title: The Passion of London [Highlander's Love #1]
description:
HIGHEST RANKING #6 in HISTORICAL FICTION!
---
For all her life, Lady Evie Verrick had been regaled of tales of the Highlands from her Highland born and bred mother. She had grown up dreaming of chivalrous knights, sword-fighting, horse back riding. Tales of kin and family, loyalty and the warmth of a home. But being brought up in a traditional English household with a traditional father, her mother was the closest thing to the Highlands she could get. And when her mother died of pneumonia before her coming out, left to her father's care, Evie wants now, more then ever, to see the promised lands that she grew up with.
  
  ---
  
  Connor Gilroy had served as the first in command to the MacKenzie clan for as long as he could remember. He owed his loyalty to his best friend and brother in arms, Hammond MacKenzie, who had saved him from being skinned alive by English soldiers years ago, before the truce was signed between the two lands. Having no love lost for the country, Hammond would be the only person who could ever convince Connor to step foot back into English lands. His chief had recently received news on the death of the aunt he has never met, but Hammond was a man of his word, and he had promised his father he would care for all kin, regardless of who they were.
  
  But Connor never would've imagined that the cousin of his best friend would be a spirit of the flames. The way Evie took on life and all of its problems with a passion that ignited a hearth, would perhaps be the first time someone ever ignited more then just passion and desire within him.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello! I've been writing for as long as I can remember, especially fanfictions. I was on winglin.net, for anyone who used to write for Asian fandoms. I then jumped to Livejournal to write for Jpop fandom (Arashi fans, yay?), before moving on to fanfiction.net. If anyone wants to know my handle there, holler! I wrote for Narnia, LOTR, Harry Potter, Pokemon, Pacific Rim, Inuyasha and more, just to name a few.

I've also been reading Historical romance for the longest time! I love them! My favorite are Highland stories, and my favorite writers are Julia Quinn, Judith McNaught and Paula Quinn. Only a few. I have lots. xD

I'll be writing mostly historical romance fiction, and I usually write series, although they can all be stand-alone's too! Do take note though that all my works are UNEDITED and I'm very well aware of my grammatical errors. I don't intend to edit them anytime soon cause writing is my hobby for now, and I don't want to turn it into a task, so I appreciate any attempts at helping me edit, but they usually just clog up my comments, so please do refrain.

That said, I do love comments and feedback regarding any characterisation, plot or any info discrepancies!

Here are my current ongoing series!

title: Unchaining Alice
description:
James Alcott has always had a talent for charming women right into his bed, a talent that he has enjoyed, along with his status of being heir to the Earldom of Ethridge. A chance encounter, however, with a woman who does not see worth in wealth of status will change his life forever. 
Alice Devereaux has been hiding for three years. She fought and survived the 1832 French Revolution and is hiding in England under a pseudonym. Her family and friends all died as criminals and if she ever returned to her native Paris then she would be slaughtered too. Her family's hatred of aristocracy has been instilled in her and she carries around the burden of both her and her people's failure to create equality. 
And then, as if God is testing her, she meets a man who holds all the qualities she was born to hate - wealth, status and arrogance. But that man is determined to succeed in winning her. So what is she to do? Succumb to his charms? Or hold true to the beliefs of her French comrades?

FAQs

1. Any advice for writing historical fiction?

Research! Research your time period, the language, the fashion, the politics, the significant events - a good way to start this is by watching movies and reading books set in the era.

2. How do you come up with your ideas?

I write books I want to read. If I'm interested in the plot, I will continue. I want to find out what happens too!

3. How do you get reads/followers?

Patience! 10 years ago I started on 0 too! I kept going, kept posting, and hoped for the best. Eventually my beautiful community found me. Yours will find you, too.

title: A Minx for the MacKenzie [Highlanders Love #2]
description:
HIGHEST RANKING #6 in HISTORICAL FICTION
---

Amhuinn Kincaid, exiled from the Kincaid Clan, has spent the last three years as an outcast among the Highlands. She lived alone with her brother Tamhas, and the two siblings rely on each other. However, when her brother ended up in trouble and captured by their former clan, Amhuinn had no other choice but to turn to the clan closest to where she and Tamhas had made their home - no other than Hammond MacKenzie, the unsmiling Laird of the MacKenzie Clan.

Hammond remembered meeting the blonde with a limp, just a year ago when he was on his way back from England. He had extended a helping hand back then, offering assistance should they ever need it. He hadn't given it much thought then, but he never expected her to turn up on his doorstep one fateful evening, firmly asking for his assistance and refusing to leave until he agreed to do so.

Complying with her requests would mean putting his clan in danger... but it appears that the MacKenzie had found one minx, he would do anything for.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello! I've been writing for as long as I can remember, especially fanfictions. I was on winglin.net, for anyone who used to write for Asian fandoms. I then jumped to Livejournal to write for Jpop fandom (Arashi fans, yay?), before moving on to fanfiction.net. If anyone wants to know my handle there, holler! I wrote for Narnia, LOTR, Harry Potter, Pokemon, Pacific Rim, Inuyasha and more, just to name a few.

I've also been reading Historical romance for the longest time! I love them! My favorite are Highland stories, and my favorite writers are Julia Quinn, Judith McNaught and Paula Quinn. Only a few. I have lots. xD

I'll be writing mostly historical romance fiction, and I usually write series, although they can all be stand-alone's too! Do take note though that all my works are UNEDITED and I'm very well aware of my grammatical errors. I don't intend to edit them anytime soon cause writing is my hobby for now, and I don't want to turn it into a task, so I appreciate any attempts at helping me edit, but they usually just clog up my comments, so please do refrain.

That said, I do love comments and feedback regarding any characterisation, plot or any info discrepancies!

Here are my current ongoing series!

title: Conqueror's Pleasure : From a King to a Concubine
description:
"Will you surrender to my desires, or will you watch your people burn?"

After a brutal war, King Arjun stood defeated before his conqueror, King Udesh. The once-mighty ruler now wore shackles, his fate hanging in the balance.

"You have two choices, King Arjun," Udesh sneered, his eyes roaming Arjun's defeated form.

"Be my Whore and save your people or watch your Kingdom get burned to Ashes"

Arjun's mind reeled as Udesh presented the cruel ultimatum.

With each passing moment, Arjun's resolve crumbled. He knew his kingdom's fate was sealed, but his own...?

"Choose wisely, King Arjun. Your kingdom's destruction or your own degradation. The choice is yours."


Would he find a way to reclaim his throne, or would he succumb to Udesh's twisted desires?

Research! Research your time period, the language, the fashion, the politics, the significant events - a good way to start this is by watching movies and reading books set in the era.

2. How do you come up with your ideas?

I write books I want to read. If I'm interested in the plot, I will continue. I want to find out what happens too!

3. How do you get reads/followers?

Patience! 10 years ago I started on 0 too! I kept going, kept posting, and hoped for the best. Eventually my beautiful community found me. Yours will find you, too.

title: The Conqueror and the Rose
description:
Roxana kept her head bowed as Alexander stepped towards the captives of war, sweeping his cloak behind him. He passed by all of the women with the indifference and sobriety that rivalled their fairness and beauty.

"The Bactrian women are eyesores," His deep, passionate voice ran out, earning the chuckles of his generals. 

That was when she realized that a pair of feet in leather soles had stopped before her. Slowly, she looked up. She saw a pair of metal greaves on strong, sturdy legs. She saw a kilt and scaled armour securely tied off at the shoulders. On the centre of his chest was engraved a sun with a face drawn on it. Then she focussed  her eyes on his chiselled jawline, then at his arrogant mouth, and then his mismatched but clear brown and blue eyes. 

Roxana's eyes widened. This was the greatest commander ever known on earth, the one who massacred thousands of citizens who revolted against him in Thebes, the one who had burned down the palace complex of Persepolis in one night, and the one who never lost a battle in his life. She wanted to look away from his intense gaze. But she lifted her chin a little higher and boldly locked her gaze with his.    

"What is your name?" He asked, his expression stone cold. She felt his hand touch a lock of her long, dark brown mane. His gaze bore into her eyes so piercingly that she decided to cast her head to the side. 

"Roxana, my lord." She replied.

"Who is your father?"

"Oxyartes, mighty warlord and nobleman of Sogdia."

"Ah, Oxyartes. I know him. I know him very well," He smiled. Then he bent down so that the tips of their noses were almost touching. She could feel his warm breath which turned into mist in the freezing winter air. Roxana shivered. 

 "Tell your father that I have come," He whispered, "And that his people are now my people."
Tous Droits Réservés

Here's a few things about me:

-I think people are really interesting. For example a person who isn't rude back when someone is rude to them but instead becomes nicer to the rude person - those kinds of people are very interesting.

Okay I can't think of anything more. Now I'm going to go and write my novel so see ya!

title: Sweet Life in the Compound in the 1970s
description:
Song You was very beautiful when she got married. She married Han Cheng, the deputy head of the group. Only after she got married did she realize how unreliable a marriage of repaying favors is. Han Cheng doesn't love her. Marriage sucks. 

After she died early, the two children were raised by the heroine, and the heroine and the couple have been promoted by Han Cheng. 

The two sons are very promising on the surface, but in fact the eldest son has dedicated his whole life to the hostess's family, and the youngest son is the permanent backup of the hostess' daughter.

 Many years later, Han Cheng, who was already in a high position, never remarried. Song You saw him solemnly salute and added the words "love of my life" on the tombstone, only to know that he loved him deeply.

 Song You was reborn, and the first thing she did was to send a telegram to Han Cheng that she and her baby were going to join the army.

title: The Soldier of Stars [1] - Band of Brothers
description:
The Soldier of Stars ~ Band of Brothers [1]

A young woman who finds peace in the stars, and let's them guide her even through the darkness that might overcome her. 

__________

Hazel Parker of the WAC, Catherine McCown of SPARs and Elizabeth Elliot of the Cadet Nurses' Corps take part in Operation Virago which will send 250 women to the front lines to fight alongside men. The government, along with the War Department and direction from General Eisenhower decide this is a secret, covert operation that the public will be shielded from, to see how integrating women into war will work. 

Each of the 250 women come with their own ambitions of what they want from war and why they signed up in the first place to be apart of this program. They become split into each of the 5 branches with leverage from each of the branch commanders, and split into groups of 2, 3, or 4 women and are placed into their different respective branches. The enlisted men of each branch, well, they do not know exactly how to approach a woman who, at the moment, has more military training and experience by the time they get placed into their positions. 

Hazel Parker, Catherine McCown and Elizabeth Elliot are placed into the 101st Airborne, the first 3 women to be apart of the Airborne. A few other women head off to the 82nd. These 3 women become part of the 506th and are put under 2nd Battalion, in Easy Company. This Company, the men in it, and the friendships and ever-lasting bonds they recreate might just change their lives, forever. 
_____

NOTE: This book will be having a Sequel called Ad Astra Per Aspera [2] - Band of Brothers!!

title: The Unknowing Heiress
description:
Maggie Swift had always known something was missing from her life. She had everything an eighteen year old aristocrat could want - a title, wealth, a good family, and an incredible friend in Max Montgomery. What could possibly be missing? 
Many do not see past the audacious and joyous personality of Maggie Swift, the outspoken American child that Nate Swift, Earl of Montrose, adopted eleven years earlier. Many do not see the fact that she has always felt like an outsider, and that she truly believes that something is missing in her life.  
But a knock on the door of Montrose Manor will change Maggie's life. It will take her across an ocean to a life she never knew. 
But what Maggie has to decide is this: Who is she? Where does she belong? Who does she belong with? And most importantly, where is home?

Patience! 10 years ago I started on 0 too! I kept going, kept posting, and hoped for the best. Eventually my beautiful community found me. Yours will find you, too.

title: In The Devil's Stables (Spirited #1)
description:
WATTYS 2016 WINNER! - Writer's Debut Category
**A Wattpad Featured story!!!**


What's a lady to do...

Lady Charlotte has never been the typical English lady. Nor does she intend to be when her uncle makes a bid to inherit everything - the land, the money. All that had been her father's a decade before. So when her uncle forces the issue, Charlotte knows her time is up. She is making her move. As the poor gentleman, Charlie. 

In two weeks' time, she plans to take control of her future while stripping her uncle of his.

When she meets her match...

Lord Greyson, the Earl of Claymore, can't seem to forget the mysterious lady he saved from being compromised, only for her to punch him in the face and descend a balcony to be rid of him.  He doesn't expect to meet her again so soon, and not like this. As a lad who looks distinctly familiar, with a sharp tongue and a spirit that demands independence.

What else is Greyson to do but watch over his little caterpillar, offering her safety and employment in his stables? It's the perfect solution. Or so he thinks. 

And finds herself falling in love...

What neither one of them expects is the sexual tension that ignites between them. What's a girl to do when she finds herself falling for her employer. And that he seems to feel the same...for his stable hand.  But that's the least of their problems as a common enemy threatens to tear them apart, one that has no intention of letting either one of them off the hook.

It's winner take all - breeches edition. And Charlie plays to win.

title: Lady Griffith's Second Chance
description:
Seven years have passed since Regan lost the love of her life. During that time, she found solace raising her three children, sequestering herself in the country and away from the talk and bustle of society. But now her eldest daughter is beginning her own search for a husband, and Regan finds herself drawn back into the public eye after so many - too many - years away.

She meets Thomas Cranmer, a young - too young - and handsome gentleman who should have his attentions focused on other women, women lacking the age and grief she earned as a widow and mother. Yet he seeks her out, winning her over with his smiles and wit, reminding her of what it is to be a woman, and a desirable one at that.

But when secrets are revealed and her respectability threatened, Regan discovers there is life beyond grief, and that perhaps it is possible to find love a second time...
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm not sure there was a time when I wasn't writing. Even though I didn't become more serious about it until I passed my teenage years, I still remember playing in my backyard as a kid, creating stories while among the trees and then rushing back in to make "books" when the sun went down and it was time to go inside.

I have a tendency to jump genres, my work spanning across young adult, historical, dystopian, romance, mystery, fantasy, and probably everything in between. I have no particular favorite that I love to read. If it's a good story, well-written, with characters and prose that draw me in, I'll be there.

I have several published works, and many more in the works. My published works are:

Knotted (young adult)
The Half Killed (historical mystery)
First Position (contemporary romance)

All three are currently available on Amazon.

Constantly moving from town to town, it was far safer than being a girl.  But when her father dies suddenly, she must pack her bags and return to England, to search for the family she has never met.  
    Hoping to find her place at last, the last thing Frances expects is that she will need to continue the masquerade -  or risk her life and her heart.
    A light-hearted regency romance.

title: Love Among the Ruins
description:
"Love Among the Ruins" is a gripping and passionate historical romance set against the backdrop of ancient Rome's decline. In a world filled with political intrigue, societal constraints, and the impending collapse of the Roman Empire, the novel weaves a tale of forbidden love, sacrifice, and resilience.

Aurelia, the spirited daughter of a noble Roman family, is caught in the turbulent currents of her time. She's a woman ahead of her era, questioning the decadence and corruption that plague Roman society. Her secret attendance at the grand Colosseum games leads to a chance encounter with Lucius, a gladiator of unmatched skill and honor. Their worlds collide, setting in motion a love story that defies the rigid social hierarchies of ancient Rome.

Aurelia's heart is torn between duty to her family and her growing affection for Lucius, a man marked as a slave. Lucius, fueled by a longing for freedom and justice, becomes embroiled in a daring plot to overthrow a tyrannical senator. As their love deepens, they must navigate the treacherous world around them, where political machinations, betrayals, and the looming threat of the empire's demise cast shadows over their forbidden romance.

Throughout the novel, Aurelia and Lucius must not only fight for their love but also grapple with their roles in a society defined by power, privilege, and oppression. Their passion serves as a beacon of hope, defying adversity and challenging societal norms.

"Love Among the Ruins" explores themes of love's indomitable power, the clash of social classes, and the enduring human spirit in the face of adversity. It delves into the complexities of relationships and the sacrifices made for the sake of love and freedom. As the Roman world crumbles around them, Aurelia and Lucius's love story unfolds, offering readers a captivating and emotional journey through a world of decadence and decay.
Tous Droits Réservés

From thrilling mysteries to heartwarming romances, I dabble in various genres. Join me on this creative journey, and let's explore new worlds and emotions through the power of words together. Connect with me, chat about books, and let's embark on a fantastic reading and writing adventure!

title: Heiress Without a Cause
description:
This is the first book in the Muses of Mayfair series, which features a group of women with secret artistic passions as they find love and friendship in Regency England. "Heiress Without a Cause" stars a spinster with a penchant for the stage and a duke whose dark past could ruin them both. I hope you enjoy reading it as much as I enjoyed writing it!

More info from the back cover:

One title to change his life... 

A disgraced son with a dark reputation, William “Ferguson” Avenel is content to live in exile – until his father dies in the scandal of the Season. With rumors of insanity swirling around them, his sisters desperately need a chaperone. Ferguson thinks he’s found the most proper woman in England – and he won’t ruin her, even if he secretly desires the passionate woman trapped beneath a spinster’s cap. 

One chance to break the rules... 

Lady Madeleine Vaillant can’t face her blighted future without making one glorious memory for herself. In disguise, on a London stage, she finds all the adoration she never felt from the ton. But when she’s nearly recognized, she will do anything to hide her identity – even setting up her actress persona as Ferguson’s mistress. She’ll take the pleasure he offers, but Madeleine won’t lose her heart in the bargain. 

One season to fall in love... 

Every stolen kiss could lead to discovery, and Ferguson’s old enemies are determined to ruin them both. But as their dangerous passion ignites their hearts and threatens their futures, how can an heiress who dreams of freedom deny the duke who demands her love? 

----

This book has been posted in its entirety as of 21 September 2015! If you want to follow the adventures of the other Muses of Mayfair after you finish this book, you can find more information about other books in the series at www.sararamsey.com/where-to-buy.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a Regency romance novelist with great taste in Champagne and bad taste in movies. I live in San Francisco, but I left my heart in Iowa.

My first novel, HEIRESS WITHOUT A CAUSE, is available on Wattpad. The rest of the Muses of Mayfair series, as well as my latest release (DUKE OF THORNS), are available for purchase at most major ebook retailers. To find them, please visit www.sararamsey.com/where-to-buy.

Sir Rob is just a nickname given to me by my inventive readers because of my passion for writing historical stories (featuring feisty ladies, fearless knights, adventure, romance and a healthy dose of humor!)

In real life I'm not a brave knight, but a humble aspiring author and historian from the sunny South of Germany, where I live among the cows, spaetzels and swabians. Despite not being a native English speaker, I try to write English stories because I simply LOVE the language. I appreciate any feedback, since I'm trying to improve! :-)

The funny brown thing on my profile picture is a helmet I wear 24/7, not because I'm a cycling enthusiast, but to protect my literary skull in which a rather important bone has been missing from birth :-)

title: EMPRESS LIU
description:
When Liu Changsheng came into the Emperor's household marrying the fourth Prince he had no ambition at all. He was just a fool in love. He was assaulted, betrayed, taken advantage of and then thrown to the side after used up. And died like a nobody. On the brink of death he got back to his senses.

But when he wakes up again he was back in his maternal house injured from a bandit attack.

Life has given him a second chance and he'll use it wisely. He'll never involve himself with the emperor's family ever again. This time he won't be a fool in love. He won't let his family die in vain.

But how?

By marrying the small village merchant's daughter. And living a life away from the eyes of anyone.

But fate always has a way to ruin our plans.

In other words, a story of court politics, betrayal and deaths, but on the end of it all, love.

title: The King's Artist
description:
After being ignored for years by the small town she grew up in, Adelaide decides it's time to start fresh somewhere else as someone else. Fed up with the limitations that being a girl bring, she decides to take up the guise of a man in hopes of increasing her success as an artist. However, her plans get deterred when Adelaide accidentally becomes a stowaway on Henry Tudor's ships. Before Adelaide can fully grasp her situation, she's pulled into a world of feuding families where a generational war rages to determine the next King of England. 

XXX

A historical fiction romance story centered around England during the late 1400s. It [loosely] follows the story of Henry Tudor and the War of the Roses as the royal houses of Lancaster and York fight to claim the throne.

Written May 14, 2018 - April 22, 2020 
120,000 - 130,000 words

Working on edits now

title: Catarina and The Prince | Tales From The Court Of Ravaeryn #1
description:
It is the season for love and murder in the court of Ravaeryn.

After a chance encounter one winter night, Lady Catarina de Fontaine had fallen hopelessly in love with Julian, the Crown Prince. However, upon discovering his untruthfulness, she immediately guarded her heart against him and rejected his advances for years.

While it might seem like their romance would end right there, never blooming into fruition, fate had a different plan for them.

Upon turning seventeen, Catarina was summoned to the palace to partake in The Choosing Ceremony, in which seven young ladies from the noble houses of Ravaeryn are selected, and the Prince would marry the one that he chooses.

As the race for power and wealth runs its course, friend turns to foe, and blood is shed. Will they rekindle their romance, or will they part ways forever?

title: A CHRISTMAS WISH
description:
"I want my very own castle; I want tons of servants and men throwing themselves at my feet. I want to be pampered and rich. I want my own bloody fairy tale!" 

Unfortunately even wishes never went smoothly for Sarah. 

Instead of getting her happily ever after Sarah was unceremoniously dumped into a world that was both completely alien and chock full of intrigue and peril as well. She got the castle and servants all right but she also got plenty more that wasn't listed in the programme. 

Now all she could do was bide her time and pray for a way out of the mess before it was too late.

Iain McLaughlin swore he'd never marry an Englishwoman. 

Infamous as the Black Wolf of the Highlands the gruff warrior was used to having everything his own way. But circumstances had a way of changing in the blink of an eye. Even a great laird isn't immune to the dictates of fate. 

So now he had no choice but to ride forth and claim his prize, whether he wants it or not however is another matter entirely.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, basically i love to write romance fiction particularly the historical romance genre. I don't know why that kind of stuff has always interested me but it has. I guess my writing is somewhat inspired by my favourite romantic authors like Judith Mcnaught, Jude Deveraux and Julie Garwood. I also like Johanna Lindsey(But not always) and Amanda quick.

Apart from romance i also love to read horror stuff especially by Stephen King. I have read almost all of his books and loved them all. I also love to read classical literature; I have read many of Shakespeare's plays and most of the work done by Charles Dickens, the Bronte sisters etc. Maybe that's why my writing style is different to most romance writers. I think I do possess a unique ability and a distinct voice. I hate tooting my own horn but I do believe I am an above average writer.

My biggest weakness is an inability to stay interested in one story for too long although I have as of late been able to conquer that failing somewhat.

P.S I am a guy living in London and I like writing Romance and no I am NOT Gay lol :)

p.s.s O.K one more thing, i am happy to read any novel but remember i dont like first person pov's, ive tried but i just cant. for me it's alot less effective as a story telling technique.

title: Under His Watch {16th Century Valois-Orléans-Angoulême Romance]
description:
Mistress Jacqueline DeWhite is married off to Lord Dominic DeFleur. She is not told anything and is expected to obey her husband without question. It starts negatively as most religious marriages do, and his cold demeanour and sexist views strain their relationship. The swordsman and personal favourite, of King Francis the First, Dominic has a lifestyle both lavish but lonely and as both as stubborn as they are can they become the couple they both wished they were?

Rough Draft. Feedback is appreciated. Will edit Summer 2016.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Forewarning: I love talking and I think my intro shows that. Sorry!

I started writing in May 2011, after fruitlessly pursuing other past times. But, writing has become a release, a love and an art to me. I hope to one day write a historical fiction novel which makes wider audiences think beyond their own problems because there are so many. I hope to do this with relatable characters, fascinating eras in history and a little bit of luck.

I keep my cringe earlier works because it shows where I started from. My readers feed my writing soul. I thank every one of you. My pledge from 2016 is I will read and cherish and reply to every comment and vote. Apart from that, I'd say my books reflect my growth as a writer and there's not much else for me to say...

Regarding reading requests: I adore undiscovered literature/ authors so I will take requests but I might take a day or two. Also just message and say hi.

Outside writing, I'm a second year medical student :) Medical doctor in 2021 if all goes well!

Yours,

Meepy ©

title: Love Her Softly
description:
The last thing Liam Mcyntire expected to find in his barn one cold February morning, was a half-starved , frozen-solid woman. She's covered in bruises and full of mistrust and suspicions. He'd been perfectly content in his bachelor life of trapping critters, selling furs and living in solitude but this mysterious woman might just change all that. 
  
  Emma Hawke was running. Running from her father, from the damage the man had done. Running from a life she didn't want--a life no different from the one that had killed her mother. She's never been off the mountain. She trusts nothing and no one--not even the man who saved her life by bringing her out of the cold. 
  
  If Liam's going to win her heart, he's going to have to learn patience and how to truly care for someone more than he does himself. He'll have to love her softly. 
  
  Can Emma overcome her past? Can she learn to trust--possibly even love--despite the fear that she holds of men and of marriage? Or will her past track her down and destroy any hope she has for a future?

title: Meenakshi
description:
"Do you know, Guruma told me how much she likes me being there." Thirteen year old Meenakshi spoke about her new life.

"She is absolutely right. Having you around is like having our blessings around." Chitrama said, as she slowly massaged her bruised arms. "Who would not like you?" She asked, her question rhetorical.

"My parents." Meenakshi whispered, making Chitrama look at her. She smiled softly at her, as she saw the little girl becoming a woman.

"Does you feet not hurt you?" She asked diverting her attention. They were bruised from walking  on the rocks and climbing trees.

"No ma. I am used to the pain." Meenakshi said, making Chitrama's heart weep.

"One day, you shall be cherished dear, so much that all this pain will be worth it." She said, caressing her soles, before she bandaged them.

"I don't have any such expectations ma. And I don't wish to." She said, before she walked to the bathing area.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The little pharmacy in troubled times
description:
Tang Lejun, a post-apocalyptic woman nicknamed "Poison Doctor", once passed through the books and became the green tea heroine in the book.
The original person was full of tea fragrance and acted sinisterly. He was kicked out by the heroine of the original book and returned to his hometown in the countryside.
Tang Lejun took inventory of his family's assets: an old house, an acre of land, a medicine shop, and several taels of silver.
She smiled. She had the wood power, herbal medicines were planted, and medicine shops were opened. Whoever wanted to do it would do it in the control group, but she didn't do it anyway.
*
New rules for drug stores: 1. The medicine is good; 2. The price is expensive; 3. The poison is not suitable, and the medicine of tiger and wolf is not suitable.
When the shop just opened, the heroine of the original book publicly announced that she had driven Tang Lejun and her brother out of the Tang Clan, and that the Tang Clan would not bear any consequences for the drug store.
Tang Leyun happily accepted, so that his family would not have to bear any responsibility to the Tang Clan.
Three months later, the drug store became famous and the rich and powerful came in droves.
The heroine of the original book also came. Not only did she want to seek medicine for her grandmother, she also wanted to recruit Tang Lejun to her army.
Tang Lejun sneered: Who do you think you are?
The heroine of the original book said: You will regret it!
In the original book, the yandere male protagonist who was supposed to be asking for what the heroine in the original book didn't want said, "Get out!"

description:
𝘼𝙨 𝙂𝙤𝙙-𝙨𝙚𝙣𝙩 𝙖𝙨 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙖𝙧𝙚, 𝙄'𝙢 𝙝𝙖𝙫𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙩𝙧𝙤𝙪𝙗𝙡𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙞𝙚𝙫𝙞𝙣𝙜...𝙔𝙤𝙪 𝙬𝙚𝙧𝙚 𝙨𝙚𝙣𝙩 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙢𝙚."




(っ◔◡◔)っ ♥ Context that no one reads♥
The five Arthurian Romances by Chrétien de Troyes is all about romance defying social construct. A chivalry, courageous and honourable type, conveying courtly love and national unity. I had only found out about this poetry book very late but coincidentally it complimented the story brilliantly, so I have featured it in this piece. I decided to name this book after all five novels, calling this the 6th Arthurian Romances, as it is also set in that time. Essentially, it is about love between two different classes. As you know they took King's bloodlines very seriously as well as the hierarchy in the 12th century. But what if this king, like the Knight of Lion and the Knight of Cart, followed their hearts rather than society?

Never written a historical book before so please 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐝 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐚 𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐬𝐚𝐥𝐭 :)

Based on:
-Movie: The Kingdom of Heaven (2005)
-Historical figure: King Baldwin IV of Jerusalem (1161-1185)

Includes:
-The Arthurian Romances by Chrétien de Troyes (1130-1190)

Started: 30th December 2023
Ended: 19th February 2024

authorBio:
28. Australian. I write books I want to read.

~~

Advertising is immediately deleted. It's rude to use people to boost yourself.

I'm sorry, I don't do reading requests. I don't have time and I feel so bad saying no!

Uploads every Saturday night AEST.

Follow me on Instagram: @littlelo62

~~

FAQs

1. Any advice for writing historical fiction?

Research! Research your time period, the language, the fashion, the politics, the significant events - a good way to start this is by watching movies and reading books set in the era.

2. How do you come up with your ideas?

I write books I want to read. If I'm interested in the plot, I will continue. I want to find out what happens too!

3. How do you get reads/followers?

Patience! 10 years ago I started on 0 too! I kept going, kept posting, and hoped for the best. Eventually my beautiful community found me. Yours will find you, too.

I'm sorry, I don't do reading requests. I don't have time and I feel so bad saying no!

Uploads every Saturday night AEST.

Follow me on Instagram: @littlelo62

~~

FAQs

1. Any advice for writing historical fiction?

Research! Research your time period, the language, the fashion, the politics, the significant events - a good way to start this is by watching movies and reading books set in the era.

2. How do you come up with your ideas?

I write books I want to read. If I'm interested in the plot, I will continue. I want to find out what happens too!

3. How do you get reads/followers?

Patience! 10 years ago I started on 0 too! I kept going, kept posting, and hoped for the best. Eventually my beautiful community found me. Yours will find you, too.

title: A Viking's Rage
description:
[2018 Watty's Shortlist] In a brutal world ruled by cruelty and power, Aiya is nothing more than a slave-her life defined by servitude and pain. But when her ruthless Lord betrays her and Northumbria falls under siege by Norse invaders, Aiya's life is shattered once again. Captured by the fierce warriors from across the sea, she is thrust into a harrowing journey that will test her resilience, force her to face unimaginable cruelty, and confront a destiny she never believed possible.

Ragda, the rightful son of the Jarl Lowzow, and his volatile half-brother Dagr lead their warriors on a raid destined to glorify their names. Confident in the favor of their gods, they're unprepared for the chaos that follows when they encounter the fiery slave girl who challenges everything they thought they knew.

A gripping tale of fate, revenge, and an unlikely spark of love that could either save them... or destroy them.

[A FORMER WATTPAD FEATURED STORY]

title: The Blue Hour
description:
Inspired by true events, 'The Blue Hour' is a story of political intrigue and doomed love set in the dying days of the Ottoman Empire during the summer of 1876. All Prince Hamid and the Belgian glove-maker, Flora Cordier, want is to pursue their forbidden love. But how can they amid backroom dealings, deadly conspiracies, and when an ominous prophecy seals Hamid's fate as the saviour of the Empire? 

*****

It's the summer of 1876, and rebellion, corruption, famine, and the impending threat of war plague the Ottoman Empire. As European powers circle like vultures for spoils, the century-old dynasty fears Allah has abandoned it. Presiding over the decline is the deranged Sultan Abdulaziz.
A prophecy emerges that Hamid, second heir to the throne, will ascend to sultan-hood by summer's end. Fearing for his life and haunted by an inner darkness, he flees the palace. Meanwhile, Hamid's step-mother Peresto, and his enigmatic tutor, Reshid, conspire to fulfil the prophecy by betraying the Sultan and Hamid's step-brother, Crown Prince Murad.
Intoxicated by love and freedom, Hamid pursues a secret affair with Flora Cordier, about to marry a man she does not love to escape her past. Over a few passionate summer months, they fight for their forbidden love to become the persons they dream of being, in defiance of society and of the powerful forces of history that conspire to drive them apart.
Intimate and intensely atmospheric, 'The Blue Hour' encapsulates eternal themes of love, power, and the struggle for freedom. Blending the epic romance of 'Doctor Zhivago' with the rich historical detail and political intrigue of a Jason Goodwin novel, it is entertaining and vividly immersive, with deep emotional resonance.

COMPLETED.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Heart of a King (The Nine Realms #2)
description:
At war with a common enemy, alliances had to be formed. And so King Dimitrios Xanthe of the Wolfen blood-bonded Princess Ailara Davriel of the Vampyr. Along with it was a promise that when the two come of age, the two kingdoms will become one. 

Until something went horribly wrong... 

The alliance was broken with the death of several royals. One kingdom was hunted and killed almost to the point of extinction. Ailara vanished without a trace. 

Until almost a century later and their paths cross again.

Finally, Dimitri will have his revenge. He'd keep her by his side so he can make her watch as he destroys what's left of her kingdom and then kill her himself. But along the way, he discovers something else... The call of the mate bond is much stronger and she stirs feelings in him that he's never felt before. 

Will the two rulers be able to reunite Xathos and vanquish the enemy? Or will they fall prey to chaos and destroy the Golden Dynasty Aiken and Selene worked so hard for? 

Only one thing is for sure: The key to saving or destroying Xathos lies within the heart of a king.

title: The Princes of Ayodhya-The Ramayan Through Short Stories
description:
Ancient India. Approximately 7 thousand years ago. The Kingdom of Kosala.

A dutiful crown prince exiled from his kingdom for fourteen years. A loving wife who follows him, and is captured. A demon king who threatens the entire mortal population of the world. 

Ram, the eldest of the four princes of Ayodhya, is known to be righteous, good, and an eternal follower of justice and law. Beloved by all in his home state of Kosala and beyond, he defeats thousands of demons even in his teenage years, fabled as an undefeatable, almost Godly hero. His marries the beautiful Sita, and is all set to be crowned king.

Then, the unthinkable happens. He's sentenced to 14 years of exile. Followed by his loyal wife and a brother who would sacrifice his life for him, Ram makes his way into the Chitrakut forest near his home city, and makes a life there killing demons, gathering berries, and blissfully awaiting for his exile to finish. 

When his wife is kidnapped and kept prisoner in the land of Lanka by a lustful demon king  named Ravan whose devilish exploits litter the pages of books and haunt children's nightmares, Ram has to follow a track, make allies, and find friends in the world of terror.  Ram has to wage a war against a king who has never lost. Ram has to reclaim his wife and be crowned the king of Ayodhya without losing himself.

This tale navigates a life before exile, a life throughout exile, and a life after the exile which redefined the word 'hardship', tested relationships, lives, and strength. 

This is the story of the Ramayan.

(Warning-This story is very funny and really not as serious as the description)

title: Forbidden Love
description:
"Do you love me?" She asked with her devious smile.

"I don't know." I answered quietly.

She walked closer to me causing me to back up. When my back hit the wall, I looked away from her. Her hand lifted my chin, forcing me to look at her. 

"Then why do you look at me like you want more hm?" She whispered in my ear sending chills throughout my body.

Seraphine is in an arranged marriage. Sure it upset her, but when she met the guy, she thought maybe she could be happy with him. At least that's what she thought before she met his sister.

(Going through editing process)

title: Nartaki~ A Fragmented Love Story
description:
She is a royal court dancer and he is an imperial prince. Both are poles apart where she is calm as a ocean he is fierce like fire, where she is a innocent soul ,he is a devil in disguise. But some circumstances in their life brought them closer to each other. Both of them madly in love until the truth came out. The very heartbreaking and the only truth that broke them apart. She made that decision and he suffered. When everything was falling apart for him she was not there and now he seeks for revenge. His absolute revenge from her. But after five years when he sees her again he was not even capable of blinking his eye. He stood there and watched her...................destroy.  

How did she go from this innocent soul to this ruthless and merciless killer. How did he change from so fierce to so calm. And as I always say time is the game changer. I KayaWrites1 is representing you the fantasy world's new, ravishing yet an ugly side of love. Stay tuned for more chapters and enjoy.

title: The Lady Who Stayed
description:
When Mary is caught in a scandal with one of the most notorious rakes in town, she believes the only solution to the grave trouble for her dangerous secrets is a wedding. What she didn't account for was her heart--and his.

***

Adrien Haverston is a rake caught in his own trap after a seduction goes wrong. One great scandal and a bitter wedding later, he is one angry husband to Mary Featherton. But despite his vow to make her suffer for shackling him to a life he has avoided ever since, he begins to realize that the burning attraction that brought them together in the first place might just lead to something promising. But falling in love with his wife may not be as easy as he first thought, because as Adrien peels off every charming and beautiful facet of Mary, he also discovers dark and dangerous secrets--one of which has the potential to shatter him.

title: The Duke who caught my eye
description:
Leonard Fox, the Duke of Montrose-handsome as the very devil and a physician by profession was very content with his less than normal life. But then his best friend dies, leaving his four year old daughter under Leo's guardianship. Leo loves the girl, no doubt. But that didn't mean he knew how to raise her. So he ends up in London in search of a wife. 

              
Meanwhile, Lady Clara Fethuerington is busy flitting from one ball to another desperately looking for the right man and reluctant to put herself out there at the same time. Unbeknownst to anyone, Clara is a famous novelist and has made fun of almost every single obnoxious member of the ton. If her secret got out, she'd be ruined. Will any man in his right man want her as his wife? Clara has no idea of what's in store for her. Let's find out..

title: Shut Up, Cinderella
description:
A grumpy boy Cinderella and a childish prince-what could possibly go wrong?!

Cinder is a young shoemaker who just wants to do his job. The only one to support his irresponsible stepmother and stepsisters, the last thing on his mind is the prince's ball. He'd much rather stay home alone and clean...too bad his fairy godmother has other plans and drags him to the ball against his will!

It's love at first sight-for Gem, the prince. Cinder just hopes to never see the obnoxious guy again. Too bad Gem is such a hopeless romantic that he searches the entire country for his mysterious guest...and winds up enlisting Cinder's help as a shoemaker to find the owner of the one shoe he kept from his crush?

The pay is good, but for how long can Cinder hide his identity while pretending to help the bratty Gem? And what happens when the two start finding common ground after all? At this rate it won't be long until Cinder is hard pressed for his sanity...

title: Ad Astra Per Aspera [2] - Band of Brothers
description:
Ad Astra Per Aspera is the sequel to The Soldier of Stars.
-----------

Waking up disoriented and inside a hospital, that has the dingy army issued light bulbs, the rough cots and the smell of despair is not how Hazel thought her new year would start, especially with the pulsing wound that lies in her side. Hazel Parker, severely injured and mentally unstable, lies in wait at a field hospital, as Easy Company continues to battle the tortures of the war. 

Catherine McCown, Elizabeth Elliot and Easy Company, are struggling, especially after the major losses of Bill Guanere and Joe Toye or others like Donald Hoobler and especially Skip Muck and Alex Penkala and most importantly, the tiny sniper Hazel Parker. Each loss pushed Easy into a darker time, a darker reality that they would ultimately have to face if they were to make the attack on Foy. 

They know the war is coming to a close soon, it has to be, but with the current loses and the shine of hope that is slowly dwindling, Easy barely stays afloat as they manage to fend off the town of Foy and proceed to Alsace, France. 

Through the ups and downs of the ending of the war Ad Astra Per Aspera follows Easy's ending to the war as well as Hazel's undying story of love and war, as well as the thoughts of the stars and the will to keep fighting even if you're hurting.

title: LEGACY ||Indian Historical Fiction||
description:
||PART- 2- REGAL DUOLOGY||
(Can be read as a standalone)

Darsh, the most illustrious son of Ashokdhar, is kind, loving, caring and simply just too good to be the Yuvraj. So, he's all set to become the king. He had his priorities set straight, the kingdom and the one to be his Queen...

Chavi was the Queen in mind. She was "illiterate" as they called her. She was raised solely in the woods by the former Queen of Ashokdhar and knew better than to get constrained by the way of royalty. She was a free spirit and she hoped to remain that way.

The two however, lose their senses falling for each other to the point where being apart feels hazardous. When Darsh finally decided to make her the Queen, Chavi flees, out of sheer fear and hatred towards the royal lifestyle.

Join this journey, of star-crossed lovers, rediscovering themselves while fighting against betrayals, families, wars, treasons and most importantly...distance.

title: A Desert Rose (editing)
description:
13th century- The Middle East.

In the heart of the Arabian desert, Princess Laila of Al-Shujae tribe faces an impossible choice to save her people from an ongoing siege. To secure peace, Laila agrees to marry the fearsome commander of Al-Muharibun. Usman, a heartless warrior. Could a bond born from hatred possibly flourish? Usman holds his loyalty to his sultan whilst Laila holds hers to her father yet, they form an unexplainable connection. Both bound by duty, both too stubborn to concede. 

Whilst navigating life in an enemy territory, Laila discovers the sinister secret
behind her lineage and marriage. A sheltered princess now carries the fate of two tribes. The conniving Sultan of Al-Muharibun wishes for war, and he will stop at nothing to succeed.

title: 70's Prosperous Little Days
description:
七零红火小日子

As the only girl of the three generations of the Gu family, Gu Qingqing has been the baby bump of grandpa and grandma since she was a child.

 Dad is the captain of the production team, my second uncle is a well-known carpenter in ten miles and eight towns, my third uncle is a chef in a state-run restaurant, and my fourth uncle... Fourth uncle has a sharp mouth and good looks. There are many cousins in the family, and my two older brothers are both in the army, and my childhood is booming. 

One day, her second brother in the Construction Corps sent her a letter, in addition to food stamps and distribution allowances, there was also a photo. 

The man in military uniform with sword-like eyebrows and star-eyed eyes looked like he had left her air force pilot elder brother by how many blocks. 

Gu Qingqing immediately decided to visit relatives! Go Corps! ! Must get married! ! ! Even if she is soft and hard, she has to ask her second brother to draw a red line for this marriage for her.

 Many years later, two handsome young men from the Chu family asked their grandpa: "How did you know grandma back then?"

 Chu Dai held back a smile: "... Back then, your grandma only saw a photo of me, and she never traveled far away. She, who sat alone on the green leather train for a day and a night to go north, lied on your second uncle and grandpa and said that she was here to find a partner."

title: Mysterious Seduction
description:
SHE IS CONFLICTED...
Emma Everard has said yes to marrying  Samuel Theobald, a dear friend of hers. Emma cannot find a single fault in her decision, but she also has trouble recognizing if it is the correct one, especially when someone else comes along to pique her interest, both intellectually and physically, as he exposes her into a completely different world in the Town she has never seen before.
HE WANTS IT ALL...
Samuel Theobald has always been in love with the beautiful, intelligent and opinionated Emma Everard. And now that she has said yes, he cannot be happier. The Town loves him for his bold articles and he revels at the freedom the pen provides, but trouble and intrigue will soon make him face choices that may change the course of his career forever.
THE INTRUDER...
For Wynne Hastings, getting close to Emma Everard is beyond knowing more about his friend's future wife. He is on a mission to shake the Everards and those they protect. Wynne is quite willing to do anything to get closer to Emma and the secrets of the Everards, even if it meant seducing her and losing his best friend. But there is one thing Wynne does not know: Emma Everard is on to him and she is ready.
THE WINNER TAKES IT ALL...
In the end, it is a battle of good and evil; of wits and tricks; and of loyalty, ambition and love. 

Still set in the fictional place of the Town, this final book in the Everard Family series follows one man obsessed to push society to fight while struggling to keep those he loves, another man who slowly falls for the wrong woman his family wants to ruin, and the heroine who happens to be in the middle of a silent, brewing war against herself, the man she adores, and the one she is fighting not to love.

[This story is a standalone title in the Everard Family series]
[This is a FREE book with PAID exclusive chapters]

title: How To Be A Queen (Myths Finding Love #1)
description:
Aerith always believed she was an ordinary mortal-clumsy, geeky, and completely out of place in the world. But on the eve of her 18th birthday, she discovers a shocking truth: she's no ordinary girl, but the long-lost daughter of the Fates, destined to rule the Underworld as Hades' queen.

Thrown into the realm of gods and monsters, Aerith must learn to navigate her new life among immortal beings, where loyalty and power shift like the winds. Tutored by gods, pursued by ancient rivalries, and bound to Hades-a brooding, powerful god who's been waiting for her for centuries-Aerith faces the daunting challenge of learning how to rule an entire realm while still figuring out how to be herself.

Can she rise to the challenge of ruling alongside the enigmatic Hades, or will the forces that oppose her destiny tear their fated union apart? With humor, heart, and a touch of magic, Aerith must learn the ropes of royalty and love in a world where even the gods themselves play by their own rules.

How to be a Queen is a fun and fresh take on Greek mythology, blending romance, adventure, and self-discovery into an unforgettable journey through the immortal world.

title: The Steward of Blackwood Hall
description:
Despite living thirty miles from London, Anabelle Latimer knows her chances of finding a husband in their sleepy village are as thin as cook's white soup. Then she discovers a kindred spirit in Mr. Fielding, the intelligent and handsome new steward from Blackwood Hall. It was a great shame that his position in life was so below her own, for he was exactly the sort of man she would have wished to marry.

Anthony Fielding, tired of being the target of the ton's marriage-minded mothers, hopes to spend a relaxing week shooting and fishing in the country. Yet upon his arrival at Blackwood Hall he discovers an estate in chaos, and a friend in desperate need of help. He is quick to offer his knowledge and expertise, unaware that his generosity will have unexpected repercussions.

The Steward of Blackwell Hall is a traditional Regency romance of approximately 66,000 words.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a hobby writer who likes to share my stories with readers. I write mostly for fun, and I prefer the soppy romantic stuff with a smidgen of conflict and a guaranteed happy ending. I write the kind of stories I like to read, and hope others like them too.

When I read, it's mostly romance, historical fiction or occasionally a bit of fantasy. Some of my favourite authors are Jane Austen, Georgette Heyer, Dorothy L. Sayers, Terry Pratchett, Dorothy Dunnett, Julia Quinn and Raymond E. Feist. I love watching period dramas, TV archaeology, history documentaries and cooking programmes.

My area of special historic interest is Britain in the early 19th century. I particularly love the English Regency period: the manners, the clothes, and how different the world was then to the way it is today.

Thank you, Wattpad, for including "Eternal Flame" in the Featured Stories list between March 2015 and July 2017.

title: The Genius Doctor and Poisonous Concubine are not easy to provoke

She waved her flag at the head of the bed: "One, two, three, four, two, two, three, four, change the position, come again." Want to humiliate her, she disgusted him not to lift. The cold king threatened her, "If you want this king to keep you, you should be honest and obedient." She laughed, "Your Majesty, I have asked the emperor for a divorce and found a good father for the child, so don't worry." See how the ugly girl transforms into a beautiful genius doctor and amazes the world.

A Little Bit About Me:
My name is Emily but everyone calls me Emmy(hence the username.)  Being near mountains some of my favourite (outdoor) activities are biking, hiking, and skiing. Besides reading and writing, I love painting, drawing, and cooking. 
         I have always told stories for friends and family but I began putting them into the written word in second grade. I've always had an interest in history, space,music, and psychology (I know I'm a geek.) I can go from extremely talkative and bubbly to antisocial and ridiculously philosophical. Nothing makes me happier than sharing my ideas and stories with people. I one day hope to travel the world as much as I can and maybe write stories about where I have been. I want to experience as much as I can in my life and see everything I have read about and seen pictures of for myself.
            If you made it through this probably boring About Me then welcome to my profile! I hope you enjoy my story as much as I like writing them! Please give me your feedback if you have any! Thank you for reading this!

title: Mr.Pelton and His Five Children
description:
General Richard Pelton has lost his wife to illness a little over two years ago and ever since then, he's been looking for a nanny to help take care of his kids. But every new nanny he brings in manages to get chased out by his children. Will they warm up to Annabel? Their new nanny? Or will she too not be able to handle the stress of living in a mansion with five children of different ages while having to do house chores and growing feelings for her boss, Mr.Pelton? Will he be able to keep things professional with his childrens nanny and set his feelings aside or will he act upon his desires?

This book is set in an olden era, I'm thinking the 1950's.  It's set in England, but I'm going to use the dollar currency and yes, they all have accents. So, mama and papa are pronounced ma𝑚𝑎 and pa𝑝𝑎, you get me?

title: Loving Eleanor(BWWM)
description:

This is Loving Eleanor.

title: The Fearless Princess (Forgotten Royals)
description:
The namesake of a murderous queen, Princess Isabella is torn between running from the bloody legacy or following the path of a woman who fought all the rules. Devoted to her family, Isabella's father arranges her marriage to a young man far from her home. Though she wants to help her father's ambitions, she knows this is the wrong choice for her. After defying her family, Isabella decides she would rather remain alone for the rest of her life. Then an enemy is thrown into her life and she makes a decision that could destroy everything for her.

But like her family, Isabella never fights a war that she won't win.

title: Marring The Duke Of Katan
description:
I was betrayed by my lover and even lost my child, so I was given a second chance.

'I'll pay back everything.'

I will send my deceitful lover and his mistress into the deepest hell.

My kind husband, who foolishly put up with me even though I only took advantage of him. I will only let him walk on a flowery path.

When did it start?

When did everything start to get messed up?

"Please, be happy with your loved one."

"Wife, are you saying that you want me to meet another woman?"

"Queen, I won't say I like you anymore, so don't run away from me."

Even the greatest assassin in the empire, who only cares about his interest, was clinging into me.

'What's wrong with everyone! I want to run away to another country and lead a peaceful life!'

Will I be able to escape safely?

title: A Lady unlike any other (four hoydens #1)
description:
HIGHEST RANKING #1 in historical fiction. 

Rosalyn is living her life. She's reckless, stubborn, unladylike and all the other things a Lady isn't supposed to be. In short, she's the bane of her brother, the Earl of Morley's existence. 

Theo is more than satisfied with life. Women fawn over him, he's rich and he isn't aimless like most of the gentlemen of his acquaintance. 

He loves horses and so does she. He needs to marry and so does she. But do they want to marry each other? Not so much. 

Read more to find out what happens when a consummate rake-Lord Theodore Fortescue and an adventurous hoyden-Lady Rosalyn Orford find themselves entangled in a not so ordinary friendship topped off with an inconvenient attraction towards each other. Will they find love or will their circumstances tear them apart? 


If you're goofy, unladylike and reckless, I'm sure you will be able to relate to Rosalyn :D

description:

It's the year 1485 and King Richard III has been slain at the battle of Bosworth along with his beloved wife and Queen, Marian of Lancaster. Their eldest daughter, Lisbet, is given little time to grieve and is forced to watch as her brothers flee into exile and her world crumbles around her. 

Taken to the new Tudor court, Lisbet and her siblings are declared bastards and must now rely on themselves, each other and the last true Yorkists to protect them or face potential doom. 

With plots, intrigue, rumours and lies all around, with this York Princess be able to find herself amidst all the blood and tears and find the will to fight back? Or will she let fate claim her as another victim...

title: Lost in the Castle
description:
THE AMBY AWARDS 2022 WINNER (Best Series)

Book One 
(Book Three of the trilogy is on the WATTYS 2022 SHORTLIST)

Wattpad featured story.

The Adept Pen 21 finalist.

Samara, a young woman from London, visits Bran Castle in Romania during a Halloween night.
 
Somehow, she's always felt drawn to the story of Vlad the Impaler, the historical character who allegedly inspired the writer, Bram Stoker, to write his Count Dracula.

Annoyed by her noisy friends, she strolls behind her group when they enter the castle and thus gets approached by their tall dark and handsome guide. Samara can't fight the attraction she feels for him, even after he claims to be Vlad Dracul himself, obviously making fun of her...or?

At the end of the tour, unable to resist her curiosity, she follows the guide through a dark corridor and time travels to another time,
a late medieval world populated by very unusual vampires, where she had once belonged. 

The mysterious guide turns out to be her husband, none less than Vlad III, the Prince of Wallachia, the Impaler... Dracula.

Samara's memories start to trickle back slowly, both good and bad. The man she loves so much that she feels overcome by her feelings for him is not exactly as he was when she left him before, when she... died. A lot of things have changed in her absence, in six hundred years.

But she is changed too, having grown up in the 21st century this time around, she is not quite the same girl as when she lived in Vlad's castle, in the late medievals.

Will the great love they feel for each other despite their long separation be strong enough to overcome all their differences? Will Samara and Vlad accept each other as they are now and fight for their love? Will they defend it in the dangerous world they live in, full of people, or better vampires, who would rather see them apart? In this place where nothing and no one is what they really seem to be at first sight?

Cover: @WakeWriteWrath

title: His Harem, his women and his WOMAN
description:
Through times we have heard unconventional love stories, there was 'Layla and Majnu' 'Romeo and Juliet' 'Jodha and Akbar' 'Shah Jahan and Mumtaz Mahal' 'Chun Hyang and Mongryong' and most recently the love story between 'Rose and Jack' of the Titanic. 



In the midst of all these names is a forgotten love story that transcend all boundaries. It went beyond religion, class, and revenge. It went beyond stereotypes. 



This is the story of a young prince who fell in love with a spirited young noble girl. They were merely thirteen and fourteen years of age. He hid his true identity and she did the same. Everything about her drew him in. Whether it's her stubbornness, her caring attitude and most of all her beauty was something to behold.



Due to unforeseen circumstances they were torn apart. She couldn't let go and he hasn't let go. Too many clashes of interest and way too many wanted them apart. Together they will conquer the world but separately they will bring destruction to the world.



The fight and struggle for the Emperor's heart, the dismal women who will do anything to gain that all elusive power. One woman though was destined for it all. And she's all he yearns for.

A Persian tale set during the sixteenth century.

title: A Gilded Cage | Tales From The Court of Ravaeryn
description:
Between love and obligation, whichever shall she choose?

...

Eleanora Finley's story begins in 1705, adversity weaving its intricate threads with a cruel hand. Her father's tragic demise in flames left her adrift, ensnared by a mother whose iron grip offered no solace, no love.

Yet fate, in its capricious dance, unveiled a revelation that no one could have ever expected. The unassuming red-haired girl from down the street was none other than the daughter of the Queen's estranged brother.

In what could have been a Cinderella rags-to-riches story, Eleanora, now known as the Queen's niece, was ushered into the resplendent halls of Aethiel Palace, where brilliance shimmered in blinding splendor. Amidst this grandeur, she encountered Crown Prince Julian de Lavilliers, a figure of regal charm yet not the beacon to kindle her heart as the Queen had envisioned.

Instead, her soul stirred for another - a man from the northern realms, his gaze icy and penetrating. His heart, encased in stone, hands forged by the harshness of battle. A man who had never cried, who had never loved. 

(STANDALONE)

title: Of Fairytales and Happy Endings
description:
What makes a good fairytale?

Catrin Llewelyn believes in fairytales, Beatrice Morton does not. And yet in many ways their life resembles one. Stepsisters living together on a manor, Catrin is shunned by her stepmother, while Beatrice is doted on and adored. Only the rules of the classical fairy tales are rather broken, for Beatrice cannot stand her mother's attentions and Catrin is devoted to her stepsister and only friend.

When the Duke of Denster hosts a ball in honor of his son's birthday, the new Mrs. Llewelyn decides to try and match make Beatrice with the Denster heir. There is one slight problem. Beatrice has long decided to find her own love, without the help of mothers and balls. So with the help of her godmother she comes up with a scheme that will take Catrin to the Masquerade ball in her place.

Will Beatrice be able to give her mother the slip? Will Catrin be able pull off the disguise? And what happens after the ball is over? Does everything go back to normal? Or could there be more to the story than either of the stepsisters ever imagined?

Of Fairytales and Happy Endings is a story set in Wales during the Regency Era. Fairytale meets history and fact meets fiction as the two stepsisters set out on a journey to discover just what is it about the fairy tales that always seems to give them happy endings.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Reading is my passion, writing is my love, art is my soul, and Christ is my life.
Stay at home mom who writes in her spare time and hopes to publish one day!

I love history with a passion so most of my novels are Historical Fiction. But I also like to write fantasy and sometimes play around with modern day romance.

To me, there is no greater beauty than the written word and a picture is worth a thousand of them.

Let's make the world a better place, one story at a time.
My favorite writers are C.S. Lewis, Charles Dickens, Alexsander Solzhenistin, and Beatrix Potter :)

title: Phoenix Rising
description:
Betrayed by the man she loved most and sent to the guillotine, a young girl embarks on a quest for revenge when she is given the chance to cheat death and be born again.  

*****

Falling from heaven to hell, Han Zi-ning is falsely accused of treason and sentenced to execution when she is betrayed by the man she loved the most and the woman she once called sister. After the blade falls, she awakens to find herself five years in the past, a time before she became entangled in the political fight for the throne. Armed with the painful memories of her previous life, Zi-ning embarks on a quest for revenge, determined to change the future for herself and those she cares about, and to send those responsible for her suffering to the damnation they deserve.

title: Tempted by a Scoundrel
description:
At the time of the Great revolt of 1857, Julia's parents make her leave India to go to England and stay with her grandfather. Julia is headstrong and highly opinionated-not your typical ray of sunshine. 

In England she meets the dashing Duke of Adlington who happens to be a rake of the highest calibre. 

Micheal Wesley-used to the women fawning over him, finds Julia refreshingly real and extremely appealing in spite of thinking her an obligation at first. But not soon after, everything starts to go wrong. 

Read "Tempted by a Scoundrel" to discover if Julia finds love in England or if she'll go back to India, empty handed and heart broken.

title: Part For Ever / Wang Ye, Wang Fei
description:
Ye Chuyan loved Pei Xiuyan for 12 years, but did not move him at all. In exchange, Pei Xiuyan wiped out the Ye family and hold her father and brother for three days in a snowy day.

She finally understood that she and Pei Xiuyan would have no love but hatred for the rest of their lives, and they would never stop fighting.

Later, Pei Xiuyan knelt in front of the Buddha and prayed sincerely, hoping to grow old together with Ye Chuyan.

Ye Chuyan smiled.

Pei Xiuyan, I have long made a wish to the gods and Buddhas: when I drag you into the endless abyss and hell, I hope that you will never enter reincarnation and suffer all the pain of hell.

I just hope that in this life and the next, I will never see or complain to you, and I will have no debts and no repayments.

~~ "Wang Ye, Wang Fei" (王爷，王妃说此生不复相见) by Sheng Mo (旌墨).
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Serpent's Veil
description:
Prince of Persia meets The Wrath and the Dawn in this epic retelling of the life of the Abbasid Queen Al-Khayzuran.
    
Arabia - Circa 764. 
    
Al-Khayzuran's life changes forever when she is kidnapped from her home and sold to a caravan returning from Hajj. 
An unlikely and altogether fateful series of events leads her face to face with the gates of the capital, a mysterious desert spirit, and a young prince on the verge of rising to the seat of Caliph. 

Thrust into a world of deception, royalty, intrigue and war, Khayzuran must learn everything she can as fast as she can, or leave her fate in the hands of her enemies.

description:
|| Everything changes when you fall in love with the enemy. ||

When General Niall Killian, a high ranked prodigy, recruits the newly graduated Thea Rhaanan to work for him, his hope is that she will be the key to unlocking incredibly valuable information from an uncooperative source. This information being exactly what he needs to finally bring an end to the decades long conflict between the Aiverian State and its despised rebels, the Elorian Crows.  

However, Thea has her own ideas.

Realizing that helping Niall may mean turning on her own people, the very people the Elorian Crows fight for, Thea must decide if trusting Niall is the right thing to do... especially when working for the State means being in the heart of the lions den and surrounding herself with people who hate her. 

Of course, her confusion and fear only worsens when she finds herself not only growing close to her new co-workers, but also starting to develop feelings for the General himself.

title: The Secret in East End  [Agents of the Crown #1]
description:
A FEATURED STORY IN HISTORICAL FICTION

HIGHEST RANKING #7 in HISTORICAL FICTION
---
Ellie had been undercover for most of her life. She had been a pickpocket for as far as she can remember, under the guise of Elliot. Any memory before the age of ten was blank in her head, with no recollection of how she had ended up under the charge of a gang of street rats as a child. Her life was meant to be mundane, as long as she remained under her secret identity. Until she tried to steal from the wrong pockets that is.
  
  ---
  
  Fabian Rothesay, the new Duke of Avondale, had spent the last 2 years rebuilding the coffers of his father, in order to ensure that the Avondale estate was not about to crumble around their feet. Taking over his father's spot as the Duke had not been an easy task, but in his doing so for the past 2 years, he has raised as one of the most eligible bachelors of the ton. What the ton doesn't know is that Fabian is biting to return to his previous life. What people believed to be a holiday around the continent, was actually Fabian's cover as he worked as an Agent of the Crown. His new status as a Duke however, did not make him want to step down as an Agent just yet, especially with a recent case that specifically embroils a series of planned heists within the ton.
  
  ---
  
  As the two are thrown together in a series of circumstances that was mostly chance, sometimes fate, and with a dash of secrecy, how would the turmoil change their lives?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello! I've been writing for as long as I can remember, especially fanfictions. I was on winglin.net, for anyone who used to write for Asian fandoms. I then jumped to Livejournal to write for Jpop fandom (Arashi fans, yay?), before moving on to fanfiction.net. If anyone wants to know my handle there, holler! I wrote for Narnia, LOTR, Harry Potter, Pokemon, Pacific Rim, Inuyasha and more, just to name a few.

I've also been reading Historical romance for the longest time! I love them! My favorite are Highland stories, and my favorite writers are Julia Quinn, Judith McNaught and Paula Quinn. Only a few. I have lots. xD

I'll be writing mostly historical romance fiction, and I usually write series, although they can all be stand-alone's too! Do take note though that all my works are UNEDITED and I'm very well aware of my grammatical errors. I don't intend to edit them anytime soon cause writing is my hobby for now, and I don't want to turn it into a task, so I appreciate any attempts at helping me edit, but they usually just clog up my comments, so please do refrain.

That said, I do love comments and feedback regarding any characterisation, plot or any info discrepancies!

Here are my current ongoing series!

title: The Vicious Viscount
description:
# 2 The Vicious Viscount
   
Mabel & Malcolm's story 

Lady Mabel is a bastard,

once upon a time Mabel was poor, she lived with her aunt , they struggled to earn money and did not have it easy, but in that though time she was the happiest, she had a secret lover who lighted up her days, the whole town did never know of their relationship since it would be a scandal for a Viscount son to even spend time with his servants. 

Mabel's aunt worked for his family,  and that's how their love started. And for Mabel and Malcolm that love was not eternal. Missunderstandings, betrayal,  lies enter the Picture and a shadow lingering behind the curtain wanting to tear them apart. 
  
Her once lover became her most hated person. 

Lady Mabel has locked her emotions and turned into a wealthy lady. But what happens when problems occur and her family goes into bankruptcy? And suddenly a knight in shining armour helps her family and that person is someone Lady Mabel never wished to see. She would do anything in her will to never get any help from that man 

Her ex lover 

Malcolm grey  a Viscount, even the name could turn her whole life upside down. A man who once loved her, a man who once was hers, now she heard of all the stories that he turned into a rake and the coldest man alive something he never used to be. Their blissful love turned into hate, she loathed him and she would do anything in her power to never get any help from that man. 

Even if it meant for her to break every ladylike rule and turn into the darkest side of england and take some help from a dangerous gambler.

She became a ghost - a ghost with a mission. She must fulfill her vow of vengeance, or she would transform into an evil, mindless phantom, doomed to wander and haunt the mortal world forever.
