If you're interested in staying updated with my latest works, I invite you to follow me on Inkitt, where I release my stories a whole week in advance before posting them anywhere else.

If you enjoy my content and would like to show your support, you can also consider buying me a cup of coffee over at ko-fi.com/tashany. I appreciate your kindness in advance!

Currently, I have a few exciting projects in the works. Firstly, I'm in the process of rewriting some of my completed stories, including "The Palace" and "Elven King Yakuza." Additionally, I'm working on a thrilling new tale titled "The General and I Mate."

But that's not all! I'm also embarking on a fresh adventure with my upcoming story, "A Walk in the Empress' Shoes." So, stay tuned for more captivating narratives and immerse yourself in the magical world of my imagination.

title: (BL) His Male Queen
description:
Sheru was a simple man living in the outskirts of the city, selling flower baskets to the nobles who came to ride on boats. Being an orphan he was raised by his uncle and right after his death his aunt kicked him out of the house. He was a beautiful boy who gained alot of unnecessary attention by both men and women but he always escaped their wayward eyes.

No matter how much he hid his face from the unnecessary attention by the nobles, destiny cannot be changed. That's why he got the whole attention of the most powerful man in the country, a notorious monarch.

This story revolves around Sheru and his swoon worthy love , which changed the evil and blood thirsty Emperor into a lover who doted on him amidst all the strife and objections of the nobles and ministers.

title: Keeping Faith  (Book 3 in the Red Valley Series)
description:
This is book 3 in the Red Valley Series but like the other ones, it can be read by itself. 

Faith Matthews is a headstrong, independent woman determined to make it on her on in a mans world. She left Charleston to escape the constraints of society, vowing to never to be an obedient wife who is only seen and not heard. Against her brother's wishes, she bought a nearby ranch; but when she finds herself in the middle of a war over water rights, her big brother sends someone to protect her. Cade Jacobs is a hard and calloused hired gun, who's only allegiance is to the highest bidder. Can they work together to save her ranch or when the sparks start flying, will they go up in flames?

title: Dynasties And  love [ Completed]
description:
Story Description:

Maximilian Ashbroune, the spare prince of Ashburn, feels trapped in a life he never chose. While his role as a prince should be one of pride and privilege, Max's greatest struggle is accepting the pressure of his destiny-marriage to a man who will eventually become king. Society expects him to be delicate, soft-spoken, and more feminine because of his attraction to men, but Max defies these expectations. He is a mix of both masculine and feminine traits, unapologetically himself, even though the idea of marriage and everything tied to his sexuality scares him.

On the other hand, Alexandros Vareli, the crown prince of Vireli, is comfortable in his role as the future king. Loved by his people and secure in his future, Alex sees marriage as an opportunity for love-a chance to find someone he truly connects with. Even though royal marriages are often arranged by family, Alex believes that love can grow between two people, and he is open to the idea of an arranged marriage, provided there is mutual respect and affection.

When their paths cross, both Max and Alex find themselves at a crossroads in their lives. Max's fear of marriage clashes with his growing attraction to Alex, and Alex sees in Max the kind of person he could share his life with. The story follows their journey as they navigate the complexities of their royal duties, their feelings for each other, and the expectations that come with being heirs to their respective kingdoms. Will they find the courage to embrace love, or will their fears and obligations tear them apart?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Fury and Flame | 3
description:
"𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐃𝐄𝐀𝐃 𝐇𝐀𝐕𝐄 𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐋𝐘 𝐒𝐄𝐄𝐍 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐄𝐍𝐃 𝐎𝐅 𝐖𝐀𝐑"


When Delphinium Tesla is dragged back into the poisonous clutches of the organization that turned her into a lethal killer, everything changes in the heightening conflict between Imperium and the rest of the world. Imperium is rising with no significant opposition and the world is quickly realizing how unprepared they are for such a threat. 

Just when it seems as if things can't get any worse for the team, their one ally turns against them and becomes one of their largest foes. The remaining members are forced to go on the run, all while trying to pull themselves together after the disastrous civil war that rocked their group. 

Between being pursued by the gangs of New York City, a teammate gone rogue, Imperium, and their own government, the team has never been in a darker point. How can the broken team destroy Imperium once and for all if the growing empire is nearly unstoppable? 

In this thrilling conclusion, the warfare that has been threatening to break out between Imperium and its resistance is nearing. The team knows that not everyone will survive, especially not if Imperium wins and gains unbridled control over the world. 

War is inevitable.


𝐖𝐇𝐀𝐓 𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐃𝐄𝐑𝐒 𝐇𝐀𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐀𝐈𝐃:

title: Healer
description:
Two very different worlds. 

Two very different men. 

And one woman who has to choose between the life that she knew and the one that lies ahead...

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Gillian Clarke finds herself thrust into a new world- a subject to sorcery and witchcraft, brought by the harsh realities of fate. 

The time? 1713, in fact. 

Oh yes, life is suddenly very different for a 21st century girl from Florida. Not to mention the fact that this fate- is not her own. It's the calling to a man she's only known for a few short weeks- Symon Macintosh, the man destined to lead, destined for power. This sick twist of fate seems to have brought her along for the ride. 

That is until she meets another man, a healer, and suddenly the two worlds, once so clear, begin to blur, forcing her to realize that maybe, just maybe, she is part of something much bigger than herself.

- If I could live somewhere where it rained 24/7, I'd be forever happy.
- I write guys with long hair & I don't plan to stop anytime soon.
- Current TV obsessions: Outlander, Interview With The Vampire, Stranger Things.
- I never sleep, ever. I'm completely nocturnal as well. Basically, I'm a vampire.
- Twinings Tea is my life.
- Like the hopeless romantic I am, Austen and Brontë fuel me. Also, Diana Gabaldon because Outlander will always be my all-time favorite series.
- I am a film/k-drama fanatic.
- I sing a lot... Mostly Disney songs, not going to lie. A LOT of BTS. (JK is my bias. 🐰🥕)
- I am your classic introvert, unfortunately. If the doorbell rings & I don't know who it is, no thanks.
- I live for Christmas Day.

title: Through the Darkness: Of Love and Loss Series Book One
description:
During World War I, Captain Everett Monterose, a disillusioned schoolteacher with a haunted past from Malad, Idaho, wants a chance at happiness instead of continually being dished out of misery. 

But after he's severely wounded and temporarily blinded in battle, he's shipped back to America. He faces living the rest of his life crippled - until he meets Elyria Ormond, a blind woman volunteering at Walter Reed Army Hospital in Washington DC, offering compassion to soldiers on their deathbeds. 

Suddenly, their lives are forever changed, and dreams of true love they'd long since given up on are within reach. But Everett soon learns happiness is not a commodity to barter for with good deeds, and there is no escape from the many forms of misery.

authorBio:
Born the 2nd oldest of 6 children, she grew up often escaping to her bedroom to read, draw, and write. Somehow, she managed to graduate high school and even continued her education by being granted a Theatre scholarship and earned her degree in pretending to be someone else. After graduating, she served a mission for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints in Toronto, Canada.
Upon returning to the U.S., she earned her Cosmetology License so she could run with scissors and not get yelled at. To really finish the deal, she became a certified Media Makeup Artist.
In 2006 she married her husband, who she met while they both worked in a magical far-off land the locals call 'The Home Depot.' Now on the search for the ever-elusive Sasquatch, they live in the Pacific Northwest, where her husband is from. When she's not writing stories or speaking fluently in movie quotes, she enjoys drawing, painting, and spending time with her handsome husband and their dog. You can like and follow her on:

title: warrior's heart
description:
Whenever the kingdom of Misrah was mentioned, the name Marliyyah came to mind. Born the only child to the Sultan of Misrah,Imran El- Assad and his queen Noorah,  she was loved immensely.But fate dealt a heavy blow to the inseparable family when the queen Noorah, suddenly vanishes without a trace and leaves the Sultan heart broken. He falls into a long sleep mysterious to healers from far and near.
Marliyyah now a fully grown woman steps into the shoes of her father to protect her people and forever closes the doors to her heart.

Orphaned and having to ascend the throne of his predecessors at a young age is the Sultan of Heman, Nawfal Al-fateh.  Being a close ally of Misrah,  he learns of the impending doom that threatens to befall the kingdom from the feared Kingdom of the Boas.Nawfal must do the needful, a marital alliance to protect his long time ally and show loyalty.
Will Marliyyah concede to this alliance? Will Nawfal be able to tame the warrior's heart?

title: The Golden Queen
description:
After an enchanted artifact lures Kara Walker three thousand years back in time, she finds herself in the perilous world of ancient Egypt, an era when everyone fears-and reveres-the might of King Ahmose II, divine law of the land. No one is exempt from Pharaoh's decree and when she is mistakenly accused of looting sacred royal tombs, she has a choice: flee for her life or face Pharaoh's wrath. Her otherworldly appearance makes it impossible to find safe harbor in the dangerous city of Thebes, and Ahmose soon becomes her only salvation. When his life is threatened by an assassin, the eccentric bond between them could change Kara's mind about returning home.

title: Inside the Beast's Castle
description:
"As soon as you believe you are a monster is when you become one."

After many years of war, the kingdom of Edria is finally in an era of peace--peace obtained by one thing and one thing only. 

A deal. 

King Regol has made a deal with the devil, or rather, a beast. A monster. 

Or so he claims. 

When he uses the deal for his own advantage, he threatens a girl named Zara, who has had everything but her family taken away. 

Zara is ordered to kill the beast Regol made a deal with, unbenownst to her that the deal even exists. When her attempt fails, she is left with two choices: to never go back home, or to learn from the beast so she can take back what is hers. 

She faces dangers on the castle grounds she thought were only stories; magic, creatures that kill a person in a single puff of air, and lastly, the beast, who can barely control the darkness that has buried itself in him for years. 

The longer she is on the castle grounds, however, the more she realizes everything is more than it seems...

...and that she has a power she could only dream about.





****
A retelling of Beauty and the Beast



Wonderful cover by @nicegirlsreadbooks

Highest rank: #1 in Fantasy
                         #4 in Adventure
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello everyone!

Thanks for visiting the page. Y'all can call me Noa. It's a pen name I picked because I thought it sounded pretty.

I'm a 20-something musician who likes to write in my free time-- which isn't very much for right now. I used to write a lot when I initially got on here and somehow cranked out two decent length stories pretty quickly, but now there's a lot of times where something started doesn't get finished or updated for a bit. I still have a lot of ideas running around rent free in my brain, though the attention span eats it every once in a while.

I'm always more than happy to talk about music stuffs. I went to school for piano performance and love trying to explain what happens when and how stuff works for studying music. Just be warned-- not all experiences with this are the same and it the level of things may depend on what time of music school someone went to. If anyone's curious about it though, I'll be happy to talk about it in the message board.

Most of my writing is fairly clean. The earlier things (before 2022) don't have much or any language (the writing may be horrendous though). Some later stuff does drop some words every now and then, but I'm not a huge fan of going overboard. The stories almost always have fights or injuries -- my characters probably hate me -- but I'm pretty sure it's not gory. It'll always be worse in my head versus what's actually on that page.

I'm not a huge fan of private messages. Y'all can DM me and stuff, but any conversations I'd rather have on a message board.

title: The original partner of the cannon fodder counterattacked and became rich
description:
[Gourmet skills are full of career-oriented beauty X loyal dog scientific research boss / The next book is "The Girl Who Wears Books Always Wants to Be My Baby's Stepmother" guidance column for collection~] 1: Pei, who has been in the catering industry for half his life Li transmigrated into a book, and she transmigrated into a time-of-the-dog novel, and became the cannon fodder for the villain in the original book. The original owner was too fat and too lazy to work, and no one in the village was willing to marry. A man who was saved by his father halfway got married. A lifetime in a wheelchair. Pei Li, who had traveled through time, knew that the sick man in front of her would, after escaping from Pei's house in the future, open up a business empire by herself and become the biggest villain on the road to riches for the heroine of the original book. Pei Li looked at the dilapidated adobe houses, the impoverished families, and her body that was panting after just two steps. fat? Can't I lose weight? ! Business empire? I
 can make one too. Villain boss? Can't you afford to offend me and send him away? ! Unexpectedly, the man's leg was healed, and the commander's father also came to find him, but he refused to leave no matter what, he kissed his wife one by one, and pampered her to the bone. Relying on her craftsmanship, she started steadily from setting up stalls, from mobile stalls in the town to stores in the city, and opened food chain stores one after another, and her business became more and more prosperous. The money earned is then used for investment, and the money is rolled over, and he has become the richest man. The villagers who used to laugh at her as a fat girl to watch the show were dumbfounded when they saw their family move from the village to the town, and then live in a villa in the city. title: A Lady's Fate
description:
Lady Helena Rowley's fate was sealed before she was born. As the only child of the powerful Earl of Alverton, it is her duty to marry well - a duty she intends to fulfil, even if that means leaving the man she truly loves behind.

But then recently-orphaned Mary Thorpe arrives at Alverton Hall, throwing Helena's plans into total disarray. Loud, blunt and clumsy, Mary is everything a lady shouldn't be, despite Helena's desperate attempts to conceal Mary's peculiar behaviour from their esteemed neighbours.

As if things couldn't get any worse, Mary has a secret - and when the truth is revealed, Helena's life will be turned completely upside-down. Plunged headfirst into an adventure that will take her a world away from the quiet, orderly life she knows, Helena will have no choice but to place her trust in the wild young girl. Forced to be independent for the first time in her life, Helena might just begin to realise that a lady's fate is her own to decide.
                                                   
#43 in Historical Fiction on 02/07/2017.

title: A Princess Torn (Alys Book #2)
description:
While coming to terms with her new position as King Dastrehan's betrothed, Alys's unknown past has blown a hole in everything she has come to know and trust about herself and her life. 

Alys' memories of her life as Princess Endolynn are few and incomplete. With tensions high between the kingdoms of Tarkam and Balear, Alys struggles to figure out who she is, and what it means for her threatened future with Dastrehan. 

Betrayals and revelations rock Balear and it's young, confused princess, leaving room for hidden enemies to throw their lots into the mix.  

Torn between kingdoms and fragmented memories, will Alys ever truly feel like she is Endolynn again? And if she does, what does that mean for the people she loves and the life she lived as Alys?

title: MV Sewol Ferry Disaster Memorials Part 1
description:
part 2 here: https://www.wattpad.com/story/228118765-mv-sewol-ferry-disaster-memorials-part-2

Mv Sewol sunk on the 16th of April, 2014 at the Yellow Sea. It was carrying 405 passangers, most of them being from Danwon High school, Ansan City. Only 172 survived. The students spent their time recording videos and joking around, but as the water came in, their survival instinct did too. Bruised/bloodied fingers, tied together life vests.. they show the desperation the students had. Even the surviving students were screaming ''Break the windows! My friends are in there!'' The students inside the ferry either drowned or died of hypothermia. They drowned in the dark, desperate for life.
This is a memorial for those students, teachers, passangers and crew, whose lives were lost, and dreams were sunk as a result of this disaster.

(Due to the 20 image limit, every victim has a chapter dedicated to them..)

My sources:
In Korean: http://416family.org/index.php/remember-n1/
In English: https://www.findagrave.com/virtual-cemetery/461567?page=1#sr-209194113

title: Love of a Giant ✔️
description:
When the human empire Audrora and the giant kingdom Etimid are plagued with the possibility of war, Prince Brandon of Etimid must marry one of the Audrora's four princesses in order to strengthen the weakening bond between the two nations. He knew he had to do it for his country, but he was never anticipating finding himself drawn to Theresa, the youngest of the princesses. 

Despite their reservations, she agrees to marry him and he brings her to his kingdom. But Theresa is anxious and unsure about their future, and Brandon fears he may have been too hasty. As the two slowly try to become more acquainted, they both begin to wonder if they can have an amicable marriage.

Or, perhaps, if they could have something more.

title: The Lost Queen (Book 1 of The Lost Queen Series)
description:
A human seer and an elven prince have one thing in common: a missing sister.
 
Seraiah's dreams have a habit of coming true, but when all her dreams turn into nightmares, she fears for her sister's life. Each nightmare is a little different, but they always end the same way--with something else looking out from Sterling's eyes.
 
When Sterling is kidnapped, Seraiah suspects the worst. After their father refuses to search for Sterling, Seraiah is forced to take matters into her own hands. She accepts the help of elven prince, Kaimana, who bears an uncanny resemblance to Sterling, and his Commander, Kestrel. 

Together, this unlikely trio will have to race against time to find Sterling before it's too late.

title: Wicked is the Curse.
description:

A tale as old as time. Magic is forbidden in the ever-growing empire of Kaelara and those who wield it are hunted it. 

Aire, a trader of secrets, has spent her years hiding the curse in her blood, determined to survive despite all that hunts her. But, when her hard built life is torn apart by betrayal, she is forced to navigate a world of magic and treachery, hunted by a ruthless soldier of the Empire who speaks of regicide and rebellion. 

To survive, she must turn to the curse of magic in her blood. A magic only she can harness to save herself and cleave a future for her dwindling people.

title: The Coveted Countess
description:
Two years after Nathaniel Swift left for America to forget the woman he loved, he learns she's engaged to another man -- and returns to England to win her back.

                                                                      *****

Lord Nathaniel 'Nate' Swift is hopelessly in love with his best friend's younger sister, Charlotte Wilde. However, Nate's rakish ways, their ten-year age difference, and his best friend's objections soon make it very clear that a marriage could never take place. So Nate does the only thing he could: he travels to America and tries to forget about the woman he loves. But after two years in the New World, forgetting Charlotte proves to be impossible, and he's quickly pulled back to England after hearing of her engagement to another man. Determined to make up for past mistakes, Nate swears to stop the impending wedding and win back Charlotte's heart at any cost. But is he too late to show her the truth he's known all along -- that they're meant to be together, forever?

[[Word count: 70,000-80,000 words]]

Cover designed by Ashley Bandy

I'm sorry, I don't do reading requests. I don't have time and I feel so bad saying no!

Uploads every Saturday night AEST.

Follow me on Instagram: @littlelo62

~~

FAQs

1. Any advice for writing historical fiction?

Research! Research your time period, the language, the fashion, the politics, the significant events - a good way to start this is by watching movies and reading books set in the era.

2. How do you come up with your ideas?

I write books I want to read. If I'm interested in the plot, I will continue. I want to find out what happens too!

3. How do you get reads/followers?

Patience! 10 years ago I started on 0 too! I kept going, kept posting, and hoped for the best. Eventually my beautiful community found me. Yours will find you, too.

title: War of the Roses
description:
After weeks of bloody battle the kingdom of Kalon had only one choice, surrender or the entire village will be reduced to ashes. King Hero was a great king , he couldn't let his people die, but been a slave of a foreign kingdom was not an option either. The  agreement was simple. Both kingdoms heirs will marry and guarantee a life long treaty of commerce and most importantly, peace.

Prince Philip was young, handsome and brave but his heart was already taken. He hated his dad and his new unwanted bride. Marriage didn't stop him from openly perusing his unlawful and scandalous relationship with one of the court ladies.

Princess Samira was of high virtue, beautiful and with a big sense of duty for her people and her kingdom. Humiliated in a foreign court by her new husband she found a way to the hearts of her new kingdom's people.  Philip realized he needed her to secure his place as king.

title: Imprisoned to Love You [Edited]
description:
A flash of lightning is all it took to turn Takeo Ruka's life upside-down. She is thrown 400 years into the past, into a world of war and bloodshed, but not quite the past she's familiar with from history class. The war is brutal and those a part of it ruthless, particularly one who is feared far and wide for his cold, cruel ways.

Despite the sudden change in her life, Ruka settles into the slow, primeval lifestyle with the help of kind, warm-hearted people of a village. While everything seems plain and simple in the beginning, complications soon arise one after the other, rousing unsettling emotions and situations.

Offering a moment of unbiased concern and help to a stranger soon turns Ruka into a prisoner, locked away in frightening luxury she cannot escape from. When she's about to give up on ever being happy again, she sees a silver lining.

It is then that she realizes that some things are not just what they seem to be on the outside. With truths slowly uncovering, Ruka soon finds the place she wants to be in and the person she wants to be with. But the question is, is she strong enough to overcome the overwhelming obstacles thrown at her that threatens everything she wishes to gain?

~~~~~~~~~~~~

title: The villainess is too lazy to avoid the male leads.
description:
I died because I was too lazy to dodge the car coming my way, and so I never breathed again.
 Then, I woke up in a small child's body; Phoenix Elan, the villainess of a popular novel I once read. The right thing to do at a time like this is, avoiding the main characters right? 
  '... but I'm too lazy, I can't do that- it's too tiring for me.'
So, I just lived my life, & seems that caused the novel to turn really strange...
   'You don't have to do anything, I'll do everything for you my lovely Phoenix,' says the villain who was supposed to be obsessed with the female lead.
   'Phoenix looks pretty no matter what,' defends the woman who was to be the cause of my death, the female lead.
  'Even if there's a single thorn in your path, I'll move it. If it's for you, I'll wipe the whole nation down to the ground,' says the male lead who should've hated me.
  Seriously, there's something wrong with the protagonists, I swear!
Warning; the cover isn't my property!!!

title: Siren of the Desert
description:
*Formerly known as The Arabian Desert.*

He was a cold-hearted bandit with the power to imprison her...
Maria disguises herself as a helper boy when Zain, the black-hearted, demonically handsome bandit attacks their prosperous town in the middle of the Arabian Desert and claims it as his own, naming himself sheikh, in search of its riches and treasures and a secret goal precious to his dark heart. To innocent Maria, it's either stay hidden or risk being caught and forced into Sheikh Zain's notorious harem. 
She was a raging spitfire that burned through his every defense...
When Maria accidentally bumps into Zain one hot summer afternoon, revealing long hair, Zain is captivated and intrigued by the boy who turns out to be a feisty girl. He immediately desires the azure-eyed beauty whose melodious voice rivals that of a siren, and decides to capture and imprison her in his harem, for he must know who she is and where she came from.  
Now a woman who craves freedom above all else, Maria will stop at nothing to free herself from the devil himself even as she struggles against the tempestuous feelings that very devil elicits within her, all while a treacherous enemy plots against them.

title: Sabella's Journey
description:
As a baby, Sabella, was left abandoned on a stranger's doorstep. With open arms, the family took her in and raised her as one of their own. 

As the years went by, her adopted mother died, leaving the family broken. From one tragedy came another. They were no longer able to sustain the hardships that soon followed, which prompted them to leave the only home they knew of in search of a better life.

Joining up with a wagon train, they left in search of a new life in Kansas. 

Having to overcome hardships on their way with diseases and looters. Things took a turn for the worst when they've encountered an Indian tribe that left most of them dead and the rest captives. 

When a particular warrior has his eyes on Sabella, she soon learns that everything is not what it seems.

WARNING
- I wrote this a long time ago - it's actually the first thing I've ever written. There are countless of grammatical errors, and this story isn't exactly good.

title: The Royal Seamstress | ONC2020

Elizabeth Webb is sent to court as replacement for her mother who was beheaded by the order of King Henry VIII, the famous Tudor monarch. Elizabeth tries her hardest to satify her sovereign lord, since the death warrant is hanging low on her head, but even the slightest mistake can cost her everything.

authorBio:
Hi!!
I'm a 25-year-old history fanatic. I spend most of my time writing and watching Netflix.
I started writing in my last year in public school, and since it has been my greatest passion.
I'm also a music and food lover and these are always a part of my writing process.
I love to read and are always buying new books. My favorite genres are historical fiction, paranormal romance and contemporary NA romance. I'm a big fan of Philippa Gregory, Stephenie Meyer and Kendall Ryan.
I'm also a big fan of classical literature, and as cliche as it is - my favorite classical book is Jane Austen's Pride and Prejudice.
I write historical fiction, paranormal romances and contemporary fiction, because I like to switch between the contrast of life in the past and the life of the present, and all the in between.

title: Upon A Time
description:
A blacksmith's apprentice who would be a knight. The heir to the throne, at death's door. One woman who would save them both, if she could...

Charlotte was number sixty-four in the second group of young, hopeful maidens intended to meet the Prince at a grand ball in his honor.

That introduction was not to be.

She returned home to her tiny village- and her visions of a future limited by it- without any warning of the drastic turn her life was about to take. 

Soon she would be fighting against the odds to help keep a gravely wounded stranger alive; and waging war with her own heart, as he stirred feelings in her she'd never known.

When the stranger's royal identity is revealed, Charlotte is faced with an entirely different battle: one to keep her family, village, and the injured Prince in her care all safe from a madman set on taking the throne by any means necessary.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi! I'm February Grace.

I've done a few more or less interesting things in my life, not the least of which include working for Disney, getting kissed by a Klingon (it was unprovoked) and going blind, though I wouldn't personally recommend the latter. I would, however, highly recommend the doctors at the University of Michigan who helped partially restore my sight after a long series of surgeries between 2009 and 2011.

With the closure of my publisher at the end of May 2016, the rights to my novels reverted to me.

I can't think of anywhere I would rather share them with the world than here, with all of you, on Wattpad.

Three of them are here: GODSPEED (the book of my heart) UPON A TIME, (1 million reads and counting!) and WISHING CROSS STATION (the book of my soul). I really hope you'll find stories and characters to love among them!

Thank you, everyone, for making me feel so welcome, I truly appreciate you all.

xoxo ~F.G.

Visit my blog: www.februarywriter.blogspot.com

title: Royally Second

With the royal family finally in a peaceful state after losses, a wedding and a birth, the press is hungry for a story. Their target is the Prince and Princess of Wales, who have yet to produce another child a year after their surprise first. Britain is suddenly alight with rumours of Kai and Mila needing to produce a male heir, and the King of England is not happy. 
Little do they know, the Royal Family is full of secrets, all of them bound to bring more news. Just as Mila thought she was adjusting to her new whirlwind life, a second lot of dramas are coming her way.

title: Haunted Hearts
description:
After losing three fiancés in tragic accidents over the past six years, Lady Elphi Matson knows three things for certain: heartache only maims its victim when it should kill, not all haunted places are crumbling castles, and without a doubt, she is cursed when it comes to falling in love.  

Able to see ghosts since surviving a drowning accident at age nine, Lord Rufus Treadway works as a Private Investigator of the paranormal. So, when his closest friend Lord Roderick Matson pleads for help solving Elphi's curse, Rufus agrees to attend the Sanham séance, promising not to let Elphi know Roderick hired him and, for his own safety, not to fall in love with her. However, just like curses, some promises are meant to be broken.

authorBio:
Born the 2nd oldest of 6 children, she grew up often escaping to her bedroom to read, draw, and write. Somehow, she managed to graduate high school and even continued her education by being granted a Theatre scholarship and earned her degree in pretending to be someone else. After graduating, she served a mission for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints in Toronto, Canada.
Upon returning to the U.S., she earned her Cosmetology License so she could run with scissors and not get yelled at. To really finish the deal, she became a certified Media Makeup Artist.
In 2006 she married her husband, who she met while they both worked in a magical far-off land the locals call 'The Home Depot.' Now on the search for the ever-elusive Sasquatch, they live in the Pacific Northwest, where her husband is from. When she's not writing stories or speaking fluently in movie quotes, she enjoys drawing, painting, and spending time with her handsome husband and their dog. You can like and follow her on:

title: 12 Seconds (#1 in Military series)
description:
After being caught in an explosion in Afghanistan, Jules is sent home with no memory of her time as a marine or the love she found overseas. 

Now, two years later, Julia is working in the local library, with an overprotective mother who would do anything to keep her from learning the truth.

But will a chance encounter with someone from her past make Julia remember who she truly is? 

And can she ever be the same person again? 


Just a few notes:

title: EMPIRE REWRITTEN
description:
Michael Jameston, a 55-year-old American book sales executive and former silkscreen craftsman, awakens to an impossible reality: he now inhabits the body of Constantine Palaiologos, Despot of Morea and soon to be the last emperor of Byzantium. Initially questioning his sanity, Michael quickly embraces the extraordinary opportunity before him. Armed with his expertise in silkscreen printmaking, a passion for medieval battle reenactments, and a fascination with alternate history, he possesses knowledge of inventions and strategies centuries ahead of his time. Determined to survive and make a lasting impact, he sets out to reshape a world on the brink of monumental change.

Join us on an epic journey as Michael crafts a new destiny and transforms the future of an empire!

title: Beyond the Cotton Fields
description:
Lucy, a 17-year old slave girl, was born on the plantation, works on the plantation, and will most likely die on the plantation. She knows little of the world past the plantation, but that doesn't keep her from wondering about it. With the rare abilities to read and write, she knows there's a better life out there for her; it's just a matter of where. Deciding to find her better life, she runs away to the north, hoping to make a living for herself. But, on her way to freedom, Lucy encounters Koi, the 21-year old son of an Indian tribe's chief. He welcomes her into his tribe, showing her the ways of the world and the heart. At Koi's side, Lucy ventures beyond the cotton fields.

title: Mondo Pastello | girlxgirl | Completed♕
description:
She was the type to stare herself in the mirror and see someone else stare back. Someone who was free and light, being able to spread her wings like an unbound angel. She was neither chained to Heaven nor Hell. Howbeit, no matter how far she reached into the mirror, she could never step through as her ball-and-chain presented itself in the form of a crown. 

She was a princess with two faces, desperately trying to have a sense of freedom outside of her royal obligations. She found it in the form of a weakness: a passion with another human being. Her love for him and ballet had kept her chin high; her crown not slipping from her pastel hair.

So why, why did it suddenly become so hard when a gothic gymnastic back-flipped into her life? Why were her heartstrings being tugged on by someone of her same gender? Why was it suddenly so difficult, so strenuous to keep living in her pastel world when this mysterious girl brought such bright colours with her?

TRIGGER WARNING: Mentions of sex, suicide and other mature themes will be contained within this book. Read at your own discretion.

title: Raven Falls
description:
She was young, reserved and a complete book lover. A rather curvy girl with hazel eyes. 

He was strange with an always bored look but had an unnatural glint. You could say he was inhumanly beautiful with a perfect set of blue eyes. 
. 
. 
. 

    "I'm not interested in whatever pledge father had with the Gregory's. I will not marry that girl mother" He barks angrily as he stomps toward the foyer. 
"Besides I heard she has the most boring set of hazel eyes" He adds as he mentally face palms at such a weak excuse. 
    "Alex you have to do this, not for yourself but for your father.. - the kingdom" his mother pleads as she tries to catch up with him. 
"How would the kingdom look at a king who cannot honour a pledge" she says. 
   He groans furiously this was a waste of time. 

Alexander freezes midway as a foreign memory flashes through his mind. He wasn't even interested in hazel eyes

authorBio: Hello Lovelies🤗. So I haven't written anything on my board for years since I've been on Wattpad. Ntombie was only 13 years of age when she was raped. things get even complicated when she's about to marry the prince of their village. Will kingdom and the king accept a non virgin as their bride?

Get taken back to the era when south Africa had no white man, still cattles, no cellphones or any technology and still huts. 

"What is a beautiful woman doing out here all alone. Don't you know there are beast roaming around in this time of the night."

She turned as she laid her eyes on the most handsome man she had ever seen.

"thinking." She said as she threw stones inside the river in front of her.

"Then we are alike. My father is impossible to understand."

He worries about his father. Her sorrows were much bigger and more hurtful than his.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Well... there's nothing more to me than listening to music, reading, eating, going out with my friends and watching movies. I hope everyone get to see or experience a piece of my creativity and get moved by it. I'm just an ordinary girl trying out new things and see what works best for me.

title: The Witch and The Thief
description:
Lachlan Shadowblade has one job, steal the Dragon Tooth Stone from the Deepwood Vault, a witch's bank notorious for being impenetrable to thieves. Born with magic in his veins, he's not the average thief and is moments away from success when the captivating Maera Maelstrom, one of the vault keepers, catches him.  
Not once in her lonely existence, did Maera ever imagine how her life would be turned upside down when one of the most powerful magical artifacts is stolen right out from under her nose. Tasked with recovering the stone from the handsome thief to avoid a punishment worse than death, Maera embarks on a daring quest that sets events in motion that will forever intertwine her fate with Lachlan's and threaten both their lives.

authorBio:
Born the 2nd oldest of 6 children, she grew up often escaping to her bedroom to read, draw, and write. Somehow, she managed to graduate high school and even continued her education by being granted a Theatre scholarship and earned her degree in pretending to be someone else. After graduating, she served a mission for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints in Toronto, Canada.
Upon returning to the U.S., she earned her Cosmetology License so she could run with scissors and not get yelled at. To really finish the deal, she became a certified Media Makeup Artist.

title: Broken Wings
description:
It's a fine line between murder and bounty hunting, and most days, Shepard Devereaux isn't sure which side he's on.

After his parents are killed in a freak wagon accident when he's seventeen, Shepard Devereaux is forced at gunpoint to abandon his younger brother, William, to their cruel uncle's care. Now a bounty hunter six years later, Shepard has saved enough money to rescue William, but within an hour of his return, his world is shattered.
When he's offered a chance to join a posse and hunt the outlaw responsible for his brother's downfall and the disappearance of his childhood sweetheart, Hazel Jones, Shepard sets out on a dangerous path of vengeance and justice. 

Being born the illegitimate daughter of a famous prostitute and raised in a whorehouse, townsfolk have made it known all Hazel Jones' life that she is little better than a sweet roll covered in manure-all except for Shepard Devereaux, the boy her heart has been set on for the better part of her life. 
Years later, one night after the outlaw Dynamite Fairleigh attacks her at The Lilypad brothel, Hazel flees, unknowingly setting in motion a heartbreaking chain of events that leads Shepard Devereaux back into her life. 
  
But Hazel and Shepard soon learn Dynamite Fairleigh isn't the only threat they'll have to survive if they want a chance at a new life together.

authorBio:
"If a person has ugly thoughts, it begins to show on the face. And when that person has ugly thoughts every day, every week, every year, the face gets uglier and uglier until you can hardly bear to look at it.

A person who has good thoughts cannot ever be ugly. You can have a wonky nose and a crooked mouth and a double chin and stick-out teeth, but if you have good thoughts it will shine out of your face like sunbeams and you will always look lovely."

Roald Dahl, The Twits

title: My Cynical Marquess ~ Lords of Reluctance Book 1
description:
Now Available on Amazon or read for free with Kindle Unlimited.

If you can I would really appreciate a review to make it easier for others to read. Thank you.

Amidst the opulence of Regency-era England, "My Cynical Marquess" weaves a tale of unexpected connection. Miss Grace Preston, an orphan brimming with intelligence and an unyielding spirit, yearns to escape stifling societal norms. Her refuge becomes the home of the Marquess of Rutherford, a man of commanding presence and frosty demeanor.

Thrown together by circumstance, Grace and the Marquess clash as he suspects her intentions towards his elderly mother. As misunderstandings entwine them, they form an unlikely alliance against the strictures of society. Grace challenges gender conventions, while the Marquess wrestles with emotions he thought long suppressed.

Yet peril looms. Grace's scheming uncle plots a marriage that threatens her independence, while the Marquess is entangled with a high-society lady desperate to secure her future.

In a race against time, they must navigate treacherous waters to rescue each other. "My Cynical Marquess" is a captivating story of defying expectations, embracing desire, and unearthing the strength of the human spirit. Will societal pressures break their spirits, or will their connection lead to a love that defies the odds? As danger and passion intertwine, Grace and the Marquess must decide whether to yield to society or fight for a future where love reigns triumphant.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello and welcome to my profile page.

To me, the written word is a thing of beauty. The way words and sentences are connected can mean the difference between excellence and mediocrity. I strive for the former, but realistically I know that I am not quite there yet. That is why I am here, to gain the practice, and if people like my work then I consider it a bonus. But you guys have to tell me so please feel free to comment.

The main genre I write is Historical Fiction, particularly focusing on the Regency Period. I love it. I love reading it and I love writing it. I am an unofficial student of history and as a result, I try to make my work as historically accurate as I can, which includes the customs of the day and also the famous people who feature prominently at that time. So do not be surprised if Prinny, Beau Brummell and Lady Cowper, along with the rest of the Almack's patronesses, make an appearance in any of my stories.

Any way, I hope you enjoy reading my humble efforts as much as I enjoy writing them.

Best wishes,

Kristina.

PS: If you wish, you may email me directly at kristina@kristinawalshbooks.com, or use the contact form on my website. Just use the link at the bottom  and navigate to the contact page. Thank you.

Plans for future works: Lord Hartleigh, a secondary character in my current novel The Price of Honour,  has a second chance at love, and a time travel set in the romantic Regency Period, Of course. More details to follow.

authorBio: I'm happily married to a wonderful man. We have 2 children, 1 son in law and a grandson. I work a full time job and write in the evenings and weekends. I love to read but haven't had the time since I started writing. I had never written anything in my life but have always had an overactive imagination. title: Commoner In The Palace
description:
In the Kingdom of Mayfield, Evelyn Kloakwood, a mere teenager, was forced to play the role of a dead princess.

What's worse? The people behind her fate trick another man, King Scarclaw, into a marital alliance with her. The sacred blood pact, as part of Scarclaw tradition, is interwoven between His Highness and Evelyn, but the lie she lives daily haunts her.

The palace wasn't a place for Commoners and she was very well aware of it.

In the midst of war, how would the headstrong young woman right her wrongs? How would she convince the Kingdom and its ruler to trust her... one last time?

Most importantly, was she worthy to bear the title of Queen? 

Read to discover.

***

Ongoing book.

title: The Dandy's Duchess
description:
"The Dandy's Duchess" tells the story of the youngest and most talented general of the National Security Bureau, who sacrifices his life for his country and finds his soul transported to another world, where he is reborn as Yun Qianyue, the only legitimate daughter of the Prince Yun's Mansion in the Tian Sheng Dynasty. In this world, Yun Qianyue is seen as a spoiled and arrogant young lady, but she actually conceals wisdom and talent. 
In the novel, she forms a pair of adversarial companions with Rong Jing, known as the cunning heir-who is also the heir of the Rong Wang Mansion. After going through a series of conflicts and misunderstandings, they eventually develop a deep emotional bond.
This novel depicts how Yun Qianyue uses her intelligence and courage to challenge traditions and break free from constraints in a male-dominated imperial society, ultimately earning respect and true love. The story is filled with romance, adventure, court intrigue, and profound character development, presenting readers with a vibrant ancient world.

title: Winfred
description:
The Women's Guard, The Soldier, The Nazi, The Spy. 

The Spy turned Prisoner. 

As they say, dead men (or women, as the case may be) tell no tales. But Kathleen Winfred isn't dead; she managed to escape. Now, the story of her capture by Nazis in occupied France, and her time spent in a hotel-turned-prison must be reported to her superiors. Most stories like Kathleen's are simple: captured, taken prisoner, and, finally, a daring or lucky escape to freedom.

But Kathleen's is a little more complicated than that, and to sort out what goes to her superiors in the end, she has to wade through the memories first. 

.....

title: Romancing Rose
description:
Rose Langford was raised by her Uncle and Aunt  who always encouraged her independent spirit. Deviating from the norm of the ton, she's remained unmarried and quite content. Though perhaps her rationale to stay as she is stems from her own philandering father. And it is that trait itself which has resulted in her distaste in the most renown rakes of England. 

William Cecil never wanted to wed. But with the consistent badgering of his sister and grandmother - it seems like he has no choice to settle. Childish and impulsive, his eye's are caught by a challenge he hopes to conquer. 

Though neither party ever wished for the other - a twist of circumstances seems to have tied their fates together.

title: The Lost Life of Laraine
description:
She lead a rather tragic life. 
The black sheep of her family due to her lack of affinity for fire. Her affinity was quite the opposite. Water in fact. 
Already in a time when women did not really have much political power or rights, she was outcasted by her family despite being of nobility. 
Still allowed to live in the distant west wing of the massive Grand Duke's manor, she has never eaten a single meal with her family nor extended family, and has spent her loneliness in her books and  sword lessons. 
Although only taught by the head butler and one of the low ranked knights of the family, she was quite bright and if her family would have given her a chance she would have done great things. 

If only she didn't die at such a young age. 

Married off to some "hero" of sort that had slayed the Dragon of the North who was terrorizing the land and threatened the kingdom, this hero also had an affinity for fire and held her in disdain like the rest of her family.

Suddenly a girl of another world was transported to their world, picked up by this hero and put into his secure care. The pair soon fell for each other despite the hero's marriage, and many believed Laraine got jealous of this girl of mystery, and tried to kill her. 

This was definitely not true. 

But because the girl was favored by the temple and kingdom Laraine was quickly arrested and put on trial.

You can probably tell what happened to Laraine.

But something strange happened the day of her execution. As soon as her decapitated head hit the ground the sky turned blood red and it began to rain fire. 

No one survived that day.

But for some reason time went back, and Laraine was back to being a child, but with no memory of her future. There were select few in her life, however, that remembered her tragedy and now perhaps will take action to prevent it.


NOTE: I'M AWARE THERE ARE A LOT OF INCONSISTENCIES. IT WILL BE EDITED SOME DAY BUT RIGHT NOW I'M JUST TRYING TO FINISH IT.

title: United We Stand, Divided We Fall
description:
(This books contain plenty Sensitive Topics about the 2nd World War, The Holocaust and many more. I do not support the actions of the Germans during WW2, I Don't support Racism, I Don't support Nazism. This book will try to divert as much of the sensitive topics away but they are still included. If you don't like any of the topics in this book please do not read. If this book is seem as offensive i will halt all Progress on this book and delete it. If it seems offensive please tell me.)

The year was 1941 and something happened to the Neutral United States Of America. The Japanese plan to bomb pearl Harbor never happened after the Japanese fleet was hit by a shockwave destroying it. All Communications with the U.S. Has cease. The Remaining Allied Power in confusion and shock that the Sleeping Giant was gone...Or was it?

All Across Canada people stare in shock of tall buildings, Weird vehicles and People in the U.S.-Canadian Border. The Japanese Navy was shock at the sight of Multiple large ships and Aircraft Carriers now in the Pacific Ocean. The British stare in shock at multiple Black Aircrafts that hover above London and Land, revealing men wearing odd Camoflauge Patterns and bulky gear.

How will the Modern United States Of America React being transferred back to the Second World War?

(new rewrite)

title: Wife of Vladimir ||Book One||
description:
"I ignored the anger I had felt all night and morning. I had always wanted to marry for love, and this didn't feel like it. My lifelong plan had come to an end, and it wasn't because I succeeded. Father had forced my hand because he was worried about me being alone. I could handle it when the time would come, but it wasn't anytime soon. I didn't understand his concern then as I do now. 

I heard the doors above the stairs creak upon and the shuffle of skirts following. I forced myself to keep my eyes upon the window as my heart started to race from nerves. This was it. This was the moment that would change my life for better or for worse. I thought of my father and how upset with him I was. This wasn't the life I wanted. 

'Sire.' Franklin whispered, already facing the direction of the stairs. 'Your bride is here.'

I held my breath. Despite my hatred for Invea and this plan my father had come up with, she didn't deserve to be the brunt of my anger. I needed to be civil. I represented Transylvania. I kept my eyes upon the floor as I turned, unsure if I was willing to face the truth just yet. I didn't feel ready.

'Don't be rude. She's watching you.' Franklin whispered into my ear before stepping away, letting me have the moment on my own. 

With hesitation coursing through my veins, I began to raise my eyes to look upon her; upon my future wife. 

Heat rushed to my cheeks as I finally saw her. My heart stopped, and I momentarily forgot how to breathe once I saw her smiling down at me.

For the first time, and hardly the last time, in my life, I was left utterly speechless."


~~~

title: Guardian of Rome (#2 in Gladiator Series)
description:
She defied an empire.

* * * *

Five months after Krista and her band of gladiators delivered a swift and humiliating defeat to the Roman army, Krista has become the leader of a slave rebellion that travels across Rome, freeing slaves from their chains and killing their masters.
Their numbers are growing vast as people flock to their cause.

But in order to destroy her enemy Krista must become like them, placing a strain on her relationship with those she loves the most.

Meanwhile, back in Rome, the Empress is devising her own plans for a swift victory as she conscripts vast legions from across the empire and calls on 'The Destroyer'. With a terrifying record of more than fifty bouts; no losses or draws, he is arguably the greatest Gladiator ever to have lived. 

But as war starts to loom a new enemy shall present itself to Krista. One that is more deadly than Rome itself and threatens to take the very thing that matters most to the Gladiatrix. 

****

Treachery, murder and lies are only a few of the things Krista will have to navigate as she searches for who she is, and all she can become if she is to succeed. 

. . . . as all roads lead to Rome, and a war that will shape the world.

title: The Goblin's Throne
description:
The Goblin's Trilogy #2

Nearly six years have passed since the goblin king and queen overthrew Queen Mab, took ownership of the Unseelie court and turned their kingdom into an empire. 

Life could not be any better for the goblin king and his human bride. Knut has recovered well from his ordeal and has taken up the mantle of the emperor with his usual unbridled enthusiasm. Matilda has settled into the life of an empress and mother both surprisingly happily. Their twins, Fritjof and Floki, just learned to stab things properly, their youngest, Odd, is learning to speak more than just growl and Matilda's currently expecting her fourth child. For the first time in her entire life, Matilda truly feels content.

However, when she is betrayed in the worst possible way by a trusted friend and she suffers an unbearable tragedy, Matilda's thirst for more is awoken like a slumbering beast. Her grief will turn her into a monster. A monster that will stop at nothing to protect the goblin's throne and bring suffering to all those that would dare try to claim it.

Special thanks to @thisrosewillneverdie for the stunning covers and banner she made!

title: Breathe Again
description:
What will it take for two people to make amends and admit they're in love?
After the end of the American Civil War, Sterling Hawkins returns home to be near the woman he's secretly loved his entire life, Dorothy Humphreys. 
When a house fire traps a recently widowed Dorothy and her infant son, Sterling risks his life to save them. To gain forgiveness for wrongs committed fourteen years ago, Sterling must prove he won't risk losing his last chance to claim love and happiness meant to be theirs. He only hopes he isn't too late.

authorBio:
Born the 2nd oldest of 6 children, she grew up often escaping to her bedroom to read, draw, and write. Somehow, she managed to graduate high school and even continued her education by being granted a Theatre scholarship and earned her degree in pretending to be someone else. After graduating, she served a mission for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints in Toronto, Canada.
Upon returning to the U.S., she earned her Cosmetology License so she could run with scissors and not get yelled at. To really finish the deal, she became a certified Media Makeup Artist.
In 2006 she married her husband, who she met while they both worked in a magical far-off land the locals call 'The Home Depot.' Now on the search for the ever-elusive Sasquatch, they live in the Pacific Northwest, where her husband is from. title: The Nymph of Versailles
description:
A 2019 Watty Winner.

For fans of Allison Pataki and Philippa Gregory, THE NYMPH OF VERSAILLES is based on the true story of Madame Montespan's rise and fall at the court of King Louis XIV.

Being the Sun King's mistress is a coveted position in a court full of greedy courtiers vying for power and Athénaïs de Montespan won't let anything stand in the way of her stealing the king's heart-not even poison. 

When the king's interest in his mistress Louise begins to wane, Montespan sees the position as a possible escape from her husband's mounting debts and loveless marriage. Her strained friendship with Louise doesn't stop her from charming the king. However keeping his heart is tricky in a court full of plotting beauties eager to have him for themselves, especially with her jealous husband bent on ending her seduction.

Then her children's governess becomes an unexpected rival for the king's heart and the only woman who can contend with Montespan. With the court swirling with rumors of poison, Montespan finds herself caught in the web of accusations. Her position with the king begins to crumble as she fights to hold on to the life she's built. Without the king's love, she fears she will lose everything as she falls from grace.

title: His First
description:
He has everything. The Look, The Fame, The Fortune, The Power.

Everyone in the world knows him. Some say he has no soul, just because he doesn't even blink when he crushes someone else's life. Some other, worship the ground he walks on. Some other, can't help but envy everything about him. 

But even with the world under his feet, There's nothing he wants more than this one girl. The one girl he already sets his eyes on since their toddler days. She's the only girl he'd gladly give up everything for. The only girl he will never think twice to get down on his knees just to see her smile. The only girl he ever loves.

She is His world.

 

 

 

Little does he know that he's also hers.

title: My Life In Ruins
description:
Passport?  Check.
A book of maps of every country in the world?  Check.
Backpack and small suitcase that contains everything I possess?  Check.
The world best, international traveling, treasure hunting dad and the most awesome stepmom who is more like my best friend?  Check. 
And new, totally gorgeous English intern of my father's who's tagging along on our next adventure?  Double check.
Call me, Callie Landon, nerdy and I'd have to totally agree.  I mean, how could I not be nerdy when I graduated high school at thirteen and double majored in college and got my bachelor's in both history and international studies by sixteen?  Again, just call me nerdy. 
But I loved my life of travel.  I got to see the world with my dad and stepmom, searching for treasure that was thought to be lost for hundreds of years...until we found it, of course.  And now we were going on an expedition to find one of the most sought after treasures:  the hidden treasure of the infamous pirate Blackbeard.
With the three of us, plus Max Knight, my dad's new intern, we were sure we would be able to find it with the help of some clues along the way. 
But then there are always those other people who just happen to think that they can find it before you and are willing to do anything to stop you. 
Oh, that's always fun.  
But then again, it's always fun in the world of treasure hunting.
(Book 1 in the My Life Series)
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Embrace the Snow
description:
"Hailing from Malwa, Nila was used to a riot of colours in both natural and manmade. Here, in the snow-covered landscape, everything had seemed a monochrome of white to her. Today, without anything to protect her from the cold, she could feel thousands of icy fingers on her body. Snowflakes swirled around her and she finally saw the snow for what it was - a breathtaking beauty.

"Don't fight it!" he whispered, pulling her into his embrace, "Embrace it! Embrace the Snow!"
_________________________________________________________________
Nilambari is a maid who serves the Princess of the Guptas. When she goes to celebrate Holi on behalf of the Princess, she is kidnapped by the Huns. When she meets the Hun King, Mihirana, sparks fly between them and she is irresistibly attracted to him. When Nila learns that she has a past with Mihira, will Nila resist this fatal attraction or will she become a willing captive for her Hun captor?

authorBio:
Traveler, poet, librarian, technology manager-award winning and Amazon best-selling author Caroline Warfield has been many things (even a nun), but above all she is a romantic. Having retired to the urban wilds of eastern Pennsylvania, she reckons she is on at least her third act, happily working in an office surrounded by windows where she lets her characters lead her to adventures while she nudges them to explore the riskiest territory of all, the human heart. She is enamored of history, owls, and gardens (but not the actual act of gardening). She blogs regularly on her website and is also a regular contributor to The Teatime Tattler, a blog in the shape of a fictional nineteenth century gossip rag.

Her current series, Children of Empire, set in the late Georgian/early Victorian period, focuses on the boys of A Dangerous Nativity, three cousins, driven apart by lies and deceit, who must find their way back from the distant reaches of the empire.

title: Then Comes Murder
description:
Heir and a spare...

Jacob Thornton-Spencer never intended to inherit his father's estate-one rarely does when they're the half-disowned second son of a particularly ill-tempered duke-but when his father and his brother drop dead in the middle of a wedding, Jacob finds himself sole heir...and sole suspect. 

Fortunately, he has an alibi. Unfortunately, confessing the truth would mean the one sentence he's been aiming to avoid: marriage. 

A Corinthian woman...

Eleanor Fane is an accomplished woman, to say the very least. Well-read, well-spoken, and far too proficient in shooting, riding, and wit to be considered any diamond of the first water. Her greatest accomplishment yet? Avoiding the oppressive shackles of the marriage market. 

She never dreamed that attending her cousin's wedding would threaten matrimony. 

Much less threaten her very life.

Finding a husband is a serious business after all.

title: 𝐌𝐀𝐉𝐁𝐎𝐎𝐑: 𝐍𝐀 𝐇𝐔𝐌 𝐍𝐀 𝐓𝐔𝐌| Indian Historical Fiction
description:
𝟏𝟗𝟓𝟎 - 𝐀 𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐭-𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐠𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐬

Set in the backdrop of a middle-class family trying to survive after the loss of their loved ones in the war of independence, Kanak finds herself engaged with a man in a marriage she had no will in.
Seeing her family already suffering enough to give them her share too, she decided to get married anyway. Leaving back her past with her lover who she knew would never be able to marry her due to societal barriers, she shrugs into the fire of life with Ashwik Agarwal, a man she knew nothing of.

Her life turned upside down when Kanak found herself in a loveless marriage torn between her heart that craved love and her mind that was strict with the principles of life.
But is that all she has to offer? Is that the only value she can give away to life, by being the responsible woman of the house? 

Through her eyes, "Majboor: Na Hum Na Tum" intricately delves into the societal chains that linger in independent India, compelling readers to reflect on personal freedom versus societal obligation.

(currently On-hold)

authorBio:
आप से फिर तुम हुए, फिर तू का उनवां हो गए🖤

welcome to my profile, stranger!
🙏🏻🪔🪷📜 🪕🪬

It's no less than a privilege to bring you to notice my works in a stream of many others. Yet I, ignorant of all controversies, am here to let you know my books hold the quality to stand apart from the crowd. I write historical fiction whose characters might be fictional but their struggles and waves of laughter are not. You won't find 'perfect' characters here, you'll find the 'realistic' ones instead.
Grant me your will to take you into the history of India, to peep into the radiant lives of people back in the day. I brew up stories and plots in my mind and give them my share of wings to help them fly to your roofs to let you know, that stories like these... do exist!
As a child, I never found a book that did justice to the type of books I wanted to read, and here I am making sure you guys don't face the same disappointment as I did back then.

⊂ 𝐑𝐀𝐉𝐏𝐔𝐓𝐈-𝐁𝐀𝐈𝐒𝐀 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐬 ♛

title: His Sudden Bride (The Brides # 1) COMPLETED
description:
LET THE GAMES BEGIN...
When Lady Alexandra Herbert discovered that she was to be married to Edward Wellesley, Marquess of Douro, heir to the Dukedom of Wellington, she was appalled. Marriage? Surely not. Without a Season, Lexa feels insecure of possibly becoming a wife to a prestigious family. But when she meets Edward, she start to change her mind...
  
FOR WHEN PASSION SPARKS...
Edward Wellesley, Marquess of Douro, was outraged with the sudden news of get married. After witnessing the scandal that resulted from the fall of his parents' marriage, he wanted nothing to do with a wife. But duty dictates that he does. It's only when he meets his intended, Lady Alexandra, who fascinates him to the point of falling love, does he question himself.
  
 IT BURNS RED AS THE ROSE...
Neither of them is prepared for the married life  nor they are not prepared for the suddenness of the attraction they are harboring for each other and where it will lead them. Let the passions begin, for the passions of the rose will break someone's heart...
  
Let the bridegroom and his sudden bride commence their fate...

title: Treasure of the sea |Lesbian story|
description:
Spring, year 1716
Eveline Adler is the daughter of a wealthy English merchant. Her family moved to the New World, while she stayed in London to finish her studies. After two years separated from her family, she decides to leave and join her loved ones in Charlestown. However, the ship is attacked by pirates, commanded by Captain Arenis, a dangerous woman capable of killing a man with her bare hands. 
Eveline's destiny changes forever; she plunges into an unfamiliar world so different from the respectable and well-educated environment of English high society. On a pirate ship she cannot escape the hard life of a sailor, the numerous boardings and, above all, she cannot escape Arenis. 
Eveline embarks on many adventures, but the greatest adventure will be to discover herself and her worth in a world that belongs only to men.

title: The Black Death (A Medieval Action/Romance)
description:
The year is 1338 and England is in a time of peril as raiders pillage the land and, with no one to challenge them, their actions begin to grow like wildfire. 

At the height of their terror, eight year old Isadora watches her mother and sister be raped and murdered by an army of mercenaries before her village is scorched to the ground. 

Promising to avenge her family, Izzie grows up to become the most feared warrior in the country.

* * * 

10 years later and a new King sits on the throne. The raiders have scattered to the east and peace seems to have returned to England but it is short lived as a new evil has come to England. 

A horrible disease starts to plague the country and the king orders villages to be purged as sacrifices to appease the Lord. 

Now, Izzie is called upon to help the King's subjects survive his soldiers with her unique set of skills. 

But the warrior with no alligences may just discover something so dreadful that could change her view on King, God and Country forever.

With a secret that has the potential to complicate her new position, and threats from other kingdoms looming, Endolynn can only do so much to keep things together. But none of that compares to what is to come.

title: Speculation
description:
The speculation of 1851. It was hailed as a sure prospect, every cotton mill owner who invested was sure to succeed, but what it it failed? The city of Milton was soon to find out as some of the most prominent mills closed their doors leaving hundreds out of work. Within all this seeming calamity was Marlborough Mills and it's master; Mr. John Thornton. He was never one to engage in speculations, but this venture affected him none the less. Then there was Margaret Hale. She was from the south and never cared for his harsh northern ways, or so he thought; but she would always be the only women he would ever love.

Now Marlborough Mills was struggling and thru a series of events Mr. Thornton found that his new land lord was none other than Margaret Hale of London. Could John and Margaret find their way back to each other and set matters right or were they always destined to be apart...

This story is based on the novel by Elizabeth Gaskell, North and South, and the adaptation by the same name.  



Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:

Also..I don't think I ever stopped loving the TV show...The Young Riders.  Bases loosely on the Pony Express  and a group of young express riders...    I love reading fan fic  about the series and writing about them and discussing their lives and their world in the 1860's

title: The Paleys (1921-1927) - An Alternate Romanov Story
description:
Following the Grand Ducal Coup of 1917, Russia embarks on a tenuous path to recovery. Grand Duke Michael, acting as regent for the young Tsar Alexei II, has granted autonomy to various regions and overseen a gradual economic revival. Yet, a shadow hangs over the future. The young Tsar has just recovered from a severe haemophilia episode and, although advances in medicine seem to be promising for his condition, voices within the family are questioning his rightful place as Tsar of Russia.

Meanwhile, in Paris, the exiled members of the Bolshevik party feel that the chance of achieving their long-awaited revolution is slipping away. Russia's prosperity has damaged their cause and their leader, Vladimir Lenin is fading away after a series of strokes. The race to occupy his place is on and is feverous, but Grigory Zinoviev has a more subtle approach. He intends to use an unexpected connection to the Ballets Russes, Russia's most avant-garde ballet company and long supported by Grand Duke Paul, to find his way into the imperial family and damage it from within.

As for the Paleys, Grand Duke Paul's morganatic family, they are fully settled in Russia. Prince Vladimir Paley continues his work as a professor of Russian Literature at the Corps des Pages and accepts the position of tutor to Grand Duke Michael's two children, Tata and George. Princess Irina Paley is living a fairytale romance with Prince Feodor Alexandrovich, but she'll have to make a difficult choice between love and her own personal ambitions.

Princess Natalia, known for her artistic spirit, finds herself drawn to a captivating ballet dancer. However, her unconventional passions could spark unforeseen consequences for both her and the Empire.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Death of a Bachelor
description:
General Kieran Hammedatha has been placed under pressure by his father to find a wife for far too long.
 You'd think that a brave and handsome soldier like him would find a bride in a blink of an eye.

 That's where you're wrong.

General Kieran is not a ladies man. He has never been one to persue women, and cannot bear how they fall to his feet and adore him openly. 

That said, he is against the idea of marriage, simply because he can't stand a life long relationship with someone who's all up in his business.

That is until he meets Elena Rivera, a woman of noble birth, who just keeps running away from him.

With her, logic flies out the window and he is left with an impulse to pursue.

title: In The Arms of My Enemy Book 1
description:
Full version available on Amazon! https://a.co/d/8Mj3nhv

Fidelia Atwell, a fiery red-headed American, will do anything to protect her sister during the war of 1812: even marry her enemy, the British spy Lord William Greyville.
****
When British spy Lord William Greyville promises to protect the American sisters of his childhood friend in exchange for his life, fiery American Fidelia Atwell finds herself married to her enemy to protect his cover and her sister's life. 
 The couple immediately butts heads, but Fidelia soon discovers her handsome husband to be a gentle and loving man who softens her feisty temper.  
When new dangers threaten Fidelia's life and William's cover, she finds herself playing the part of the spy to protect the man she loves and end the war that keeps them apart, but a traitor and an old enemy mean that failure will be something worse than death for William and the Atwell sisters.

As spies, they could both lose their lives.  
As husband and wife, they could both lose their hearts.

(Book One of the "In The Arms of My Love" Series)

title: Love Me Long (Love Me Book 4)
description:
Chloe Lockwood has loved Valentine Juric since she was fifteen. It was a love that had blossomed into a love affair when she was only nineteen years old. They had vowed their love for one another. Valentine's only dream had been to heal people, and Chloe's dream had been to love him. When Valentine becomes the ruler of his small country which is in the midst of civil war, his dream of healing is crushed and he must become a warrior. While Valentine stays behind to fight the war, Chloe is sent home to the U.S. There she stays for twelve years, waiting for the time she can return to Valentine. When news breaks that Valentine has found another, Chloe realizes she is done waiting and returns to take back what was lost.

title: A Mahogany Moment
description:
In 1942, James 'Jamie' Ross's life seems perfect-he has a promising career, an approved engagement to a beautiful woman, and his parents' blessings. However, after a fight leaves him injured, he finds himself under the care of Olivia Townsend, a nurse at the only colored hospital in their small Alabama town. Despite societal norms, Jamie and Olivia form a deep connection that transcends racial boundaries. As their friendship blossoms into a forbidden romance, both must confront the prejudices of their time and decide whether their love is worth risking everything they've ever known for.

title: Whispers of Freedom
description:
In the tumultuous backdrop of the Korean War, Lena "Lark" Jackson, a gifted jazz singer from New Orleans, finds herself navigating a world torn apart by conflict and uncertainty. With her powerful voice, she captivates audiences in the smoky jazz clubs of Seoul, using music as her refuge amidst the chaos. But when she encounters Sergeant Kim Joon-ho, a dedicated South Korean soldier haunted by the scars of war, their worlds collide in a moment of unexpected connection.

As Lena and Joon-ho navigate the perils of a country at war, their bond deepens, blossoming into a forbidden love that transcends cultural barriers and the dangers surrounding them. Together, they embark on a perilous journey, facing ambushes, betrayals, and the heart-wrenching choices that come with war. Each stolen moment is a reminder of the freedom they seek-not just from the physical confines of the war but from the emotional barriers they've built to protect themselves.

Whispers of Freedom is a poignant tale of love, loss, and resilience, exploring how two souls from vastly different backgrounds can find solace in one another amidst the chaos of a world at war. It's a story that celebrates the power of music to heal, the strength of human connection, and the indomitable spirit that fights for freedom against all odds. Will their love be strong enough to survive the challenges ahead, or will the war tear them apart?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Adamya
description:
अन्तः अस्ति प्रारंभः।

The end is the beginning.

A caterpillar dies, to birth a butterfly. Water evaporates to rain down. Dead carcasses fill the stomachs of vultures.Life gives way to death and death to life. In a vicious circle of different karmas and janmas, a soul leaves a decaying body to move onto something better and livelier.

But what if certain karmas are found hanging on the thin string between salvation and damnation?

This is exactly where Mihira Ramnath Subhedar finds herself. The last of the many Kaliyugis, she was holding on to the narrowest beam that would lead her towards eternal the light, or so she thought.

Poets were liars, she discovered when the end neared. There was nothing peaceful about death, no rest and no respite; just an ounce of faith which made her believe that she would finally find a place at the Lord's feet. But the ever merciful Leeladhari had discrete intents for such a soul that had just witnessed the end of the heinous yuga.

"No, ain't Vaikuntha but Dvāpara. Good luck completing the unfinished business!"

Walk along the aisle with Mihira while she embarks on the greatest pilgrimage of her rekindled life, witnesses the red of the Swastika being washed over by the red of vengeful blood and being swept off her feet by a man she'd never heard of.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Mending Broken Bonds
description:
Sometimes, one Act, however small and childish, can change the course of Destiny without the person doing it knowing about that beforehand. 

Such was the case with Karn when he overheard a conversation between the Kuru Kulvadhus, learning his identity before he was supposed to.

Standing at a diverging Road, he decides to Mend Bonds between the Cousins rather than sitting idly and watching an inevitable War unfold. 

Aided by the youngest Princess of Hastinapur and the Brahmin King of Panchal, will the Suryaputra be able to succeed in uniting the Kauravas and the Pandavas as they embark on a Holiday to explore the Kingdoms of Aryavart?

_

Book 2 of "Altered History of Dwapar" tetralogy, a fictional series based on Mahabharat, the sole purpose of it being entertainment.

Now, as the threat of another war looms over Hastinapur, Karna must return to the brothers who hate him, to the mother who rejected him and to the friend he betrayed.  A story of redemption, forgiveness, sacrifice and new beginnings.
