title: The Girl With The Sunset Eyes {Historical Interracial Romance/ #1 Blake Series}
description:
{London 1795} Katherine Ayim is resold illegally after running away from her master.  Her new owner is known for his benevolent nature and approachable character. But, the middle class business man is overly protective of his investment. How good can a man be if he buys a slave? Or will be able to let go of the girl with the sunset eyes?

authorBio:
Forewarning: I love talking and I think my intro shows that. Sorry!

I started writing in May 2011, after fruitlessly pursuing other past times. But, writing has become a release, a love and an art to me. I hope to one day write a historical fiction novel which makes wider audiences think beyond their own problems because there are so many. I hope to do this with relatable characters, fascinating eras in history and a little bit of luck.

I keep my cringe earlier works because it shows where I started from. My readers feed my writing soul. I thank every one of you. My pledge from 2016 is I will read and cherish and reply to every comment and vote. Apart from that, I'd say my books reflect my growth as a writer and there's not much else for me to say...

Regarding reading requests: I adore undiscovered literature/ authors so I will take requests but I might take a day or two. Also just message and say hi.

Outside writing, I'm a second year medical student :) Medical doctor in 2021 if all goes well!

Yours,

Meepy ©

Admin:

Blake Series: A 2 part series following William Blake and Katherine Ayim. No 3rd part due to other commitments. Youtube trailers are below:

The Girl With Sunset Eyes: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YYfuv2kttp0

Current Updates Summer 2016:

I am replying to comments from 2011-2016 now because I was applying to medical school so I was focusing on my application. I came from an underprivileged school and I am the first person in my family to go to university. I was just exhausted and writing and replying was too much.  But, that's not an excuse. I love hearing back and I will be a lot better now.

Current Story: Coming of Age (also interracial historical romance) called Workshop of the World. Weekly to Biweekly updates

title: Wuthering Heights by Emily Bronte
description:
When young orphan Heathcliff is adopted by a wealthy gentleman, he quickly forms a close bond with his benefactor's daughter, Cathy. But over the years, their childhood friendship morphs into a desperate, twisted, possessive love, as they wrestle with the violent and tyrannical rule of Cathy's brother and the confines of social class that keep them apart. What follows is an ingenious and darkly captivating narrative of frustrated passion and tortured heartbreak reverberating through the generations, wrought with all the brutality, power, and wildness of the Yorkshire moors. 

With striking force, Emily Brontë's mesmerizing prose claws at the nature of human folly, defying the gender, religious, and social mores of its day. Wuthering Heights is a transcendent, mystifying masterpiece that examines the cruelty of love, and the ways in which the past, scratching at a windowpane with ghostly fingers, never lets us go.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Abandoned Bride
description:
Rose and Prince Edward's love and marriage defy all laws. He is of noble blood and she is a commoner whose parents left her at a temple when she was born.

After Edward's older brother, the king, loses his life at war, he's next in line to take the throne.

The Kingdom's noble people are displeased with the future King's unlawful union and will stop at nothing to end it.

But when Charlotte; Edward's power-hungry ex, moves into the palace, the future of the great nation is uncertain.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I've always been drawn to the complicated spaces in life-the grey areas where right and wrong don't quite exist, where every choice is messy, and morality doesn't come with instructions. Those are the stories I love to write.

At first glance, my books might seem like your typical boy-meets-girl stories. But beneath the surface, there's always something darker-a psychological undercurrent, a shadow pressing in on the characters. I love exploring how love, trust, and even identity unravel in unexpected ways when faced with the weight of secrets, flaws, and the complexities of being human.

My stories aren't about heroes or villains; they're about people-raw, imperfect, and deeply tangled in their own realities. If you're into tales that don't offer easy answers, where you're left questioning everything alongside the characters, then you might find a piece of yourself here.

---------

South African. 🇿🇦
Ig: dineomenko

dineo@dineomenko.com

title: The Art of Defiance | ✔
description:
Lady Eleanor Mary Cantwell, daughter of the Marquess of Salford, is a proper young lady. With her golden complexion, raven-black hair, and manners befitting a princess, Lady Eleanor has always been deemed a belle. There is just one problem.

Lady Eleanor Cantwell is Indian.

Having been adopted from India when Lady Salford found herself unable to bear a child, Lady Eleanor is shunned by society, including her mother, on account of her true heritage. The ladies turn their noses up at her and the gentlemen only wish for her virtue which she clings to dearly. They certainly have no wish to wed an Indian girl, no matter how pretty she is!

Which is why the entire ton is incredulous when a young man - a duke, no less! - offers his hand in marriage to the young daughter of the Marquess of Salford. Lady Eleanor finds it quite hard to believe that any gentleman would wish to marry her and instead of feeling grateful, all she feels is remorse and anger. A husband would only bring with him a mountain of restrictions that were detrimental to her plans of travelling the world - the land of her ancestors, in particular. 

So, when her parents sell her off to the duke, she realises that she no longer cares for society, her beloved father, or her reputation. And when the duke makes her an enticing offer, she realises she would have to abandon all sense of propriety, manners, and rules to do what he asks of her.

She would have to defy.

©Richa Rachael Kurian, 2021
.

title: Viscounts and Vampires
description:
Eleanor Hastings is hardly an ordinary debutante. She is entering her first London Season at the age of twenty-four, after spending the past nine years with her father in India. With her mother determined to have her make a good match amongst the ton, Eleanor has more pressing matters on her mind. Namely, hunting vampires. After making the startling discovery that vampires have returned to London after more than thirty years, Eleanor must rely on her wits, courage, and newfound friends to combat the growing threat.

title: The Prince and His Slave
description:
Arius is the Prince of Egypt, the future Pharaoh. Everyone knows how great of a young man he is and he is respected by all of Egypt.  However, he hates his father and because of this, his trip to becoming the next Pharaoh becomes a hundred times more difficult.

Chione is a slave that works at the Pharaoh's palace. She has nothing, except for a loving grandfather who she was sadly separated from. But there is only one thing she wants, and that is to get back at the Pharaoh for killing her family.

It doesn't take too long for these two people's lives to come together, and when they do, it doesn't take them too long to realize that they are breaking Egyptian laws and putting both their lives at risk. 
 
It is a forbidden love that could never last...
For he is the Prince and she is merely his Slave.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Grace (A Sinclair Society Novella) Rough Draft
description:
Grace Anderson was certain her future was secure when she accepted the proposal of Jonathan Sinclair. When he dies unexpectedly, she is devastated, and even after five years, she has found no man who can equal the man she was to have married. 

Her mother has introduced uncountable bachelors to her, but she could not encourage them. A strange lady's maid reintroduces Grace to Mr. Adam Melbourne, a young man who had been as a younger brother to Jonathan. Despite her determination to ignore the cheerful gentleman, she thinks of the future once again.

A companion novella to The Debutante, The Sinclair Society Book Two and Best Laid Plans, A Gentleman of Misfortune Book Two.

title: The Spaniard's Bride
description:
Third Book in the Bride Series

Roseanne never believed in fairy tales. They just didn't seem quite as realistic and perfect as her own life. Being the only daughter of Queen Annalisa, she had everything laid at her feet. From the fancy dresses and elaborate jewels to the handsome Knights, Roseanne, the pinnacle of beauty in England, could not have asked for more. 

Until the untimely demise of her mother. Suddenly, her father is aiming to settle a treaty with a long time enemy. And she is the peace part. 

Forced to marry the insensitive king of a completely different country, she has to decided whether she made the right choice of not.

title: Mermaid Tear (The Fated #2)
description:
Her entire life, Iliana has heard that those affected by the hands of the gods will live harsh, grand lives. Unfortunately for her, over the past month she has learned exactly how true those stories are. 

For Kain, that means learning how to deal with what it means to be a hero. Selflessness and bravery are required in equal measure, as well as the will to step into a role he has never wanted to play. As those around him begin to recognize the string of fate at play, unexpected allies arise, and take actions that will shake the world as he knows it.

For Iliana, it means navigating life among the Reotakian peerage. Given to the emperor as a plaything, she must learn to hold her tongue, or suffer at the madman's hands.

Unfortunately for both of them, games played by the gods are never easy. 

The measure of life in the eyes of an immortal will always be different than that of a human. 

And the death of a hero, necessary for the betterment of the world.

**Cover by ItalyChick**
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, Kat here~! Or, Unbound, depends on your preference.

So, about me.

I'm 27, use she/her/hers pronouns, and am a hopeless romantic when it comes to books. I enjoy cliches, books with royalty, dark magic, and world-ending stakes. Fate is another bonus for me, as well as dark fantasy. This shows a lot in my writing!

The main project I have on this account, The Fated, is a four book series full of magic, gods, royalty, and a bit of fate. There are slow burn romances, deaths, angst, and swordfights! If you're interested, the first book in the series--Siren Song--is finished, with the second--Mermaid Tear--quickly following.

At the moment, I only plan on posting and not on taking requests for reading.  My job keeps me too busy. Feel free to message me at any time with anything about my books, though! I'm always willing to talk...perhaps a bit too much.

Highest ranking #4
For a man used to ruling the British aristocracy, William Hamilton was contend being ruled by the young vixen who fell in his arms accidentally. 
For a woman used to being chased for her dowry and ridiculed for her lack of grace, Georgiana Malcolm has managed to stay positive through it all. When she falls for the man that ton calls "Angel" her confidence wavers, will she be enough to tie down a man like that.

title: Gods of Malcea ✔️
description:
In the land of gods and monsters, humanity ravaged Malcea with endless wars. Their insatiable hunger for treasure, pleasure, and power led them to forsake the gods who had once guided them. For thousands of years, the gods remained silent, watching with grief and fury as their creations spiraled into chaos. But when humans stood on the brink of war with the ancient dragons, the gods finally chose to intervene. Their return, however, was far from merciful-for the Gods of Malcea had darker, more sinister designs for their wayward children.

Karos, a soldier of Asalph, is one such pawn in their game. Trained to hunt dragons, his beliefs are shaken when he forms an unexpected bond with Ake, a dragon desperate to return home. As Karos questions the gods' motives, he must decide whether to uphold the laws of his homeland or fight for a future shaped by his own choices-and the fragile, growing bond with Ake who challenges everything he thought he knew.
         _______________________
       
      @Haylee for this gorgeous cover!

authorBio:
*All of my works are rough drafts! Some are just rougher than others, so beware.*

Why share my rough drafts for everyone to see? Because writing is a long, challenging, and imperfect process, and I'm not going to pretend otherwise.

Every great piece of writing starts somewhere, and what you're reading now is just the beginning of that journey. A journey I would like for you to take with me, and maybe inspire you to start a journey of your own along the way.

I go by Sno or Milan.

I write all the gay. 

I'm ace.

I'm not obsessed with the idea of originality, but rather taking the familiar and turning it on its head. I strive to create thoughtful, introspective, and just fun stories that stick with you long past the final page.

title: Behind The Walls
description:
My fingers slid down his frangible ribs, subconsciously counting each one. I stared upon his scrawny figure. My hatred had quickly turned into guilt and embarrassment. The taste of my salty tears filled the corners of my lips; I had really been standing here for twenty minutes now. The path that lead me to this destination was unquestionably not a pleasing one.

♥️♣️♦️♠️♥️♣️♦️♠️

🏰

Adelaide is forced to marry the prince from her neighbouring kingdom of Arcania... 

at least, that's what the prophecy of the envelope determines. 

Adelaide has gotten tired of being pushed around all her life; she decides to take matters into her own hands and ventures off to Arcania to plan her escape. 

Not expecting to find her fiancé's diary, she begins to read it. 

Her eyes are unveiled to the sins he has committed, or are they really his sins?

Will Adelaide be able to escape the marriage she's forced into? 

Is there a deeper meaning behind her mistreatment?

Does she end up changing her mind and falling in love with this mysterious man anyways?

.  .  .

I still need to proof read this one more so please point out any mistakes you find✨

title: Twins of Tenby Hall
description:
"The Riley twins were born in the spring of 1797 during a ferocious storm that battered the Salisbury 
Plain for three days together. Isabel entered the world with a flash of lightning, her shrieking drowned 
out by a grand clap of thunder. Thirteen minutes later the storm abated, clouds parted, and Miranda 
was handed to her father, blinking in rays of sun that poured through the window."

Isabel loves the comfort of home and the company of her family and few close friends. She doesn't care for the drama of the season or dream of gothic adventures as her sister does. She is wild and carefree in her own right, mischievous if need be, and the fun she has with her sister and closest friend is enough to satisfy her fancies. If only life took pleasure in forcing adventure on those who wished for it, instead of those who did not.

Miranda is a playful romantic, she looks forward to her first season with a desperation which rivals that of a starving man on his way to a feast. She can't wait to dress in beautiful gowns and dance the nights away with the height of the Ton. More than anything, she dreams of finding her prince charming and falling in love; but love is a game, and some play it far too well.

title: The Crimson General Desires no Prince! (GL)
description:
A festive day, a week have the kingdom of Polestin celebrated for their victory with the crimson general leading their army.


The soldiers who served have been guaranteed a spot inside a local bar of the capital city. 

Clank!



"The Crimson General despite being a woman is a talented warrior! Three cheers for the general!"

"That woman saved me when I needed it! All hail the general!"

"She's like a sister to all the soldier! All hail our general!" 



Every warrior kept on drinking as the news reached them that the war with their neighboring kingdom was over, the ruler raised their white flag as they asked for mercy- being beneath the crimson general. 



"General! Come drink with us!" 

"..."

The Crimson General, for how she got her name is because of her crimson hair that became the trademark of her legendary name already spreading across the many kingdoms. 

"I don't drink." she denies the invitation her comrades and just sat down on the table watching the others enjoy themselves.


"Enjoy, general! You might even find a man here that suits to your liking! You know... your type I think...! The general would love a soft-spoken man!"

"...No."

"Hah! That's a shame! In any case I heard that you'll be receiving a reward for helping win the war!"


"A reward... I wonder what could it be."

...


The reward:

"You can choose any of my children to marry you. I have the finest royal princes for you to choose. That is my reward." The King motions to his left side showing his sons who smiles, sitting in their throne meeting her gaze..


"Eh?"


"My liege, forgive me but this is..."


"Are my children not good enough for you? General, I applaud your accomplishment. Isn't marrying into the royal family a good enough reward for the general?" The King asked the general who swallowed the lump in her throat looking at the princes in display.

"I choose-!"

Everyone stopped and waiting for the girl to continue. 




"I choose the princess instead!"

title: Broken But Unburnt
description:
(This story will become free on JULY 15, 2024)

They say nothing was left of Ravenna Aphelion... nothing but her ancestral amber ring and a scared little girl clinging to it and crying in the ash of her home, broken but unburnt. 

Season 1 of Broken But Unburnt

***

Years later, three kingdoms are on the verge of war. Karil seeks to wipe out the magic that Idoria worships and Delos is caught in the middle, taking refugees and making alliances that are raising tensions more than diffusing them. A man in the West calls himself The Chaos and is doing his best to live up to the name, a prophecy has scholars on the edge, and religious zealots are flooding the streets and committing violent acts against those against the belief.

This world needs salvation. And it may come from the most unlikely of sources; the bastard of a sullen king, an assassin with a deadly secret, and a monster hunter from an ancient order. 

They may not save the world but they will give it a choice. Resurrection or ruin? What will humanity choose?

title: TAUHIDA ✔️
description:
He turned abruptly to face her, she was already getting on his nerves. 

"What in the name of Allah is wrong with you?" he asked with a sigh."You don't get me, do you?" he asked again trying to be clear. 

"It is you that don't get me, if you did, I wouldn't be here in the first place" she voiced narrowing her eyes on him. 

"Then leave" he seethed glaring directly at her. "Is that a challenge I hear?" she asked holding her waist with both hands. 

"Take it as you think of it" he voiced walking away majestically. she groaned and murmured softly beneath her breath but it didn't remain unheard to him "He knows I can't, grumpy" she said and he found himself smiling weirdly to no one in particular. 

~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~•~

Just like scattered stars trying to cluster again, just like the scars trying to heal with love, just like the swirling storm breaking down all bounds and just like the blinking starlight shining on a mirror, this story is also a mirror of life. 

Cold secrets will be clamped just like the break of dawn. Despite all odds, underneath their ventricles and cuticles is an undying love for each other. 

Just stay tuned with me so I will prove once again how fate can actually change the hearts of two people, Tauhida Al-amin Borodo and Sayf Hakeem Elnafaty @ "Tauhida". 

Lots of love
Deedi-- ❤️

title: Sincerely Scarlett (Letters Of Change Series Book 2)(COMPLETED)
description:
**1st Draft, this will eventually be edited!**

He heard voices coming from elsewhere as he rang the fancy bell for service.
"I'll get it!" he heard a muffled small voice say before a young girl came from the door behind the counter
"Hello Sir! And welcome to the Boardinghouse." The young girl said cheerfully.
"Hello Miss, I would like a room." George said with a smile, the young girl had bouncy red curls and large icy blue eyes that were the same color as his own. Her smile seemed familiar but he knew he hadn't met the small girl before, yet the one before him seemed very familiar.
"I don't know how to do that..." She said with a frown "Wait here I'll go get my Mama!"
George smiled as she ran back through the doors yelling for her Mother.
"Belinda Grace! It's not polite to shout indoors! You know that." He heard a familiar voice say, a voice he hadn't heard in around eight years. Scarlett his heart raced almost instantly as the very woman who filled his each and every dream for the past eight years walked out the door and greeted him.
She seemed to have gotten even more beautiful if that were even possible. Her red hair no longer was confided to a fancy bun or hairstyle. It now fell past her waist in thick waves free and unruly while her bangs fell into her hauntingly beautiful Gray eyes. She had a simple smile on her face showing faint dimples on either side of her cheeks. Her skin was still the color of ivory but now housed several freckles which only made her more becoming.
"How may I help you?" Scarlett asked bringing him from his thoughts.
"Oh um... I-I'd like a room... with a bath." He said thankful for his overgrown facial hair. She didn't recognize him, and he was fine with that. He wasn't ready to face his wife he ran out on eight years ago.

title: Never Kiss a Toad
description:
[A Victorian romance continuing family stories begun in the various Regency books of Jude Knight and Mariana Gabrielle.]

David "Toad" Northope, heir to the Duke of Wellbridge and rogue in the mold of his infamous father, knows Lady Sarah "Sal" Grenford, daughter of the once-profligate Duke of Haverford, will always hold his heart. But when the two teens are caught in bed together by their horrified parents, he is sent away to finish school on the Continent, and she is thrown into the depths of her first London Season.

Can two reformed rakes keep their children from making the same mistakes they did? The dukes decide keeping them apart will do the trick, so as the children reach their majority, Toad is put to work at sea, learning to manage his mother's shipping concern, and Sal is taken to the other side of the world, as far from him as possible. How will Toad and Sal's love withstand long years of separation, not to mention nasty lies, vicious rumors, attractive other suitors, and well-meaning parents who threaten to destroy their future before it has begun?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Have you ever wanted something so much you were afraid to even try? That was me ten years ago.

For as long as I can remember, I've wanted to be a novelist. I even started dozens of stories, over the years.

But life kept getting in the way. A seriously ill child who required years of therapy; a rising mortgage that led to a full-time job; six children, my own chronic illness... the writing took a back seat.

As the years passed, the fear grew. If I didn't put my stories out there in the market, I wouldn't risk making a fool of myself. I could keep the dream alive if I never put it to the test.

Then my mother died. That great lady had waited her whole life to read a novel of mine, and now it would never happen.

So I faced my fear and changed it-told everyone I knew I was writing a novel. Now I'd make a fool of myself for certain if I didn't finish.

My first book came out to excellent reviews in December 2014, and the rest is history. Many books, lots of positive reviews, and a few awards later, I feel foolish for not starting earlier.

Dip your toe into my world here on Watpadd, or with one of my lunch-time reads collections or a novella, or dive into a novel. And let me know what you think.

title: The Rise of an Empress
description:
In the year 1608, Countess Anastasia Radziwiłl, an extraordinarily beautiful and ambitious young woman, begins her journey as the queen's lady-in-waiting in the opulent Polish Royal Palace. This prestigious position is no accident-it is part of Anastasia's carefully devised plan to ascend the rigid hierarchy of court life and secure a place beside the enigmatic Prince Aleksander, heir to the throne.

Anastasia's sharp mind, charm, and grace make her a force to be reckoned with as she maneuvers through the treacherous politics of the 17th-century Polish court. Serving the queen brings her close to the very heart of power, where she learns to manipulate alliances, outwit rivals, and earn the prince's favor. Yet, even as her calculated steps bring her closer to her goal, Anastasia must tread carefully, for one wrong move could cost her everything.

title: My Soldier (*Completed*)
description:
"Do you have to leave?" I say through tears. 
"I promise I'll be home before you know it."
That's a lie. It'll feel longer than what it actually is. And it will all feel like hell. 
"I'll be lost and...and...alone without you, Matt" I sob even harder. 
"Don't say that. You'll have Aunt Kathy and Jo. Trust me when I say this: they know exactly what they're doing. They've been through plenty of these before."
I nod, not trusting my voice, afraid I'll break down again. His hand comes to my cheek as he wipes a tear that's falling. His arms then indulge me in a huge hug, his familiar cologne invading  my nostrils. 
"STARKS! We're boarding!" I flinch at the fact that its time to let him go. 
He kisses the top of my head, 
"I love you." He whispers in my ear. 
"I love you too." I respond weakly. 
"I love you most." 
And with a final, hard kiss, he walks away from me. 
Kathy holds me and lets me cry on her shoulder as Matt looks back at me, and walks into the plane.
~~~
**This is an original story by @QuackingDuck. Any other publication of this story has been stolen**

title: Rein in the Highlands
description:
After the death of her mother Rein finds that her small world comes crashing down, losing her home to pay for the expensive hospital bills was not something Rein expected either was moving to Scotland... After losing the house Rein's father contacts someone he thought he could forget, His sister. Aunt Sophia is a reclusive woman that seems to be more than content living in exile on a lonely farm in the Scottish countryside . When Rein arrives she is moping around inside depressed with the relentless thundering and rain outside that is until one day she ventures outside determined on figuring out why she feels so attached to the Land, what she hadn't anticipated was being sent to a whole other time, back to the 12th century Scotland. With her limited knowledge of the land and the customs Rein soon finds herself with a target on her back and in the middle of two warring clans. However all hope is not lost when Rein finds herself on the cusp of death her saviour comes in the form of Rowan Mclain Laird of Mclain keep, an often moody tortured soul, that is until his path crosses with Rein slowly and all at once Rein begins to melt the heart that time had frozen, But will Rowan be able to protect his new found love from the darkness brewing. What happens when you test the bonds of time, nothing will ever be the same when time begins to write its wrongs.

title: Transmigrate to the 80s to be a stepmother
description:
穿到八零当"后妈" written by 肆婳v

Qin Shi saved a child and died. The system gave her three rebirth choices.

1. Transmigrate to the 60s to be another family's daughter-in-law.
2. Transmigrate to the 70s to be an educated youth in the countryside.
3. Transmigrate to the 80s to be a "stepmother" of three babies.

Qin Shi decisively chose 3. She really can not bear the hardships of the 60s and 70s.
-
At the blind date, Lu Zetian looked serious: "If you don't want to, I don't want to drag you down."

Qin Shi: "I understand."

Before Lu Zetian could relax his expression, he heard the other party speak again.

"You need someone to take care of the children. I need you to take me out of here. We can get married by agreement."

"My task is to seriously support and educate the three children to grow up, take care of your food, drink and life, and play the loving husband and wife outside when necessary."

"And you only need to pay for all the expenses of the family and my salary. Of course, I will give you the account book to ensure that the account is clear and not fake."

Lu Zetian: "...?"
-
The three children of the Lu family heard that if they were going to have a stepmother they would not have enough food and clothing, or even be abused.

They made up their minds to show their stepmother that they were not easy to bully.

As a result, the stepmother saluted them seriously as soon as she entered the door, and then gave courtesy in front of them.

"Hello, my name is Qin Shi. I will take care of your daily life in the future. I swear to the chairman that I will treat you fairly, justly and openly. I hope you can cooperate with me and we will live well together."

Lu family's 3 children was shocked: ⊙ ﹏ ⊙!?

title: The King's Rejected Lady
description:
Talia grew up without trusting anyone but herself to live. With no father figure to look up to and a clinically depressed mother who keeps on betraying her, Talia crawls her way to the top of the social chain to survive. But upon one drunken night, she meets her terrible end. Just like that, Talia loses all she worked hard for, or so she thought.
When she wakes up, she becomes a duke's eldest daughter in a medieval era where alliances and conspiracies dictate a noble's future and where love is a luxury that will lead anyone to ruin. No matter how twisted the world she is pushed into, Talia is determined to live long. She realizes that she is given a second chance to live - or not.
 
Reality slaps her hard when she learns that she is now inside the body of a sixteen-year-old villain character of the Netflix series that she binge-watched, "Thorny Crown"! Talia, who is now the infamous Lady Victoria, entered a popular yet twisted Netflix series two years before the plot started. And in that plot, the character of Lady Victoria is meant to die like cannon fodder for the female lead!
 
Talia refuses to die again. And this time, she is going to extend her helping hand to another side character, the second prince of the story, Prince Cory. She decides to be the queen and defy the plot called destiny with the king of her choosing.

In an era of deceit and conspiracies, will she be able to keep her head as she walks the thorny path of a villain?
With her head on the line, will she be able to control her blooming feelings for the pawn that she has chosen?

title: The House Of Bloody Lotus
description:
"So, what do you think?"

I heard Jingam's voice as I glanced over my shoulder, finding him standing behind me. He regarded me a soft smile that I returned innocently. "What did I think of what, lord Jingam?"

"The garden, of course." He said, lifting his eyes as he surveyed the scenery with me.

I brought my gaze back to the view before me. "It's wonderful. Lotus is my favorite flower and it's my family's crest."

"I know." Said Jingam softly, he lowered himself, taking the space beside me. "That's why I had them planted. This used to be a koi pond, but I thought it'd be a nice surprise for whenever you come to visit again. I just didn't think it'll take you five long years to come back."

"Lord Jingam." I feign my overwhelmed enthusiasm. "Don't tell me you had the pond converted into lotus garden especially for me?"

"Why of course. There's nothing more I want than to see my little bird happy."

My little bird?

The delight wiped away from my eyes and my smile faded. I couldn't hide the surprise that came over me when he used the word my.

The smile on Jingam's cheeks wiped away when he noticed my surprise. "Didn't you know?"

I shook my head, "didn't know what?"

"Has your brother not told you?"

That very phrase turned my ears numb. Yuanji is filled with tricks and surprises. Of course, my brother would not tell me anything. "Eldest brother likes keeping me in the dark. I'm afraid, I don't know what's going on."

"I promised your brother I'll marry you as soon as you're at marrying age. Your brother can be quite persistent. He brought you here to be my wife."

title: Beast and Beatrice
description:
A lost maiden, a castle in the woods and a reclusive Lord. Tragedy has stolen everything Gilbert ever loved. A devastating fire stole away his wife and child and left its mark on him, staining his skin and damaging his voice. He can never forgive himself for not rescuing the most important people in his life. Now he lives in self-imposed isolation, eking out a living by bartering his skills as a woodworker. Until this strange woman comes banging at his door. Now he has a chance to redeem himself, even if only in his own eyes by rescuing a damsel in distress. If she will allow him. 
Beatrice has been living a half-life ever since her parents died. She doesn't mind being relegated to nanny, nurse and governess to her sweet nieces and nephews but now her sister-in-law is trying to marry her off. One night, mad with fever, she runs off into the forest to escape and suddenly finds herself trapped in a castle with an intriguing stranger. He never utters a word and yet she finds him intriguing. 

This story is a work of fiction. It is set in a fictitious version of the 19th Century. It is not historically acurate.

title: Legend of Concubine's Daughter Minglan 知否知否 应是绿肥红瘦
description:
The pessimistic and negative daughter of a concubine living in the ancient times thought - since life is so difficult, why should one invest serious effort in struggling to live?

The life of an ancient noble woman is often determined and controlled by her family. Moreover, one's actions often implicate one's entire family - thus, it is fairly common to see an unexpected calamity result in suffering borne by one's whole family. Managing to live a good and successful life while retaining one's dignity is simply too difficult to achieve.

Ah, living in the ancient times is simply too dangerous - we should all just sleep till we die.

title: The Broken Princess
description:
His voice echoed out in the room, "I, Xavier Agnor, son of King Darius Agnor, crown prince to the kingdom of Albion, take Adelaide Elhera, daughter of King Azaiah, princess to the kingdom of Maldon, as my lawfully wedded wife."

What was he doing?!

I watched as Mother rose along with Sabrina and Aunt Marissa in shock. Father demanded the ministers to cut the ribbon but before they could I spoke, making sure my voice was loud and clear, "I, Adelaide Elhera, daughter of Azaiah Meristus, princess of Maldon, take Xavier Agnor, son of King Darius Agnor, crown prince to the kingdom of Albion, as my lawfully wedded husband."

Xavier connected his bloody finger with my cut palm and gathered our blood before stamping it onto the documents. 

Binding us for life.

title: Paragon - Book I
description:
*COMPLETE* There are whispers across the kingdoms that the Paragon, that strangely gifted person who can wield all four Skills, has been found. 
    
  They're wrong, of course. No one has caught the Paragon. Allayria should know: she's it. 
    
  But Allayria doesn't want to be the Paragon, and in her pursuit of freedom she finds herself enmeshed in a web of lies, caught in a group who might be even more dangerous than she could have imagined. 
    
  Still, she's not the only one who has problems: bigger tides of change and danger are shifting across the world she has been assigned to protect. The Jarles, a kingdom in the east, has begun moving across its borders, and there are strange murmurings about what they have done, and where all the children they abducted have gone. 
    
  Faced with responsibilities she never wanted, and a life she thought she could never have, Allayria must decide how she will help--and if she will be the Paragon at all. 
    _____________________
    
    WIP
    Cover art and written work by Azi.
    
    Highest ranking: #66 in Fantasy 2/3/2018
    
  Hi everyone! Thanks a ton for taking the time to read Paragon. I'm so excited to share it with you, and to hear your feedback, theories, and insight. It's just me, myself, and I on this one (no beta) so if you catch any errors or inconsistencies, give me a shout--it will be much appreciated. The plan is to release a new chapter each weekend until we reach the end. 
    
    -  Azi
    
    Note: violence, sexual themes, and some coarse language will appear in Paragon.

title: My Liege And I
description:
My love, can you hear that? 
It is my heart that beats for you.
The dew has long settled, where are you?
My feet are sore, breasts heavy, belly sagging, and the time waits for no one.
Will you come back?
My ears hurt, a child wails, the crown pierces my skull, and my heart is lonely.
Are you coming? 
I sit at the window, put on my make up, look at the mirror. 
Maybe you won't come. 

S.V
Tous Droits Réservés

title: In Fair Verona
description:
After an offended Greek goddess sends Kenna back in time to Elizabethan England, she discovers she must stop the theft of Shakespeare's best known tragedy before returning to her century, all while resisting the charms of the theatre's Romeo. 

                                                                   *****
 
After being dumped via voice note, Kenna Fernsby is convinced there was never a tale of more woe. Offended by the insult to true tragedy, a Greek goddess banishes Kenna to Elizabethan England, where she stumbles upon a plot to steal the priceless first draft of "Romeo and Juliet" from right under William Shakespeare's nose. Determined to outwit the thieves, Kenna dives into the intrigue, even when doing so may tangle her healing heart with a man from the past and force her to choose between the 16th century life she has fallen in love with and the fate of the play she loves as much. 

[[Wattys 2021 Winner in Historical Fiction]]

title: Aide Me
description:
"Before I show you who I am, I want you to remember what you're fighting for," Aide replied cautiously and gave them all a piercing stare. "Keep an open mind."

"Just tell us, lad," Hanke snarled impatiently and bobbed his sword.

"Brace yourselves," Aide said as he slowly reached for his hood. 

Emaia's heart pounded vigorously in her chest, so loudly, she feared people could hear. 

This was it. She would finally see the face of her rescuer, the face she had so longed to see.

Aide gave them all one last lingering look before he closed his eyes. "Your whole world is about to change."

He punctuated his sentence by pulling off his hood.

The entire crowd gasped and all readied their weapons, as long silver hair burst free from the cloak and long slender ears appeared.

It was impossible, Emaia thought. They had been extinct for decades. 

But there was no denying it. She looked at the man who had rescued her a few nights ago, and remembered him as charming and valiant. It all made so much sense now-why he could do, what he could do.

He was an elf. And not just any elf. 

- A Northern Elf.

title: My Zulu King
description:
I must be dreaming!
How is that in the whole universe God decided to choose me to go back in time. The worst part is that I'm getting married to the Zulu King who already has 6 concubines 
Argh! Life of a Zulu girl😯😢

I don't own the credits to the story cover

🔜🔜🔜🔜🔜🔜🔜🔜🔜🔜🔜🔜🔜

His eyes told a story, deep, sensual, strong, fearless, powerful.

The man demanded attention without even having to say a word.

His stance made him the alpha male without even lifting a finger.

He looked to be 6 feet in height. Amazing physic accompanied by muscles.

Battle scares marred some parts of his body but in only added to his masculinity.

His face was void of any emotion, no one could tell what he was thinking. Not that I'm a master reader of emotions or anything but you get my point.

He was beautiful in a inhuman way. His skin tone was a fairer mocha , I bet it might be lighter but the man looked like he bathed in the sun, training every single day.

He did not belong amongst us humans, I don't even think he would belong in my world. He deserved a planet of his own.

He has surpassed human beauty, he must have been a default when he was created because there is no way in hell anybody can look like him.

He looked matured and seasoned. I want to laugh thinking about the men in my world proclaiming themselves as real men.

This is man standing in front of me is the true definition of real man, his whole being is the definition of a man...wow!

😍😍😍😍
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Lost: Book Two of The Whitechapel Chronicles
description:
'Whitechapel. The East End of London. Streets of tawdry degradation and grisly dark crimes of unlimited horror.....'

From the comforts of London's middle class suburbia, to taking refuge in an old abandoned asylum in Whitechapel, Megan's life has changed immeasurably since meeting the vampire, Harper Cain. 

Now living with Harper, his blood brother Garrick and Garrick's gang of mercenaries, Megan finds herself at the centre of an age-old war between the vampires and their enemies, the lycan-esque Varúlfur. 

Still struggling to cope with the turn her life has taken, Megan discovers that not only is she unable to escape the ghosts of her past, but she is going to have to contend with some very dark revelations about her future. 

A vampire with the history of Whitechapel running through her veins she might be, but Megan will soon learn that there are far worse things to be frightened of than ghosts.

title: If I Can Hate You, Why Can't You? A Nigerian Story
description:
Anger, pure anger and fear sipped through her veins threatening to burst out. She struggled vehemently to release her hand, but that only made him tighten his hand around her twisted arm.  

She cried out of pain but that only seemed to impress him. 

He smirked and said, 

"Mm, so fiesty?" He glared at her and pushed her against the wall. 

"You are evil Abdullah!" She almost shouted. Beads of sweat formed on her silk skin. Why was he making her life a living hell in her matrimonial home? She was supposed to live a happy life with her so-called husband, but instead, he is bullying her. 

"Just tell me, why?" She gazed at him confused wondering what he meant by that. 

"Why what?" She cried 

"Heh" he chuckled, "don't play dumb with me Kulthum. Just tell me why you chose him over me? What am I lacking? Huh? Tell me!" He shouted pushing her more against the wall. 

"Because you are evil! I never loved you in the first place, you are nothing worth loving" she spat as tears flowed down her beautiful face. 

As soon as he heard that, his face stoned up while his jaw clenched and his eyes became bloodshot. Such a sight she had never seen since she was married to him. 

"If I can hate you, why can't you, Abdullah?! I am so tired of this relationship, I can't do it anymore just let me go" 

With a dejected heart, he released her hand and whispered dangerously close to her ear,

"If I can't have you, then no one will" 

He stumped off angrily while she slumped to the ground releasing a heavy sigh of defeat as tears rolled down her cheek. 

Since the day she got married to him, there had never been a day where she laughed for at least two minutes. 

All she knew at that very moment was that she was doomed!

*completed but currently under editing*
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Time Echoes
description:
When brilliant archaeologist Zephyr Benson is mysteriously transported to a magical version of Viking-age Scandinavia, she finds herself thrust into a world where myth and reality intertwine. Captured by Ragnar Stormcrow, a roguish outlaw with arcane powers, Zephyr must navigate a realm of ancient magic and mythical creatures while grappling with cultural shock, racism, and constant danger.
As Zephyr and Ragnar journey across treacherous landscapes, fleeing those who hunt them, their relationship evolves into a complex dance of conflict, fascination, and unexpected tenderness. But when fate tears them apart, Zephyr finds herself caught between two men and two vastly different visions of her role in this world.
Torn between the obsessive, power-hungry Ragnar and the honorable, dutiful Leif Ironheart, Zephyr must uncover the truth about her own latent powers and make choices that will shape not only her fate but the destiny of this mystical realm.
"Time Echoes" is a dark, sensual tale of time travel, magic, and romance that explores the depths of human nature against the backdrop of Norse mythology come to life.

title: Sands In The Darkest Night
description:
This is a story that took place in ancient Egypt-464BC.

In a time of slavery due to the falling away in Israel, many are left homeless and are forced to seek refuge...in Egypt.

The Crown Prince originally shrouded in mystery, seemed like an enigmatic yet unpredictable person when Aria first met him and Aria felt an unusual pull to him going to places she shouldn't, meeting with a certain someone she shouldn't...

Aria wasn't the strongest in her beliefs as a Jew.

But what happens when what started as an innocent draw spiral into something dark, possessive and downright unholy?

What happens when innocent fascination turns into fear and a cry for escape? An escape that came in the form of Ahmes.

But little did Aria know that she wasn't quite done yet, her faith was revived and her doubts cleared but what happens when she's told to go back, back to the monster in human form who sees himself as god, and help him see...

 See what?


That even God could love a monster, that his love, showed forth even then, extends to all people and that no one, including him, was beyond saving.

title: Wonderland by Night
description:
Lady Sarah Emiline Lucia needs to hide her identity for fear that mobs will kill her and her family after her uncle-Napoleon Bonaparte-is exiled to Melba. She is sent to Hampshire, England, to stay with friends of her father. To stay safe, she must play the role of her maid while her maid assumes Lady Sarah's identity. Complications arise when she meets the very handsome man, and she suddenly wants him to look at her as a real woman, not a servant. Protecting her life, however, is more important than confessing the truth

Gabriel Lawrence's pirate ship is almost captured, and this time it was too close. He and his crew need to hide for a few months in hopes that Napoleon's men who seek revenge will soon forget about him.  During his stay at his aunt and uncle's in Hampshire, he meets his enemy's niece. Because she doesn't know who Gabe is, he will become close to her to see if she knows any more of her uncle's secrets. But the beauty of her companion, Miss Emmie, captures his attention, and her quirky personality keeps him wanting more. But her over-zealous nature for adventure places both of them in danger, and he's forced to play the honorable rogue.

How can he protect them both when an unknown spy is always one step ahead...and wants Gabe dead?

Content warning: This story contains a mild amount of violence, and a kidnapping scene... along with plenty of falling in love.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Marie Higgins is an award-winning, bestselling, multi-published author of Christian and sweet romance novels; from refined bad-boy heroes who make your heart melt to the feisty heroines who somehow manage to love them regardless of their faults. Between those and her others, she's published over 100 heartwarming, on-the-edge-of-your-seat stories and broadened her readership by writing mystery/suspense, humor, time-travel, paranormal, along with her love for historical romances. FAQs

1. Any advice for writing historical fiction?

Research! Research your time period, the language, the fashion, the politics, the significant events - a good way to start this is by watching movies and reading books set in the era.

2. How do you come up with your ideas?

I write books I want to read. If I'm interested in the plot, I will continue. I want to find out what happens too!

3. How do you get reads/followers?

Patience! 10 years ago I started on 0 too! I kept going, kept posting, and hoped for the best. Eventually my beautiful community found me. Yours will find you, too.

title: Have Patience
description:
Lucy Kensington's life has been made incredibly difficult by the fact that her illegitimacy was once a front page story.  She has grown up surrounded by disapproval, being looked over and ignored, or being blatantly snubbed by those would would fall at the feet of her wealthy parents and siblings.

Prince Edward, the once irresponsible, forgotten son of the King of England, is now suddenly the Prince of Wales, and is thrust into a role he is not prepared for.  His father's grief,  his preference for Edward's deceased brother, and his open dislike for Edward have made for an impossible mission in front of him.

The unlikeliest of pairs suddenly find themselves in a position to help the other thrive, succeed, and find what was missing within. But romance between two such people can never be, with more than one force fighting to keep them apart.

title: Hunted by a Night Fae
description:
Heather once dreamed of spending a day in Faerie, surrounded by magic and music. But now she wants nothing more than to escape.

When Heather is captured in the Wild Hunt, she makes a bargain with a powerful Night Fae, Ronan, in order to return home. However, Ronan has motives of his own and is not above his own faerie trickery to get what he wants, especially when Heather finds herself linked to the world of Faerie in more ways than one. 

Dark forces are arising in Faerie, a corruption threatening the very magic that balances the realms of human and fae. If Heather wants to return home she'll have to make a choice between returning to those she loves--or saving the world she always dreamed of.

Book one in the Corrupted Fae series

title: Highlander's Embrace
description:
1540, Scotland

A storm is brewing on the Highlands...

When headstrong and stubborn Gavin MacKenzie is driven to seek vengeance after the murder of his father, he seeks help from the King of Scotland. But things are amiss as he begins his journey across the fierce and unforgiving Highlands. And when he crosses paths with a crimson-haired young woman just as tempered as the Scottish Highlands, passions are quickly set ablaze. He fears she has already stolen his heart.

A secret two decades old could unravel everything...

Elyn Douglas doesn't feel like she belongs in the small village of Dornie, lingering right outside the walls of Eilean Donan Castle. After the assassination of Laird Angus MacKenzie, she's thrust into a world of violence and highlanders, but when she meets the rugged and powerful Gavin, she doesn't know what to expect. All she knows is that when he looks at her, her heart melts a little bit of the frost that has plagued her whole life...

As chilling rain and howling wind pelt the Highlands, Elyn fights the racing of her heart that begs for her Highlander's Embrace...

title: Witching Tree (Alice Gray Book 1)
description:
New job, new city, fresh start.

If she could only ignore the magic, strange creatures and weird family history that plague her every step, Alice Gray 'might' have a chance at a normal life and new boyfriend. 

Probably not though, normal isn't really her thing.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

In the wilds of rural Lancashire, England, in 1612, the members of the famous Pendle Coven were rounded up to be tried and executed.

Or so Thomas Potts told the world in his account of the events.

But all was not as it seemed.

One survived.

Her name is Alice Gray. 

In modern-day England 25 yr old Alice Gray is haunted by strange dreams of a woman like her, but not her. Thrust into a new reality, Alice must find her place into a world where witches and vampires thrive.

And if that wasn't enough, they all want something from her...

If you like it vote and comment!

┈➤ Lt. Robert 'Rosie' Rosenthal is a pilot newly assigned to the Hundredth bomb group, and rapidly making a name for himself as one of their best. A Jew from Brooklyn, Rosie is determined to see Nazi Germany defeated, with a single-minded focus on causing as much damage to their war effort as possible - and he will not allow anything to distract him from the task. 

American Red Cross volunteer Jean Lester, like all good citizens, wants to do her bit for victory. Stationed at Thorpe Abbotts, England, Jean is dedicated to making life on the base a little more endurable for the men of the Bloody Hundredth. But after months of war, and too many G.I.s she has grown to care for Killed or Missing in Action, she is beginning to find that it is better not to become too attached to soldiers who may never come back. 

But when a traumatised Rosie seeks consolation after a horrific mission, a bond begins to form between the pilot and the Red Cross girl, and the two must wrestle with their feelings for one another against the backdrop of a deadly and unforgiving war.

title: Winter Wildflowers
description:
Hunted, she thought. She was being hunted. She cried as she tripped once more, her foot catching on a log, and in that one falter, the soldier was upon her. Instantly he roughly pinned her down with a knee to her back and held a strong hand to the back of her neck. Ofelia, immediately burst into tears, thick sobs escaping to the forest. "Pa!", She yelled, weeping into the snow, "...Pa."
The soldier sighed and waited.
"Sir!", The same voice from before bellowed, "We must get moving!"
Ofelia continued to yell out, screaming into the earth, but he only waited. He was cold. Angry. The Frost upon his knee digging into her back. Ofelia could feel his impatience, his irritation at her outburst. She laid there sobbing until she could sob no more. Until the heartbreak seeped into horror. Until she lay there staring at the roots instead.
Only then, after a slow and resounding silence, did the soldier lift his knee off her, dragging her up by her arm.
Ofelia followed.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Stranger of Galilee
description:
Holding her breath, Claudia lay her head down against the ground and willed herself to be somewhere else. Anywhere else. When she had desired more adventure in her life, this was not at all what she meant! While the garden they were in was beautiful, with uniform, perfectly dispersed trees that let the evening sun shine through with a heavenly golden light, and well-kept paths for anyone to walk, Claudia wished she was enjoying the scenery as a visitor, rather than a fugitive.
               She could not see Lucius at all from her position, but she could hear him as he moved like a panther through the garden, the rustle of grass his only giveaway. What was he planning to do? Did he have a plan at all?

For a long, long time, the garden remained silent. In fact, Claudia was about ready - nay, desperate - to stand up and look around, when from a distance she heard a shout, the clinking of swords, a terrible 'squish' sound, then nothing at all.

**
Follow the journey of two distinguished members of the Roman Empire, during the time of Christ's ministry on the earth as they discover the true meanings of 'love', and 'sacrifice'...

**
This story switches between two points of view, the switches marked clearly by '***'. This story does not contradict teachings of the Bible, but merely shows the happenings of Jesus' death, burial and resurrection from a different perspective. I hope you enjoy the read, and learn something new about our wonderful God!

*If you enjoyed this book please also read it's short story spin off, 'The Traitor Inside'. Thank you!*
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Never Kiss a Toad
description:
[A Victorian romance continuing family stories begun in the various Regency books of Mariana Gabrielle and Jude Knight.]
  
David "Toad" Northope, heir to the Duke of Wellbridge and rogue in the mold of his infamous father, knows Lady Sarah "Sal" Grenford, daughter of the once-profligate Duke of Haverford, will always hold his heart. But when the two teens are caught in bed together by their horrified parents, he is sent away to finish school on the Continent, and she is thrown into the depths of her first London Season.
  
  Can two reformed rakes keep their children from making the same mistakes they did? The dukes decide keeping them apart will do the trick, so as the children reach their majority, Toad is put to work at sea, learning to manage his mother's shipping concern, and Sal is taken to the other side of the world, as far from him as possible. How will Toad and Sal's love withstand long years of separation, not to mention nasty lies, vicious rumors, attractive other suitors, and well-meaning parents who threaten to destroy their future before it has begun?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Mariana Gabrielle is a pen name for Mari Christie, who is not romantic--at all. Therefore, her starry-eyed alter ego lives vicariously through characters who believe in their own happy-ever-afters. And believe they must, as Mariana loves her heroes and heroines, but truly dotes on her villains, and almost all of her characters' hearts have been bruised, broken, and scarred long before they reach the pages of her books.

She is a professional writer, editor, and designer with almost twenty-five years' experience, and a member of the Bluestocking Belles, the Writing Wenches, and the Rocky Mountain Fiction Writers. She is the author of multiple Regency romance novels, including The Sailing Home Series and La Déesse Noire: The Black Goddess, and will soon release a mainstream historical, Blind Tribute.

title: Stars
description:

When the General goes to persuade his brother to donate some of his grain to the army, he benefits more than he will ever know. His brilliant niece, Isabella, offers her help in the war for independence. 

She travels back to the camp where she becomes a nurse, an inventor, and a spy for the Culper Spy Ring. 

What happens when she meets Major Benjamin Tallmadge, a man as intelligent as he is handsome. The two quickly become friends and bond over their many shared interests. 

But what will happen when the damned redcoats interfere?

title: The young man I picked up insisted on marrying me
description:
In ancient times, a young man named Qi Yuan encountered danger on the way up the mountain. He fled in panic. When he looked up again, the hot summer day turned into snowflakes, and he had arrived in a strange place.
Qi Yuan was immediately frightened and cried. He squatted on the ground and shivered. When he was about to be frozen and lose consciousness, he fell into a warm embrace. When he opened his eyes again
, he was already a family. "Yes." Qi Yuan nodded firmly. He had a family.
Looking at the strong chest of the man in front of him, Qi Yuan was nostalgic for the warmth he gave him. He believed that this was his embrace, and no one else would give it to him.
"Have you really forgotten everything?" Shen Lingyun asked helplessly, "Don't you still remember your name?"
"Hmm." Qi Yuan covered her mouth, her pretty face flushed, "I can't find my home, you can't take me away."
One-sentence copywriting: The little boy traveled through another world and found a good man to marry himself.
Reading tips:
1: Modern fiction, unrelated to reality, purely fictional.
2: The little boy can only marry and have children

Search keywords: Protagonist: Qi Yuan, Shen Lingyun ┃ Supporting role: ┃ Others:

Concept: Happiness requires one's own efforts, and good people will be rewarded.

title: Set Me As A Seal ✓
description:
A time-traveling god. A mortal stuck in Ancient Greece. They have always been able to hear each other's thoughts, across time and space; the only problem is, they were never supposed to meet.

Until they did.
And it unravelled the balance of everything. 

₪₪₪₪₪₪₪₪₪₪₪₪₪₪

The immortal Greek god Evgenis' only job is to travel through time, making sure humanity stays on its course. This is what he was born to do. He was meant to be machine-like, cold, and detached from humanity - ready to invoke bloodshed as needed. His ability to follow through with his duty, however, is disrupted when he forms a mysterious internal bond with a mortal. 

You see, the Goddess of Love had a different idea for her son's future. Seeing the cruelty of the gods around her, she formed the unborn Evgenis with a secret gift: an eternal inner bond with a mortal. She chose Tharos - named for the strength of his heart - an Ancient Greek villager living an unassuming, simple life. This connection, she prayed, would keep Evgenis' moral compass and conscience strong. He would not end up like the others.

No one could anticipate, though, just how powerful and disruptive this bond would grow to be. 

------------------------------------------

"Set me as a seal upon your heart... for love is as strong as death."
- Song of Solomon, 6:8

------------------------------------------

title: The Fraudulent Duchess | ONC 2022
description:
The Duke of Bedford needs money.
After years of gambling and not paying attention to his budget, Cecil Hastings finds himself in financial trouble. If he cannot find a reasonable amount of money soon, he will be forced to sell his estate. 
Then, he remembers his great-aunt's proposition. Years ago she told him that when he got married, she would give his future wife a generous sum. The Duke of Bedford wants to get his hands on that money. The problem is that he does not have a wife, and even if he found one, how would he be able to convince her to give him the money?

Susan Taylor has been in service all her life. But after she overhears a conversation between the Duke of Bedford and her employer, she finds herself tangled up in the Duke's financial problems. When the Duke offers to give her half of the money in return for pretending that they are a married couple, she finds herself agreeing. 

Susan Taylor is no longer a lady's maid. She is now the Fraudulent Duchess of Bedford. 

___

title: Kingsley's Bride
description:
Scarlette Ravenswood's world is thrown into turmoil when her sister, Meredith, elopes on the day of her wedding, endangering their family's honor. In a desperate bid to salvage their reputation, Scarlette agrees to marry Darius Kingsley, a wealthy and handsome man set to inherit the dukedom. Little does she know, Darius conceals a ruthless grudge against Meredith, which colors his perception of Scarlette. Despite his cold and calculating demeanor, Scarlette resolves to soften Darius's harsh edges while steadfastly searching for her elusive sister. As she delves deeper into Meredith's disappearance, Scarlette uncovers unsettling truths about her sister's actions and the perilous web of deceit that surrounds them.

Amidst the backdrop of their tumultuous marriage, Scarlette and Darius navigate treacherous waters of suspicion and intrigue. Darius's ruthlessness is matched only by Scarlette's unwavering determination to uncover the secrets that threaten to tear them apart. As they confront their own demons and the dark forces conspiring against them, Scarlette and Darius find themselves reluctantly drawn together by shared adversity. 

In a journey fraught with revenge, betrayal and redemption, they discover that their greatest strength may lie in trusting each other.

title: Harmonia
description:
Ayse Neslisah Sultan wasn't always a Sultana, but once a simple girl in the Russian countryside, named Nadya. She lives a peaceful life on her family's farm, unaware that her world is about to change forever. As rumors spread of Crimean Tatar raids, Nadya's idyllic life is shattered. Captured and taken far from home, Nadya's journey leads her to the heart of the Ottoman Empire, where fate will intertwine her with the mighty rulers of a world she could never have imagined.

From a terrified Russian farm girl to a key figure in the harem of Sultan Mustafa, this is the story of Ayse Neslisah Sultan's early life-the woman who would rise to power and change the course of history. Torn between survival, loyalty, and a future she never chose, Nadya must navigate the intricacies of court life, love, and political intrigue, all while uncovering the secrets of her own identity.

description:
𝐓𝐇𝐈𝐒 𝐈𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓 𝐀 𝐒𝐔𝐂𝐂𝐄𝐒𝐒 𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐘. 𝐓𝐇𝐈𝐒 𝐈𝐒 𝐀 𝐑𝐔𝐈𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍.

It's the beginning of a new age when Jaylah Imperatrix seemingly returns from the dead to reclaim her throne. And in perfect timing. 

In her absence, evil has begun to rise. Ruthless and bloodthirsty Seifer Daggen will stop at nothing until he usurps the Oceanic throne. He is also relentless in his plans to eradicate Jaylah before she finds him and attempts to end his life.

With the help of mercenary Alexander Khan - whose allegiance is terrifyingly unclear - Jaylah may have a chance to save her nation from the rapidly growing threat.

Jaylah soon finds that her criminal partner can stir up suspicion in her just as easily as he can make her cold heart feel things she's never felt before. But the shakily allied Alexander is not her only concern. The Queen must travel to distant lands, build her court, face an unknown deceiver and realize who she truly is before quenching the fire of revenge in her heart.

Her throne, people, and life depend on it. A crown can be a bloody burden.

( BOOK 1 : completed )
( BOOK 2 : updated fridays 2pm pst )

title: Queen Alli - Beloved of Arjuna
description:
In the Tamil Mahabharata, Alli was one of the wives of Arjuna. She was a legendary fierce Warrior Queen of the Pandyas. Similar to Draupadi, she was not born of a human woman, Alli was born from a yajna, from a water lily.  She was a capable, Amazon-like ruler, under whom, both administration and army was led by women. 

Arjuna who was on a visit to the Pandya Kingdom was awestruck and lovestruck by the charisma, the leadership capabilities and tigress-like ferocity of this beautiful Queen.

authorBio:
Hi Everyone! <3  I am Mithyava!

I love reading & writing about ancient Indian Historical Romance and ancient Indian Mythological Fantasy Romance.

I turned to writing so that, together, we can all undertake the journey to explore the timeless beauty of ancient India's history and mythology! I am a huge fan of the Mauryas, Satavahanas, Guptas and Cholas to name a few.

I am fascinated by Southeast Asian as well as South Asian countries and their respective ancient history & mythology too. I plan to write about this soon!

title: ADITI ISHAN:Unexpected Love
description:
Aditi,the Princess and pride of kingdom Parvan,never believed in the idea of marriage.Love is nowhere in her thoughts as well.Unaware of the reality,she dreams to live an independent life sticking upto her rules.When she is trying to explore her life....when she is least interested in marriage.....Prince Rajnath Ishan of the rival kingdom Chanver,appears out of blue and captivates the Parvan kingdom which is a bitter pill for the kingdom to swallow.

Aditi....having her beauty sleep in her chamber had no idea of what is going on.A Prince entered her chamber with his face concealed.Aditi,being a wonderful warrior,sensed some mishap and took her dagger...She was resolved to defeat the Prince...but sadly it's too late now....all the Royals and Nobles of her Kingdom were already under capture and victory of the Chanvers on Parvans has been declared.

Just then,something weird and wild happened.The Prince put forward a marriage proposal for Aditi...saying that he would spare her family and people's lives only if she agrees to marry him. 

Will our stubborn yet sensible Princess marry the Prince whom she hadn't even looked at but sounds familiar!!??Have they met before??Do they know each other?

Look into the life of the lovely Princess Aditi  to know what happened.......

Unravel the blossoming love between two sweet souls but retaliating rivals.

title: Dancing on Strings
description:
"A Princess to your kingdom before A Principal to your stage."

Mai, Princess Royal and first of twelve daughters has only two priorities. 
Her family and her dance - and sadly her dance can never come before her family. 

Because of this, despite her talent, Mai has never had the chance to preform to her fullest. 
Until the winter celebrations arise and the great artists come to town. 
Among them is The Black Rabbit, a trickster and enchanter who offers her the chance to take the stage without risking her position.

He just has one small request for her in return.

She just has to dance for someone.

title: Timeless: Through Time - Garcy
description:
Canon-inspired Timeless, with Garcy as the central focus from the beginning.
Seasons 1, 2, 3, & currently 4

Season 1:
🇩🇪🚀🎪
Lucy Preston has always had her perfect life carefully planned out - but when she is selected to travel through time chasing dangerous bandit Garcia Flynn, her life as she knows it is destroyed. With her new team, Lucy must do what she once thought impossible. Her task becomes even harder when she realizes unwanted feelings for Garcia Flynn are surfacing...
But is he all that she thought he was? 

Season 2: 
🚘🚢🔎
Reluctantly allied with old enemies and new friends, the Team struggles against a Rittenhouse headed by Lucy's mother and the cunning, tricky Emma Whitmore. Amongst the carnage, a newfound trust between Lucy and Flynn blossoms into an easy familiarity and threatens something more.

Season 3:
👑🏳️‍🌈🌉
Emma finally has everything she's worked for - but it's not enough. Striving to unite a fractured Rittenhouse, she finds an unlikely ally in a certain hot mess Preston sister. Meanwhile, in the bunker, Jiya has looming visions of some dark future in deep water. Lucy and Flynn find their feet in their relationship just to face the threat of it all falling apart.

Season 4:
🏫💻🎸
(Flynn's on his third drink when she walks in. Lucy looks about five years older, but no less... she looks good.)

The São Paulo diary hand-off will mean the team can finally put the past behind them to focus on their futures; tech superstars, bar owners, history professors and homemakers. Unfortunately, history has a funny way of repeating itself. Lucy and Flynn's little family with Lorena and Iris, who now has more aunties and uncles than she knows what to do with, is under threat from a mysterious rogue time traveller.
Featuring a few new (or old) additions, the Team are dragged together once more to hunt a ghost and protect the lives they've built.

(Season 4 & redrafts currently under construction.)

✨ Cover by amanda

title: The White Queen -The White Queen
description:
At 24 years old Eliza de' Medici she is the uncrowned second queen of England. While she sits on the throne of England she lives in the constant fear that the rival house of Lancaster will raise an army and usurp the throne which is Husbands by right. Now the mother of seven young children she must navigate through the world and fight for the future of her husband and her kids by herself. As the York Court becomes more and more divisive she makes enemies of the Earl of Warwick and her husband's mother Cecily Neville and encounters terrible truths about her husband's brother George. To counter their influence and what she believes is a threat to her family she allies herself with her husband's brothers Edmond and Richard and brings her Woodville relatives back to court after encouraging the marriages of her Woodville cousins Elizabeth and Jackie to the Dukes of Norfolk and Ruthland. Brought back to a court that is more divisive than ever Eliza must learn to watch out for her family and her rights as she navigate a terrible world in which the biggest threat to the house of York is no longer the house of Lancaster, but enemies within their own family.

title: The Prince's Escape
description:
Once we are alone, he turns to me, "We need to work on your acting skills. How can a commoner be such a bloody awful liar? Don't you learn that when you are infants?"

"Oh, I'm sorry I don't lie for sport like you lot! Last I checked, it's the ones with the sticks up their arses who are so brilliant with deceit and after seeing your performance I know it to be fact! I've never heard such shit! As though I hold any regret, for telling that fancy prat anything, ha" I call back. Now that we are alone, I no longer require restraints as I let my temper run wild. 

He does something that takes me by utter surprise. He literally grabs my lips and pushes them together. "Don't you ever shut this mouth of yours!" I move my hands to his chest, trying to pay no mind to the heat radiating from him and give him a great push, shoving him a few steps back in surprise. 

"Don't touch me! Agh!" I let out before taking a breath, and with a little less force I add, "the King bought it didn't he."

"Barely," he grunted. My head snapped back at him, I was fuming. How could a man make me so incredibly angry with just a few words? This must be the great charm of the Prince, I hear so much about.

authorBio:
Never take a writer for granted.
They are snipers armed with words. They know how to aim with sentences, how to fire with paragraphs and how to immortalise with their kills in verse.



Books let you fight dragons, meet the love of your life, travel to faraway land and laugh alongside friends, all within their pages. They are an escape that brings you home.


Don't let this be the last page of your story but the first page of your next chapter.

title: ARIA
description:
PREVIOUSLY KNOWN AS CUPID FOR MY LOVE

Aria MacGregory was engaged to the crown prince. Eventhough she loved him very much, she knew that the prince was in love with her younger sister, Riana.  

Due to her incurable illness, she died alone without having her love by her side. 

But then, she woke up a year before the engagement and so she decided to be the cupid for her love, avoid the engagement and dies peacefully. 

However, in her second life, the prince did not want to cancel the engagement and wanted her to be his queen.

And there were something more than just conquering  a true love.

A romance medieval story with a dark twist of fantasy.

🍁🍁🍁

title: Secrets of the Crown Assassins
description:
[Sequal to the hit Wattys 2022 Shortlisted Novel!]  

The Crown Assassins, the world's most ruthless leaders, have a reputation that precedes them. But perhaps there's more to them than meets the eye.  

After being almost killed and having their secrets spilled to the world, they're ready to right their wrongs. Their only hope is the real Arielle Fortier, now known on the streets as Phoenix Night. 

Indigo Fluor, the girl who almost tore the Crowns lives apart for an undeserving friend, is back. She's ready to destroy their power and bring them down, brick by brick. But this time she must enlist the help of a girl with a smile too sweet and a boy with a mind to cunning. Can she trust either of them?

Phoenix Night ran away from the throne for a reason and she had no plans to go back. She was a thief and a thief only. No amount of begging from her younger sister, brewing trouble, or regret will ever change her mind. But, with a large rebellion looming and even larger conspiracy climbing out of the shadows, there's one last play that can avoid all out war. Hopefully.

It's time for the Queen to claim her crown.

Crown Assassins Series
Book 1: School of the Crown Assassins
Book 2: Secrets of the Crown Assassins

title: Love & Murder: An Eliza Winter Mystery
description:
Lady Eliza Winter has one friend in the world and she happens to go missing. And when Eliza goes to report the disappearance to the police they won't hear a word from Crazy Eliza Winters. 

Determined to find her friend Penelope, Eliza reaches out to the new detective in town, Lord Colin Bradshaw, but in order to find Penelope, he needs to know everything that led up to her going missing. Unfortunately, there are some things Eliza isn't willing to tell. 

Will Eliza be able to find Penelope without giving away all her secrets? Or will Lord Bradshaw be a match Eliza wasn't ready for.

BOOK 1 (COMPLETE)

Bai Pingting has always been contrary the saying, "A woman's virtue is ignorance". Although she serves the Marquess of Jing-An as a maid, she leads a life far richer than most women. Her plain appearance is not what defines her - but her intelligence, far beyond many wise men.

One is a soul who seemingly destroys peace while the other aspires to be the sword that saves. Between them, lies a mountain of hate...

Who of the two most cunning people on earth cast the trap and just who captured the other?
