title: End of Winter (Rewrite & Expansions into Book Four)
description:
First they survived a serial killer in their own barracks. Then they went to the wall against a pre-conflict strike of Soviet Union soldiers attacking them in their own barracks, leaving behind half of their number dead and the survivors of the brutal close quarters combat shell shocked and physically wounded.

Criminal Investigation Division, the National Security Agency, the Defense Intelligence Agency, the FBI, and the CIA are all interested in what went on. Accompanying the members of the Alphabet Agencies is the aide of a member of the House Military Affairs Commission and members of the Secret Service.

All of them wanted to know what happened.

Unfortunately for them, the blood spilled on the mountain in the name of madness and hatred has woken it from its ancient slumber.

And it wants more.

THIS STORY IS A ROUGH DRAFT/STREAM OF CONSCIOUSNESS VERSION OF WHAT WILL EVENTUALLY BE EDITED AND EXPANDED INTO BOOK FOUR OF THE PUBLISHED SERIES.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A last little bit of me, mostly rusted and damaged metal.

I'm a father of four and have two grand-children. Married for more than 20 years to the same woman who puts up with all of my crap and laughs while I do stupid things. I live in the Rogue Valley, Oregon, someplace I had dreamed of returning to for the 20 years I was gone.

A Cold War veteran of the US Army, I was released after my third medical board refused to return me to full duty. From there I worked in a factory, was a bartender, worked in a cannery, did construction, worked at two big store chains. I've worked for a carnival, slinging cable for a nation-wide cable company, and other jobs. I'm currently nothing more than a lazy old man who watches TV with his grandchildren and kids.

Three years of college before I just walked off one day, leaving my car and my books and everything else in the parking lot of the college. (My friends got it and took it and me home to my wife)

My absolute favorite movie is Freejack. Favorite song is Wasted Years by Iron Maiden. Favorite TV show is: Grey's Anatomy. Favorite book is Redliners  by David Drake.



*****NOTICE****

If you ask me to critique ANY military story, have your stuff straight. Don't try to excuse it with 'it's just fan-fiction' or 'it's not real' or 'I'm making it up, it doesn't matter', because it does to me. One look at my page should tell you that it matters to me.

If you ask me to read anything, I *WILL* critique it.

<b>Credits:</b>
Damned of the 2/19th Covers: @undertoned
Initial Editing Pass: Heather Dawn Willard & Jose Quervo
Character Concept Sketches: Owen Kuhn
2/19th Special Weapons Group Concept and Implementation: US Department of Defense

title: CROWN OF GLASS  ✔
description:
❛WHAT HAPPENS WHEN YOU MAKE THE TEN MOST POWERFUL GODS ALIVE PLAY A GAME OF MUSICAL CHAIRS WITH ONE SEAT?❜

They fight - to the death.

They fight over three crowns and a throne with steel spiked maces. They despair a little more everyday keeping their vows. They wander in hospitals to find a cure for their torn hearts. They haunt castles and secret passages. They betray the ones they love the most. They are dying women and miserable men. They make peace with their enemies, not friends.

Girls of rivers with hair like the night dance down the moon stairs. Goddesses of flame hold out hands which crumble and burn.

This story sings of three rings. 

Of forgotten maps. 

Of a queen who should not be alive after all she has suffered.

But most importantly, it sings of three gilded crowns studded with the jewels of the heavens.

Crowns of glass.

➳ Shortlisted for the Wattys 2018.
➳ Now a featured Wattpad story.
➳ Winner of over fifteen prestigious awards.
➳ Highest rank: #2 in Fantasy.

❛NO ONE TOLD ME THAT BEING A QUEEN WOULD MEAN PAYING THE PRICE OF POWER WITH STEEL AND BLOOD, DARLING.❜

title: Thread of Ash and Fire
description:
Anna and Ryne must battle against evil forces - and their own hearts - in this high-stakes conclusion to the Thread of Gold series.

Season 4 of Thread of Gold 

***

Annalise Cidarius has a tough decision to make: seize the throne or take a chance at love. Reeling from a devastating battle that saw the defeat of the evil goddess Lucia, Anna returns to Stillwater Castle, where an empty throne awaits her; a throne that both she and her enemy-turned-lover Ryne Delafort intend to sit on.

But shortly after Anna returns, it becomes clear that chaos and dissent still rein. Reports surface that Eris Delafort has seized control of the neighbouring kingdom and is massacring towns. Even more disturbingly, there are whispers that Lucia has returned, and the goddess might just be more powerful than ever before...

If Anna is to save her kingdom, she must muster her courage and defeat the forces of evil once and for all. For if she fails, she'll lose everything - including her own head.

WARNING: This story contains strong language, depictions of violence, and mentions of sexual assault. Reader discretion is advised.

title: Heart of Leoth: [HAITUS]
description:
Heart of Leoth is on Haitus as I work on my next published book. It will return end of March 2023. 

-------------------------------
The Final Book of The Four Realms series.

Carrying the last blood heir of Azura, Fara has returned to Calate to try and persuade her brother the king to court peace. Yet her heart remains with the Leoth warrior she left behind. As Fara tries to manoeuvre the political pieces of her own realm in order to bring peace to Ethis, Theodan too must embrace his destiny. A destiny that will force him to make a choice between his realm and the woman he loves. 

In the furthest corners of the Four Realms, a dark force starts to rise to the surface, and the strings of fate that have been loose too long, start to pull taught. War is coming. But so is something far more powerful. Soon, Leoth and Human alike will be forced to take a side, for what else are mortals capable of, but love and war.

title: Liars, Deaths, Scales & The Guardian Odyssey
description:
"You can never alter time, no matter what change you make, what's done is done! There is no changing what has occured, Apsara"
He said to the broken lady, who was on the black marble floor.
"You thought, you could change the fate of the time....not you would simply divide the time into two different verses."
Tears of grief and failure continuously rolled down her soft cheeks as spoke,
"There are four entities in a universe, Time, Space, Reality and Soul. They can never be altered!"
His rage echoed through the chamber.
Apsara looked at him with puffy eyes now filled with a new found emotion of confusion.
"So are you telling me that- I was already, really there.....in the Mahabharatha.?"
Her mind clouded with disbelief, she was never an outsider...she divided the link that connected the time line of this universe.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
About Me:
🌟 Dreamer | Writer | Music Lover

Hi! I'm a 10th-grade student who loves writing stories, singing songs, and creating music (whenever I can sneak into my brother's studio!). Playing the Violin and Keyboard is my happy escape, and I'm always eager to learn and grow every day.

I believe in the power of balance-accepting both happiness and sorrow as part of life-and trust in God and my inner self to guide me through everything.

Here, you'll find snippets of my imagination and bits of my soul. Feel free to stick around and explore the worlds I create. Let's connect through stories and dreams!

💬 Always happy to chat about life, dreams, or just random musings!

title: Starrlings 1: House of Fire
description:
The Fire Princess is betrothed to the Air Prince to bring peace to their warring nations. While she tries to adapt to the new kingdom, she discovers a plot to reignite war, so she must join forces with the Winter Princess to prevent it.

✩✩✩

Princess Lumi is sixteen, painfully quiet and shy, and blindly loyal to her abusive twin brother, Tai. Her dream is to join the fire army and serve her brother faithfully. But her dreams are shattered when her grandmother, Empress Kiyo, arranges her marriage to a foreign prince.

Prince Raphael of Lombardia is all good looks, grace, and charm, with the ancient magic of air and thunder in his blood. He's the perfect match; the heir to the most influential nation in the world. But his father has a reason for this arranged marriage, and Raphael will always put his nation before his new bride-to-be.

Then there's Ariane and Isabella Domez: sisters, and orphans of the Fire Wars. With no one else to care about them, Ari will do anything for her younger sister. Even if that means waiting on the cruel Winter Princess, who has sworn to hate the Fire Princess.

STARRLINGS reading order:
Book 1: HOUSE OF FIRE
Book 2: HOUSE OF WINTER
Book 3: HOUSE OF NIGHT

This young adult fantasy novel is set in a world full of elemental magic, magical creatures, and warring kingdoms. 

The first book in this series is set almost entirely in a magical school, Hilverton College, where the most elite magical students - princes and princesses - train to become powerful Starrlings, and learn to harness their own magic and the magic of their creatures, called Kinnlings.

title: Freedom in Marriage: A Southern Historical Romance ✅
description:
It's 1854, and the south is thriving on agriculture. Men do the hard work, and women raise the babies.

I feel like I'm being smothered.

I've always been too smart for my gender. Too eager to learn. Too expressive.

I want too much. At least, that's what my father says.

The oldest son of my father's friend is home from college, and he's looking for a wife. And his sights are set on me.

Will I be too much for a man like Easton Abernathy to take as a wife, or will he be intrigued by the knowledgeable woman my father keeps suffocating?

title: Arta - the last princess
description:
"Who did you say she is?" Osman demanded from the man.
The prisoner was shaking and pleading for his life but did not say anything as he got aware of the terrible blunder he had made.
"Answer me or I will end your miserable life right here right now" waves of anger was visible in Osman's eyes. He raised his sword intending to cut the man's throat.
"Stop" Arta shouted.
Osman slightly turned his head to Arta's direction while his sword was still high above his head ready to strike. 
Arta's heart was beating so fast, she was frightened but at the same time, she couldn't see this monster kill one of her people and do nothing. "I am Shahzadeh Arta. The only daughter of King Darian." Arta confessed. Her voice was louder than normal and a bit shaky.
Osman chuckled coldly. A devilish smile appeared on his face.
In the blink of an eye, he cut the man's throat. Everyone was silent only a faint hysteric cry of a woman from the cage could be heard. Arta's body was numb. She was just gazing at the man's lifeless body with teary eyes.
Osman turned back and after cleaning the blood on his sword with the prisoner's clothes he lowered his head and whispered into Arta's ear, "you are just a slave now".
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Soar
description:
Please note: this is a third-draft story but is not revised. 

More than a century ago, dragons and the blue-eyed Shaderi flew together. Then they were brought down by jealous men who feared their power. Now blue eyes are a curse and dragons are a laughingstock, neither seen outside of slavery.
  Born a slave, her fair features mark her as a witch who is worth less than even the right to a name. He is a dragon who was raised in the arena, a life that left him unable either to fly or to breathe fire.
  Thrown together by an ambitious showman, they are united by a bond as old as the legends. Together, they have a hope for something more than the lives to which they were born, if only they can learn to trust each other.
  The words of a mysterious minstrel point them west, where rumors say their people live in freedom. The road there is hard, and at the end of it they find themselves a world embroiled in a secret war. This new world is ruled  by a king who values tradition above all else. At every turn their new friendship is tested, and they are forced to decide how much they are willing to pay for a place to call home.
  He wants to help her learn the truth of where she came from, and she wants to give him what every dragon deserves: a chance to soar.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Rome: Marriage Pact
description:
After the chaos of Julius Caesar's assassination and with Rome in disarray, people are desperate to restore order. In this alternate reality where marriage is encouraged to form alliances, no matter the couple's gender, both Octavian and Antony's families push for them to get married and put their rivalry aside. 

Both men begrudgingly agree, despite the fact that Octavian is nineteen and Antony is forty. Both of them struggle to relate in married life, but with enemies around every corner, they soon learn they need one another to hunt Caesar's killers down.
This will mainly be written in Octavian's point of view, but will sometimes switch to Antony's.

title: The Man Inside the Iron Fence (The Boy in the Woods Pt. 2)
description:
It's 1939, and the world is at the precipice of war.  But life for one young man in rural America couldn't be better.  Jonathon Blackwell is the eldest son of the most powerful family in town and heir to Blackwell Iron and Mining.  Unlike many who struggled to survive the final years of the Great Depression, he has everything he could ever want - except the one thing he desires most.

Sheltered by class, privilege, and living inside a locked iron fence meant to protect him, no one could ever imagine anything terrible could happen to him, but dark times are coming.  Fate is about to play it's cruel hand, and when it's all over, the world, the country, and young Jonathon will be changed forever.

The much anticipated prequel to the 2014 Watty award winning and Wattpad featured story, The Boy in the Woods!   This is Jonathon's story, and it just may break your heart...

Note:  Even though this story takes place before  events in The Boy in the Woods, it's intended to be read AFTER because it wraps up the last of the mysteries of that story.   A gentle warning - many spoilers and much confusion lie ahead if you decide to start with this one.  :)

title: Through My Eyes
description:
Set in the late 18th century, this saga of love and betrothal envisions how girls of supposedly 'noble' families were lured into a marriage they do not necessarily want to be a part of. Seventeen year old Eloise is the daughter of a Duchess, a widowed Duchess.Her mother expects a lot from her, perhaps too much. One night, it is revealed that Eloise is betrothed... to a man she has never met. He is due to arrive for their wedding in the late summer and Eloise has no say in the matter. As time passes and Emmanuel proves himself to be a man that Eloise hates, she finds herself being drawn closer and closer to her childhood best friend, Damon. What will Eloise choose? Emmanuel, whom by marrying, Eloise will be able to uphold her mother's reputation, or Damon, with whom her heart lies?

title: Teaspoon of Honey
description:
May Berkeley gets called in to get rid of a beehive and gets to know the Purcells, specifically Eugene Purcell, a rational and sometimes middle son of a viscount. While the beekeeping business develops, so do the two's feelings as they keep bumping into each other's paths.
____

A short excerpt:
"Regardless," he added, "I'm glad you took those dreadful, aggravated things away."

"Bees are not angry creatures," May defended. 

"My numerous bee stings would beg to differ with your assessment."

She chuckled, "They are protective and will defend themselves, sometimes to the death. The same way you would seem to defend and protect your sister."

"Miss, are you comparing me to bees?"

"I believe I am, my lord. However, I think you are more of an angry creature than they are."

His face heated and in a more hyperbolic setting, steam would have hissed out his ears. 
"Excuse me?! You do not get to come into my home and-" He stopped himself.  He was proving the infuriating beekeeper right. Even the cat woke up. "Never mind."

title: Odd Rose
description:
-"Why are you crying?"

What, I didn't know I was crying.

 -"Come on." He offers a hand to help me up.

-"Stay away... from me." I get up on my own a grunt escaping my lips when I feel pain in my knees.

-"Your knees!" He crouches down to look at them up close.

-"Oh don't act as if you care." I look down and see he has wet hair, which is reasonable since he came out of the bathroom.

*Swoop* He scoops me up, my injured knees on his left and my head rests on his right shoulder. I hitch as he picks me up.

-"What do you think you're doing? Put me down this instant!"
 I try to wiggle out of his arms, but it's useless, he holds me tighter to his chest.

He gently places me on the bed, and I sit on the edge, I instantly throw my hand to his face intending to slap him.
As if it were muscle memory he blocks my hand and gently holds it. He crouches down not breaking eye contact.

-"Stella, I'm... sorry. I acted out on you."

I know Jacob, and that probably was hard for him to admit.

-"Let me treat your knees." He places a gentle hand over my wound.

~
~
~
~

V.E. Graham is an author/student who hopes that having multiple occupations makes her look like she has a life. She studies English, History, Classical Civilization, and how many days one can live off popcorn before getting sick.

Veronica wrote her first novel at age fifteen when she discovered writing about people is way easier than actually talking to them. title: The Family Legacy
description:
Writer Grace Campbell and her sister, Faith, had a troubled start in life. They were the only family each other had. When Faith gets the opportunity of a lifetime to move to Scotland and help a Scottish Clan solve a family mystery, Grace tags along as an opportunity for some deserved holidays.

Grace didn't, however, plan to meet James MacInnes - the eldest son of the Clan and the heir. He is everything she knows to avoid, everything that would break her heart.

As their attraction grows, Grace is more and more convinced that stern and polite James is his family's future and their legacy, and Grace just isn't the right woman for him.

title: A Crook In The Sand
description:
"YOU FOOLISH GIRL, NOT EVEN YOUR STORIES CAN SAVE YOUR BEAUTIFUL THROAT."



Khai killed 1000 girls before he got to her. And he would make sure she would die like the others. His beautiful hands demand blood on them.

Mazeeda would make sure that she'll be the last girl Khai would ever kill. Her beautiful neck will not be touched by a blood-coated blade. She will take her friends place.

If Mazeeda cannot save her own life with trained hands, she will do it with her quick mind and sly mouth. During the night, she weaves stories never told before to Khai; in the morning, she roams the palace to escape. With each tale she tells, the more she realizes these aren't just stories; but something much greater.

Something that Khai is keeping from her, things he does not want to be let out.

Somewhere a 1000 miles across the sand kept land, three brothers are plotting something that'll end the reign of the monster and save their sister.

title: His Queen
description:
"She is a bare diamond found in a sea of pointless extravagance."

Two hearts spoke with such vehemence;
two minds clamored. 

For you see, what our hearts say is a thousand times louder than that of our mind's scream.

"Hush darling; you're mine now."

A King.
A Servant.

"Shall I make not my claim on you, I might brand myself an utter fool for letting you go." 

Shall their hearts intertwine as one sweet melody, shall their minds sing in sweet, sweet symphony; everything, every mayhem and havoc that blocks their everlasting harmony shall dissolve into a cloud of dust and vanish forever. 

Never to be seen.
Never to be felt. 

For love conquers all.
For their sweet, sweet melody shall prevail until the end of time.

"My darling, you are my bare diamond found in a sea of pointless extravagance."

Indeed; love truly conquers all.


H I S  Q U E E N
ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.

title: Bride Price ✔
description:
"You know I cannot commit such atrocity my love. I cannot sleep with anothers wife." Tomori stressed, looking away as she moved to untie her once white wrapper. It was now brown and dirty, showing all she had to suffer just to make sure there was no stain of blood on it. Brown and black was allowed, but not red. Not yet.

"I would rather die than be called the wife of that animal." She hissed. "Yet you are his wife anyways, and until we leave his territory, you would always be his wife." He replied.

"My lord, I'm beginning to think that you don't want me any more." Abebi sniffles and he freezes in discomfort. "My loyalties have been sworn to the king since I became a warrior." 

"You had better choose one, your loyalties to your king, or your loyalty to me." 

...

The prophecy was simple, only Abebi could give the aged king a son, only she could bear the heir to the throne. 

Thrown into a marriage she despised, Abebi runs away with her lover, the head warrior of the village, in search of refuge and another life. 

But fate has other plans, as the king is not ready to have his only chance of having a son slip through his fingers.

Cue bloodshed and war, it's a fight of survival, and a quest for freedom.

...

For Tomori to finally get his wife, he must pay the highest bride price.

He must pay with his life.

For every love story comes with a price. 

...

title: Blood-Bound [ Lore of Penrua: Book I ]
description:
A LINE UNBROKEN. A TRUTH UNSPOKEN. 

Born into wealth and privilege as the niece of an emperor, Starborn Lady Mhera never dreamt that tragedy would shatter her world. But darkness roils beneath the peaceful facade of the Holy City: a rebellion is brewing among the Arcborn-the dangerous, magic-blooded undercaste of Penrua-and they will stop at nothing to destroy the peace of the realm. That much is proven to Mhera when she is just a girl and her greatest treasure is taken from her. 

Years later, still wounded by the evil the Arcborn wrought against her, she is on the brink of professing her final vows as a nun...but before she can accept the life of safety and solitude she doesn't truly desire, she is offered a chilling compromise with fate that threatens everything she has ever known.

FIRST PLACE WINNER - 2018 Clash of Swords (hosted by The Fae Folk) - Dark Fantasy Category
SECOND PLACE WINNER - 2018 Sunset Awards - Fantasy Category
SECOND PLACE - 2018 X Factor Awards - Overall!

authorBio:
Mina Parkes (she/her) is a genre-wandering wordsmith who writes stories about heroes solving problems far bigger than themselves.

By day, Mina works magic as a cubicle witch at a Fortune 500 company. By night, she scribbles away in her pajamas.

Among her very favorite things are em dashes, prickly characters, iced coffee, and (obviously) books.

Mina lives in Virginia with her handsome and hilarious husband, their opinionated cat, and a ferret without a single survival instinct.

title: A Grace of Crowns | ☑ Queenkiller, Kingmaker #1
description:
❖ QUEENKILLER, KINGMAKER Book 1 ❖

Feudal Southeast-Asia filled with magic, daemons, and a royal conspiracy.
  
This is Isla's quest for the truth, and her slow spiral into becoming her very own worst nightmare.

When the gods ascended thousands of years ago, they left behind the divine gift of theurgy. Its powers still echo amongst men, but run fiercer yet in the blood of kings and queens. And one of them will stop at nothing before Isla is dead.

A betrayal lures her out of refuge and into her journey home, where she must unmask her enemies before they unmask her. The theurgy that she has had to keep hidden for many years can be her greatest ally or her most lethal foil.

Only her wits can guide her through the dangerous politics of the Surikh court. But amidst the plots and schemes bubbling around her, she uncovers something far more sinister than the identity of her enemies. Something that can change her entire life; indeed, entire kingdoms.

title: Anti Heiress
description:
Princess Sarina has no desire to become Queen of Ilythia. After an assassination attempt, she fakes her death and escapes with one of her ladies-in-waiting. Just when she and her lover think the royal life is in the past, the new princess is forced to live with them for her safety. To prepare her beautiful new successor, Sarina disguises herself as a male courtier to tutor the future queen. The more time Sarina spends with her replacement, the more she wishes she could reveal her true identity- consequences be damned.

authorBio:

title: Astoria
description:
M E R E D I T H is a princess without a country. Her family, formerly the royal family of Borgavia, has been exiled from their home, forced to live under the rule of the Empire of Astoria.

A N T O N Y is a prince who doesn't want a crown. Soon to be king of Astoria, he will inherit the empire his family built before him. Though glorious, it has become an empire built on blood. Antony has his work cut out for him to restore trust among the empire's citizens and to rebuild the parts that have fallen to disrepair in the wake of former kings' desires only for conquests. 

A  R E B E L L I O N is rising. In the midst of the gathering tide, Meredith will swallow her pride and go to King's City for a job in the palace, all in the name of supporting her family. 

N O  O N E in the king's palace is aware that their newest servant is more than a servant, and Meredith plans on keeping it that way. 

H O W E  V E R, the best laid plans are often upset.

title: ~.✧ Austora ✧.~ [COMPLETE]
description:
~.✧ The kingdom of Austora is built on family names and tradition. So what happens when the quiet princess breaks the rules of both? ✧.~

Asaidylina "Saidy" Bordovaki is the third in line to the throne of Austora. She knows that her eldest brother Kartren will be King one day and is more than happy to let him live in the spotlight while she lives a quiet, comfortable life in the shadows of the castle. Despite her anxieties when it comes to new people, she is even willing to do as her parents say and court a gentlemen-Ibrin Corzavan-to create an easy life for herself and her family. But then, things change. Things become a little less easy...

Larklind Sarcroft enters Saidy's life. First as a friend, and then maybe more. But there's a problem: while his family upholds traditional values, he is not of the gentry. Not even close. He's a gatekeeper guard, considered on the same level as a castle servant.

But love has no bounds and despite their completely different worlds they are drawn together by a beautiful force. Only time will tell how long this force can keep them together...

title: Sideways and Backwards: a novel of time travel and self discovery
description:
A novel of time travel and self discovery.  

Natasha Delancourt, Editor-in-Chief of a publishing company, wakes up the morning after Halloween with a massive hangover, and a huge problem when a photo of her from the night before has gone viral. And it's not a good photo. Advised by her company PR to get out of London and turn off her phone, she takes the train to Cambridge.  Determined to figure out how her life has gone so sideways, and how she can get it back on track, she makes an afternoon pilgrimage to Evensong service at King's College, an ancient chapel in the heart of Cambridge.  

Then things get weird.  Feeling moved by the music and surroundings, she closes her eyes and then the world gets dark.  She wakes up in the same place, but a very different time....

**This was my NaNoWriMo book from last year 2014, and I'm putting it up on Wattpad in order to get feedback as I continue through the editing process.  I'm hoping I can self publish it in the next few months, though I'm going to spend this November working on a new idea that's been percolating in my head, and then come back to it with fresh eyes in December.  Please leave comments or send me an email with your thoughts and feedback!  Thank you!**
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Born in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, now based in Southern California, following a circuitous route that physically meandered through sojourns in London, NYC and Nashville; and emotionally encompassed several bad relationships, a good marriage, a stillborn son, a miscarriage, a miracle daughter, and post partum depression.  Good times.

I love: pens, history, early choral music, travel, play doh, cats, libraries, and college ruled notebooks.

Hoping to get my ass in gear to finish, and publish, my first book(s) here!

title: My Wild Irish Rose
description:
Colorado, 1875.
  When the MacEilans left Ireland, they hoped for a new start, away from the pain that has followed them their whole lives. But when four of the children are left alone in the frontiers of Colorado, a new start seems impossible- especially for Anne MacEilan, who still lives in her family's dark past.
  America isn't at all how they thought it would be. There's thieves and disease all around them- just what they hoped 
wouldn't be there. 
  Life has never treated the MacEilan family well... but will they be able to beat the odds, and make a life for themselves on the harsh Colorado soil?
  
  This is the first book in the Irish Thistles series, which will tell the stories of the MacEilan sisters. All of the written books can be found on my page.
  Book 1: My Wild Irish Rose- Anne (complete)
  Book 2: Ladybird- Mary (complete)

title: Choosing Love Over Honor [Agents of the Crown #2]
description:
Watty's Longlist 2018!
---

As the owner of a gaming hell, Lionel Chadwick lived on the edges of London's Society, not fully accepted yet not entirely shunned due to the sheer amount of wealth he owned. With a plethora of females around him at his gaming hell, the Museum of Money, no one ever questioned why he never was permanently attached. 

Charlotte Rothesay, youngest sister to the Duke of Avondale, has watched Lionel Chadwick grow up her whole life, and she could never imagine herself with anyone else.  After having her heart broken time and  time again as Lionel caroused, played and switched mistresses, along with how he intentionally put distance between them, Charlie has had enough, and was setting her sights elsewhere. While she was a strong and very wilful girl, she had her limits, and Charlie has had enough of setting her sights on someone who would never come to her. 

But when years go by and they still remained on the peripherals of each other's life, maybe Fate has had enough of their tiptoeing around each other. One week together from an accidental time together, and maybe their life may take an interesting turn.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello! I've been writing for as long as I can remember, especially fanfictions. I was on winglin.net, for anyone who used to write for Asian fandoms. I then jumped to Livejournal to write for Jpop fandom (Arashi fans, yay?), before moving on to fanfiction.net. If anyone wants to know my handle there, holler! I wrote for Narnia, LOTR, Harry Potter, Pokemon, Pacific Rim, Inuyasha and more, just to name a few.

I've also been reading Historical romance for the longest time! I love them! My favorite are Highland stories, and my favorite writers are Julia Quinn, Judith McNaught and Paula Quinn. Only a few. I have lots. xD

I'll be writing mostly historical romance fiction, and I usually write series, although they can all be stand-alone's too! Do take note though that all my works are UNEDITED and I'm very well aware of my grammatical errors. I don't intend to edit them anytime soon cause writing is my hobby for now, and I don't want to turn it into a task, so I appreciate any attempts at helping me edit, but they usually just clog up my comments, so please do refrain.

That said, I do love comments and feedback regarding any characterisation, plot or any info discrepancies!

Here are my current ongoing series!

Ray Taylors, a 16-year-old boy who leaves his abusive household during World War II. title: 𝐏𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐇𝐀𝐋𝐈 : The Arcane Noxus Queen
description:
~Panchali : The Arcane Noxus Queen~ 

•Book 3 of Life of Panchali Trilogy• 

Panchali, The Arcane Queen of a Noxus Empire, the mysterious figure walking into the shadows of reigning fear and brutality. 

The Queen who was labeled as the Villain by the world, was a walking death of the people. She was the ruthless killer and the most feared warrior on the battlefield. 

The Queen of Darkness was never seen by anyone and remained an Arcane for a long time. 

She was known as the Queen of Noxus, the powerful empire with a fearsome reputation. To those beyond its borders, it was brutal, a rule of dictatorship and threatening but those who look past its exterior it was an unusually inclusive society where the strength and talents of its citizens were respected and cultured. 

Yet the subjects of the Empire never had a glance at their cold hearted yet generous Queen. And for the people outside the borders, it was a taboo to enter. 

Those who tried fell into the cold embrace of death after witnessing the horrifying of tortures behind the walls of the Royal Palace.

Even the wind never blows without the permission of the Arcane Queen..!! 

As the wheels of time rotate, the renowned five Princes of Hastinapur find themselves getting entangled in the clutches of the Arcane Lady. 

The soft hearted kind Princes stumbled upon the cold hearted ruthless Queen. 

The five of them were known for their selflessness, high spirit and jubilant nature while on the other hand the Queen was infamous for her ruthless tactics, cunning strategies and selfishness. 

Little did they know they were slowly becoming someone's obsession. 

Well, that was until they started to find clues about someone stalking their life and warning them for the upcoming events.

Plots were made and conspiracies were woven as the "Villain" returned to take her revenge back. 

Bloods were shed and bodies were thrown onto the ground while the world anticipated the next move of the Arcane Queen.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Death Swap
description:
NASA officer, ex-military woman, and staunch feminist Andrea Taylor didn't expect to meet her death on a quiet Tuesday night at the hands of an inexperienced robber with a gun. Even less, she didn't expect to regain consciousness only a few minutes later beside a grumpy local writer. 

In the 18th century.

What else is needed to make her journey more tumultuous than it already is?

✓A young aristocrat trying to make her his whether she likes it or not.
✓A generally grumpy journalist who seems too fun to taunt(she may or may not have feelings for him).
✓Four extremely protective older brothers. 
✓Her anxiety flaring up at the wrong times. 

The icing on the cake- a treasonous plot unfolding in the background

All while Andrea learns to navigate the world of 'Miss Imelda Danbury' with zero memories.

title: Welcome To Paradise
description:
When she agreed to chaperone Lizzy for her first season Eden never thought to see The Duke of Buckingham Nicholas Sheffield the man who has held her heart since they were thirteen years old. While Nikki and Eden are getting reacquainted things  start to spiral out of control. Someone has tried to hurt Eden by lacing her clothing with lye. On a short business trip with Nikki to Paradise farm's where she raises horses the couple ends up married and spend the rest of the season trying to keep it a secret from everyone. Now that they are married each day they must learn to balance long torturous nights of men flirting and courting Eden at all the social events she attends to help get Lizzy married off. Then there are the tumultuous nights they share together in private passionately crossing off all the different places and ways on Eden's list. Join Eden and Nikki on their comical journey of trying to keep a secret neither of them wants to keep but instead of talking they are being slaves to their passion or they are to busy at social events to find out what the other really wants.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I have been writing since I was young it was something I did to escape from the here and now and enter into worlds and places I found interesting. I have never really shared my stories so this is a new experience for me. I watch as my sons (two of them) get published and wonder what it would be like to have that type of experience. So here I am trying my hand at sharing.

title: Sarah's Roses, Book I: Roses of Blue (Revised)
description:
Some secrets are best left unrevealed.

A twist of fate takes Sarah away from the brothel she was born in to the cotton plantation of her Aunt and Uncle.  As she tries to fit in with High Society, Sarah struggles to accept and abide by the cruel morals of the Antebellum South.  And when she forms a tender attachment to her slave, Samuel, her complicated life becomes even more complicated. 

Living in an era where to be a bastard is to be an outcast and to love a black man is criminal, Sarah struggles to find meaning to her life and hope for a forbidden love.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Reading is my passion, writing is my love, art is my soul, and Christ is my life.
Stay at home mom who writes in her spare time and hopes to publish one day!

I love history with a passion so most of my novels are Historical Fiction. But I also like to write fantasy and sometimes play around with modern day romance.

To me, there is no greater beauty than the written word and a picture is worth a thousand of them.

Let's make the world a better place, one story at a time.
My favorite writers are C.S. Lewis, Charles Dickens, Alexsander Solzhenistin, and Beatrix Potter :)

Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/_journey_of_a_writer_/

title: The Arrogance of Elegance | Book 1 of Taunton Chronicles
description:
England, 1816. "Mr. Nicolas Burns was a man of high esteem, and I knew without a doubt that I would be his wife one day. If only I could convince him as such."
Follow Magdelline Forsythe as she strives to get the attention of her childhood friend, Mr. Burns, in order to charm him into marrying her. After not seeing Mr. Burns for four years, when he returns to Taunton, Magdelline makes it her goal to get him to fall in love with her in the short time of his stay. Even if it meant to lie and manipulate. 
Follow a tale of romance, morals, and redemption as Magdelline Forsythe has to come to the decision of whether she would like to be an honest woman, or find "love" by snaking her way into the path of Mr. Burns.

title: My Name Is Naomi
description:
In Germany, Wolfgang Braun is forced to join the Nazis.  He isn't sure he believes anything Hitler is doing is good, but he doesn't have a choice.  When the most powerful man in the country enlists your help, you don't turn him down.  So what happens when he finds a young Jewish girl hiding in the rubble? Does he take her to a concentration camp or kill her? Or does he help her escape to freedom?

Naomi Adler is an eighteen year old Jewish girl in the middle of an age of terror, the Holocaust.  Her family has already been taken away, but by some sort of fortune, she was saved.  Can she make it safely to America, as her family had planned, or will she be found out before then?  Her world turns upside down when she meets David Lee who in 1918, WWI, was drafted into the United States Army, just like his father and brother. He was a driver, transporting men, food, and supplies when needed, risking his life to support them on the battlegrounds

title: The Horse in the Prince's Stables
description:
She's cursed to remain as a horse for the rest of her life. Her coat is colored black for her mother's transgression. Only for one hour every night her human self can shed the mane and the hooves. The only way to break this curse is to find someone who will fall in love with her. Kaelyn had always had her heart set on the wonderful and handsome prince Philip, but he doesn't even know she really exists. Nobody pays any attention to a palace horse. 
When the two of them are captured by common horse thieves, it is up to Kaelyn to bring Philip safely back home. It's a long journey, and they have many miles to cover. Perhaps prince Philip will discover that his horse "Aurora" is more than she appears?

authorBio:
Gosh,  what is there to say really? I'm just a girl who dabbles in way too many fandoms, cosplays, writes (when I find the time), watches movies and tv shows, constantly wears headphones with music, laughs, takes waaaaay too many pictures of my dog... All the while trying to figure out that weird and beautiful mystery we call life. I make mistakes on a daily basis and sometimes I wish I could kill my lazy streak with an epic sword.. Ah, to be human.

And I will admit that I would die 100% happy if I could ever meet Tom Hiddleston and just give him a hug and wish him a merry day. That, or be able to stroke a red panda's fur and cuddle them because they are just beautiful creatures and I love them so much <3

To my dear fans - Each and everyONE of you is awesome. Thanks always and forever for reading and bearing with my long writing hiatus. Your patience is appreciated :) I wish you all luck in whatever journeys you are pursuing in your individual lives.

***

title: Yes, Master
description:
In England, Rosalie works as a maid for a high-society family to support her poor family. Treated cruelly by her mistress, Rosalie slaves away day after day, wishing for an easier life.  She is surprised when a way out comes in the form of a proposition from her mistress's handsome son.
(Cover by: @I_heart_u64)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi! I'm Danielle. I'm a lover of music, particularly pop-punk. (P!ATD, FOB, WATIC, WTK, ATL, Mayday Parade, and Marianas Trench are my life. ) And of course I love to write.

Projects:

Through My Looking Glass was the first thing I ever posted on Wattpad. It's just a book of poems I wrote one year when I got really into poetry. I still love poetry, but tend to write stories now.

Yes, Master is my first completed story on Wattpad. It takes place in England, and tells the story of Rosalie, the maid for a rich family, who falls in love with her boss's son, Alexander.   It's cheesy and pretty awful, but it holds a special place in my heart.

Subjugated came next. Taking place in medieval Ireland, Maura is a headstrong, stubborn girl in an era where girls are expected to be anything but. When she's forced into an arranged marriage by her uptight father, she wonders if she'll ever find love. This is one of my favorites because I love how it examines family dynamics and shows that home is really where the heart is.

Plagued is set in the era where mysterious plagues wiped out thousands. Arabella Bordel gets more than she bargained for when she offers newcomer Henry Beaumarchis archery lessons, especially when Henry makes a surprise declaration when he is sick.

Catered takes place in contemporary NYC. It's a classic rich girl, "poor" boy story, but with a twist, because the rich girl was once "poor" herself.

Corresponding Stars takes place in 1903 Europe and shows how a twist of fate brings two people, Alexis and Genevieve, together.

Traditional in the Twenties takes place in 1926 NYC. It tells the story of how, through a series of coincidences, a Jewish girl who has never ventured out of her traditional world meets the boy who changes it.

Updates: I try to update weekly at least one of my stories. There's no specific schedule, but I usually update Tuesdays during the summer, and weekends during the school year.

title: Through It All
description:
In the small town of Lakewood  in the nineteenth century, the future of Adam Lancaster and Sophia Willis has been set through an arrange marriage, but Sophia is in love with the son of the richest man in town and Adam has never considered marriage as part of his life. Will they give each other a chance or are they destined to live unhappily ever after?

authorBio:
Thirty something Mexican fangirl and a hopeless romantic.

Been writing since I was 12. What started out as a Die Hard Fan Fiction, it has turned into a passion.

History, vintage, romance, are my jams.

title: The Pearl of Troy
description:
War has raged outside the walls of Troy for the past seven years. Safe inside the royal palace, Briseis, a spirited young Trojan princess, sits back as her famous cousins, Hector and Paris, fight against the Greeks, who encroach upon Troy's borders more each day. 
An ill-advised trip outside the safety of the palace leads to Briseis being captured and held hostage by the Greeks. She's put in the custody of Prince Achilles of Thessaly, a moody and impulsive young man who just happens to be the Greeks' greatest warrior.  Achilles is destined to win glory and immortality but live a short and tragic life. 
Briseis is given in an arranged marriage to Achilles and the two find that their union might be based on more than just politics. But when Achilles comes into conflict with the greedy and powerful, King Agamemnon, it sets off a cycle of violence and tragedy that threatens all they both care about.

title: Not your Romeo and Juliet
description:
"What is an adventure without a risk, my lady." He smiles.

"And you want your lady to do the dirty work?" I question with disgust.

"If you wish an adventure, quit being a lady. " He replies. 


What if Romeo and Juliet wasn't just an insta love story? What if it had a real beginning and perhaps a real end?


"If loving you is a sin, I accept the punishment." He says with utter sincerity.

"And if losing you is the risk, I'll resist my affection." I reply.


Meet Romeo Montague and Juliet Capulet,the children of two family who hate each other deep within their hearts. But unlike the original Shakespeare's version, this one has a plot twist.

title: The Time-Traveller's Choice
description:
One moment, Emma Scott is in her college room in 2015, and the next she's in 1921 falling in love with an ex-soldier with a charming smile and a secret...

Emma's an old hand at time travel: the first time she was pulled backwards she was ten years old. She can sense the memories that stone, fabric and wood have soaked up: usually she just sees them, but sometimes she ends up living them. She knows the drill: (1) avoid getting pulled backwards in the first place; (2) avoid the object that's pulled you backwards; (3) prevent the memory that imprints on the object, or, if all that fails, (4) wait it out until you're back in the right time.

The problem is that the object was an old ring that her Granny Alice bequeathed to her, and Emma last saw it on the finger of her great grandmother, fleeing into a crowded London street. Now Emma is trying to find the ring and go back to her own time, but her great grandmother has vanished, and meanwhile there's Charlie Lawrence who's making Emma wonder if she even wants to go back at all...

title: Thrown Through Time
description:
Sophie Landvik's life is going just how she planned. She has a great job and a great apartment in the city. She has everything she ever wanted and wouldn't change a single thing. 
So, what's a girl to do when she's mysteriously transported to  Norway during what appears to be the middle ages? Can she get home, or will she have to keep herself from killing the pompous Chief's son, who thinks he's Odin's gift to women? And why do they keep saying she's the one from an ancient prophesy?

authorBio:
Hi to my followers! I have been slowly working on a few new 'books' and am nearly ready to publish. I know it's been a while, but most of the ones I have already published had already been finished for years before I added them to Wattpad. Thanks for your patience, and I hope you enjoy what's to come!

I love to write! Sometimes I just have an idea in my head that turns into a story. I tend to struggle with endings and knowing where the story stops, but the more I write the better I get. I welcome constructive criticism and if you see any errors, misspellings, or other mistakes, let me know. I try to edit as well as I can but being so familiar with the story makes it easy to miss things sometimes. Thanks for reading my work. I'll add more as I'm able to edit it!
I'd like to add that I so enjoy the comments I've been getting! You guys are amazing! Sometimes it's hard to know if your style of writing actually conveys what's in your head and from the comments, I'd have to say it seems to be! Thanks for reading!

title: Best Laid Plans (A Gentleman of Misfortune, Book 2)
description:
What could possibly go wrong next?

With the recent drama of his family behind him, Lucas Bywood wants nothing more than to stay out of trouble and pretend he is not pining over the absent Miss Darkin. What better plan than to visit Bath, the largest social town outside of London? However, it quickly becomes apparent he has picked the wrong friend as a traveling companion.

Mr. John Ward has eyes only for the card tables and shows no interest in shielding Lucas from Bath's debutantes and matchmaking mamas on the hunt for a bachelor. But matters shift from annoying to alarming when Ward's determination to seek justice gets them both suspected of murder.

As they say, "The best-laid plans of mice and men often go awry" and Lucas' plans weren't terribly well-laid to begin with...

title: Aisha and the Prince of Wales
description:
Aisha Ahluwalia is a London-based Indian, focussed on her career as a personal shopper with the UK's most sought-after designer, Elise Alva. She's used to dealing with celebrities, having handled clients ranging from Oscar-winning actors to the wives of star football players. What she doesn't expect is to be swept away by her newest client, the Prince of Wales.

Prince Edward Nicholas Arthur Philip, who prefers to be referred to as just 'Nick,' is the most eligible man in the UK. The paparazzi just can't leave him- or his love life- alone! Used to people fawning over him and dropping not-so-subtle hints that they'd like to be the next Queen, he is intriqued by Aisha, the hardworking, no-nonsense Indian girl who is a breath of fresh air.

Sparks fly, but it's difficult to keep a whirlwind romance secret from the paps! Will Aisha and the Prince of Wales make it down the aisle in one piece?

title: The Paleys (1915-1921) - An Alternate Romanov Story
description:
The Grand Ducal Coup has succeeded. In order to avoid revolution, Grand Duke Michael Alexandrovich, the Tsar's brother, takes the reigns of the Government in Petrograd and declares himself regent with the support of all senior Grand Dukes. With a heavy heart, he sends his brother, wife and daughters into exile to the Isle of Man and becomes his nephew's tutor until he comes of age. Russia becomes a Constitutional Monarchy and revolution is avoided.

Meanwhile, the Tsar's uncle, Grand Duke Paul who settled in Russia in 1914, after spending several years living in exile in Paris because of his scandalous marriage to a divorced woman, is adjusting to his old life. His children, Vladimir, an accomplished poet, Irina, and Natalia will have to settle into a new world, far from everything they have always known. 

In the last times of the old regime, Vladimir falls in love with Grand Duchess Olga Nikolaevna, but the coup, Rasputin's murder and their divided loyalties drift them apart. His sister Irina also finds love with Feodor, but he still sees her as a little girl. Natalia, the most extrovert and fiery of the siblings, makes an impression wherever she goes, leaving a trail of broken hearts in her wake.

Together, they will have to navigate through life, love, friendship and heartbreak in a strange country with a new position, new people and new conventions.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I'm a translator who actually wanted to be an Historian and I use the (little) free time I have to write because I just can't help it. Also a mom. And changing of the seasons enthusiast.

title: Her Wolf King
description:
BEAUTY AND THE BEAST MEETS JANE EYRE

Lenore Abrahams: Forced into a betrothal with the cruellest of men due to her family's poverty. One desperate night, she does the unthinkable and strikes up a bargain with a wolf: she will live with him as his bride for the space of one year... if he pays off her father's debts and frees her of her abusive fiancé. 

Everett Dunstan: Once a man, now a wolf. Every night he transforms into a beast and howls at the moon, caged in the skin of an animal and made to guard a treasure that can only be given to the pure of heart... And though he keeps a close watch over it, he is far from worthy. But when he meets someone who is, he seizes the chance to break the curse that binds him to his wolf form. 

Will these two trapped souls be each other's salvation... or undoing?

title: The Apprentice Girl // Book 3 in the Rosie Grey series
description:
A month after leaving her life as the Ealing's scullery maid, fourteen-year-old Rosie Grey had to go back home without so much as a reference. Her brother helps her start a new life, offering her a job in his tailor shop, away from the comforts and struggles of the Ealing household.

Although a different job from the one she had worked for six months, Rosie flourishes under the instruction of her brother, but she cannot forget the life she has lived. The memories of life in the factory and the struggles she faced under Mrs Ealing's thumb continue to plague her mind. As do her feelings for the Ealing's oldest son, Robert. The only person who was kind to her in the Ealing family, and the reason for her leaving. His soft brown curly locks and smile makes her forget the difficulties she has faced in the past, even if she is sure she will never see him again.

That is until Robert shows up and stirs the scandal up again, forcing her to figure out her true feelings for the Ealing's oldest son and come to terms with who she really is.

title: The Northumbrian Saga
description:
Aethelwin is a Peaceweaver.

Niece to the King of Northumbria, she is married at the age of 13 in order to strengthen support against Aelle, the would be usurper of King Osbert's throne.

But guaranteeing the support of strangers who have their own agendas is no easy task.

Aethelwin finds herself not only on the wrong side of the debilitating civil war, but at the mercy of a family and a village who blame her for their hardships.

Then, just as she finds the means to change her fate, history intercedes.

Ivarr the Boneless and his two brothers, Halfdan and Ubba, have laid claim to York. Aethelwin is flung into a world of chaos and panic as she fights against the Danes and even her own people, to bring her brother out of his stronghold in the north and restore her beloved Northumbria.

But at what cost will she fight for a Kingdom in the final throws of death.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: A H Gray lives in the West Australian city of Perth, where she studied History and Archaeology for six years. Influenced by her interest in such subjects, and her love of a good story, a number of ideas and characters have since come to life in the form of her debut novel, The Northumbrian Saga. The novel is intended to be the first in a series of fiction books based on the history and people of medieval Northumbria during the Anglo-Saxon and Viking periods.

title: The Royal Games
description:
Just as I go to slip into my room, the mysterious stranger places a hand on my waist and leans over my shoulder. "If I were the Prince I would only have eyes for you" he breathes into my ear before walking away, leaving me a hot mess.

**

The United Kingdom is looking for a wife for their son, the heir to the throne of Britain.

A deal is negotiated. All girls from 19-21 who live in the U.S.A must register to enter a trial period in the palace in England, competing for the Prince's heart.

Rosaline Princeton finds herself one of the 'lucky' girls chosen to embark on this incredible journey. But she has no desire to leave her family and home country, and certainly no desire to win the heart of a man she's never even met before.

But over the months she encounters crazed girls certain of their right to Britain's throne, a Prince she can't seem to shake from her thoughts, friends to last a lifetime, a rather unpleasant brother, a charming cousin, secrets and, quite possibly, even love thrown into the chaotic mix ...

... But will she get her fairytale ending? And with whom ...

authorBio:
Hey there and welcome to my page!

Thank you so much for reading my stories! I really hope you enjoy them... Because I love writing them! Some people have left really encouraging comments on my stories that have really encouraged my confidence with writing on here!

I do LOVE writing but for me, Wattpad is just a hobby. Wattpad has to revolve around my life and commitments, not the other way round. But, I enjoy using Wattpad to take a break and live out my romantic fantasies! I'm a little bit of a cheeseball over here sorry...

Saying that though, my Wattpad life is rather busy at the moment. I am currently in the middle of writing several different stories which I hope to begin publishing soon. So keep your eyes peeled!

Vote for me? It only takes a sec ;) as they say at Tesco... every little helps! Teehee.
Comment? Constructive criticism is more than welcome but no hate please.
Follow me? Find out when I update immediately and get notified when I publish my new books currently under construction.

Thank you for your support,
ashling x

title: Chosen : Assassin Book 1
description:
Chosen when a child, Lady Joselyn is trained to be a ruthless killer. She is destined to be the English king's assassin and protector. Only he and the guild master are supposed to know. It's a life and death secret that must be kept.

For an assassin survival is precarious. Life is something you simply cannot take for granted because the next day is never granted. Despite her privileged upbringing, Joselyn quickly learned how to survive on her own and to never trust a soul while following the Guild without question.

Upon her return to England, a murderous plot against King Cassiush is discovered. Joselyn is shocked when she finds out who the fiend is. She's even more shocked when the King proposes marriage, a lot. An assassin has never married her king before. The last one who fell in love had her tongue ripped out and was burned alive.

Letting her emotions cloud her judgment, Joselynfalls for Cassius and agrees to the marriage, jeopardizing not only his life but her own. Disobeying the Guild means death. Now she must figure out how to keep them both alive and not piles of smoldering ash.

title: Crown of Blood
description:
War is upon Iride. 

And the crown on Cage's head has never weighed heavier.

Struggling to save his kingdom from conflict, Cage sets out to find a way to reach an agreement with Endir and avoid the fulfilment of the visions of death and destruction still torturing him. But in order for that to happen, he must make peace with Kat.

Kat has become the ruler of a once great kingdom and she has sworn to return it to greatness. But for that to happen, she needs more resources than are available. Resources she knows neighboring Iride is hoarding. After all, she was once a subject of Iride herself and is aware of the hatred and discrimination Endir unjustly faces. 

She will stop at nothing to make things right.

When two former lovers meet across the battlefield, the fate of two kingdoms will be decided.

And the fairies who played their hands must face the consequences of their actions.

title: One crazy duchess.
description:
He walks in angrily.
"I thought you said you couldn't have children."



I am caught off guard but nevertheless I compose myself.
"Forgive me your excellency I do not understand." I say looking down.



"Look at me," I bring my eyes to his," you are bleeding which means you are healthy and can conceive." he glares and it hits me.



"Well, if I remember correctly your excellency, I said I cannot give you children. I never said I could not have children." I curtsy." Now if you'll excuse me, I have duties to get to." 
I leave the duke dumbfounded.

title: The Longing Hearts: Tale of Subhadra and Arjun's Exile✅
description:
Cover Credits: @SuryaVadhu_Padma

"The Longing Hearts: Subhadra and Arjun's Tale of Exile" is a heartwrenching tale that explores the story of Arjun and Subhadra, two individuals deeply in love, who are forced to live separately during the time of exile.

As the story unfolds, we are transported to the era of the Mahabharata, where Arjun, the valiant warrior and third son of Queen Kunti, finds himself exiled along with his four brothers. The Pandavas are banished to the forests for thirteen long years as a result of losing a game of dice against their cousins, the Kauravas.

Arjun, torn between his duty towards his brothers and his love for Subhadra, is forced to leave his beloved wife behind. Subhadra, the beautiful and intelligent princess of the Yadav clan, understands the predicament Arjun faces and willingly accepts this separation, knowing that it is for the greater good of their family.

The story delves into the emotional turmoil experienced by both Arjun and Subhadra as they navigate the challenges of living apart.

As a writer, I explore the intricacies of human emotions, friendships, and the beauty of personal growth. My poetry captures fleeting moments and deep feelings, while my photography freezes time, revealing the extraordinary in the ordinary.

When I'm not crafting narratives or capturing images, you'll find me reviewing books, sharing my thoughts on the stories that inspire me, and connecting with fellow creatives. title: The Cowboy and the Angel | ✓
description:
To him, she was the perfect definition of an angel. What would an angel like her want with a cowboy like him? Did he even stand a chance to win her heart?

Dixie Harden and Jason Archer have had it for each other since they were little. After the school closed and the Archer's moved, they haven't seen each other in ages. But that was about to change.

One day, unexpectedly, they run into each other at the mercantile. It was peaches and cream from there. All seemed to be perfect, and they would have each other at last, or so they thought. After crucial circumstances pull them apart, the things that surface become too much to bear. Will their love last despite all the lies and treachery, or will the cowboy lose his angel?

Started: March, 2019
Ended: September 18, 2019
Edited: 🚫
Word Count: 55,235

Note: This was my second ever book to write, and it's super cringy. It's also written in country/western lingo so some things won't seem grammatically correct.

Also, this book is based on the Wild West time period (1865-1895). Some of the places that will be mentioned in this book are fictional places I have come up with, others are (or were) real but may look different than they actually looked in history.

Scriptures used are from KJV.

title: Commander-in-Chief Swap
description:
The premise this time is World War II with the positions of Douglas MacArthur and Dwight Eisenhower swapped. There are no other changes. A flashy, gung-ho, European front and a sober, solid, lean Pacific front will develop.

So this time, the main perspective is on the American side. Japan and Germany are getting their asses kicked. Or, rather, woe betide anyone that isn't named Douglas MacArthur. If you are a fan of the Axis forces, then prepare to get depressed, I guess, but anyway, this is fiction.

title: Beyond the King's Gate
description:
A servant's daughter befriends the prince and finds an unlikely friendship. One that would be greatly scrutinized. Pushed and pulled, the prince has to choose the future of the kingdom he is being raised to rule? One that has its place for servants, and those of the upper class. But two shall never mix.

Or follow his heart? That tells him he sees more in her than just a servant? As they grow up, the once innocent hearts that believed all were equal, quickly learn that there is a rift between servant and prince. And to cross onto the other side would mean losing everything. 

Will love and friendship be enough to surrender everything?

The estate is entailed, but the eldest sister Rebecca comes up with an ingenious solution to their problem. Although Rebecca's idea is highly irregular and somewhat illegal, Alex's promise wouldn't let him to back off.
It could've been easy, if their mutual attraction didn't complicate matters. And then, Rebecca's brother's secret past comes to light, and a worse entanglement ensues.

title: Something
description:
Ps....Nothing comes before Something. In short you have to read Nothing in order to understand Something

I can do this. I can do this. I can do this.I am not a waste of space. I am not a disgrace. I am not pathetic. I am not nothing.


I am something. I am something. I am.......Something.



I wiped away the stray tear that managed to break through and took a deep breath. Nobody should see me weak I am strong.




"Please let me go"

"I can't and I won't"


"Trust me there are better females out there, beautiful and strong, not broken like me"


"I don't want other females . I want you. Only you"



"You don't understand what your saying"



"I want you. I need you. Only you"



"It's something sinister. Something of old. Something that will consume you. Don't listen to him. It's all lies. It's always been lies. He doesn't care. He never did"

"Who are you"

"The only person who will finally make you to be something "


              .                   .                  .




Sequel to Nothing. Cant be read as a stand alone. In order to understand this you must read 'Nothing'.

title: Two Birds [ONC 2024]
description:
An Open Novella Contest 2024 Book.

Prompt used: Prompt no. 88

Your father is forcing you to marry someone you have never met. The night before your wedding you tie your sheets together and make your escape through the window. Half way down you make eye contact with someone doing the exact same thing a few windows over. 

                                        ---------------

Royal families hold a reverent image and must uphold it in front of their nobles and citizens. What then shall the Princess of England do when she has no interest in fulfilling her father's wish of marrying a never seen prince of Netherlands.

                                        ---------------

Jane, also known as Jess, is the only daughter of the King of England, Leo Evans. Upon meeting the French Princess Catherine, Jane and Catherine develop mutual feelings for one another. But the arranged marriage by King Leo troubles the two love birds. 

Wanting to fly far and high in love, the two must decide their actions wisely for it affects not only their lives but the honour of their families as well. Should they take a wrong step, the centuries old prestige of their families will be put on test.

Witness passionate love, royal family drama and kingdom affairs and journey through the life of two suffocating birds as they try making things work in the intolerant and conservative society of the seventeenth century.

NOTE: The book is not mature but the last two chapters may contain mature or triggering content. Reader discretion is advised.

title: The White Duchess - The White Queen
description:
Eliza de' Medici, Duchess of Devonshire and Countess of Charolais and March, finds herself thrown into a life of struggle when she first steps on the island of England.   The complicated, yet loving life that she had with her great aunt and uncle, the king and queen of England, is casted into uncertainty when Eliza chooses to side with the York faction (and marry their heir), believing them better situated to handle power within the country. Suddenly forced to deal with realities that she never thought about, Eliza must tackle the viciousness and poison that lies within her own family, while protecting her own growing one from the uncertainty of The ever-changing government. With a Civil War approaching, Eliza much learn where her loyalty is firmly lie and ready herself for a military campaign that will decide not only the future of her family, but the future of the country she has sworn to serve.

title: Full Circle (gxg)
description:
Princess Knallia's birthday is less than a week away, and her parents haven't given up hope in her finding the Prince of her dreams. But Knallia has, and her parents decide to throw a masquerade ball in order to gather all of the Princes in one location to make her choice easier. Aven is a young thief on the run from a neighboring kingdom, who had to leave her father behind to try and make enough money to pay off the family debt. When word of a masquerade ball reaches her, she is almost too happy to go. An excuse for a thief to wear a mask near the kingdom's wealthiest citizens, no doubt dripping with jewels? Sign her up! But what happens when the unlikely pair run in to each other, can they become more together than they could have dreamed?

This novella was written for the ONC 2021 contest with prompt #87

title: The Factory Girl // Book 1 in the Rosie Grey series
description:
Rosie Grey was only seven years old when she arrived at Mr Thompson's cotton factory. Now fourteen, she has become accustomed to the treatment of the workers and the harsh conditions under which they are forced to work.

After an accident in the storeroom leads to her dismissal, Rosie must try to make her own way in the real world, away from the life she had grown used to.

But despite being seemingly free from her life at the factory, Rosie struggles with the dark past that holds her captive, and she doesn't know if she will ever be able to escape the life she tries so hard to forget.

(C)Spruce_Goose
Cover - Made by @Azanthiel

description:

{𝕀𝕟𝕤𝕡𝕚𝕣𝕖𝕕 𝕓𝕪 𝔼𝕣𝕣𝕠𝕣_𝟙𝟚𝟜𝟚}

𝓣𝓱𝓮 𝓟𝓪𝓷𝓭𝓪𝓿𝓪𝓼: 5 𝓫𝓻𝓸𝓽𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓼 𝔀𝓱𝓸'𝓵𝓵 𝓷𝓮𝓿𝓮𝓻 𝓵𝓮𝓪𝓿𝓮 𝓮𝓪𝓬𝓱-𝓸𝓽𝓱𝓮𝓻.. 𝓫𝓾𝓽 𝔀𝓱𝓪𝓽 𝓲𝓯 𝓽𝓱𝓮𝔂 𝓱𝓪𝓭 𝓪 𝓼𝓲𝓼𝓽𝓮𝓻? 

𝓓𝓪𝓾𝓰𝓱𝓽𝓮𝓻 𝓸𝓯 𝓐𝓰𝓷𝓲, 𝓐𝓪𝓰𝓱𝓷𝔂𝓪 𝓱𝓪𝓼 𝓫𝓮𝓮𝓷 𝓻𝓮𝓫𝓸𝓻𝓷 𝓯𝓻𝓸𝓶 𝓚𝓪𝓵𝓲 𝓨𝓾𝓰𝓪 𝓽𝓸 𝓱𝓮𝓵𝓹 𝓬𝓱𝓪𝓷𝓰𝓮 𝓽𝓱𝓲𝓷𝓰𝓼 𝓯𝓻𝓸𝓶 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓰𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓽 𝓮𝓹𝓲𝓬, 𝓣𝓗𝓔 𝓜𝓐𝓗𝓐𝓑𝓗𝓐𝓡𝓐𝓣𝓐. 

𝓦𝓲𝓵𝓵 𝓼𝓱𝓮 𝓫𝓮 𝓪𝓫𝓵𝓮 𝓽𝓸 𝓭𝓸 𝓲𝓽..?

title: Alexis of Troy (Book I)
description:
Featured on Wattpad - Editors' Choice, Epic Fantasy & Extraordinary Realms (2023)

🏅Wattys 2022 Short Listed
🥇Short Listed for the ONC 2021

There is nothing more terrifying than waking up in an unfamiliar place with no idea of what happened. Alexis knows firsthand what this fear is like, considering she woke up stranded on a sandy beach. The icing on the cake? Zeus whisked her away to the ancient kingdom of Troy. The very Troy from the epic legend, the Iliad. 

Alexis finds herself ensconced in a world on the brink of war, at the mercy of the gods, and conflicted in her feelings for a young man destined to bring the fall of the great city of Troy.

authorBio:
» Wattpad Creator
» Former Wattpad Engagement Ambassador
» Pronouns: she/her

Welcome to my slice of Wattpad. Here you will find a quirky, queer bibliophile who works two jobs while pursuing a career as an author. How am I still going??? Copious amounts of caffeine, sheer will and an imagination that never slows down!

When I'm not writing or working, I'm usually a couch potato (always exhausted 😆) watching TV/movies or reading. I have a supportive and loving partner who is exasperated by my adoration of books 😜🧡

What am I passionate about?? Here's a list for ya:

»  Animals should be cherished and respected
»  Mental health matters
» People with disabilities are people too. Give them dignity and support
»  People of colour matter
»  LGBTQ+ love is real
» Body positivity is amazing
» Women's bodies should not be political
» Homeless communities need more support and less stigma
» Inclusion and diversity in life and literature are so important. There is no room for hate here. This is a safe space for all.
» You. Are. Amazing.

💚💙To quote the quirky, lovable Bill and Ted: "be excellent to each other."💜🧡

CURRENTLY ON WATTPAD:

Alexis out of Time Duology

⁕ Alexis of Troy (ONC 2021 & the Wattys 2022 Shortlister)

⁕ Loki & the Kindergartners Save the World (Novella + Novel)

⁕  Awakening (18+)

⁕ COMING SOON: Of Starlight & Gold

My writing process is chaotic. I have no schedule because I break it all the time. I have no notes because I never look at them. I'm a space butterfly fluttering frantically through life!

title: Blood and Steel
description:
Vorgen Galahad. A knight who is a member of the order of the Black Priors. Knights who are not bound to the code of chivalry. 

Always preferring to be put on guard duty, Vorgen keep a low profile in the order. All is fine and dandy as he live through the boring yet fulfilling days. 

That is until his superior "Vortiger" The leader of the Black Priors, tasks him with an exclusive mission which forces him to get into action. 

Little does he know that this mission will not only force him into action but also send him to a journey where he will discover his past, the consequences of his actions, the cruelty of life and perhaps the one emotion that he has never experienced before as a lonely ass Virgin. 

(The story is based off of a medieval game called "For Honor".) 

(English is not my first language, sorry for the bad grammar you might see in this story)

title: Golden Face
description:
Baldwin was the son of Amarlic I, King of Jerusalem and Agni's of Courtenay, daughter of the Count of Edessa.
He was the only son of the house of Anjou, while he had an older sister, Sibylla, who acted as his mother until the end of his reign.
His meeting with the servant Rebecca will change his life, since with the disease of leprosy he had, he didn't think he would ever know love.
A fictional story, based on real people and events, set in 12th century Jerusalem.

title: Celia (A Sinclair Society Novella)
description:
After two years, Lady Celia Leith has had enough. When she married Sir Horace, she thought she knew what marriage would bring her: security, a home, a loving husband. What she wasn't expecting was a mother-in-law who despised her and criticized everything she did. She also believed her loving husband would actually be at home more than a week at a time.

Taking a stand takes a strength of will this lady didn't know she had. With the help of a lady's maid who is more than she appears, Celia sets about making Clarendon her home. However, when Sir Henry returns with friends in tow, Celia must be resolved to continue her plans.

Will the truth behind his travels bring her closer to the husband she loves, or will her heart be broken?

title: Hathor's Mirror
description:
Nerys Whitaker has it all - a cushy column at History Lives!, a gorgeous flat in a Grade II listed building in a leafy part of London, and a relationship that's lasted more than a year. But in just one day, she loses her job to AI, finds an eviction notice stuck to her apartment door, and gets dumped by her partner who's fallen in love with someone else.

Hungover and depressed, she ends up in the British Museum archives with her best friend who shows her a mirror that suddenly appeared in a locked box dated to the time of Thutmose III. Despite being thousands of years old, it looks brand new. Nerys says it's a fake until she looks into it and finds herself transported into the apartment of Pharaoh Hatshepsut's daughter.

Now all she wants to do is get back home to McDonald's, hot showers, and electricity, but when she learns the goddess Hathor sent her to ancient Egypt to stop the Egyptian empire from going down the wrong track, changing history, and erasing her existence, she finds herself embarking on the adventure of her life.


COPYRIGHT NOTICE: This work is owned by E A Carter. If you find this story on any online platform other than WATTPAD, I did not allow this. You may also be exposing yourself to malware. If you wish to read this story in its original, safe form, do it here on WATTPAD.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
❃ Wattpad Picks Featured ❃ Multiple Award Winner ❃ Published Author ❃

The daughter of a reverend of modest means, E A Carter grew up in the Canadian countryside with only a bicycle, her cat, and her imagination to keep her occupied.

Inspired by the fantastical, magical worlds of Tolkien, C.S. Lewis, and Hans Christian Andersen, she began writing her own fantasy-based stories set in past times at the age of 13.

Today, her books are a unique blend of romance, fantasy, and historical fiction. Many of her characters are real persons of history - princesses, priests, warriors, kings, and queens, all carefully researched and brought back to life in immersive plotlines that span empires.

So far, her readers seem to love her unique retellings of the past. Her books have won numerous awards, including from Writer's Digest.

title: The Kennedy Life: Back to the Future
description:
"What if you could change history?" Caroline Kennedy is only 18 years old when she, her brother, and some of her cousins, go back to 1962. They are sent by Senator a Edward M. Kennedy to prevent the Kennedy asassination and stop America's worst nightmares from coming true. They eventually gain their family's trust and are guided through the times of the Cuban Missle Crisis and the Civil Rights Movement of the 1960's, guiding straight towards the JFK assassination. They will answer questions that people have asked before, "What if there was no Vietnam War?" "What if John Kennedy had lived?" "What if Bobby Kennedy did not run for president?" And what if you grew up with the father you never knew? They find that changing the past isn't as easy as it appears to be. Enemies are going to be made and allies do not trust them...
