title: The Traitor's Daughter
description:
When Elizabeth Ledford was ten years old, her father was  accused of committing treason against the crown. He was arrested and labeled as a traitor, then promptly executed. Elizabeth was forced to watch her father die, and had to face the wrath of those who framed him. 
Nine years after her father's death, Elizabeth returns to the court of King Owen, the man who had her father killed, although he knew that he was innocent. She pretends to be the daughter of a woman who taught her what really happened to her father, and convinced her to enact revenge on those who helped to frame her father. 
Elizabeth embarks on a dark journey, unsure of what to expect, but believing that she'll be able to dispose of all those who wronged her and her family. Along the way, she make unexpected allies, meets old friends, and finds out just how much revenge she can handle without losing her mind.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello, everyone!

I'm Morgan, a twenty-nine year old from Nebraska. Thanks for checking out my page! I'm terrible at these About Me sections, so bear with me while I struggle through this.

I absolutely adore history and prefer writing historical fiction stories. I love the Tudor Period in England, and love learning anything about Henry VIII and his six wives, particularly Anne Boleyn. I am also obsessed with the 1920's and wish that flapper fashion was still a thing. I also love the American Revolution era, and love the musical Hamilton.

If I'm not writing, I love to sing probably more than I should, enjoy reading, and love Netflix and sleeping way too much. I'm an ISFJ and a Capricorn, and I have 2 pugs, Tonks & Luna, a pit bull mix, Penny, and a cat named Charlie! I also love sewing and creating my own historical outfits.

A few of my favorite authors include Libba Bray, Taylor Jenkins Reid, Eric Ives, Antonia Fraser, and George RR Martin.

I try to update regularly, but I have a full time job that keeps me occupied, so I write and upload as often as I can. If you follow me or my stories, please don't expect weekly updates.

I do read stories on here from time to time, so if you'd like me to read your work, please feel free to post on my message board or PM me, and I'd be happy to read it when I have time!

Now that you've learned more about me than you probably cared to, go and check out some of my stories if you'd like! Thank you so much for your encouragement and support. xx

title: Clay's Cottage (Book 1)
description:
[COMPLETE] Seeking inspiration for her next historical romance novel, Tilly Fletcher visits a mysterious 19th century Tasmanian cottage, abandoned suddenly over a century ago by a sad and lonely recluse.

As Tilly steps through the still and silent house, untouched and fully furnished after all these years, the impossible happens to her. Dazed and confused, she struggles to comprehend that she is no longer in 2019, but suddenly standing inside the cottage in 1869 - and is caught by the aforementioned recluse, Nicholas Clay.

While Tilly faces the obstacles preventing her from going back home, she also has to adjust to the sudden change of living in the 19th century. But it's not long before Tilly starts to enjoy the new life she's started for herself, and has doubts about returning to the life she's known for twenty-eight years - especially if it means leaving behind the man she is unexpectedly falling for.

[Word Count: ~70,000+ words]

The @HistoricalFiction Award 2022 "Top 25"
The @HistoricalFiction Award 2022 "Stories Worth Mentioning"

In real life I'm not a brave knight, but a humble aspiring author and historian from the sunny South of Germany, where I live among the cows, spaetzels and swabians. Despite not being a native English speaker, I try to write English stories because I simply LOVE the language. I appreciate any feedback, since I'm trying to improve! :-)

title: The Chronicles Of Kalyani
description:
In the swirling vortex of time, a peculiar phenomenon occurred. Ahana, a brilliant and fiercely independent 25-year-old from modern-day New Delhi, felt an inexplicable pull towards the past.

As she touched the ancient artifact, the Kalachakra, her world dissolved.

When Ahana opened her eyes, she found herself in the opulent chambers of Avanti Nagari, 500 BCE.

She inhabited the body of Princess Kalyani, the third daughter of King Manavendra.

A princess known for her foolishness and carefree nature.

But Ahana's arrival changed everything.

First Thoughts of Ahana in Kalyani's Body:

"What sorcery is this? How did I, Ahana, end up in ancient India? This can't be real... yet, the memories, the sensations - they feel so vivid."

Ahana assessed her surroundings, her modern knowledge and analytical mind racing.

The intricate politics, the strict etiquette, and the whispers of courtiers and eunuchs overwhelmed her.

But Ahana refused to be intimidated.

"I am Ahana, from a future era," she reminded herself. "I possess knowledge that can change the course of history."

As Ahana navigated the complexities of Avanti Nagari's royal court, her sharp wit and cunning strategies left courtiers and scholars speechless.

"How does she...? This is impossible!" Minister Radhagupta whispered.

The ignored princess had become a force to be reckoned with.

The Transformation Begins!

Ahana's modern knowledge and intelligence would soon disrupt the delicate balance of power in Avanti Nagari.

King Manavendra's wise and just rule would be tested.

Prince Aryaman's protective nature would be challenged.

Princess Nalini's jealousy would simmer.

And Ahana's own fate would be forever entwined with the ancient Indian dynasty.

The Story Begins!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Rome: Wicked Game
description:
After the Ides of March, Julius Caesar's grandnephew is called back to Rome to witness the will being opened. To the teenager's shock, the will states he is now Caesar's heir in name, money, and loyalty to his army. 

Marcus Agrippa is loyal to Octavian, the heir to Caesar's name and fortune. But he is loyal to a fault, which soon turns into infatuation for the young Octavian. 

Marcus Antonius thought he was going to be Caesar's heir, but the realization Octavian is heir instead leaves a bitter taste in his mouth. Hateful at the teenager for stealing his glory, he toys with Octavian, trying to win his favors. 

Both Antony and Agrippa desire to be on Octavian's good side; ranging from gifts to secret letters given to the handsome faced youth with the curled blonde hair. 
Alarmed and flattered, Octavian toys with the men back, playing in their wicked game.

(Note: In this alternate history, Antony never falls in love with Cleopatra. Both Antony and Agrippa love Octavian, who has to decide between becoming the first Roman Emperor or the first Roman Pharaoh once Cleopatra and Caesarion are dead.)
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Truth About The Many Worlds Of Printed Pages
description:
Weekly updates (Wednesdays/Thursdays)

°•○•°•○•°

Once they all quieted down, the old woman spoke to Siena and James. "Let us direct this argument a little more towards philosophy. Think of our many worlds, as possible worlds. Possible fictional worlds, existing in those books you love to read. What if every single one of those imaginary worlds is real? And what if you two, working together, might have a chance to change them? To create happier lives for many, many unfortunate and tragic characters? It would not change the books for the readers in our world, you don't have to worry about that. You would only make their lives better in their own universes."

°•○•°•○•°

Siena, a young Italian teacher with a dream of working in the Uffizi Gallery.

James, a Scottish journalist and inventor working on his book about the Lochness Monster.

They have nothing in common, nothing apart from their love of books.

However, once they are brought together by the mysterious Bibliophile Society, they find it very hard to stay apart.

°•○•°•○•°

"So many worlds, so much to do... " James mumbled distractedly as he and Siena finally followed George towards the front door.

"...so little done, such things to be. That's Alfred, Lord Tennyson," Siena finished for him as George opened the front door for them.

°•○•°•○•°

This is a contemporary, urban fantasy romance that will transport you into the worlds of books (those in public domain, for copyright reasons).
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Prince and His Slave [REWRITTEN]
description:

Chione is a peasant with nothing more than a loving father and the wonderful skill to treat the ill and assist in childbirth. However, she is forced to leave everything in order to work at the Pharaoh's palace so she can afford a treatment to help her sickly father. 

Fate will lead these two very different people to come together and fall in love. And when they do, it doesn't take them very long to realize that they are breaking Egyptian laws and putting both their lives in danger.

Lord Erec, Baron of Greenwood.  Years of service earned him glory, honor, wealth and even a title or two.  While contented, he felt no real joy...until he met her.

Resourceful and brave, Gwyndolyn twice escaped death at the hands of treacherous villains.  But she found herself quite alone...until she met him.

War loomed ominously from Far North. Treachery and treason lurked within.  The King and the entire kingdom were in danger.

Falsely labeled as traitors and hunted like animals, Erec  & Gwyndolyn desperately searched for the real traitor.  But how could they possibly beat the odds and win the day before time ran out?

*This work has shortened chapters for e-readers. In book form it would have about 34 chapters.

title: Pride and Prejudice
description:
"Pride and Prejudice is an 1813 romantic novel of manners written by Jane Austen. The novel follows the character development of Elizabeth Bennet, the dynamic protagonist of the book, who learns about the repercussions of hasty judgments and eventually comes to appreciate the difference between superficial goodness and actual goodness. A classic piece filled with comedy, its humour lies in its honest depiction of manners, education, marriage and money during the Regency era in Great Britain.

Mr Bennet of Longbourn estate has five daughters, but because his property is entailed it can only be passed from male heir to male heir. Consequently, Mr Bennet's family will be destitute upon his death. Because his wife also lacks an inheritance, it is imperative that at least one of the girls marry well to support the others upon his death, which is a motivation that drives the plot. Jane Austen's opening line--"It is a truth universally acknowledged, that a single man in possession of a good fortune, must be in want of a wife"-is a sentence filled with irony and sets the tone for the book. The novel revolves around the importance of marrying for love, not simply for economic gain or social prestige, despite the communal pressure to make a good (i.e., wealthy) match." -Wikipedia

More readable version of "Pride and Prejudice" from the Gutenberg library.
Domaine public
authorBio:
I'm currently part of the @RP_Clan and @RP_Warriors joint account where we do cool stuff. Check it out!





Still reading? Well I hope you are ready for the barrage of information you probably won't even remember by the time you've finished reading. Here it goes:

Italy is my favorite country; in fact, I plan to spend two weeks there next year.
If you like tuna and tomato sauce- try combining the two. It's really not as bad as it sounds.
If Purple People Eaters are real... where do they find purple people to eat?
Wednesday is hump day, but has anyone asked the camel if he's happy about it?
Christmas is coming.
A song can make or ruin a person's day if they let it get to them.
Lets all be unique together until we realise we are all the same.
Abstraction is often one floor above you.
I think I will buy a red car, or I will lease a blue one.
The waves are crashing on the shore; it is a lovely sight.
What was the person thinking when they discovered cow's milk was fine for human consumption... and why did they do it in the first place!?
Last Friday in three week's time I saw a spotted striped blue worm shake hands with a legless lizard.
Don't step on the broken glass.
A glittering gem is not enough.
I would have gotten the promotion, but I wasn't there to receive it.
My Mum tries to be cool by saying that she likes all the same things that I do.
When I was little I had a car door slammed shut on my hand. My hand still remembers it quite vividly.
The old apple revels in its authority.
I'd rather be a bird than a fish.
I want to buy a onesie... but know it won't suit me.
A purple pig and a green donkey flew a kite in the middle of the night and ended up sunburnt. How?
Writing a list of random sentences is harder than I initially thought it would be, except that I'm not writing them... :3

title: Above All
description:
"I mean what's a party if they're no Idizians, am I right?"

The night of the Day of Doves changes everything for Amani Cloutier, a 27-year old top agent at a prestigious PR firm in Canada who has been tasked with the ultimate job of her career...
Changing the Idizians public opinion on the royal family, especially the prince twins of Idizia. Two polar opposite boys with no regard at how they should conduct themselves while living in the lap of luxury. 

In a blink of an eye, she is thrust into the native home in which her parents had once forgone due to unknown circumstances. Astonishing news of her true lineage and where she comes from and her ultimate duty to the country has completely altered the trajectory of where she thought her life would be at this point. Amani never thought she herself would be fighting to be... Empress?

As she continues working for the royal family and learns more of the history, dots begin to connect on her parent's secrecy concerning their home country and what that means for her own presence here in Idizia. 

Join Amani in a journey of learning her family's past and the strong connections her parents had with the former royal family that were tragically assassinated by a rogue group of deviants for reasons never disclosed. Will she find what she's looking for? Answers unseen in the public's eyes. Will she follow her heart and emotions while catching the eye of many love interests? 
In the end, will Amani reign above all?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Royal Regard
description:
When Bella Holsworthy returns to England after fifteen years roaming the globe with her husband, an elderly diplomat, she quickly finds herself in a place more perilous than any in her travels-the Court of King George IV. As the newly elevated Earl and Countess settle into an unfamiliar life in London, this shy, not-so-young lady faces wicked agendas, society's censure, and the realities of a woman soon to be alone in England.

Unaccustomed to the ways of the beau monde, she is disarmed and deceived by a dissolute duke and a noble French émigré with a silver tongue. Hindered by the meddling of her dying husband, not to mention the King himself, Bella must decide whether to choose one of her fascinating new suitors or the quiet country life she has searched the world to find.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Mariana Gabrielle is a pen name for Mari Christie, who is not romantic--at all. Therefore, her starry-eyed alter ego lives vicariously through characters who believe in their own happy-ever-afters. And believe they must, as Mariana loves her heroes and heroines, but truly dotes on her villains, and almost all of her characters' hearts have been bruised, broken, and scarred long before they reach the pages of her books.

She is a professional writer, editor, and designer with almost twenty-five years' experience, and a member of the Bluestocking Belles, the Writing Wenches, and the Rocky Mountain Fiction Writers. She is the author of multiple Regency romance novels, including The Sailing Home Series and La Déesse Noire: The Black Goddess, and will soon release a mainstream historical, Blind Tribute.

title: Azur Lane: Ripples through Seas and Times
description:
The two naval legends of the Pacific, one representing the Land of the Rising Sun, and another representing the Land of Freedom and Justice, found themselves transported into a world much like their own with its own twists, where the world is embroiled in a two-sided war; one against the mysterious but dangerous entities, the Sirens, and another one being their own kind, Humanity. 

Stuck in this world with no way back to their world for now, the men of the two battleships must set their differences aside to bridge the rifts in the Azur Lane Alliance. However, this world seems to be full of surprises, ready to catch the men and sailors off-guard at any time. And they will be in for a shock after strange going-ons on their respective ships. 

Our story will start out similar like the previous Fanfic and other Azur Lane Fanfiction. However, after the Defense of Pearl Harbour, the storyline will diverge greatly and will not follow neither the Game Lore or the Anime Lore. 


Join us in this journey as we watch brave sailors and Kansens fighting not just for maritime freedom, but also, what was impossible back in our world. 

Global Unity.

"War. War never change"

"Peace is just preparation for the next war."

title: The Crown Prince is Actually a Princess! SEASON 1
description:
I reached the limit of 200 parts for a book in Wattpad and was unable to publish in the same book so I made a new book! It's the continuation of the previous one, from Chapter 67 Part 3 onward.

SYNOPSIS:

Disguised as a man, the Crown Prince was actually a girl!
For 18 years she disguised herself as a man, and what a man: the Crown Prince of the Yan Kingdom. Now in order to kill her greatest enemy, the current Prince Regent, she ended up in his hands. Will she be able to keep her secret identity and succeed in killing him? Or will love bloom from hatred?

"His Royal Highness is Pregnant!" tells the story of Prince Murong Ci, the Crown Prince of the East Palace of the Great Yan State, who disguised herself as a man for eighteen years and protected herself as a "Straw Prince" and cultivated power in secret. Her opponent, Murong Yu, the auxiliary Prince Regent, who was given the Emperor's surname by the Emperor of Yan, had great martial skills and power, cruel and vicious, strategizing, and eyeing the Emperor's power. In order to regain the real power of the Murong clan, Murong Ci meticulously planned an assassination of the Regent, but she ended up beginning a strange relationship between them... a strange love. She grew from being the "Straw Prince" to being the Emperor, he grew from being a domineering Prince Regent to a Wife-loving Demon.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Edge of Misery: The Mitchel Brothers Series Book Two
description:
** Picks up where The Edge of Hell (Mitchell Brothers Series Book One) left off**

If there's one thing Declan Mitchell learned from watching his mama almost die from the heartbreak of losing his daddy to a war nineteen years ago, it was that a great and powerful love delivered an equally devastating heartbreak and suffering-the kind he had every intention of avoiding like the bubonic plague. And until traveling west to Idaho Territory and coming face to face with the mismatch-eyed, auburn-haired beauty, Wren McCrawdon, he believed he might succeed in carrying out his plans of never marrying. 
Molded by her traumatic journey west when she was twelve, twenty-four-year-old, accident-prone Wren McCrawdon's life on her family's ranch in Falcon Ridge, Idaho, is full of back-breaking work, beginning as dawn's first rays peek across the mountains and ending long after the sun sets when she can barely drag her weary bones up the stairs to her bedroom. But from the morning Declan Mitchell and his family arrive, her miserable existence becomes more bearable until tragedy strikes when all she sees are the harsh realities of loss and suffering.
Concerned for Wren's safety and remembering how bitter the edge of misery was after his daddy died-Declan discovers he's willing to do anything he can to take it away from her... even if it means a marriage of convenience is the only suitable solution. There are only two problems: first, it's already apparent he's following in his mama's footsteps toward eventual heartbreak, and second he somehow has to convince Wren to agree.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Born the 2nd oldest of 6 children, she grew up often escaping to her bedroom to read, draw, and write. Somehow, she managed to graduate high school and even continued her education by being granted a Theatre scholarship and earned her degree in pretending to be someone else. After graduating, she served a mission for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints in Toronto, Canada.
Upon returning to the U.S., she earned her Cosmetology License so she could run with scissors and not get yelled at. To really finish the deal, she became a certified Media Makeup Artist.
In 2006 she married her husband, who she met while they both worked in a magical far-off land the locals call 'The Home Depot.' Now on the search for the ever-elusive Sasquatch, they live in the Pacific Northwest, where her husband is from. When she's not writing stories or speaking fluently in movie quotes, she enjoys drawing, painting, and spending time with her handsome husband and their dog. You can like and follow her on:

title: When We Were Human
description:
Dahlia has lived in our universe as an immortal for centuries. She has a soft spot for this universe - all the good and all the bad - and has made the best of an admittedly bad situation. Her universe? It...went through some things, but who cares, when ours is so inviting? The thing about peace and tranquility is that it's always fleeting, and when her former best friend is murdered in cold blood, Dahlia will put her own life - and that of a very unwilling, broody sidekick - at risk to solve a murder that should never have been possible in the first place.

title: UnShaekable (FFXII)
description:

Carried on with promises of treasure worth enough gil to pay back her debts and repair her airship, she tags along for the ride in hopes of getting long-awaited revenge on Vayne Carudas Solidor, a man she appears to possess endless ties to. At the end of the day, all Balthier really wants is some answers.

authorBio:
I like Final Fantasy a lot.

Like, A LOT a lot.

title: Raja Ko Rani Se Pyar Ho Gaya
description:
"Raja Ko Rani Se Pyar Ho Gaya" is a chilling tale of love, obsession, and revenge. Set in a grand palace where beauty hides a dark secret, the story follows King Vikram, who, after losing his beloved Queen Aranya to a mysterious illness, finds solace in a new marriage with Maya. But their happiness is short-lived as strange and terrifying occurrences plague the palace halls. The spirit of Rani, once a loving queen, has returned from the dead, her jealousy turning into a haunting fury. As the palace descends into chaos, walls bleed, whispers echo through empty corridors, and shadows stalk the living. Trapped between love for his new wife and the terrifying grip of his past, Raja must confront the horrifying truth of Rani's obsession, or risk losing everything to her vengeful spirit. The atmosphere grows darker, as ancient secrets and long-buried corpses emerge, leading to a spine-chilling confrontation where not all will survive.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, I'm Devanshi,  I'm busy writing spooky tales, heartwarming romances, or intense thrillers. I love creating characters with complex emotions and twisting plots that keep you on the edge of your seat. Follow me for a rollercoaster of emotions, from laughter to tears to a chill down your spine!

Stay tuned for more stories and don't forget to leave a comment - I love hearing what you think!


Disclaimer:  don't expect me to be a professional writer just yet. But hey, I promise to keep things as entertaining as my caffeine-fueled nights ! If you find a plot hole, just pretend it's a mystery waiting to be solved - after all, we all love a good twist! 😜 Enjoy the story and let me know what you think (but no homework, please).

title: A Thousand Miles[Thorin Oakenshield Love Story]
description:
Alyndra is the only daughter of a dying race. Most of her family was whipped out by the vile creature; Azog the Defiler. When she was 5. her father discovered she was gifted with her mother's animal and he kept her safe from the rest of the world to protect her. Alyndra has never left the comforts of her home until the day a wizard discovered her and changed her life in more ways than one with a quest to reclaim an ancient homeland that was taken over by the very beast her kind feared.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: One Scottish Lass A Regency Time Travel Romance Novella
description:
Samhain. All Hallows' Eve. The most mystical night of the year. The time when the veil between the worlds became perilously thin. And with a full moon overhead, this awesome power reaches its climactic height. 
    
Sorcha had no time for mystical nonsense - there were enough challenges in navigating the mine-field of her mother's vicious temper and the most important event of her young life. For, at long last, she had left Edinburgh to see the world. She and her mother were visiting the elegant city of Bath. Sorcha was wearing the finest dress she'd seen - and she was stepping into a life she'd only dreamt of.
    
But when Johnny's eyes meet hers, and jealous rivals vow revenge, that delicate layer between what is and what once was rips. It shreds like the fragile thread of one's life.
    
One Scottish Lass is the first novella in the regency time travel romance trilogy. It is 116 pages / 18,000 words. The second novella in the series is A Time Apart. The first two novellas end in cliffhangers, while the third provides a happy ending. The series then will continue in another trilogy - those will be coming out over the coming weeks. These stories are teen-friendly with no explicit language, violence, or intimacy. All proceeds benefit battered women's shelters. 

Note that for those who prefer reading books in all-in-one form, each trio of novellas will also be compiled as a completed box set once all three are done. It just means you have to be patient and wait for me to finish writing all of them :). For those who prefer to read along as I write, and offer suggestions for me to shape the plot, these novellas are here for your enjoyment! 

Either way, I'd love to hear your feedback on the storyline and characters.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I love writing in a variety of genres. I currently have over 500 books published in all lengths from full 500+ page novels down to short stories. The "series" wording here on WattPad is a bit nebulous, so let me explain. I always write in series of books - and each book I have here is the complete book 1 in a series. So you get the entirety of that book which then connects to even more books in the series.

Some of my series are with unconnected characters, like the 16 full-length medieval novels with a sword being passed from heroine to heroine. Some use the same cast of characters, like the 31 mini-mysteries featuring a black detective in Salem, Massachusetts. Some feature wholly standalone stories for those characters, like my zoo mini-mysteries. Some feature connected storylines, like the time-traveling couple in the Destiny Interrupted series.

All of my books are written "clean" with no explicit intimacy, no harsh language, and no explicit violence. All are suitable for teens and up.

For a full listing of my books please visit:

http://www.lisashea.com/lisabase/writing/gettingyourbookpublished/lisalibrary.html

title: a world alone [hbo war / band of brothers]
description:
Madison returns home from the war, but the war is not yet over with her. She is broken, and she needs to heal. She needs her family and friends, but she pushes them away. With the help of a newly found acquaintance, she may just learn how to live again, and not blame herself for the losses she has encountered.

I also like manga/comics, vintage/history, HBO War, anime, K-dramas, and so much more. If it's a good story in any form, I will have my hands on it!

I follow back--I love supporting people.

title: The Nutcracker Prince and the Four Realms
description:
A collab story with @lil_Carolew21

A Nutcracker story mixed between the 1990 movie The Nutcracker Prince and the 2018 movie The Nutcracker and the Four Realms known as The Nutcracker Prince and the Four Realms

Young Clara needs a magical, one-of-a-kind key to unlock a box that contains a priceless gift. A golden thread leads her to the coveted key after she and her nutcracker doll join a Christmas battle between toy soldiers and the minions of a mouse king, they have to retrieve the keys to restore the other three realms from the control of the Mouse King, who wants all four realms for himself by stealing their most prized possessions.

title: Saving Percival (The Cousins Book 3)
description:
Sir Percival, a gentleman renowned for his aloofness and haughty demeanor, finds himself thrust into a relentless pursuit. The object of his unwavering quest is none other than Miss Christianna Cooper, a spirited young lady who had captured his heart five years ago. Though he had accepted her disappearance, he now wants to unravel the mystery and get answers.

Christianna never forgot the awkward young man who had shown an honesty unlike anyone she had ever met. After five years in the country with her elderly great-aunt, she is astonished to meet him once again. But the bitter man she meets is nothing like the one she had known.

Do they have another chance to find love together, or have the years changed them too much?

title: The Summer Soiree
description:
In the summer of 1814, Schönbrunn Palace becomes the setting for a grand masquerade, bringing together Europe's royalty in an evening of splendor and intrigue. Among the masked guests are the Prince of Austria and the Princess of Prussia , whose chance encounter beneath the moonlit terrace ignites an unexpected connection. Amidst the swirling dances and whispered secrets, their bond grows, defying the delicate balance of political alliances and courtly expectations. As the night unfolds, they must navigate the fine line between fleeting freedom and the unyielding weight of their royal dynasties.

History Buff
Geography God

title: The Assassin Princess (Book One)
description:
Long ago in the kingdom of Talahan, Queen Isabel, descendent of the great fae queen Azura, gave birth to two girls, Her second children, Atheena and Alexandria. The kingdom was in celebration for two months, until baby Atheena was abducted by a hooded figure. Now, Atheena knows herself as Ryia, the most skilled assassin in the assassin underworld. Then, Ryia is hired to protect princess Alexandria, a rebellious princess and her twin who only wants to explore and be free of the castle. But what happens when Ryia finds out about her past, and the people she thought she trusted were the people she should be most afraid of? And will Alexandria ever except her parents decision of putting her in an arranged marriage, or will she slowly fall in love with someone else? Will Alexandria ever be able to control her shadow powers that were passed down by her father? And will Ryia be able to save her sister from an evil assassin who is trying to kill her? Read to find out.

authorBio: Hey! We're Flame Fox (Vi) and Spirit Owl! (Aria). We like to write books, listen to music, and watch anime. We hope you enjoy our stories. Check out our solo accounts @VI-fallout (aka Flame Fox/Vi) and @AriaReeve (Spirit Owl/Aria)! Leave a like and follow!

title: From Darkness
description:
A story of love in times of darkness, of all kinds of love. 

This is the story of Ivy and her loved ones before the Second World War in Nazi Germany. They say history was written by the victors, but what about the history of the defeated? See the unseen side of history, through the Germans' eyes.
Ivy is a conflicted girl who, along with those around her, goes through one of the darkest periods of human history. To survive, they must make the ultimate sacrifices for love, family, friendship, acceptance, war, safety, and happiness.

This is the first book, the beginning. They came from darkness.

(c) 2014 All rights reserved - Mary B.C.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hopeless artist with a head full of dreams.
I'm a firm believer that those who do not know their history are doomed to repeat it. It's important to understand the past and to understand all people.
I have a thing for the Oxford comma, respect the comma.

"Wit beyond measure is a man's greatest treasure" - Rowena Ravenclaw

title: Dark Age Maiden
description:
Lady Carina is the favored daughter of the lord of the manor. She boldly refuses to marry the man he chose for her. Now, her father's fortress is under attack, and she escapes before dawn to reach the mysterious count he told her about. Before long, she finds herself caught up in the great Saracen attack on France as well as a very personal assault on her heart. 

As the great Islamic army advances from Spain deep into Europe, Carina  
experiences the power of love, though she doesn't truly believe in love. But time is running out for her and for her country. The much feared Saracen army may soon be standing at the gate. Can Europe survive the assault, and what of Carina? Is she prepared to surrender her heart?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A place of good cheer and honor. Where stories are told of knights, a prince, and women of royalty. But not all. And of more than one courageous woman who doesn't even know how beautiful she is until awakened by the one who would steal her heart. 

I'm so impressed with your wonderful support, all the stars, the comments and showing me you like my stuff. Thank you, thank you, thank you. 

Guess I'm just someone who has to write. But it's special when you tell me you like my stories. I'm Christian, so think I'll do one on Jesus soon and see how that goes. Also, planning another historical likely to be titled "Her Knight Time Story." As I'm dreaming it up this one will have a surprise but still end on a happy note. 

Glad for new authors who put their ideas out there for all to see. One of my favorites did only one short thing, but it was so good. Wish she would do more.

Now, Her Rebel Heart is being rewritten. It is the story of Jenny, who during the American Civil War loves a Confederate soldier. How can she get him to realize that she is no longer the young girl he knew in school? Then, unexpectedly, she meets a Union captain. When the fighting is over, who will capture her heart? If you like romance in a real historical setting you might check it out.   

Another romance with adventure is Mist on the Moon, the tale of a girl and a prince, and much more, taking place during the Middle Ages. There's a lot to it, but now it is finished.  

By the way, your votes help the stories to be seen by others. Love your comments. Some are awesome!  My personal best to you.

title: The Traitor's Daughter (Complete)
description:
Zena's father is accused of betraying his country, Zorbia. Their estates are confiscated and he is on the run. Zena, too, is forced into hiding to save herself from the soldiers who are hunting for her. She decides to embark on a journey to clear her father's name. She means to plead to the ruling Prince Lucas Maximilian, but instead walks into danger and intrigue. Will the kind and mysterious Luke help her? Can she save her heart from breaking when she knows the truth about him?

authorBio: Growing up on a diet of romances, I always wanted to write one. It is my hobby and my passion to weave stories of true love and desire. Follow me to read sagas of love, betrayal, and deceit. I promise to give you happy endings.

title: Timeless
description:
Riona Willow has known darkness and refuses to ever be helpless again. 

When this modern day warrior woman lands in 12th century Scotland, things are bound to go awry. But with her delinquent brother and oblivious twin sister in tow, Ri will have a tough enough time finding a way home, let alone keeping them alive long enough to make the journey.

Shaw Logan has faced great adversity and works to protect his people and their lands.

When a strange, otherworldly beauty saves his life, nearly dying in the process, Shaw is determined to discover what could make such a bonnie lass learn to fight with the grace of an angel and the deadly force of the most skilled warrior. Her younger siblings are driving him crazy with their bickering and antics, while she herself frustrates him in an entirely different way.

The longer they spend together, the more Ri allows him in, and the closer Shaw comes to learning about her past. But her siblings are restless and afraid, even if they won't admit it, and as Ri begins to fall for Shaw, she starts to wonder if she really wants to go home after all. 

Something lurks in the shadows, watching, waiting. A darkness threatens the happiness Ri and Shaw have found in each other and the life they might build together. Ri is getting closer to finding a way home, which will put her family out of danger, but if Ri and Shaw are to have a future in any century, they'll need to find this threat and eliminate it.
Domaine public
authorBio:
I have a WILD imagination. Things tend to go whizzing around my head and the only way to calm them down is to write them out. So, enjoy my mental ramblings.

"I believe in the imagination. What I can't see is infinitely more important than what I can see."

"I believe in love, lust, sex, and romance. I don't want everything to add up to the perfect equation. I want mess and chaos. I want someone to go crazy out of his mind for me. I want to feel passion and heat and madness. I want it all."

"There is no genius free of some tincture of madness."

"I'd rather regret the things I've done than regret the things I haven't done."

"All that is needed for the triumph of evil is for good men to do nothing."

"Philosophy is the highest music."

title: Battle for Love ♡Completed♡
description:
(2nd Book of Battle series)

For some couples, love isn't in their stars. Their hearts don't beat in sync, their eyes don't meet discreetly, the blush doesn't spread to her cheeks, the thoughts of his don't invade her mind often. 

What if life gives two such people a second chance at love but a it's forbidden one. Will they fight against all the odds for the one they love? Or will their love succumb to the worldly rules?
✧*✧*✧*✧*✧*
"Thank you, Queen!" He said bowing his head a little in respect
"You're welcome and I am not going to be the Queen anymore." She informed 

"Did my sister steal the crown from you? Or something like that? But I don't think that she'll do something like that." He asked

"She is like my sister and I gave her the crown with my own will. No one can force the great Piara Rosh." She said
Seeing his baffled face, she started laughing 

He stood frozen at his place, spellbound by her beauty as her laughter rung in background, playing with the strings of his heart, evoking unknown emotions.
✧*✧*✧*✧*✧*
Piara Rosh, a woman with the golden heart, was emotionally blackmailed into marrying her best friend who is the king Of Daksesh, Harshveer. They may be tied together with the holy thread but he's not her love.

King Lakshya Chatura, the defeated king of Chaturajy, lost everything in the war. Half of his family died during battle and remaining were burnt in the fires of Johar including his wife Drishti. His sister was forced to marry the enemy king and suffered a lot. A single war took everything away from him breaking his heart into millions of pieces, almost unable to love again.

So, what will happen when there seems to be a hope? What will happen when an unhappily married princess starts making his dead heart, beat again? Will the brewing storm in both hearts destroy everything again or bloom into heavenly solace? 

Attraction and Love is beyond control and what happens they would have to fight a BATTLE FOR LOVE.

title: A Touch Of Darkness
description:
The kingdom of Oscensi has a dark secret. Buried deep beneath their castle's chambers is a single prison cell. And within is a boy with destruction at his fingertips.

His only company lies with the black flames he conjures, along with the mysterious girl whose visits provide a rare spark of light in his lonely darkness. Until the day the castle falls, and he is gifted his first taste of freedom.

Yet this world does not welcome a boy with the talents of a monster. Fighting to both contain his malicious power and keep his life, he finds himself running, trapped by dangers from all sides.

After all, how can he trust anyone when he can barely trust himself?

-♛-

WARNING: Mentions of self harm and suicidal thoughts

[beautiful cover by @morsmortalis]

~ Completed ~
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Just your ordinary local wolf stuffed with a tangle of disconnected plotlines, a thousand characters, a million half-formed worlds and one little scrap of sense sobbing quietly amongst the chaos. In other words, you can call me Pup.

Despite my wolfish nature, I'm very friendly and would never do anything to hurt my readers. See, look at the nice fluffy rug I've laid out for you! Just don't go looking underneath it. There's been a, uh, red paint spillage.

Though I'm made up of 97% books, I'm supposed to be pursuing a career in computer science, so I dedicate a sliver of time to dabbling in code. I also create occasional art. I'm trying.

Anyway, you're here for stories, right? Good thing I have a few of those lying around. Here's your selection:

⋆ A Touch Of Darkness ~ high fantasy set in a medieval-esque world, featuring fiery magic and a whole lot of sword-fighting, ~175k. The sequel, A Deadly Bite, is completed at ~200k.

⋆ The Heart Of Asariel ~ a non-religious, fantastical take on angels, set mostly in a sci-fantasy city and featuring a sunshine idiot and the angst girl he's in love with. Completed ~65k.

⋆ Suspect Number Five ~ mystery in which a diverse group of people -- including an aspiring detective -- attend a dinner party and get tangled in a murder case. Completed ~40k.

⋆ Shadewylf ~ first of a high fantasy trilogy focused on magical wolves. Completed ~125k, being (very slowly) rewritten offline.

⋆ Pynk ~ set in the same world as Shadewylf, completed ~35k.

A few other things! Firstly, I'm a club admin for @DreamlandCommunity -- which I highly recommend you check out.
https://www.wattpad.comhttps://www.wattpad.com/user/DreamlandCommunity

If you read any of my books (I love you) and actually like them, then I have a little corner of a discord server where I blab about my worlds and their many characters.
https://discord.gg/jC3rRTq

I'm also on Tapas, I guess?
https://tapas.io/SpruceWolf

Credit for profile banner: @-DeeIsDead-

Go well!
- Pup

title: Echoes of Yesterday
description:
Yesha, a Filipino-British girl living in present-day London, stumbles upon an old, dusty journal while exploring her grandmother's attic. The journal tells the story of Danny Walker, a fighter pilot stationed at Pearl Harbor in the late 1930s, and his deep love for a Filipino nurse named Maria. Drawn in by the romance and history, Yesha becomes obsessed with the story, only to be mysteriously transported back in time to 1939 Pearl Harbor.

Yesha finds herself in the midst of a world on the brink of war. She meets Danny and Maria, quickly becoming friends with them both. As she spends more time with Danny, she begins to fall for him, captivated by his courage, kindness, and unwavering love for Maria. However, she doesn't recognize the growing ache in her heart until she witnesses the tender moments between Danny and Maria, realizing that she has fallen deeply in love with him.

Throughout the story, Yesha battles with her feelings, knowing that Danny's heart belongs to Maria. She tries to hide her emotions, supporting Danny and Maria's blossoming romance, even though it causes her pain. As tensions rise and war looms closer, Yesha grapples with the impossibility of her love and her place in this time.

In the end, after a series of emotional events, Danny begins to see Yesha in a different light, realizing too late that he has also fallen in love with her. However, the realities of war and the unchangeable past force Yesha to return to her own time.

The story is a poignant exploration of love, sacrifice, and the inevitability of fate, as Yesha and Danny's love story unfolds against the backdrop of one of history's most tumultuous times.

title: Targeted
description:
Arabella and Adrian have been married for five years and life couldn't get any better in their eyes. They have two beautiful children and are ruling the kingdom together. There hasn't been any rebel attacks since the day Ara was almost killed. They were happy. 
     But things start to go downhill when they get a threatening letter from an anonymous person, announcing that her father is dead, and that he is coming after Arabella. Soon after, they find out that her father really is dead, the mysterious threatener was telling the truth. 
     With their lives at risk, they have to make some hard decisions to keep their family safe, decisions that could drastically change their lives. Will they survive this new threat and live happily ever after? Or will they fall to the hands of their deadliest adversary yet? Read to find out.

title: Close Your Eyes
description:
Caspian is no longer a Telmarine prince, but king of the magical land. Clara has been at his side from the moment the Pevensies' left the land.

One year later, the Pevensies' return, though not a soul knows why.

Things are far darker than they know, and they must rid the magical land of great threats.

(I don't own Narnia. All credit goes to the creators. I only own Clara and her story)

title: Bound by Honor (Book 1 in the Legacy of Love Series)
description:
"Bound by Honor" launches the Legacy of Love series in the tumultuous year of 1453, as the Hundred Years' War draws to its bitter close.

Lady Isolde de Valcourt lives a life carefully measured by duty and honor, bound to her politically ambitious husband, Lord Edwin, in a marriage arranged for power rather than love. Her quiet acceptance of her fate is shattered when Sir Lucien Beaumont returns from the battlefields of Aquitaine, carrying both physical scars and the memory of a passion they once shared.

As England's grip on France crumbles and the winds of war howl through castle corridors, Isolde finds herself caught between her sworn obligations and the undeniable pull of a love she thought long buried. Sir Lucien, though injured in body, remains unshaken in his devotion to both his country and the woman he has never stopped loving.

Their forbidden romance blooms like a rose among thorns, each stolen moment weighted with the price of discovery. Against the backdrop of England's darkest hour, as territory and influence slip through noble fingers like sand, Isolde must make an impossible choice: remain faithful to her vows and title, or risk everything for a chance at true love.

Set in a world where alliances shift like battlefields and hearts wage wars of their own, "Bound by Honor" weaves a tale of passion, duty, and the courage required to defy the bonds of convention. As the first installment in the Legacy of Love series, it sets in motion an epic saga spanning centuries, where the eternal struggle between duty and desire shapes the destinies of generations to come.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Greetings,

I am Christina, a 27-year-old aspiring author. Writing has been a lifelong passion of mine, and I am currently in the process of publishing my debut book. Balancing my writing with my busy schedule, which includes school, work, and family commitments, can be challenging, but I am dedicated to keeping my readers updated on my progress.

I am thrilled to share my work with you all and appreciate your feedback and support. Your encouragement has been instrumental in my journey as an author, and I am grateful for your continued readership.

Thank you for your support, and I hope you enjoy my work.

Best regards,

Christina

title: Bhanumati's Curse
description:
In ancient times where princess seems to be pride of the whole empire what happens if the same princess became the cause for destruction of her own empire.....
.
.
A saga of Princess Bhanumati's curse where her silly condition made her empire crumbles under the weight of her own decisions.....
Blinded by her own ego who thought no one is more powerful than her own empire no on can beat his brother....what happen if she challenge the King of Rajadhrapura to win her over the war with Suryagarh.....
.
.
" What you can do for me? "
She questioned him with fearless eyes which darting on him

" I can burn the whole world just to make you my slave. "
.
.
Grab your seats and dive into the story of Princess Bhanumati.....what will be the outcome of her silly condition.....
.
.
Will she live the live she dream of or everything goes contrary to her own expectations.....
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello my lovely readers.........Welcome to my Wattpad page, where history and romance intertwine in a grand tapestry of royal intrigue! I'm excited to introduce my latest series, set against the majestic backdrop of the Rajadhra dynasty.

Step into a world of opulence and power, where the rulers of the Rajadhra dynasty navigate the treacherous realms of politics and love. Each story weaves together intricate plots of passionate romance between various couples, fierce battles for dominance, and deep-seated revenge that threatens to upend the balance of power.

Experience the drama and elegance of a bygone era as you follow the lives of legendary figures and their personal struggles. Discover the complexities of their relationships, the conflicts that define their reigns, and the historic events that shape their destinies.

Join me in exploring this epic saga filled with love, ambition, and the timeless allure of royal history. Dive into the saga of the Rajadhra dynasty and let the journey through romance, revenge, and regal splendor begin!

title: Needed By Him
description:
At a very young age, Qin Ruo had a long dream. A terrible one. She knew that the dream is certainly going to be true.

 A dream of someone's soul inhabiting her body.

Claiming her body. Claiming her family and claiming her fate.

But no matter how hard she tried to hate the other soul, she just can't. When that soul took over her body, not only her family is happy but even became more blessed.

At some point, she just thought to herself. Maybe her presence just arent not needed anymore. Maybe it's better if she disappears.

"Don't go. I need you".

title: Simple Servant
description:
Highest Rank: #2 Historical Fiction-
  Noah has been a Servant for as long a he could remember. His Mistress Cathliene Manchester just recently remarried to the Lord Louis Montego. This means that her and her twin sons are now members of Society. When the Montego family receives invitations for a Masked Ball celebrating the Alminian Princess's year of eligibility, an order from Noah's Mistress will change his life forever. Witness Noah's struggle as he experiences desire for a woman who is socially superior. After all what is Noah, but a Simple Servant?

[[Word count: ~ 101,000]]

authorBio:
I've been writing for a while now, but I still love hearing from readers. I highly enjoy other people's opinion, so if you see a grammar mistake or if you love what you read/ hate what you read don't be afraid to let me know. We're all here to put our work and ourselves on the line. Don't think you have to be nice to me, I'm a big girl I can handle all kinds of criticism.

I love reading.  I'm mainly a Fictional/ Romance junkie, but I'm pretty much open for anything.

I tend to be highly critical (mainly on continuity issues) when I read other's works. Not many authors seem to like that about me. I offer Tit-For-Tat on reviews, but unless you ask for me to specifically review your work, it is highly unlikely that I will comment on your story.

On a personal note, I use Google for my pictures. If it's yours, and it's copyrighted, or if you just don't want me to use a particular picture, don't be afraid to let me know.

In honor of all the readers, thank you for not picking up the remote.

title: Fateful Hindrance
description:
(The Triumvirate Histories Book Three)
What do you call the girl who gets on a jet with the supposed enemy rather than one that would have taken her normal, not so dangerous life in New York?  A traitor to the people who call her family, betraying them to the people they'd called the enemy for centuries.
Now, add a woman who had almost successfully killed you just a few months before, though had turned extremely nice and even protective, and her nephew who looks at you with an expression you want to just slap right off his face?  The two people who supposedly had a plan that would pretty much make you disappear off the face of the earth.  
And what happens when that plan completely breaks the heart of the man you love, even if it works perfectly?  You shatter your own in the process...which you think you deserve for doing it to him and everyone else who loves you.
Anyone who hears my story might think I'm a traitor, but I'm not...no matter how much I feel like I am.  I was going off with the Knights learn more about their side of the story.  Being with them, I knew it was going to change me, too.  They were the fighters, the protectors of the Brotherhood, even though they thought they were out to destroy them.  
And I was going to protect them now, too. 
According to the reports, the Order wasn't hiding out anymore.  They were on the move, infiltrating giant corporations and governments of wealthy, powerful countries.  We were going to try everything to stop them and their ambitions of molding and controlling the future in their favor.
And how could I forget the inside, the one who was telling all the Brotherhood's secrets, even if the Knights had already known them?  
But before I could do that, I had to disappear, make sure that no one came to look for me...and that involved breaking the hearts of my family, friends...and, most importantly, John.  
His heart had been broken so many times in his life...but now I was going to shatter it.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
- The name's Ansley.
- I'm 30 and blow out the candles on April 27th. 
- I've gotten the lovely privilege of writing short stories for USA Network's Dig (Iron and Ink) and WB's The Gallows (Slit), who partnered with Wattpad for promotion. 
- Potterhead forever.
- Snazzy is my favorite word.
- I absolutely adore Disney movies. Tangled is my favorite. 
- Tea/coffee and books are my favorite combination.
- I listen to scores when I write.  Otherwise, I get distracted. 
- I find it weird when people tell me they like my writing style.  I didn't know I had one.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/writeon27/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/writeon27

In case you were wondering...
- Life comes before writing for me, so sometimes I have to push back my uploads.
- All of my old stuff is crap and I know it.  Trust me, I get embarrassed when I read it and realize how truly awful it is.
- None of my books are professionally edited, just like pretty much all books on Wattpad.  You're going to find mistakes and plenty of them.  Stop pointing out every single one. 
- None of my story cover images are mine.  I get them from www.weheartit.com.  Don't try to report me for it because you're going to have to report pretty much everyone on this site.
- I don't take reading requests, so please don't ask.  I'm always extremely flattered when people think of me, but I'm just too picky with what I do read.
- Please don't ask to translate any of my books.  I will say no.

title: Tomorrow We'll See Morning
description:
Struggling to support his dementia-stricken mother and neglectful father, French-American Maurice Burdett is drafted into WWII and shipped out to a cold, isolated landmass called Attu island to take it back from the invading Imperial Japanese forces. After being left for dead in the heat of battle, Maurice forms a risky alliance with a person who could very well destroy them both: a conflicted enemy soldier, Isamu Maruyama. 

Laden down with stoic expectations and struggling to uphold his father's image, Isamu is deployed to Attu to invade the island as part of the war effort, ready to lay down his life- until, in a moment of panic, he deserts his comrades before their final stand. Stranded with no options left, he forms a tense alliance with Maurice in order to get back home.

title: The Queen of Aramdeau
description:
Daniela becomes engaged to the King of Aramdeau, but will it be enough to preserve the peace between their countries? King Charles is not an easy man to get to know, but when circumstances pull them apart, Charles' and Daniela's feelings begin to grow. Daniela has always taken her duty seriously, but now she will have to learn to take matters into her own hands to protect both their peoples. 

'The Queen of Aramdeau' is a medieval fiction romance with a taste of action, mystery, and court intrigue. The romance is clean/closed door, however there are a few descriptions of death/violence.

Completed May 6th 2024!

title: Eastern
description:
Jacek Dydynski, a swaggerer and adventurer for hire, loses all his movable property and poczet (lance fournie). To save his honor, he must carry out a dangerous mission in which the words engraved on the wedge of his saber will prove true: 

VINCERE MORI
(To win or to die)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Jacek Komuda. Polish professional historical writer. Author of more than twenty books and collections of short stories set in the 17th-century Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, the country of winged horsemen. That is, in the wild fields of Eastern Europe, where blood was cheaper than wine and a man was worth less than a horse. Whoever was not killed by a Tartar or a Cossack - his neighbor killed him.
Jacek Komuda has sold about half a million books (paperback editions) in Poland alone. The author is passionate about the culture of the inhabitants of the former Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth. On a daily basis, he lives and works in a wooden nobleman's manor house in the Eastern Carpathians, which he built faithful to the tradition that every Polish writer, like Henryk Sienkiewicz or Joseph Conrad, should write in his own manor house. The writer lives here together with his beloved horses, as he is also a reconstructionist of the old Polish cavalry - hussars and armored flags. Jacek Komuda's work was not yet known to English-speaking fans of literature - historical fiction. This is the first opportunity to get acquainted with it.

title: Devout Deception
description:
Abigail Havisham has a carefully hidden secret - she suffers from amnesia and can remember little of her life prior to an accident that wiped her memories three years back. A winter ball puts her between a rock and a hard place when she is introduced to Lord David Righton, a man who claims they were sweethearts cruely separated four years ago

Abigail has her suspicions - but she also has her curiosity. Could she really once have loved this man who was now a perfect stranger to her? She decides to investigate Lord Righton, hoping to find out what their connection truly was. The results turn out to be not only surprising but also life changing.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Reading is my passion, writing is my love, art is my soul, and Christ is my life.
Stay at home mom who writes in her spare time and hopes to publish one day!

I love history with a passion so most of my novels are Historical Fiction. But I also like to write fantasy and sometimes play around with modern day romance.

To me, there is no greater beauty than the written word and a picture is worth a thousand of them.

Let's make the world a better place, one story at a time.
My favorite writers are C.S. Lewis, Charles Dickens, Alexsander Solzhenistin, and Beatrix Potter :)

Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/_journey_of_a_writer_/

title: Behind The Walls ✔️
description:
Anastasia also known as Ana is the princess of a kingdom called Salona in Greece. She's very loved by her kingdom but not so much by her family. Her mother hates her and so does her father. 

Due to a new law Ana can be crowned instead of a male relative. Ana's an only child. Her father doesn't like this but can't change the law because the people decided it. Her father has said that he'll be king till the day he dies because he doesn't want to see Ana be crowned queen. Life isn't in her favor but will someone will bring light to her empty life? 

Sebastian a boy who grew up in the same kingdom as Ana but lived a very different life. When Sebastian was young his father died while at war. He never wanted his father to go so he snuck in on one of the trucks carrying food. While his father was on the battlefield fighting Anastasias father pushed Sebastian dad in front of him to get shot instead of himself. No one saw this besides Sebastian, and no one would ever find out. 

Once Sebastian grew up he decided that he would come for the royal family but not without consequences.

#36 Greece 
#47 Royalblood

#55 Familysecrets

title: Calanthe
description:
When she was only six summers old Calanthe was orphaned and taken as a slave to Lord Hereric in Britian. She was partially adopted by two workers that managed the Lord's farmstead. Life is pretty good for Calanthe as a slave, but she always wanted more. To have freedom and be respected by all.

One day changes her world forever.
A series of events lead to Calanthe in the company of brutal warriors that seemingly kill without a second thought. Vikings.

Will Calanthe ever get her freedom?

[RANKING] #25 in Historical Fiction  29/09/17
[RANKING] #17 in Historical Fiction 9/10/17
[RANKING] #12 in Historical Fiction  19/10/17

authorBio:
Hey there!

My name is Emma and here's a little bit about me ☺️

I'm 19 y/o and and at university. I'm a proud kiwi from good ol' New Zealand and I come from a small rural town on the Canterbury plains with 2 cats, 11 chickens, 1 younger sister and a father. My brother currently lives in England and my mother is in a better place.

I can't wait to travel the world and I want to visit every continent although perhaps Antartica, although close, is a little bit difficult.

I enjoy writing but it is just a hobby and I will admit I find it hard to find enough time for it. But my mind is full of ideas and writing acts as a way to calm me.

I read a quote once that said "Write what you want to read." And that is what I stick by. (I did a quick google search for the person that said this but unfortunately I couldn't find anything).

I'm glad you've read this far and hopefully my writings entertain you.

title: Mahogany Is The Color Of Devotion
description:
Lafayette Hugh was a romantic through and through. She spent most of her time with her head in a romance novel. Imagining her own future happiness. Over the years she had turned down plenty of offers for marriage, hoping to find her special someone. 

Nicholas Anderton was known for two things: being incredibly dense and speaking without thinking. But underneath all of his obliviousness was a man with a heart of gold. He yearned for real, genuine love and affection. He wanted a family of his own to care for and lavish affection on. 

When Lafayette decides Nicholas is the man she wants she realizes that getting his attention requires a lot more skill. What are Hugh's known for? 

Seduction. 

Will she be able to win him over or will her affections go unnoticed?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Taverns and Treachery
description:
No matter how her heart breaks, or the world burns around her, Marianne Wilson is a practical girl. She has a tavern to run, after all, and a family of traitors to protect.  But, as the situation in Cambridge becomes more dire, and it appears that war with the British is coming, it becomes increasingly difficult to stay neutral. The spell of revolution is seductive, even as handsome British soldier is quartered with them. When unexpected matters of heart begin to disrupt her carefully guarded facade, Marianne must discover who she can trust, and if she is ready to give in to dangerous, impractical love.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello! I'm an author-y Ravenclaw who adores reading and writing in my spare time. The rest of my (not-spare) time is occupied by being a full-time student, having just begun the very long process of becoming a doctor (fingers crossed for me!) And singing opera, of course!
My favorite tropes include: forbidden romance, found family, sibling rivalries, redemption arcs, and magic galore! Expect to see these things cropping up all over my stories.
I am a bilingual amateur poet, better chef in theory than in practice, and possess a semi-decent Scottish accent.

Current Novels:
The Queen of Monsters (epic fantasy): Ongoing!
Taverns and Treachery (historical romance: On hold for now!
Lady Winter (fantasy romance): Completed
You can also check out some miscellaneous writing on my profile, like poems, short stories, and some spooky stories that I churned out for Halloween.

Au revoir! Stay kind and creative!

title: Reckless Protector: Isaacson Trilogy Book Three
description:
*Book 3 in the Isaacson Trilogy, "Reckless Protector" picks up where book 1, "Reluctant Berserker" and book 2, "Fearless Warrior" left off.*

Ulric Isaacson, a berserker and US Marshal, has always believed that everyone, except him, would live a full and happy life. And up until both his twin and his younger brother claimed their mates, he thought he was perfectly fine with his lot. 
However, while on a daring rescue mission, Ulric meets Ingrid, a mysterious woman who sees the future, and claims her for his mate. But, instead of riding off into the Wyoming sunset with her, she runs away from him only to reappear in his life when he least expects it. With evil forces working against him, Ulric discovers he must challenge the gods if he hopes to spend his life with the woman who's healed his wounded heart and soul.

authorBio:
Born the 2nd oldest of 6 children, she grew up often escaping to her bedroom to read, draw, and write. Somehow, she managed to graduate high school and even continued her education by being granted a Theatre scholarship and earned her degree in pretending to be someone else. After graduating, she served a mission for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints in Toronto, Canada.
Upon returning to the U.S., she earned her Cosmetology License so she could run with scissors and not get yelled at. To really finish the deal, she became a certified Media Makeup Artist.
In 2006 she married her husband, who she met while they both worked in a magical far-off land the locals call 'The Home Depot.' Now on the search for the ever-elusive Sasquatch, they live in the Pacific Northwest, where her husband is from. When she's not writing stories or speaking fluently in movie quotes, she enjoys drawing, painting, and spending time with her handsome husband and their dog. You can like and follow her on:

title: Noli Me Tangere (The Social Cancer)
description:
From the renowned Filipino reformist and national hero Dr. Jose Rizal comes a classic piece of literature that served as the spark for the nation's revolution and the eye-opener regarding the disease that has been festering within the Philippine society during the Spanish era.

After seven years of studying in Europe, a wealthy young gentleman by the name of Juan Crisostomo Ibarra returns to the Philippines, filled with hope and inspired by dreams for the betterment of the country. Armed with sheer determination and a firm and positive outlook on things, he commits himself to continuing his father's philanthropical work, pioneering projects aiming at the development of the people's welfare by providing means to education and livelihood. While there are people who are avid supporters of the young man's cause, there exists in the shadows an entity as dark and malicious as the abyss it came from, shrouded deeply by lies and deceit and the hypocrisy that spawned it, hell-bent on destroying everything that stood in its path...

title: "Sir Guy's Atonement" (Book 3) by Gratiana Lovelace, 2015 (a Wattys2015 Nominee)
description:
If we could go back and change one thing in our lives--a careless thought, a hurtful remark, a devastating action--who would not wish to undo a wrong, or a mistake, or a regret?  And yet, the past cannot be undone, wrongs cannot always be righted, and regrets must be lived with.  And Sir Guy of Gisborne must somehow find a way to live with his pain and guilt of killing Lady Marian Knighton and harming others--if not for his own sake, then for his growing family’s sake.  Sir Guy’s loving family is his greatest blessing.  But Sir Guy's happiness will be challenged in a way that he never thought possible, when an old spectre from his past misdeeds returns to haunt him. And Sir Guy will finally have to atone for what he has done.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My life is blessed with a love that deepens each passing year that we are married--and my husband and I have been married for more than 30 years now.  We are each others' true hearts and loving soul mates.

And I have always been a romantic at heart, loving the great novels, plays, & poems by Austen, the Bronte's, Shakespeare, Wharton, and others--whether the stories were of star crossed lovers, lovers with obstacles in their path, or lovers needing to learn how to love again, etc..  At university, I studied literature and performed it--as well as, writing my own early musings in prose and verse.  But the everyday necessities of life took hold and my creative writing spirit lay dormant for a very long time.

However my return to my own creative writing in February 2010--after viewing the liltingly romantic BBC production of "North & South" (first broadcast in 2004)--became an unstoppable force that has infused my life with inestimable joy as I have written over 50 stories to date.  Of my stories, some are original fan fiction, but most are my completely original stories--with my writing of new stories continuing weekly.   I joke, that I can't turn off my storytelling brain--nor would I want to. 

My storytelling genre is romantic love--tender, passionate, sensuous, and always honoring the deep and abiding love that my lovers share.  My stories are tales of heartfelt love and of lovers who cherish each other.  After all, Love is the cherished dream of our hearts' desires (Gratiana L., 2012).

I began a blog called Something About Love; in 2011 where I have also shared my stories.  It is found at www.gratianads90.wordpress.com  And in August 2012, I began to share my stories with the wider audience of Wattpad, with you.  I hope that you enjoy my stories.

Cheers!  Gratiana Lovelace  (upd Dec. 31, 2019)

P.S.  My profile picture is Renoir's lovely "At the Concert" (1880).  For more, visit http://impressionism.kimbellart.org/exhibit/saints

Regency debutante Lottie Atwell must silence a blackmailing killer before her secrets are exposed and her family is ruined. She's killed before, but can she do it again?

One year ago, Lottie Atwell killed a man to defend her honor.  Now, a blackmailing killer claims to have proof of the incident and will reveal her secrets unless she agrees to his demands. Lottie must silence the killer by any means necessary, even if she must give up her love for Thomas, the gentle Scottish stablehand.

To protect the woman he loves from afar, Thomas Hawthorne hides his position as a Lord and poses as a stablehand.  He's been hiding from the world and avoiding his duties since returning from war a broken man, but when Lottie's life is threatened, he must make a choice.  Continue hiding or rise to his birthright and save the only woman who inspires him to live again.

How far would you go to protect the ones you love?

title: The Other Side of the Door
description:
"Mademoiselle, you mustn't be too angry with him, he has had a hard time coping, you know," the teapot spoke to me. 
"I have every right to be angry with him. He could go meet the devil himself, and I would still have every right to be angry. He has locked me in a castle with talking teapots and wardrobes that sing for fun. I have every right," I replied, collapsing on the bed. 
"I do not mean to contradict you, mademoiselle, but you have had simply your freedom and your father taken away. He has had his whole body taken away and his whole life practically ripped out of his hands. Sure, he may have temper issues and he may be slightly vain, but he is trying. Trying is all anyone asks of each other. Just, try to understand." And with that note, the teapot hopped out of the room.

* Beauty and the Beast Story *

title: Royale (Book #1 Royale Series) {Under Revision}
description:
It's not about telling the truth...it's knowing which lies to tell

Juliana Renée Clairborne has always known that she doesn't belong to the parents that she was raised by. She came to terms with that a long time ago. But sometimes, she can't help but wonder where she belongs or who she belongs to. What she doesn't know is, is that there are secrets and lies hidden inside the palace walls that she was raised in, and it won't be long before one by one, these secrets are revealed. The thing about secrets is, they're called "secrets" for a reason. Some were just meant to stay hidden.

Raised by the King and Queen of Albion, it is Juliana's duty to marry Prince Aspen of Isola and rule beside him as King and Queen of their kingdom. Juliana knew that trying to fall in love with Aspen wasn't going to be a fairy tale. What she didn't expect...was a battlefield. 

The walls of the palace always seemed like a safe haven for Juliana, but now she starts to question everything she has ever been told. As she gets ready to face marriage, secrets, lies, fate, and betrayal, she comes to realize that maybe her head isn't quite big enough for a crown.

authorBio:
Welcome to the collab account of Ithildae, Gadsul, Evara, and Aris! We are so excited you are here and can't wait to share the love of writing with you!

This account is run by four friends, namely, Ithildae @Ithildaeforever, Evara @BananaBam03, Gadsul @Gadsul, and Aris (who does not have a wattpad account). We love writing and created this joined account so we can share our many collaboration stories with the wattpad community.

Hey guys, Ithildae here. I love writing, and I'm sure I do it way too much, but there is just something about bringing characters to life and getting to know them that intrigues me and draws me in. However, I am currently focusing on other things in my life as well, like becoming a nurse! Or living my life for Christ! "Therefore, if anyone is in Christ, he is a new creature; the old things passed away; behold, new things have come." 2 Corinthians 5:17

This is Evara now speaking (or typing)!!
WRITING IS LYFE.
There is just something about writing that I love! Just creating characters and living them out is honestly such an amazing experience!
<ps I'm pretty sure that I just make the characters up, and then they start taking over, using me as their keyboard O.O >
I am proudly a Christian, living my life to Christ's glory! <John 3:16> <Ephesians 2:8-9>

This is Aris now. Writing is a fun hobby to do with friends, and I have enjoyed every moment. I am also a devout Christian, and always put him first in my life.

Gad-Sul here. One of the reasons I joined this crew of collaborators was in  hopes that I might overcome my fault of coming up with (in my opinion) great ideas, and neglecting to lay it out on paper (or screen). Another reason is of course to write with my friends and have fun. It is my sincere hope that you, the reader, will enjoy our stories. I am a Christian, desiring to be a loyal and faithful servant of Christ, and I like super-heroes and Tolkien.

title: Eclipsed By LOVE
description:
"Zahra al-Zahiri and Azhaar al-Sadr-two souls from rival kingdoms, destined to be enemies yet bound by an invisible thread neither can explain. Separated by centuries-old caste divides, they have never met, but something has always been missing, something hidden deep within them. Zahra, caged within the palace of Suez, feels a longing she can't name, while Azhaar, the arrogant prince of Cairo, senses an emptiness despite his victories. They are like shadows of each other, unknowingly seeking what lies on the other side. As their worlds collide, they will uncover not only the secrets hidden within themselves but also the undeniable pull that has drawn them together all these years. 
In a story where hatred meets desire, they will learn that sometimes, the greatest rival is the one who holds the missing piece of your soul."

title: The Selected
description:
[COMPLETED] The royal palace was holding a competition choosing the most beautiful girls in the whole kingdom to compete. Their prize? Simple, they get to become the kingdom's next queen. 

Liana of Aris was happily living in her small town, she got free bread from their local baker, praising from her townspeople, and a family that loved her.

When the palace men came knocking on her door, she counted the benefits of joining the competition and went with it. It wasn't until she got to the palace that she discovered staying in the competition was harder than she thought. When she thought things couldn't get any worse, something horrible started happening in the palace. Only Liana noticed what was happening around her. 

Will anyone listen? 

Will she be able to save anyone?

Will she be safe?

***It may sound a lot like "The Selection" by Kiera Cass but trust me it's a lot different. If you liked "The Selection" or just the royalty genre, then I think you might like this.***

title: FENG YU JIU TIAN [VOLUME TWO]
description:
Feng Ming was only 19 when he lost his life saving a child from death without hesitation. The grateful father of the rescued child grants Feng Ming a second chance at life. Unknown to Feng Ming, his soul is whisked away to a far away ancient land (resembling the dynasties of China).Upon waking up, he finds himself inhabiting the frail body of Thunder Kingdom's crowned prince who is also graced with the title of the most beautiful man across all the lands. However, his beauty has a price as he attracts the unwanted attention of the minister of affairs, Rong Tian who finds every reason to torment the prince mentally and physically. As Feng Ming starts to get a hold of the conspiracies surrounding him, what will happen when the prince's true identity is revealed? And what happened to the 'real' prince?
