title: Champion Revised: A Songs of War Novel
description:
Ardonia fights its bloodiest war in history. The Voltaris strike against the other clans for the first time in 900 years. The Nether seeks vengeance against the Overworld with a gigantic siege. In the midst of it all is Thalleous Sendaris: Champion of the Ardoni, lieutenant in the Sendaria Militia, and one of the first combatants of the Great War.
As powers older than any record join the battle, Thalleous wages war not just against enemies bearing mighty armies, but the doubts he has about rivalries older than memory and the seductive power of the Prime Songs that this war is fought for.
This is a rewritten version of Champion: A Songs of War Fanfiction, the hit story that shook the Wattpad Songs of War community. Read now to re-experience the magic of the original story, or to fight the Great War for the first time!

title: Winter Fire [ Book 1 ] ✔
description:
On the second jump, Claire's bad leg gave way and she felt herself tumbling forward. A cry of surprise escaped her and Claire was certain she was about to topple off the side of the train. 

Alek, however, moved quickly, catching her mid-fall and keeping her upright, and alive. Claire lifted her eyes to meet his which were wide with alarm. The expression was fleeting, lasting for only a moment before it was replaced by a frown. "You could have fallen," he said pointedly.

"I know," Claire breathed, finding her thoughts drifting to the strong arm wrapped around her waist. A flush rose to her cheeks and she was grateful for the biting wind that masked her reaction. "Thank you."

"You need to be more careful," he continued, his eyes locked on hers, bright and haunting in the silver glow of the moon overhead.

"I will," Claire assured him, her heart skipping in her chest. "I promise."

------

title: DOGS. Legacy Saga II
description:
**English version of the WATTYS 2019 WINNER story**
1672, Caribbean Sea.
He lost everything for her. She risked everything for him.
But maybe love is not enough to bridge over so many deep differences between them, and the only way for them is goodbye.
However, the sorrows the sea brings, only the sea washes away.
And what the sea brings together, no human will can tear asunder.

Second installment of the Legacy Saga, a love story full of adventures at sea, set in the thick of the war between Spain and French pirates.
And a different look at the challenge of being  a woman in a world ruled by men.

Castillano is charged with treason and on his way to the gallows, and Marina is determined to save him. She and Dolores take on a perilous journey to Spanish territory, two women alone with their cunning as their only weapon, to get to him before he's executed. But Marina's reunion with Castillano exposes that sometimes feelings are not enough to bridge over all the odds, and thei legacy of their past still holds a heavy yoke on them.
They still have hard battles ahead, both real and with themselves, if they want to be truly free.

In the midst of political turmoil, deep secrets, and a growing empire on the brink of collapse, their marriage teeters on the edge of destruction. Will love be enough to heal the wounds between them, or will the truth, buried beneath layers of lies, tear them apart forever?

title: The Royal Thief
description:
Enter a dangerous, magical realm on the brink of rebellion, where the loyalty of the Guardians means power... or death. What happens when one Guardian turns her back on the Heir? Can Solangia survive? Or will it be pulled apart by scheming nobles and desperate rebels?

Among traitors, thieves, assassins and mages, Morane must choose whether she will live up to her title as the Royal Thief or join the revolution-- and quickly, for she is not the only one making plans. Time is running out until the rebels strike, until the Heir rises, until her loyalty is tested.

Who will survive, and who will fall?

In this breathtaking adventure of high fantasy every path is fraught with danger, and no one is as they seem.

title: Langley: A Regency Romance
description:
"The Langley family's heritage is engraved into Regency London's essence, where secrets and desires mingle amid sumptuous soirées and exquisite promenades. Josephine Langley, the vibrant firstborn who defies social standards, is an intriguing presence in high society.

Josephine meets the mysterious Reginald Harrington, Duke of Ashburn, at a lavish ball where candlelight dances and silk rustles. Their friendship, forged over laughter and secret moments, surpasses Regency's elite.

Their relationship grows into a passionate, covert romance as they overcome social expectations. Josephine and Reginald's love tale takes place in Regency nobility, when passions are hidden under finery.

Like two souls fated to clash, their hearts must choose between convention's suffocation and love's intoxication. Can they reject society and find a future where their hearts belong?"

title: Tales of the Vangen: The Dead King of Danic (Book 3)
description:
A year has passed since the fall of Middengard. With the conspiracy against the Empress crushed under the Vangen's heel, an unlikely peace has fallen over the Empire. But the Empress does not sit idle. Now is the time for the licking of wounds and the settling of old scores, starting with the Vangen itself.

For twenty five years Regis served the Empire faithfully, only to abandon his post and flee back to Danic, his frozen homeland in the north. Captain Libro has kept the Empress's vengeance at bay for as long as possible, but even her wrath cannot be stifled forever. With orders to bring him back to meet the Empresses judgment, the Vangen ride for Danic and capture the one man to desert the guard and live to tell the tale.

But all is not as it was in the frozen north. A new King has risen, spreading darkness over the land and cutting off all contact with the outside world. Regis soon discovers the old life he'd left behind holds little recognition in the present, and yet the ghosts of the past still haunt him to this very day.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
J.J.Fritz aka FritztheGrim is a journeyman wordsmith and author of the up and coming Dark Fantasy series "Tales of the Vangen." When not writing, he can be found skulking through used book stores and sampling coffee flavored concoctions to find the magicks necessary in completing his many tomes of wonder.

J.J. Fritz lives in The Eternal Plains of Midderland with his second in command and their lovable war band of persnickety feline companions. When not in his lair scrying the Nether for wayward clues and answers, he works at his day job...for now anyways.

If you want to know more about J.J.Fritz follow him on Wattpad and Twitter for news and updates on completed chapters and short story releases.

title: "Quick Time Travel: Binding the Childbirth System, She's So Pregnant"
description:
Introduction:

[Quick travel + childbirth system + beautiful female protagonist]
Jiang Zhili suffered from a terminal illness and died unwillingly. After her death, she received a system of having many children and many blessings.

As long as she helps the overlords of various worlds give birth to children, she can gain eternal life.

Jiang Zhili has been fighting the disease for more than ten years. Now that she has the chance to live forever, she is naturally ecstatic.

Isn't it just to help the overlord give birth to an heir? no problem

In order to quickly complete the task of giving birth, she used all the props in the system mall

Not beautiful enough, there are beauty pills! If you don't have enough physical strength, you can use the Body Tempering Pill! 

Even the extremely strange artifact elixir is available in the mall.

Jiang Zhili just wants to complete the mission and gain eternal life, but why are the overlords of these worlds treating her more and more strangely?

Hey, hey, hey, she just wants to have a baby and run away, don't let these men get involved...

title: The Huntress ✓
description:
(EDITORS PICK) In the bloody, ruthless, and decidedly uncouth world of 17th century pirates, can a woman deceive even those closest to her and survive?
 
Bronte is forced to make some tough decisions about her life and livelihood at far too tender an age in a time and place when options for women are few. Port Royal, Jamaica, in the 17th century is only a good place to be if you're a pirate. And so, a pirate she is. A pirate's life is precarious enough without the added burden of hiding one's sex. But, if she is to survive, hide it she must.

Lucien's father wishes him to take over the family merchant business but Lucien feels God has a different path; he longs to use his medical knowledge to help the less fortunate in the Caribbean. Just as he is about to embark on his God-given task, a certain pirate spoils his plans. Is he wrong about the path God has for him? Lucien is forced to work for his father and delay his plans until he can hunt down the pirate who thwarted him. He is sure he's a match for anything the pirates dish out but soon realizes he's gotten more than he bargained for and it just may cost him his life...


⭐️ Featured in Editors Pick 9/2020

title: ᴛʏʀᴀɴᴛ's ᴏʙsᴇssɪᴏɴ
description:
[Discontinued]

After dying in prison because an experiment, I went back 2 years before my death. 

My faith in the Imperial Family, my affection for my own family, all of it could go to hell!

To do that, I went to the second prince of this Empire, Azazel von Elysian to seek for a cooperation.

"I will help you become the Emperor. In return, make me your Empress by becoming the Emperor. I want everyone at my feet."

With this agreement, we were bound by a bond where we would crush the Empire and create a new. 

I will make him the Perfect Tyrant. 

-

"Verena, tell me what you desire. I'll give it to you with all my heart."

He whispered softly in my ear while holding me from behind, as if to lock me in his embrace forever. 

"Why are you asking me this when we already reached our goals?"

He tighten his embrace, burying his head onto my shoulder. 

"... I'm sorry, I just wanted to know whether you will leave me or not."

"Is that so?"

However, it appears that as time passes, he has developed a strong attachment to me, bordering on obsession.

"I'm addicted to seeing more of the feeling that arose when you smiled at me and just me."

He wouldn't let me escape from his golden cage that he created for me. 

"I'm the only one who can save you, Verena."

-

"Please don't leave me. I will do all you ask of me... just, please don't abandon me... if you do, I'll kill myself."

My eyes went wide as shiver ran down my spine as I unconsciously stepped back because of his threat.

That Tyrant Emperor that I created is kneeling on the floor and wailing in front of me, the one who has used him for years. 

As if he were a child who would be abandoned by his parents.

Is it possible for me to get to the desired conclusion in this way?

"If you're going to hell, Verena, please bring me along with you."

***

| Side Note |

- Cover : Canva
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Lost Princess
description:
I glare at him, yanking at the bonds. He laughs softly. "Oh princess, you're so delicate. Do not struggle, we wouldn't want you to break, would we?" He whispers. I snarl at him but he's right, I'm sick and weak at the moment and the cold rain isn't helping matters. I turn away, coughing and choking on blood, but swallow it quickly, not wanting anyone to know my state. He smirks slightly.
      
      "Why are you so cruel?" I ask curious at his behavior. In the Castle I was kept away from the outside world by my parents, who told me of the dangers that lurk in it. However the servants and the cooks, who lived outside the protective wall of the Castle, always seemed like good people. 
      
      "Cruel," he scuffs. "I am not cruel. Your kind is. Sitting in your castle, while families starve, homes burned to the ground because the blasted taxes are too high to pay. Cruelty, my dear Princess, is a word you and your family are all too familiar with." His words felt like a slap in the face. He can not be speaking truth. The kingdom loves my parents and they would never allow their people to starve.

title: Behind the Royal Mask
description:
In a kingdom torn between reform and greed, Beatrice, a fearless rebel leader, infiltrates the royal palace disguised as the betrothed of a powerful noble. Caught between two men-the idealistic Crown Prince Alaric, and his dangerous cousin with dark ambitions-Bea must navigate a web of lies, betrayal, and growing feelings. As she uncovers secrets that could shatter the realm, she faces a choice between loyalty to her people and a future with the prince. In a world of masks and shadows, can she spark a revolution before it's too late? 


Blurb {

The kiss was fierce, possessive, his mouth claiming hers in a way that was wholly different from the fabricated memory she'd described. Her hands freed, she found herself pulling him closer, their breaths mingling. His hand slid down her back, pulling her against him.

When they finally broke apart, they were both breathing heavily, their faces close as they took in each other's flushed expressions. Alaric looked into her eyes, an amused smile tugging at the corner of his mouth. "So," he murmured, his voice a low rumble, "was Caelon as good as me?"

}

Blurb 2 {

"Your Highness," Cedric whispered, disbelief threading his tone, "With all due respect, do you really think it's wise to look at her like that with those lovey-dovey eyes, knowing she just insulted you?"

}

title: SECRETS UNDER The SILVER SCREEN
description:
In the heart of 1950s Hollywood-a world defined by glamour, secrecy, and societal expectations-an unlikely bond forms between two women on opposite sides of the spotlight. Lana Chastain is the epitome of a movie star: stunning, enigmatic, and endlessly desired by millions. But behind the dazzling façade lies a woman trapped in a toxic marriage, haunted by loneliness, and searching for something real. Ruby Jamison, a young, aspiring screenwriter from South Dakota, arrives in Hollywood with wide eyes and big dreams. Hired as Lana's assistant, she finds herself drawn to the actress for reasons beyond admiration; there's a connection she can't ignore.

As their friendship deepens, Ruby becomes Lana's confidante, a role that pulls her closer to a world she's only dreamed of-and to feelings she's never dared to explore. But in a time and place where their romance is forbidden, both women must navigate the thrill and terror of a hidden love. Through late-night script rehearsals, stolen glances on set, and whispered secrets in private trailers, they discover that some connections are too powerful to resist.

title: Deliciously Deadly: a Red Riding Hood retelling
description:
When stupid little Lottie threw a stick to throw off a monster (spoiler: it didn't work), she did not expect that it would lead her down the path of an unordinary life with a very unordinary husband.

✽ ✽ ✽

All Lottie had ever wanted was to live an ordinary life out of the shadows of the mistakes she had made as a seven-year-old.

After a stranger shows up in the village offering to marry her, she gets exactly what she wished for: a normal, peaceful life with an ordinary husband. They might not have love or kids between them, but life goes on, right?

Until a series of unfortunate disasters strike (as they do) and puts her on the doorstep of hell.

That's when she finds out her very ordinary husband... isn't so ordinary at all.

✽ ✽ ✽

A loose retelling of Little Red Riding Hood. Set in the same universe as my other series: The Mad Brides.

Written for the ONC 2023

All Across Canada people stare in shock of tall buildings, Weird vehicles and People in the U.S.-Canadian Border. How will the Modern United States Of America React being transferred back to the Second World War?

title: Third Person - Complete
description:
PFC James Roberts just wanted to serve his country, like his father and grandfather. He left his middle class life to join the military with the hope of making his family proud. Graduating top of his class in Basic Training, attending Advanced Individual Training for  Ammunition Specialist (55B) at Redstone Arsenal, Alabama, Roberts graduated with top marks and was sent to Germany to what he believed would be a premier posting.

Roberta Lewis graduated with Roberts, in the top ten of her class, hoping to make a new life for herself. The military has offered travel, experience, training, and after she leaves the military, college. A life changing offer, and something Lewis desperately wants.

But what would have, could have, been a bright and promising career ended with a beat up pickup truck arriving. Fate has landed Roberts and Lewis as  Privates in a place called 2/19th Special Weapons Group on a mountain called Alfenwehr.

Welcome to Hell, Roberts and Lewis.

Enjoy your stay.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A last little bit of me, mostly rusted and damaged metal.

I'm a father of four and have two grand-children. Married for more than 20 years to the same woman who puts up with all of my crap and laughs while I do stupid things. I live in the Rogue Valley, Oregon, someplace I had dreamed of returning to for the 20 years I was gone.

A Cold War veteran of the US Army, I was released after my third medical board refused to return me to full duty. From there I worked in a factory, was a bartender, worked in a cannery, did construction, worked at two big store chains. I've worked for a carnival, slinging cable for a nation-wide cable company, and other jobs. I'm currently nothing more than a lazy old man who watches TV with his grandchildren and kids.

Three years of college before I just walked off one day, leaving my car and my books and everything else in the parking lot of the college. (My friends got it and took it and me home to my wife)

My absolute favorite movie is Freejack. Favorite song is Wasted Years by Iron Maiden. Favorite TV show is: Grey's Anatomy. Favorite book is Redliners  by David Drake.



*****NOTICE****

If you ask me to critique ANY military story, have your stuff straight. Don't try to excuse it with 'it's just fan-fiction' or 'it's not real' or 'I'm making it up, it doesn't matter', because it does to me. One look at my page should tell you that it matters to me.

If you ask me to read anything, I *WILL* critique it.

title: Once Upon a Kingdom

Far away in the land of arabia, in a kingdom by the desert, is a Princess, who goes by Qadira. She was born with talent and skill, the hands of a physician and the mind of a skilled herbalist. Simply put, she is a healer. Then there is Prince Qaswar of the Sabaean Kingdom: a mystery and playful madman, yet a mercy to their kingdom. They call him Amir-al-suyuf, prince of swords. Despite their differences, both are equally willing to do anything it takes to keep peace in their kingdom.

The Qatabanian Kingdom and Sabaean kingdom have been at each other's throat for centuries past and when royal Sabaean blood is spilled by the people of Qataban in battle, they seek royal blood in return. title: Assassin to the Prince of Death
description:
Trackers. With their duel colored eyes, that tattoo on their faces, and their unusual gifts, its not a surprise why normal people are scared of them.

Lady Scarlett, or better known as Dark Tracker Scarlett, is all too familiar with others being afraid of her. Her freedom was taken from her because of her special powers that came on that horrible night. However, her fate of forever being feared and caged changes as Death comes and gives her a kiss, sending her to Death's Academy.

She didn't die, she was just recruited into the all male school to train with the most deadliest of trackers. Trackers that are to work for the hidden Prince of Death himself; if they can make it. 

As soon as Scarlett steps into the academy, trouble is already stirring. From the group of boys that she meets as soon as she opens her eyes to the mysterious Tracker Isaac, her fate is just starting to be spun.

New and old Kingdoms are going to war, taking more and more trackers to destroy each other. Death is ready for this war. However, something unknown is stopping him. 

He continues to stay hidden from the world, nobody knowing his face; yet toying with everyone all the same.

Follow Scarlett as she journeys through the twisted game called fate: meeting friends, foes, and old enemies that all want one thing... Death's little assassin; then Death's ending itself.

Sergeant Stillwater is a highly trained Special Weapons soldier, trained by the US Army to fight and win on the nuclear battlefield. Stationed on a mountaintop in the Fulda Gap during the Cold War, the barracks is buried beneath meters of snow every winter and the Rear Detachment cut off from all help. Every prior year has resulted in dozens of deaths and wounded via enemy action or madness induced violence.

This year he's woken up, badly injured, on the floor of a barracks room, with no clue how he got there, who he had for backup, or why he's been left for dead by persons unknown. He's not completely there, his brain malfunctioning and even the lizard unable to get all his systems running.

But someone has let the winter into the barracks, and Sergeant Stillwater, badly wounded and barely more than a dangerous animal himself, has to survive in Arctic conditions and see, not only who he has to defeat to survive, but who else might need his help.

authorBio:
A last little bit of me, mostly rusted and damaged metal.

I'm a father of four and have two grand-children. Married for more than 20 years to the same woman who puts up with all of my crap and laughs while I do stupid things. I live in the Rogue Valley, Oregon, someplace I had dreamed of returning to for the 20 years I was gone.

A Cold War veteran of the US Army, I was released after my third medical board refused to return me to full duty. From there I worked in a factory, was a bartender, worked in a cannery, did construction, worked at two big store chains. I've worked for a carnival, slinging cable for a nation-wide cable company, and other jobs. I'm currently nothing more than a lazy old man who watches TV with his grandchildren and kids.

Three years of college before I just walked off one day, leaving my car and my books and everything else in the parking lot of the college. (My friends got it and took it and me home to my wife)

My absolute favorite movie is Freejack. Favorite song is Wasted Years by Iron Maiden. Favorite TV show is: Grey's Anatomy. Favorite book is Redliners  by David Drake.



*****NOTICE****

If you ask me to critique ANY military story, have your stuff straight. Don't try to excuse it with 'it's just fan-fiction' or 'it's not real' or 'I'm making it up, it doesn't matter', because it does to me. One look at my page should tell you that it matters to me.

If you ask me to read anything, I *WILL* critique it.

title: The Picture of Dorian Gray by Oscar Wilde
description:
Oscar Wilde's only novel is the dreamlike story of a young man who sells his soul for eternal youth and beauty.

In this celebrated work Wilde forged a devastating portrait of the effects of evil and debauchery on a young aesthete in late-19th-century England. Combining elements of the Gothic horror novel and decadent French fiction, the book centers on a striking premise: As Dorian Gray sinks into a life of crime and gross sensuality, his body retains perfect youth and vigor while his recently painted portrait grows day by day into a hideous record of evil, which he must keep hidden from the world. For over a century, this mesmerizing tale of horror and suspense has enjoyed wide popularity. It ranks as one of Wilde's most important creations and among the classic achievements of its kind.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: El Filibusterismo (The Reign of Greed)
description:
From the renowned Filipino reformist and national hero Dr. Jose Rizal comes a classic piece of literature portraying the grim reality of the backward state of the Philippines during the Spanish era.

After the events of the first novel "Noli Me Tangere", El Filibusterismo follows the story of Simoun, a mysterious jeweller from America on a business venture in the Philippines. Widely known by the name "Black Cardinal", he earned his infamous reputation as a trader for his dark but unusually persuasive countenance, crooked morals, and unorthodox methods in doing business. To the regular folk, he is just another entrepreneur with a twisted sense of morality, but unknown to everybody, he is much more than just a mere opportunist he seemed to be. For beneath his dark glasses and silvery white hair, there lies beyond them a much deeper and darker persona...waiting for the right time to strike!

title: Sands of Redemption
description:
Georgia has always held a fascination for the Middle East. With little money and nothing to keep her home, she seizes the chance to teach English in Abassa. 

The country is everything she imagined, authentic and so different from anywhere Georgia has been before. Sure, it has its issues-but it's safe. The violence in the east is far away, and as for the local terrorist group-it's harmless.

Until it's not.

After a vicious attack throws the country into chaos, Georgia is taken hostage. The mystery surrounding her kidnap gradually unravels and she discovers help in an unlikely place. 

Soon Georgia finds herself fleeing across the desert, her fate in the hands of a man who both despises and cares for her. 

Can she trust him to get her home alive?

title: The Rose of Rome
description:
"Livi, you must choose: fleeting riches or a life of lasting purpose?"

Livia Aurelia, the daughter of Senator Tiberius, grows up amidst the splendor of Rome's wealthiest elite. Despite the opulence surrounding her, she feels lost and disconnected from the society her mother cherishes. Urged by her mother to secure her place among the rich and beautiful, Livia reluctantly steps into the dazzling world of Roman high society. Her natural charm and grace soon earn her a sterling reputation and draw her closer to a handsome young nobleman.

Yet, as Livia delves deeper into this glittering life, she is confronted with profound questions that shake her to her core. Faced with a choice between the fleeting allure of wealth and a life of deeper meaning, she must navigate her path with courage and conviction. Will she choose the ephemeral beauty of riches or embrace a life of purpose and fulfillment?

Join Livia on her journey of self-discovery in a world where the lines between duty and desire blur, and one woman's search for truth can change everything.

title: the ballad of eternal glory
description:
In the capital of Luoyang, the daughters of Grand Chancellor Shangguan An each await their own glorious destinies. And by their side is their cousin, Fei Minxi, who observes the machinations of the nobles of the Dan Dynasty and the different fates of the three Shangguan daughters.

-

IT IS A plot that brings Fei Minxi to the imperial capital of Luoyang, into the arms of her proud and magnificent cousins. The Shangguan sisters are the staple of Luoyang's high society, the daughters of the dynasty's Grand Chancellor. No one shines as brightly as they. And by standing with them, Minxi is thrust into a world she is not prepared for, that she was never taught to be a part of.

The sisters are all fascinating in their own rights. The eldest is Shangguan Yunhua, promised to be the future Empress since birth. The second, Shangguan Yunjun, a girl not of the courts but of the battlefield, the youngest female general of the dynasty. And the youngest, Shangguan Yunxuan, the picture of the perfect lady, the envy of all despite being the daughter of a concubine.

And so Minxi watches. As she watches the battle of the heirs, watches Yunhua become the wife of the heir and then their Empress. Watches the Shangguan family claws their way to the top, as it all splinters apart. 

This is a story of glory, and how one family attempts to leave their name in the long river of history.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: North And South √ (Project K.)
description:
***All Credits To Elizabeth Gaskell***


When her father leaves the Church in a crisis of conscience, Margaret Hale is uprooted from her comfortable home in Hampshire to move with her family to the north of England. Initially repulsed by the ugliness of her new surroundings in the industrial town of Milton, Margaret becomes aware of the poverty and suffering of the local mill workers and develops a passionate sense of social justice. This is intensified by her tempestuous relationship with the mill-owner and self-made man, John Thornton, as their fierce opposition over his treatment of his employees masks a deeper attraction.

In North and South, Elizabeth Gaskell skillfully fuses individual feeling with social concern, and in Margaret Hale creates one of the most original heroines of Victorian literature.

title: His love ( time traveller)
description:
The battlefield was a cacophony of chaos-clashing swords, roaring cannons, and the cries of men. Smoke filled the air, and the earth trembled with the weight of war. Yet amidst the storm of violence, there was one figure who moved with grace and serenity. The hero stood tall, his eyes steady and breath slow, as though the destruction around him was but a distant echo.

His comrades fought furiously, desperate to survive, but he remained still, watching with a calm that seemed almost unnatural. Arrows flew past him, and the clash of steel rang in his ears, yet nothing broke his focus. His presence seemed to radiate a strange energy, one that deflected fear and chaos. He did not fight to conquer; he fought with the essence of peace within him, a serenity that protected him more than any shield.

A soldier, bloodied and shaken, ran to him, bewildered by his unshakable composure.

"How are you so calm? In the middle of this?" the soldier asked, his voice a mixture of fear and awe.

The hero glanced at the man, a faint smile playing at the corner of his lips. His voice was soft but carried through the noise.

"War is born from chaos, from fear and anger," he said, "but peace is my true strength. When you fight with a calm heart, no storm can touch you. It's not the battle I conquer-it's myself."

The soldier stood stunned for a moment, before nodding slowly, finding in the hero's words a fleeting sense of clarity amidst the madness.

Twenty two year old Princess Nandini Singh is in a fix. She is summoned by her father to her childhood home to discuss a matter most urgent. And that involves a head strong, arrogant and cold heart prince. 

"Royals never fall in love, we only have political alliances"

Yuvraj Abhimanyu Raj Singh is aghast when his father discloses the arrangement he made with his best friend - the Maharaj of Jaypore. Forced to honour his father's wishes he makes sure that the bratty princess learns a lesson or two about the fate awaiting her, especially when he learns a truth involving the princess that shakes him to the core. 

Will they be able to survive each other and fall in love? Will they find what they had lost in the past? Join the prince and princess in a journey to find the answers

title: The Duchess' Enchantment
description:
Annalise   is everything a young eligible single noblewoman should be. Incomparably Beautiful, nicely titled and generously wealthy. However, being the sole heiress to the rich and bountiful Duchy of Goslar is proven difficult after her parent's death and the absence of a male heir, especially as the wealth is exploited by her selfish and vain Uncle and his family. In an attempt to salvage and regain the wealth that is so rapidly depleting, her uncle decides to throw every eligible, rich and titled gentleman her way, no matter how despicable and snobbish - but Annalise knows that it is only the half-truth. He wants to get her out of the way, so he can govern her Duchy the way he has always wanted, and bleed it dry. 

She does not know how or even if she can accomplish what she set out for, nor does she know why she trusts the handsome and mysterious stranger who offers her an olive branch -- and a solution to every problem she is currently facing; a sanctuary from her snobbish, vain and selfish family, the welfare of her people. 

Cassius  is at his peak in everything;  a thriving military career, a caring, supportive family and his talents praised in every corner of the world, what more could he want? But he is constantly reminded that, as a prince, it is his duty to marry well and produce heirs to benefit the empire. 

Cassius knows that every woman is only out for his title, wealth and unfortunately do not know anything beyond, court gossip, fashion and how to snag the most eligible lord - everything that he despises. After many years of searching and disappointments, Cassius becomes resigned to a life full of work, duties and responsibilities and refuses to make any space for anything else. 

But fate is colliding because when he sights the stunning, witty, fiercely protective beauty, he is possessed by a longing he cannot control. To claim her, he offers her an undeniable deal; the trouble is, will she accept? And will she ever truly belong to him?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I frequently  escape to novels and stories to avoid boring life! I do love stories set in a different world and of course love some romance here and there.  I'm a chocolate lover- who doesn't love chocolate? It's my kryptonite, but also my life. 

My spare time is usually spent learning about history and historical figures, or bickering with my siblings (who doesn't, I have a lot of them), or for some reason doing something productive like studying or learning economics or sciences, don't really know why but hey, I'm a Capricorn, and I have a tendency to overwork and a love of routine.


When I'm not busy running all over the place, I like to write down my thoughts and I meditate often, which is where I get most of my ideas for writing stories. Hopefully you enjoy my works!
Love from Aus!

title: Runaway Fiancés | ONC 2023 (Complete)
description:
Always willing to put herself last, Catalina Juárez has never rocked the boat. But that all changes when her father insists she marry a man she cannot stand to be near. 

Hopping into a carriage for hire, she spends the last of her money on a ride to nowhere. Because this mysterious carriage has one rule: you go where it takes you. 

Well, that was a waste of money, because she isn't even to the edge of town before she's unceremoniously dumped off at a train station. With no money to buy a ticket and no time to think of another plan, Catalina pushes through the crowd and onto the train. 

Marcos Caballero has never met a problem he didn't want to solve. Traveling alone on a ticket meant for him and a woman who didn't want to be with him, he's taken in by the scared, doe-eyed look of the woman in the dining carriage. 

She's ticketless and alone; he's lonely and has an excess ticket. 

Stepping in to save her, he claims her as his wife, not really expecting her to play along past the point of danger. But she quickly steps into the role with ease, acting as if they've known each other their whole lives. Somehow, it seems like they might have. 

But being on the run from troublesome and powerful fathers isn't without its struggles, and Catalina and Marcos are going to have to decide how much they are willing to risk to put love ahead of duty. 

~ * ~ * ~ 
This is one of the five novellas I'll be writing for this year's ONC! You can find the rest (Hang it Up, Christmas at the Cabin, Love Lies & Red Eyes, and I Don't Want to be Queen) on my profile! 

For this story, I selected prompt 9. "There's an urban legend that's been circulating for years about a taxicab that doesn't take you where you want to go, but where you need to go. One night, you stepped into this cab." Except make it pre-car-era.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Blood of Quartz
description:
Erik Torston is a simple hog farmer, the head of the family after his father and half brother answered a summons to war five years ago. When a new summons comes, he and his friends answer the call, leaving River Bend and the only home they've ever known.

Erik is reluctantly forced into the world of soldiers and politics, questioning who he is as he navigates a secret family connection, a scheming Duke, and his attraction to the beautiful Lady Abigail. 

Circumstance takes him to the Capital, where royal secrets and a war threatens not only everything Erik has ever known, but his life as well.

---

Lady Abigail wants nothing more than to go home to raise her uncle's infant daughter Mouse in the warmth of her family home while he grieves the loss of his wife in childbirth. She plans to head home when the army mustering for the King heads for the coast. That army includes Erik Torston, the handsome and somewhat mysterious new recruit.

When the Duke arrives to inspect the troops, it starts a series of events that changes the plan for everyone at Berrigan Keep, thrusting Abigail and Mouse into the viper's nest of the royal court, where whispered scandals are currency, and nothing is what it seems... 

Including Erik Torston.

---

Blood of Quartz is an alternate universe fantasy adventure story with hints of magic, secret royalty, and a slow burn love story. It is about finding your way when life turns out differently than you expect, family, and the ties that bind us all.

Cover by Ren Tachibana @rentachi - https://www.rentachibanaworks.com/

title: The Other Elizabeth
description:
Upon her brother's death, Elizabeth de Scales learns that she shall become an heiress, at the tender age of seven. Although born into a pro-Lancastrian family, when Elizabeth is sent off to live with Lady Isabel, the sister of the Duke of York, she soon must choose where her loyalties lie.

Caught between her Lancastrian blood, and her Yorkist heart, Elizabeth finds herself swiftly growing up amid the Wars of the Roses- and deciding on the sacrifices she must make. 

By an unexpected twist of fate, she soon finds herself entangled with the enigmatic Wydeville family, and is raised to a status beyond her wildest imagination. However, the closer to the crown, the heavier the price Elizabeth and those dearest to her must pay... 

This is the first book in the 'Forgotten Roses' series of untold stories of women hidden from history, and at the heart of the Cousins' War.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
-Avid amateur genealogist
-Constant coffee drinker
-Most likely to be found watching Netflix, in bed, or reading anything history related.

Writing has been a passion of mine since I was old enough to hold a pen. I
first joined Wattpad when I was 13 and I am now studying History at university. I am fascinated primarily by the Medieval period, from 1066, to the Plantagenets, to the Wars of the Roses, and the Tudors, and have a particular interest in women's power, and uncovering stories of 'hidden' and unknown women.  

I am currently posting a revised version of 'The Other Elizabeth'; a story I started writing when I was 14.

Please feel free to drop me a message at any point! - Sophie

Find me on Twitter - SophieSeymour15
And Instagram- sophie_seymour15

title: The Heart of a Viscount: Book 1 Victorian Romance Series: SAMPLE CHAPTERS
description:
*Now published on Amazon and free with Kindle Unlimited 
Sample chapters only

What's a girl to do when she's left orphaned and alone after her father's unfortunate and unexpected demise? 

Miss Verity Weston imagined she'd be whisked off to the country and settle into a quiet life with her only living female relative, Aunt Margaret, the Countess of Blakley. However, her father had other ideas. 

Fearing his sister, Margaret, would set a bad example for Verity-the countess was quite eccentric and well in her dotage-her father did the unthinkable and left her the ward of Viscount Stanbury-a mere stranger.


Viscount Stanbury was in too deep. A confirmed bachelor and heir to a dukedom, Julian lived his life at leisure until the unthinkable happened. However, as a gentleman, he was only as good as his word. Verity Weston had turned his life upside down, and he wanted to wring the chit's neck or kiss her senseless-depending on the moment. 

With Verity's exquisite beauty and dowry, settling her with an honorable husband should have been easy, yet nothing was simple when it came to Verity.

A love/hate relationship, burning chemistry, and a crazy, overbearing countess collide in this thrilling and humorous Victorian Novella.

title: Ladies, Lords, & Liars
description:
✔️Completed✔️


Though his mother wanted everything in life- always more, more, more- Aeric would have been perfectly content to live out a normal life. They never wanted for much, except for the ever-present hunger for money from his mother, and he could have stayed that way forever. But since before he was even born, his mother has tried time and time again to climb just one notch higher on the social ladder, and to grasp the riches that came with a higher title. It created problems and rifts, but the worst part was the planning and conniving to gain that status; the concocting of schemes that only someone who has gone a little bit crazy would ever dream of. Aeric was always the easily roped-in participant, hardly able to say no. 

This time, her scheming will not only break the law, but it take him farther than ever, into a whole new life. And to make matters worse, this new life is in a palace.

title: Fallen Kingdom
description:

Set in 1387, a place called Caelum. Full of 3 different kingdoms, rulers, people, all fighting for the same thing. A place of safety, without war. A place to settle down, a place to call home. 

Caelum is divided into 3 sections. Each section ruled by a different royal family. Each section works together to create peace.

When alivia and carter are forced to marry all hell breaks loose. I mean Between Oliver's crush and Alivia and Carter's hatred for the marriage and each other, what could possibly go wrong?

title: The Brightlings
description:
Felix Swift is a teenager with a big problem; He just can't stay awake. And falling asleep at the wrong moment has already caused him more trouble in the past year than most people will ever experience.

Relocating to the countryside with his family brings with it a whole new set of problems. Missing persons, freak storms, crop circles, all-night raves, the local gang, not to mention the challenge of baby-sitting his annoying little brother. His time in the 'arse-end of nowhere' is proving to be every bit as wild as his years growing up in South London. 

But as Felix soon discovers, village life also holds the keys and the clues to the adventure of a lifetime, and an opportunity to nurture the seeds of friendships that will last forever.

*****************************************************************************

Dear Readers,

If you are enjoying The Brightlings, please don't forget to vote for each chapter, and feel free to comment (provided you don't post spoilers). Receiving the tiny little stars and additional interaction really spurs me on, and certainly helps to point more people towards my story. 

I'd love to hear from you, if you like what you are reading, but I'm afraid that I can't promise an instant reply as I'm pretty flat out these days.

Finally, it really shouldn't need to be written here, but just a quick note with regards to intellectual copyright and my use of this platform to write/publish The Brightlings; 

All rights reserved. This work is all of my own creation, and I retain the right to publish it elsewhere, or to remove it from this platform at any time in the future should I choose to do so. 

---- I will not accept any excuses from those that copy or intend to pass this work off as their own, or republish it elsewhere without my permission. ----

Ok.... so now that is out of the way, there's nothing left to say, except "buckle up, hold on tight, and enjoy the ride!"

Cheers,
Ric

After losing all he had lived for at the hands of a merciless Occupation, Riyad joins the Resistance fighters to persist against the Armed Forces and liberate his country. title: Alternate Dream
description:
Nina longs for a carefree life of excitement and exploration.  She had no idea that dream would lead her to a strange alternate reality with no idea how to return home. 

Her initial encounter with The Capitol's inhabitants leaves her terrified and searching for a way home, wondering if a life of excitement was truly what she wanted or if she bit off more than she could chew.  

Her search for a way home becomes even more pressing when she learns the nation's Pairing Ceremony is coming up in less than a month.  An event for all single men and women in which they must pair with their life partner.  Nina is horrified to learn this ceremony is NOT optional. 

Will she find a way back in time or find herself stuck in an alternate reality forever? Whether she likes it or not.

This is Book 1 of a two book series.

title: A Royal Union: Princess Lallaina and Princess Ingrid Alexandra"
description:
In the midst of royal expectations and cultural traditions, Princess Lallaina Chiara Francesca Isabella Lucia Elizabeth Alexandra Mary Charlotte Diana Frances Alice Margaret Rose Mountbatten-Windsor, Duchess of Sussex, Windsor, and Wales, and Her Royal Highness Princess Ingrid Alexandra Schleswig-Holstein-Sonderburg-Glücksburg of Norway find their paths intertwined in a tale of love, duty, and self-discovery.

As the daughters of powerful monarchies, Lallaina and Ingrid navigate the complexities of their royal duties while grappling with their own desires for freedom and identity. Despite their privileged lives, both young women yearn for genuine connection and understanding. When fate brings them together at a diplomatic event aimed at strengthening ties between their two nations, an unexpected bond begins to blossom.

Set against the backdrop of opulent royal ceremonies and intricate court intrigues, their friendship deepens into a profound love that challenges societal norms and expectations. With family pressures mounting and the eyes of the world upon them, Lallaina and Ingrid must confront their fears and insecurities while navigating the delicate balance between personal happiness and royal responsibilities.

As they embark on a journey of self-discovery, the two princesses learn the importance of loyalty, courage, and love in a world that often seeks to confine them. Together, they will challenge the status quo, redefine the meaning of royalty, and forge a future where love knows no boundaries.

"A Royal Union" is a heartfelt exploration of love and identity, set against the enchanting backdrop of royal life. Will Lallaina and Ingrid be able to overcome the obstacles in their path and embrace a love that transcends tradition, or will their royal duties tear them apart? Join them as they navigate the complexities of their hearts and discover the true meaning of a royal union.

title: A Daughter's Love - Book 2 The Frencolian Chronicles (complete)
description:
The Chatelain children are growing up in the Manor House, far from Kings Castle in Frencberg where their father resides most of the time. Their mother, Elissa Chatelain, the baroness of Chanoine, is almost overcome and overdone with this awesome task of raising five children and being their main teacher in basic education of reading, writing and arithmetic. The youngest child, Jobyna spends most of her time with the servants and playing, but the time comes when she has to step up in a way that most adults would shrink from, or she knows she might lose her father forever...

authorBio:
A lover of human souls, I believe without doubt that, "With God all things are possible." Mark 20:27
One of my favorite themes for writing stories are those based on, "From rags to riches" - on being thankful for everything that comes our way, good or bad and making the most of it... remembering always that, "A happy heart is good medicine and a cheerful mind brings healing, but a broken spirit makes you sick." Proverbs 17:22
I haven't had, or been able to make time to write and that's mostly what I'm here for. I can't take reading requests as I have so many unfinished works of my own to get done. God bless you.

title: JAMES AND I
description:
Lady Julia Fairfield finds herself entangled in a web of duty and love. Her father, the Duke of Fairfield, arranges her marriage to Prince James, the newly ascended heir to the British throne following his father King Edward's passing. The union promises financial security for their family.
However, Julia's heart belongs to Viscount Henry, a charming and handsome suitor beneath her social standing.
Prince James, initially overwhelmed by his unexpected ascension, is reluctant to marry. Yet, upon meeting Julia, he's drawn to her intelligence and spirit. Secrets from his past threaten to undermine their budding relationship.
As Julia and James begin their marriage, drama unfolds. Julia's secret meetings with Viscount Henry intensify, forcing her to confront the consequences of her actions. Unbeknownst to her, she starts falling deeply in love with James, complicating her tangled emotions.

authorBio:
Hello and welcome to my profile! I have been on Wattpad a long time now and started off very much as a silent reader. title: Anabasis of the Northern Sea
description:
In 1943, the Japanese Empire found itself squeezed between the military powers of the United States and the Soviet Union, feeling the pressure of their encroachment.

Across the Pacific Ocean in the United States, a massive naval expansion plan was being implemented based on the Two-Ocean Navy Act. Once all planned ships were completed, the total tonnage would reach approximately 1,3 million tons. Meanwhile, the Soviet Union was dispatching a colossal ship from Europe to East Asia - the Sovetsky Soyuz. It was the first super battleship commissioned by the Soviet Union.

Three years had passed since the end of the Second World War in Europe in July 1940. The conflict, which seemed to have subsided, was now once again poised to ignite, this time in the Far East.

RELEASE: 2024 (UP TO DATE)

title: Scandal Of The Heart
description:
Scandalous Devotion...
Lady Eliza Thornton, the youngest of four siblings, is the last of her family expected to uphold the Thornton name by marrying into nobility. But when she finds herself irresistibly drawn to Thomas Grayson, the newly hired footman, her world is turned upside down. His quiet strength and unassuming charm stir desires in her she can no longer deny. As they share secret glances and fleeting touches, their forbidden connection grows, threatening to ignite a scandal that could ruin them both and shock all of society.

A Secret Destiny...
Thomas Grayson has always known his place-until he meets Lady Eliza. Her beauty, intelligence, and fiery spirit captivate him, but as a servant, he knows he has no right to her love. Still, their bond deepens, and soon their clandestine romance becomes the talk of the ton. Just as the Thornton family grudgingly gives their blessing for the match, a shocking truth is revealed: Thomas is the rightful heir to a dukedom. Now, with his newfound status, the tables are turned, and what was once a scandalous affair is transformed into a celebrated love story. But as they prepare for their future, new challenges arise, and Eliza and Thomas must face them together, or risk losing everything.

title: Arthur
description:
Elizabeth of York married Henry Tudor after the bloody War of the Roses ended. Their first son, Arthur, represented everything England needed: union, peace and prosperity. The Houses of York and Lancaster finally together in one. However, Elizabeth had a horrible feeling as she held him for the first time: that her precious boy would never be King of England.

Join Elizabeth and Arthur in this story about the first Tudor years. Experience ingredients of life at Henry VII's court: power, revenge, secrets, sorcery and, unexpectedly, true love.


**This is the sequel of THE YORK ROSE, but the story does stand for itself**

title: Kidnapped Love
description:
Akila moves her life across the country in hopes of rebuilding a fractured relationship with her mother. But as the days unfold like delicate petals,  a sinister shadow begins to darken the once pristine canvas. Whispers drift through the streets, telling tales of mysterious kidnappings that haunted the nation. In the midst of her search for solace, she found an unexpected companion-Derek. But with fates wicked sense of irony, it was with this friend that she would soon find herself entangled in a web of danger. A devilishly handsome young man appeared on the scene, his gaze fixated solely upon her. In his charming presence, she believed she had found her first true love. However, whispered doubts clouded her mind with each encounter. The pieces of a disturbing puzzle began to align, and she can't ignore the unsettling truth that this enigmatic figure might be the very culprit behind the abductions that plague the nation. But the crimes ran deeper than a mere string of kidnappings. Secrets that echoed in the corridors of time, intricately woven into the tapestry of her lineage, threatened to unravel her fragile existence. An ancient relic, passed down through generations, now rested heavy upon her shoulders. Holding a power so strong, that if fallen into the wrong hands it would unleash an unfathomable darkness upon the world. With each passing day, she realized the perilous path fate had set before her. In this city she had hoped would be her sanctuary, she would face not only the danger of a burgeoning love turned sour but a battle to protect the very essence of her being.
*Kidnapped Love is completed but currently being revised and edited. Parts will be posted as they become available. 12/12/23*
*When your done with this book be sure to check out the sequel on my page Kidnapped Love: The Beginning of the End*

title: The Last Son of Egypt
description:
"With the blood of Cleopatra and the soul of Rome, I will show the world, the greatness of my home. I will recreate a new Alexandria; I will create a new era, a dynasty that is mine, and I will show Rome that I am its greatest foe and ally." 

Years After the death of his mother, Prince Ptolemy returns to Mauretania to become its new King. After years in Rome, he seeks to continue the wise and popular rule of his parents but is also eager to claim glory from the oppressive and extravagant regime of Rome. The city is plagued by whimsical emperors who at every turn threaten Ptolemy's ascent. As the young king struggles to revive the legacies of his ancestors and establish a new one for his only daughter, he overcomes his fears to become a ruler worthy of the name, Ptolemy.

title: Inscribed In The Stars
description:
SEQUEL TO WRITTEN IN THE STARS

Dalia Al-Ruwaisi, eldest Princess to the Kingdom of Rughad, has aspirations to lead her people. But her father, the King, has greater plans. In order to avoid conflict, she has no choice but to marry the King of Balqaas, their long-time rivals. Dalia must leave everything behind; her dreams, aspirations and loved ones.

It may be the closest chance she has at becoming Queen, but Dalia must also face the prejudice against her as the Queen Consort, whilst also bearing the secret her father entrusted to her.

The newly crowned King of Balqaas, Harun Abdul Rabbani, detests the thought of having to open up his heart to another woman. But he can no longer avoid it when the duty arises to save his people. And just when he thinks he has settled onto the throne, a familiar threat arises once more in Balqaas threatening the safety of his new wife, his family and his Crown.

Will the two royals be able to unite under one banner to dissolve the threat that endangers them both, despite their generation-long hatred?

DISCLAIMER: This story does have Muslim characters but in no way is meant to depict how Muslims really are or how they should be.

description:

Forced to live with her uncle. Merchant Lord Grimston is well known and respected in the kingdom.

She won't let her uncle's soldiers get their filthy paws on her father's armor and old squire sword.
Her father taught her the skill of a sword through vigorous training. Training meant for hardened soldiers.
She was told that her father died on the battlefield by everyone in her village and the kingdom.

title: The Judge's Daughter
description:
Austin Tanner is ready to settle down and marry, but as the bounty hunter works his last case, he receives an unexpected surprise when a woman who is bent on revenge takes him prisoner. Strange, how this little slip of a woman would make him forget that he'd order a mail-order bride and would be married soon.

Eleanor Lawson wants her father's murder solved, and she'll do anything she has to... even forcing the bounty hunter who had worked the case to find the killer. She hadn't planned on being attracted to Austin, and she especially didn't except to have so much fun while working with him to track down the criminal.

title: She's A Natural
description:
*SAMPLE ONLY! FIRST 5 CHAPTERS AVAILABLE!*
*This is the third and final book of my supernatural series. It is NOT complete on here, but you CAN find the full version of it on Dreame AND MoboReader!*

Mia knew she wasn't normal. 

She just wanted to be left alone. On her seventh birthday, she was cursed with gold eyes and the power to control all four elements. She was a freak, and she didn't know what she did to be punished like this.

On her eighteenth birthday, after her foster home slammed the door in her face, a mysterious man shoved a train ticket into her hand and told her to get on the midnight train. Confused but not having anywhere else to go, she followed his instructions.

She didn't know that she would end up at a protection school for supernatural creatures. She didn't know she was needed to fulfill a stupid prophecy some witch lady chanted a thousand years ago. And she definitely didn't know she would meet her mate, whatever that was. All she did know was that he was hardheaded, possessive, and a dragon.

title: Old Hollywood
description:
A lot of people imagined so many things about Rosalind LeRoy. She must have been a wild heiress or another bombshell blonde with nothing to fill her head. Some supposed she must have had so many torrid affairs with actors and toured Europe with the next Howard Hawks on her arm. 

What a lot of people didn't know was that she was on a leash just like any other studio employee. LeRoy Pictures owned her and her image, and her Daddy made perfectly clear that she was to front the best, effectively spotless reputation. 

Still, she knew how to have fun, and she was just coming into an age where she was ready to give Charles LeRoy the biggest run for his money.

title: Zatz x Reader (Demigod)
description:
Maya and the Three is a fantasy cartoon limited series created by Jorge Gutierrez. (Who also created the book of life.) The series is inspired by a rich, vibrant mixture of Aztec, Maya, and Inca mythology, and modern-day Caribbean culture. 

(Before you decide to read this story make sure you've watched the series first, trust me it'll make a lot more sense if you already seen what's going on..)

(Also y/n uses they them pronouns in this story! I did this so anybody of any gender can read the story without using feminine or masculine pronouns for the reader.) 

Y/n is a Half human and Half god/goddess who was brought into the underworld along with their twin sister Maya. Their mother, Lady Micte, (Goddess of Death) brings them into her husbands palace, Lord Mictlan (God of War). Mictlan despises the half inbred gods, close enough to take their lives as infants, but his wife convinces him that he has the advantage of gaining ultimate power if he sacrificed one of them as they became older. They had an agreement to sacrifice Maya, but with Y/n they have different plans for them..The two gods send them up to the mortal world and wait 15 years for these two twins to grow.

title: the sable spy
description:
Cassalyn Diao is used to making enemies of all kinds, but none have ever come close to truly hurting her. So when she stumbles upon a plot that could set her nation back by years, she runs to her old allies at the Arecian Secret Service for aid. 

Marcus Dalton has been looking for Cass since their last disastrous last encounter years ago, but he didn't expect their next meeting to begin with her passing out bleeding on his front doorsteps. But he'll take the chance to reconcile with her and try to put their past behind them. 

It won't be easy, though, with their cunning enemy seeking ways to silence Cass and her own refusal to let anyone in again. The two will have to work together against the ticking clock to survive this game of cat-and-mouse and come out with both their hearts and heads intact.

title: The Lady's Sickly Husband
description:
Transmigration? A Chong Xi Marriage? Sickly husband? How worse can this get?

Mo Qian Xue now lives in a soddy, destitute, small house with broken furnitures. The grass had grown wild and unruly from lack of proper care. The rice pot in the kitchen, it's left empty. Well, this mess seemed quite manageable, however, why is it they only have one quilt in the house?

Not only does she serve her husband food and refreshments during the day, does she need to make sure he's well "fed" at night too?

"It's getting late now... we should go to bed. Said the sickly husband. She simply closed the door, turned off the lights, and went straight to sleep.

"If you dare move, I'll kick you out of the bed!" She threatened.

In the end, the man still managed to wrap himself around her no matter how she resisted. The sickly husband wasn't as weak as he appeared to be!

Mo Qian Xue worked hard to become rich. She built workshops, opened factories, one aided by her sickly husband towards prosperity. Fortunately, she could live a peaceful life far from bickering relatives, but then, much to her dismay, she still had to deal with the villagers knocking on her door.

So they want her money? They want her position as a wife? Since when was she, Mo Xian Que easy to bully?! They want to make her lose face? Alright, let them come a little closer then... give them a.... slap!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: 𝒟𝒾𝒶𝓂𝑜𝓃𝒹𝓈 𝐼𝐼
description:
The lights were dimming, the city was quiet, and the nights were reserved in good old New York City!

The Big Apple they called it, where men and women across the globe came for freedom, making memories that would last forever.

The year was 1999 and Amina Ali was no longer the weak woman everyone once remembered.

Amina and her husband the infamous mafia don of New York, Leonardo De Luca began their reign in the City that Never Sleeps. While it was hard to manage marriage, parenthood, and the mafia, Amina and Leonardo tried their hardest to prove they wouldn't fail.

It had been almost three years since the Diamond Of Versailles was missing and there was no clues as to where it could be.

After a long battle of pain, Mina and Leonardo realized they were deeper in the war than they previously believed. Never did they expect to team up with Kai, Sora, and Kenji to beat the Asahi's and finally end the war that took so many lives.

The demons that Kai tried shutting out came back to him as he faced his family and old life once more.

Enemies were coming from left and right. First came Kaya, then came Kazuya, though the mastermind behind it all still remained a mystery.

The De Luca's were no longer home. They were entering forbidden territory in the dark city of Tokyo Japan.

Though there was still one question that riddled everyone's mind.

Would the De Luca's finally fall?

(SEQUAL TO DIAMONDS) (CANNOT BE READ AS A STANDALONE!!)

title: vikings, LA BELLE DAME
description:
She is the god's fae, condemned to look upon the Viking King Ragnar in silence and watch him as he killed, loved and lost and fall in deep love with him in the process. 

Then one day on the cold hill's side, Ragnar battle worn and asking for death to come and find him, she made a noise and he turned around to listen. 

This beautiful women with all the love of a hundred lifetimes finds her knight and beloved in the flesh, his skin warm and calloused, and touching hers. A touch she has dreamed off since her memories first begun. 

She finally believes all her waiting and praying has been answered; how wrong La Belle Dame was. 



- 

A Viking retelling of the John Keats classic mythological poem "La Belle Dame sans Merci". 


FREEHAWKS 
VIKINGS - RAGNAR'S DISAPPEARANCE

title: I became a villain mother in the 1960s [Through the Book]
description:
穿成六零反派媽媽[穿書]

Su Zhi woke up

and found that she had traveled through a book
, or she had traveled through a very popular and extreme period novel
, and became the villain cousin who stole the heroine's first love. She had a miserable end,
and her two brothers were also cannon fodder villains who harmed the heroine?

Su Zhi shrugged innocently, "So what?"

As the little girl of the Su family, she was born with a bright sky and full of blessings.
Her father loved her, her mother loved her, her brother loved her, and even her grandmother loved her to the bone.
There was also a future big man as a backer .

Su Zhi said, what's the best, the round and thick
future big man: "I will be your backer, will you marry me?"

title: From My Heart To Yours
description:
In the historic heart of Edinburgh, Evangeline Hawthorn, a dedicated medical student at the University of Edinburgh, crosses paths with the enigmatic French exchange student, Maximilian Beaumont. Evangeline, who had always prioritized academics, finds herself unexpectedly drawn to Maximilian.

 Her feelings blossom into a secret love, expressed through anonymous letters. As their clandestine meetings in the school courtyard multiply, they succumb to their undeniable chemistry. Their shared passion for knowledge and exploration leads them to embrace their love, lighting up their lives and intertwining their destinies. 

In the hallowed halls of their university, they learn that love can be as transformative as it is intoxicating. This Dark Academia-inspired romance follows Evangeline and Maximilian as they navigate the complexities of love and academia, unlocking a world of possibilities they had never imagined.

title: Rags & Riches (A Zodiac Story)
description:
In the 20th century many problems arose. The rise in slums, horrible discrimination, and big bosses. America is facing an internal struggle in the influx of people and economic crisis. 

(Main characters)
Aries, The richest man in the country is a cunning, arrogant, and cold man. His only line of sight is always getting bigger and better. Many common people hate him and wish to overthrow his power. However, nobody has ever seen his face so he travels freely among the crowd without anyone taking notice. One day someone had finally gotten to him. Someone had stolen his most prized possession, the documents to all his companies which is worth billions of dollars. 

Leo, is a renowned police officer who has been privately hired by Aries to catch the person who had stolen the documents. His is passionate, driven, and has been heartbroken many times despite his caring personality. He is hesitant to get close to anyone which has resulted in his lack of friends and his hardcore dedication to his job. Thought he secretly hates Aries he is one of the few people that have seen his face and must fulfill his job of who stole his legal documents. 

Taurus is a young and  fresh immigrant that had escaped the prosecution of Jews in Germany. Little did he know the persecution continued here as well. He is subjected to discrimination but is incredibly intelligent. Going to school as a 17 year old is a struggle everyday and his parents don't seem to care about the bullying he goes through in school. He is determined to make a statement but is always let down by those who offer help. Will he let go of his suppressed emotions and make a difference?  

COVER BY @ENDOLIA

DON'T WORRY THE OTHER SIGNS ARE HERE AS WELL THESE ARE JUST THE MAIN PLOTS. 

I'm not a history expert so I apologize if anything is inaccurate. It is a historical FICTION for a reason.

title: Hope's Heart
description:
Young widow Hope McClellen leaves her farm in Pennsylvania for a new life out West with her daughter Maggie, but her plans are shattered when bandits attack the stagecoach and leave her for dead. Rescued by tracker Calvin McKay, Hope starts her own dressmaking shop in the small town of Sweetwater, but will she get a second chance at happiness?

Calvin McKay vowed never to let a woman get close to him because of his past, but he is intrigued by the quiet young woman he rescues from bandits. As he and Hope grow closer, Calvin begins to look forward to a better future, but will his secrets come back to haunt him?

title: My Rogue Lord
description:
For years he was despised, loathed and hated. Those very emotions became him as he fled, vowing to never return and to be used as a spawn. But life has a funny way to put us in situations we despise, he had to return to the very thing he despised to carry out the duties which were rightfully his. 

She was taught to be a lady, one of status. Her sole purpose in life was to provide heirs for her future husband, nothing more, nothing less. And that is what she lived by, what she believed, until he came along.......
He stirs feelings inside of her she never knew existed. She awakens feelings he thought he had buried long ago. Together, they discover each other. But old enemies are plotting. Could their beginning be their end?

All is fair in love and war
Within imperfections lies perfection
Hate is easy ; love takes courage
Real eyes, realize, real lies

Perhaps when the rivers run crimson with my life's essence, then they will understand; by then it will be too late



It was a cursed thing, the human heart. It knew no sense, no discipline. It lead one to love what could destroy it, and it did not know the difference between joy and pain.

title: The Birth of Rekiya
description:
In an era when a girl child is aborted or killed, Reba after twelve years of barrenness became pregnant, only to be conceiving a girl child. 

One day, the King of Gabatha arose in anger. "Oh you fragile women! Since you are always taken as slaves and can't defend your kingdom, may you never be born in my Kingdom again! I announce that every girl child about to be born be killed. While every boy child from the age of seven be trained to fight war, and bring victory to my land. I curse every unborn girl child! I will never allow my Kingdom to be taken. And I will fight this war without women!"

Yet, Rekiya was born!

title: Edge Of Time
description:
Jilted by her fiancé, Marissa is done with men until fate steps in and she finds that Craig Langston may be more man than she can resist.

Marissa is a high energy independent career woman of the 21st century who finds herself on a collision course with destiny when she is thrown 144 years into the past. Confederate Officer Dr. Craig Langston is an enticing man that any woman would long to fall in love with, and now Marissa is torn between rampant desire, for the man ignites her very soul, and a longing to return home. 

Can she find it within herself to embrace a new life in the arms of her Confederate officer or will more sinister forces intervene before she can discover what may be the greatest love of all time?

title: The Queen of Darkness
description:
With Zeus' death, Samira and Hades continue to rule the Underworld, as well as their new kingdom by default. But how easy can that be with the council still lurking by as threats? 

Or, when someone unexpectedly returns with a strong personal vendetta. 

How will Hades learn to balance newcomers, and the two separate worlds? 

And how will Samira finally learn to become the queen she was always meant to be, when there are constant jabs sent her way? 

Follow Samira and Hades along in the second book of the Greek God Series: The Queen of Darkness.

title: Claiming His Treasure
description:
Charlotte "Charlie" Carver knows she's in trouble when Jackson North shows up at her door in the middle of the night, nearly a year after he unceremoniously broke her heart. She's always suspected her ex had secrets, but she never thought those secrets would put her in danger-until violent men show up right on Jackson's tail, and suddenly she's caught up in an adventure unlike any she ever imagined.

Jackson has never been able to forget Charlie, the only woman he's ever loved. He'd do anything to protect her--but he'd also do anything to help his team find the fortune hidden by eccentric billionaire Vincent Rinaldi. Unfortunately, the key to finding Rinaldi's fortune rests in a gift Jackson gave Charlie back when they were together, and now she's tangled up in his dangerous life whether he likes it or not. 

Soon, they're on a wild chase through Croatia's islands with Jackson's teammates, the notorious Devil's Set. Career treasure hunters, the Set has seen their share of danger and adventure, but they've never encountered a hunt like this.

As they pursue the ultimate treasure, Jackson and Charlie face one danger after another-but the biggest threat might be the one targeting their hearts. Neither wants to admit that there's still a sizzling connection between them, but sometimes, the hunt is too intoxicating to resist...


MEET THE DEVIL'S SET: Treasure hunters. Adventurers. Bad boys. 
A second chance at love has never been this dangerous...

title: Her Healing Touch.
description:
For as long as Bella Skye could remember, she has lived in seclusion, and far away from the people she called family. For reasons, she could not explain, the villagers have despised her very appearance whenever she came into their view. Thanks to the training she received from the old lady her father commanded to live with her, Bella became a talented healer. What was it about being knowledgeable in the healing arts made you a witch? The villagers claimed that she was the bride of the Devil, and ran away from her, especially when she was called to heal someone. Would she ever have a real relationship with the man she called brother? Would she ever be accepted? And most importantly... Would she truly find love?


Read the book to find the answer!

title: The Queen
description:
You've read it as a Biblical tale of courage, now experience the beloved story of Esther as it springs to fresh life in this inspired, modern-day novel! A gripping tale of jealousy, obsession, betrayal, love and mercy is told anew. Witness the book of Esther like never before!

 It is the pageant of a lifetime. 127 women and only one chance to win. A young, beautiful maid named Katherine -- a simple commoner -- suddenly finds herself chosen as a contestant for the handsome, mature King's potential bride. She is faced with an uncertain future and he is a magnificent King with a lonely heart. 

Through unlikely circumstances, they develop a friendship and an unexpected love. But as the day of the King's decision draws near, she discovers that the stakes for the crown are much higher than she thought and their very lives could be in danger. 

Will their love be enough to save his kingdom and her life? Or will it be the key to their undoing? It all comes down to one simple question, does she have what it takes to be the Queen?

title: Destined To Be Yours
description:
1850s, India. 

Rajkunwari Saya Singh: the niece of Maharaj Bir Singh Rajkunwar, the King of the princely state- Bhaddaiyan Raj of British India. 
She is a Rajput princess who is proud of her heritage and refuses to bow down to anyone. 

Geoffrey Berkeley: A young British soldier employed in the British East India Company. 
He is a man who upholds his ideals and his love for his country as most important.

Fate conspires for them to meet.
Sparks fly, fiery words are exchanged and hidden feelings come to the surface. 

But fates have never been too kind and this time around they have to cross through the hurdles of colonialism, ethical and cultural hatred, racial and religious divide, language barrier, resistance from  those around them and a full fledged War of Independence to get to each other. 

Follow the story of forbidden love and passion of two star crossed lovers...

(The story revolves around the times of the First War of Independence of 1857, India)

Myles though baffled by the decision goes along with being treated as a pawn to aid in a permanent treaty. authorBio: Hey there, I'm Micah, an aspiring writer with a passion for crafting unique tales. I embarked on this Wattpad journey because the stories I craved simply didn't exist elsewhere. title: Princess In Disguise
description:
(Completed)
Princess Amelia Cardston is put to a task by her parents. They want her to go to another kingdom and pretend to be a common girl in order to spy on them and find out what is going on with them. The kingdom claims they are in need of financial help, so Amelia is going to see if they really do need help, or if the royal family is just wanting to line their royal pockets. Amelia is a cousin to a duchess living in the palace, so Amelia is going to stay with her on the guise of her being a college girl who just broke up with her cheating fiance. The only problem is, when Amelia shows up, she is blown away by the handsome prince Ashton. Can she keep her secret from him? What happens when Amelia finds out a dreadful secret about the prince? Will the secret force her to admit to the prince who she really is? Or can she keep her secret and leave the kingdom without a broken heart. 
Join, Amelia, Ashton, and some of his cousins in a battle of wits, intrigue, and some romance thrown in.

title: ✧The Earthe of the Elves✧
description:
"Upstairs!" I hear a yell and pounding footsteps. I crawl out of the window until I'm hanging from my hands. I take a breath. I let go.

~

Living in a small town with a single mother, Mia Glenn never expected anything special to come of her life. She never thought she would go on an adventure as harrowing as the stories she read. Until one day she narrowly avoids being kidnapped, discovering in the same day a whole new universe that she is supposedly a part of. 

As she navigates the elven world of Earthe with the help of a particularly attractive elf boy, she learns secrets about her identity and her father's, of whom she believed had ditched her and her mom at an early age. Soon Mia discovers that peace isn't as easy as it seems, and while Earthe may be beautiful, there are dark parts that are creeping back to the light. 

Even in a world of perfect beings such as elves, lies can be spun as precisely as an arrow can pierce a target, and evil can sneak up on you when you least expect it.

Mia is used to reading about this kind of stuff, not living it. Safe to say she finds herself in one hell of an adventure.

-
