title: Purple Blues [Elvis]
description:
When does a girl ever get the opportunity to meet her idol in person, even when they have passed away almost thirty years before she was born? Well, go back to when they lived, of course.

Katelyn is sixteen years old and was born in the year 2005, yet she is obsessed with Elvis Presley and has listened and danced to nothing else all her life. Her grandmother Iris, who was sixteen in 1956 when Elvis was young and famous and is just as obsessed, raised her from infancy since her biological mother and father were in prison when she was born. Because of that, Katelyn is bullied. So she turns to Elvis. His music is soothing and fun and can instantly bring her into a good mood. A miracle happens, and she gets the chance to meet him in New York. Sure she becomes an icon because of her purple hair and a rumor that says she's from the future, but the real thing here is that she befriended her idol, is falling in love with him, and is trying to tell him information about his future that can save his life.

Elvis is intrigued by this strange girl who says she's from the future, and who knows all his songs, even ones she claims hasn't come out yet. He finds himself drawn to her and her purple hair. Does she know something? Will she change his life?

Born with scales and the ability to breathe fire, Mo spent all her life being bullied and ridiculed. For in the Kingdom of Kreatier her kind are not welcome: Half-breeds or as they are better known, Vuruks. But when she loses her family to a curse she must acquire the assistance of the the King's highest mage. This leads her into the company of a king's guard, a flirtatious knight, named Philip who promises his help but at the cost of her also joining the guard. From a country bumpkin to the king's trusted guard, Mo never once thought it would be easy, but her plans take an unexpected turn when the king is met with a rebellion which forces her to fulfill her oath, lay down her life for the king and defend his majesty against all those who oppose him, including her very own kind. title: THE DANCING GIRL
description:
Noor, a dancer in the Royal Court of the Al-Yauzhan Empire wants nothing more than to pay off her debts and lead a nice, simple life-but a chance encounter with the crown prince and his brother brings her into the dangerous world of court politics. As Noor and the princes investigate their uncle and cousin's possible treason, she grows closer to the crown prince, but in order to save the kingdom and the person she loves, Noor will have to risk everything...

A romantic adventure set in an imagined Arabic kingdom, THE DANCING GIRL is a story of court intrigues, romantic entanglements, and secret meetings as Noor and her best friend Amir try to help the princes they're falling for expose corrupt court officials with plans to seize the throne. Noor and Amir are close to having everything they've ever dreamed of...now all they need to do is survive.

title: Escape from the Obstinate Prince ✓
description:
Sequel to "Escape from the Witch Hunters"

Jack kept walking towards her and Ami kept backing up until finally she hit the wall. "Why are you doing this?"

"Doing what?" he had an arrogant smile on his face and he got closer to her.

"That." she nodded towards his closing in on her. Her breathing and her heart beating picked up speed.

"Is it wrong for me to want my own wife?" his own body was nearly pressed against hers and he rested his head between her head and shoulder.

"It is when you, just days before, resented the very fact that I was alive." she closed her eyes, trying to steady her breathing.

"Maybe I've had a change of heart." he looked at her. 

She looked at him with her blue eyes. "I don't think so."

"What if I said I loved you?" he whispered hoarsely.

"I wouldn't believe you." she rested her head against the wall as her heart pounded in her ears.

His eyes flashed, then he viciously grabbed her by the waist, pulled her close to him, and his lips crashed onto hers.

~~~

Andromeda Aurora Amélia the Third had dreaded the day she turned sixteen, as she would have to be married to the very snobbish boy, Prince Jacques. They had met only once before, and they had not gotten along in the slightest. 

She hadn't wanted to play ball with him. He got mud on her favorite dress. She was a ninny and didn't like petty lizards. He was a snob who hated anything in a dress.

What happens when they're forced to marry? Will the alliance go through? Will Jack drive Ami crazy enough for her to return home? Or will they work out their differences for the sake of their two countries?

A princess. 
One born with the attributes of a fiercely independent warrior and of an erudite, learned scholar.
One who isn't without her fair share of fatal flaws.

A sprouting leader whose reign hasn't yet been witnessed by the world. A young woman thrust into an unfamiliar world of death and deceit abandoned to balance a crown the weight of a kingdom on her head. 

She must go through betrayal, grief, and much more an ordinary woman her age could not have coped with. But she is no ordinary woman, she is a goddess. A mortal goddess born of zeal and wit destined to rule Vaibhavgarh. 

What are the events that will unfold when her loved one dies, when another betrays her, and when another reveals a shocking truth?

Can she stop the conspiracy that she is unaware of or must she go to war? Is her doom fated or can it be reversed? 

Flip through the pages of the Indian princess's life as you find out what she is destined to be.
~~~

title: The Knight's Rose
description:
Many centuries ago, in the kingdom of Chuvaria lived a young poor maiden named 'Rose Van Sparrow'.

Rose and her family were the dwellers of a small village in the kingdom and struggled to survive through the obstacles of life. A hopeless romantic, beautiful girl with brown eyes, Rose had never dreamt of any luxury other than the well-being of her beloved family. Her only wish was to live a life of peace.

But fate has something else destined for her. One event, one meeting, and one sight with a mighty black knight changed the whole life of Rose Van Sparrow. A life of fate, imminent truth, and affectionate love awaited her arrival. While Rose believed she was an insignificant citizen of the kingdom, her true identity was hidden deep beneath the dense soil of fabricated phenomena.

And to unravel the greatest twists, you must read the story of 'The Knight's Rose'.

A novel filled with grief, fate, and love! A romantic tale of a Knight and his Rose.

title: Jamais Vu
description:
What if you met the man of your dreams but he was already married... to you?

Jamais Vu is a time-traveling romance wrapped in a deadly mystery.  Nessa is in the last year of her university studies when she begins to experience strange phenomena - waves of déjà vu, convincing her that she is familiar with places she's never been before.  When she sees a bearded stranger, she is powerfully drawn to him, feeling as though she knows the older man already.

But Dan is overwhelmed by the appearance of the beautiful younger woman, who is actually a youthful version of his missing wife.  Nessa is somehow travelling ten years into the future to meet up with her the man who will eventually become her husband.  Past and future become entangled as Nessa meets a young Dan in her present, while ten years in the future, Dan strives to save his wife from the clutches of a lethal serial killer.

The clock is ticking as both a young Nessa and an older Dan attempt to keep the future intact, and restrain themselves from falling in love with the wrong version of each other.  But is it cheating on someone if you're in love with who they are - just in another time?

title: The Assassin of Time
description:
Carried to a fantasy future by a dark-eyed, time-traveling stranger, can Leonor overcome the guilt that haunts her and fulfill her destiny... while navigating her growing attraction to her newfound protector?     


Leonor, a student at present-day Harvard, would do anything for the people she holds dear: her roommates, her beloved little brother - and the brilliant but eccentric Professor Mosey, the mentor to whom she faithfully delivers meals three times a day while he conducts secret chemistry experiments that have earned him the nickname The Batty Professor.

One night, Leonor's world is shattered when mysterious and deadly spies arrive at Professor Mosey's office to steal the discovery he made just hours earlier: a chemical solution that, when consumed, allows humans to time-travel.

When Leonor becomes the spies' next target, she has no escape - until a man with midnight-black eyes whisks her three hundred years into the future. There, she discovers a world whose most powerful figure harbors dark plans to use Professor Mosey's time-travel solution to transform all of reality: past, present, and future. Plans that can be stopped, if at all, only by a secret that Leonor possesses.

To prevent her enemy's designs from taking shape, Leonor will need the help of the newfound protector who carried her to the future, a man defined by his rigidly disciplined nature. Together, the two must navigate a city of elites, servants, mysteries, and masquerade balls. Their quest will require them to confront painful secrets from their own pasts, but Leonor is determined to do whatever it takes to save the world from doom. To save her family and friends.

And to save the man with whom she has begun to share an attraction as unexpected as it is undeniable and irresistible.


New parts post every Friday. The very first two parts run long, then the parts become shorter. If you enjoy the story, your votes would mean the world to me. Looking forward to seeing you around!

title: Royal Twins
description:
I? I am just a normal 18 years old girl that is called y/n. normally I wear not expensive clothes. I live in a little village with not that much people. We have a king. He runs our city from the age of 20. But now, it is time for his sons to take over. Yes you heard it, sons. They are twins. Both 19. Because the king doesn't want to disadvantage one of them, they both are becoming kings. It is really weird to have 2 kings but I think our little village will get used to it. All the girls from the 17 till 19 got a letter, so included me to. Do you want me to read it? Here I go, "dear girls, here are speaking your next kings. This is a letter to all the girls in the village from the age 17 till 19. This is because we are 19. Because we are becoming kings we want of course someone next to us. You all get a chance to come to our castle and live here for a month. You will proof to us that you would be a good queen for your village. You will have to do tests and we will choose 2 of you at the last day of the month. 2 of course, BC we are two kings. We wish you luck and we see you in 3 days" interesting isn't it. I don't want to go, but my parents need the money if I become the queen. But... if I am going to do my best? I think not. Even if they are kings... it will not be real love...

title: The Drunken Feathers
description:
In this biographical series that begins in 1784, twenty-one-year-old George, Prince of Wales-- the eldest son of King George III and heir to the British throne-- spends his youth idly by keeping countless mistresses, drinking profusely, and making friends with the radical Whig Opposition, much to the dismay of his father and the conservative Tories. While the Prince of Wales is handsome, witty, and intelligent, he is also vain, haughty, and melodramatic. However, his Whig friends overlook his vices in the hopes that their political alliance with him will one day be in their favor, as they hope to one day retake the government from the Tories. The Prince of Wales gets himself into even more difficulties with an illegal marriage, accumulating debts, and an evermore distant relationship with his parents. This finally culminates in the Regency Crisis of 1788: when King George III suffers through a serious mental illness, the Prince of Wales' true disposition is finally revealed before the public eye.

title: Akshaya Keerthi~The Rise of Rajat Kumari[✓]
description:
{Undying Glory} 
{The Rise of the lady with the complexion of silver on her tone}


"Royalty' what comes to your mind when you hear this word? Comfort, never ending luxurious? But is this luxurious life the complete truth? Cobweb of conspiracies, maze of  mysteries and dirty politics are always associated with this mere word. Behind the curtains of palace, each one possess their own smile of sorrow and tears of agony. 

What happens when the lust for power and greed for the throne empowers the human mind to dig a casket of flesh? Swords tainted with the blood of their own ones. Fake smiles, obsessions, path of thorns, cunning thoughts, greedy heart and a naive shattered soul amidst the darkest secrets of the palace. Nothing seemed difficult until a dark morning. 

Her delight, smile, the moments of peace came to an end in a day. It wasn't her husband's ashes but the ashes of her smile. Compelled to cry in darkness, it was her transformation from a naive princess to the shadow of the king and heir of one's principles. Unleashing the dark secrets, she reached the final stage. Is it the end or the half of the journey?

But when Donovan, the mysterious Native American with a troubled past, shows up in her victory garden one afternoon, he piques Jack's curiosity. Donovan's arrival brings both thrilling excitement and harrowing danger as Jack has to choose whether she'll stand with Donovan against the ghosts of his past or return to the independence she no longer craves.

title: Upon Shattered Wings
description:
She was ripped away from him
 Drowned in the cold hands of death
 But he would do anything 
 To have her back

**
Once upon a time a winged girl fell in love with a winged prince. She was kind and beautiful but also young and naive. She gave her heart to him on a silver platter and her love cost her her life. 

Once upon a time a winged prince fell in love with a winged girl. He was the prince that was written in every fairytale, charming and loved by the people. But every prince is not the same. He took her for granted and in turn, destroyed the girl he loved. 
  
 And once in a blue moon, they meet again.
**

"Are you going to leave?" Again. The one word he couldn't bare to say as he looked away. 

"I'm not leaving." I reached up and held his face in my hands, forcing him to look at me. "Not in this life or the next, I'm not going anywhere."

title: He's from 1945
description:
Zhou Sheng was born in a scholarly family, but was born in troubled times and had a lot of ups and downs. He traveled through time and space and woke up to find himself in the so-called 21st century, and secretly married a man through business.
His nominal husband Chu Qinbai came from a good family, but he left the family business early and became a household name. He hated this marriage for profit so much that he looked down on Zhou Sheng, who was arrogant and full of bad habits of the rich second generation.
But Zhou Sheng, who had changed his heart, didn't care too much about these.
He thought it was a good era, without hunger and war, and everyone had clothes to keep warm and a roof to shelter from the rain.
He started a livelihood business, invested in medical care and education, and did poverty alleviation construction, and was too busy to do anything.
Chu Qinbai thought he had ulterior motives, and those rich second generation friends were even more dumbfounded.
"Is Chu Qinbai going to divorce him, so he works hard?"
"I bet he can't last a month."
"One week."
A long time later, Zhou Sheng, who has many titles such as "the most low-key young philanthropist", "national heavyweight project investor", and "benchmark of the times", became more and more mysterious.
In the same year, Chu Qinbai's secret marriage was exposed, and he was on the Spring Festival Gala at the end of the year.
The media was surprised who had such a big face to invite him to appear.
Chu Qinbai: "Return a favor for my wife."
Media: "?!"
Don't ask, if you ask, the answer is that his wife is both famous and professional. If you ask
again, the answer is that if she doesn't appear on the Spring Festival Gala again to remind him, will the person who is often not seen for a month still remember that she has a husband? A
righteous and gentle nobleman is x-rated by a crematorium star and movie emperor.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Accidental Assassin ✔️
description:
Women don't have a voice, they have duties. The four lands that make up her kingdom isn't any different from their neighbouring countries. But sometimes girls aren't voiceless, sometime a man might raise his daughter to protect herself. Alissia was raised by her father and when he died her grandfather continued her unconventional upbringing. Knowing he wouldn't always be there to protect her, he taught her to hunt and protect herself. 
One of these hunts goes wrong and Al meets people who take an interest in the strange young girl.
Women aren't meant to have an opinion, she was never meant to be taught more. She is a commoner, she is female and she is deadly.
Put in a unique position Alissia is taught the ways of an assassin. Now she'll have to navigate the shadows who want her for themselves and the ones who want her dead. She's going to have to fight for her place while the gypsy seers try to find a man who is vital in a prophesy that will define the future of several kingdoms.
How will this accidental assassin deal with a life full of courtly expectations, restrictions and shadows?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am Isabel, make up your own mind about just how badass one good girl/little sister/ best friend/ lovely daughter can be :)

Change, meet Ariel, she'll show just how strong one little wolf can be!
My first teen fiction is up here, my first Werewolf fiction, my first Change

Accidental Assassin, a girl should be seen not heard. She certainly shouldn't be loaded in weapons and have an opinion. Yet here she is, Alissia, a lady in a corset and big dresses with fast, sharp blades and an equally sharp, fast tongue.

title: Eliana (holocaust story)
description:
(COMPLETED) Eliana Goldenberg is your average teenage girl living in Germany. She goes to school, argues with her little sister and even has a boyfriend. But her family is keeping a secret, a very dangerous secret. They are Jewish. The fear of discovery is constantly chasing them. They have changed their names and moved towns but they can't seem to escape. A new concentration camp has been built outside their new town. But she is not the only person with secrets. What happens when Eliana learns that her boyfriend is more involved with the Nazi's then she ever could have known?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey! I'm Tori! I live in the crazy USA. My life revolves around school, horses, theatre, and of course, writing.
I love writing romances in any genre. I also love slam poetry.
My favorite authors/poets are John Green, Colleen Hoover, Maya Angelou, Anna Binkovitz and Ollie Renee Schminkey.
My favorite music comes from Lady Gaga, Pentatonix, Train, Paramore, Jason Mraz, Adele and many other artists.

title: Josephine
description:
The year is 1960. Princess Josephine Anna Maria Price of America has her whole life laid out before her eyes. She is the heir apparent to the Imperial throne of the largest superpower the world has ever seen, stretching across six of the seven continents. She has the intention of living peacefully and only ascending to the throne in her middle-ages, as her mother and father are still quite young. She may be ten, but the sophisticated, organized young girl already knows how she will live her life. That's just her way of doing things. She's a planner. 

Until everything changes in one day. In one day, she is thrust upon the throne, younger than she was ever prepared for. Now she must face the challenges of greedy nobles, assassins, rebels, and her family's dark past all while juggling the daunting fears of marriage and childbirth.

Will she rise like a phoenix out of the ashes of the Imperial Americana? Or will she crumble and fall-like everyone thinks she will?

**************************************************
Completed! 

******Reviews From Readers******

"I have very much enjoyed reading this story. The alternate timeline is interesting. The characters are well written and believable. Josephine is a story I would recommend to anyone who enjoys historical fiction," -@Asher_LOATM

"Its really good! Very solid backstory and well composed characters, and an engaging plot and lots of heartbreak! Im prolly gonna get trust issues from this! :D i havent read the entire novel, but im certainly looking forward to finishing it," -@cuteferret11

authorBio:
Hello there friends!

My name is Jack, I'm 19, a ordinary amateur writer and a pretty normal dude.

This is where you can view my collection of novels, collectively tied together in what I affectionately call the 'Symbiosisverse', which is my creative endeavor to establish a unique literary multiverse of different worlds, people and stories, wrapped together. In fact, every single one of my books is connected to one another in some fashion, even if it isn't explicitly mentioned.

All of my books are arranged in reading lists for easy access!

I adore all the characters I created, and I've worked super hard on all of them so far, and some still have stories being produced while I juggle work, my freshman year of college as a geography major and just trying to live. That was most certainly a run-on sentence I just realized, but I am far too lazy to fix it. I promise, my actual writing is far better.

If you want to talk, my DMs are open, as is my message board! Just hit me up!

title: The Echanting Duchess
description:
I was just a simple lady living on a peaceful countryside.
Then one day, I was knocked out and before I get to know what was happening, I woke up one morning inside an extravagant carriage, fully dressed in an elegant white gown with a stranger reaching out his hand from the outside. 
And before I could even make a sound, the stranger - a surprisingly stunning and dangerously handsome man at that, came into view and uttered four ridiculously simple yet devastating words that shook me to the core. 
And just like that, I became a pawn discarded to become the wife of the most stunning and most unscrupulous man on the kingdom - His Grace The Duke of Kargaz, Calex Hexon Tygart.

The simple and quiet life of Atallie Ygravet was suddenly put into chaos when she became entangled with the notorious Duke of Kargaz. She was caught up as a Duchess surrounded by too many of mistresses of her husband. Everyone thought that for a simple lady from an unknown little faraway county such as Atallie, she couldn't possibly accept her fate to have her man with his too many to count mistresses swarming like flies on the entire estate. 

However, everyone was dumbfounded when they saw the Duchess with her cool, unperturbed, and aloof personality as she gracefully and calmly drank her tea while reading some books. She was so leisure to the point that even the disinterested and distant Duke started paying attention to her. 

Nobody knew what was going through the minds of the Duke and the Duchess of Kargaz. 

Oh, please, Duke, get those glaring eyes of yours away from me! Don't make me snap, or else you'll go blind in just a breath away! - Duchess

Hmp! Why is she so calm and quiet? What kind of game is she playing at? - Duke

In the continent where they live, wherein elements and magic exists, are things as simple as they seemed to be?

description:
You have always lived a rather quiet life serving a princess who never shows herself to the public. However, your peace is disrupted when the princess you serve is suddenly arranged to marry the prince of a neighboring kingdom. As the princess' servant, you travel with her with only the best wishes in mind. 

You just never expected her fiancé to fall in love with you instead.

authorBio:
Yeaaaah, well you guys can call me either Ahiru, Enilor, Caroline or anything really... like Arrow... g-get it? CarrowLINE? No, okay I see. =.=

Anyway, I imagine you're probably here because... actually why are you here? To hear about lil' ol' me? Well, have you come to the right place because my life is just so incredibly interesting. I'd dare to say that I am the very most interesting person in the entire world. Congrats on discovering my interestingness.

Ummmmmm, I like cats and I live on a mountain.

So, have we accomplished your goal? Are you satisfied? Do you know enough about me now?

...No? Oh gosh, what other incredibly interesting aspects of my life can I bring up? I can.... knit.... and I like puppets.

No....

I love puppets!

I have a ostrich (puppet) named Koal! Then there is Tango! He loves hugs! <3 <3 <3 And my fine young hand, Monfri, named after Mon-Fri! Not to mention my owl, Moose. Then my two (nameless) marionettes, and my lil' sheep, Yuu.

Oh dear, I almost went into puppet ramble mode for a second there! I better leave before it gets any worse.

I'm happy you got to learn incredibly interesting facts about me (which you won't forget). Fare Thee well.

title: Love Knows No Age [Elvis]
description:
Elvis, freshly returned home from the army on March 7th, 1960, is a bit sore from losing his mother and coming home to his Graceland mansion without her there. His 43-year-old housekeeper Mary is there to greet him, though, and she's a welcomed sight. And a pretty one. Why is she more attractive than he remembered her to be? Maybe it's because he's been away from home for a while, and his brain is still adjusting. She's the next mother figure to him, after all, since she's a family friend... But it isn't familial feelings he's starting to feel for her, and familial feelings aren't what she's starting to feel for him as well. Both are shocked when they find out that there is a spark between them, especially because they have known each other for a while, and there's an 18-year age difference between them. What will this new and unexpected attraction do to Elvis's relationships between current girlfriend Anita and new flame Priscilla? Will this help heal Mary's heart since it was broken due to her nasty divorce while Elvis was gone in the army?

Note on rating: some sensual comments/details

title: Lavanya : The Chosen Queen [On-Hold]
description:
FEATURED ON WATTPAD HISTORICAL ROMANCE


Lavanya, the daughter of Siravuri Bhargav, the General of Maheswari, was a cheerful girl by morning but a messiah of the poor and homeless people at night. She was the most wanted person of Maheshwari and was chased by royals, especially Prince Virendra like crazy. Things take a drastic turn when the King of Maheswari asked Lavanya's hand in marriage with his son Prince Virendra who was known as God of War because of being cold and ruthless in battle fields.

title: Swashbuckling in the Dark
description:
A privileged runaway. A notorious pirate. A vengeful lawman. A bloodthirsty killer.
  
  
  A young woman turns to a life of piracy to escape a life of privilege, unwittingly reuniting with the childhood friend who abandoned her. Determined to forge a new life for herself, she denies the old feelings that his return have stirred up. They forge a temporary truce to achieve their ends.
  
  However, their uneasy alliance is tested by words unspoken and murky secrets. To survive in the harsh reality of their world, the pair must not only repair the damage between them, but uncover the secrets of the haunting myth who hunts them.
  
  Highest Rating #4 Historical Fiction.

authorBio:
I am a writer, editor and avid reader.
Right now I am living abroad and studying in Barcelona, Spain with my partner. In summer of 2022 I will receive my master's in digital marketing. I have written a couple of books for Wattpad and my goal is to eventually publish these novels. I've also written some fanfictions for my favourite video games, the Legend of Zelda.

On the side, I offer my services as a freelancer alongside my partner and fellow writer, helping other writers with their projects and questions. You can find us at the website link on my profile.

title: Denarius: Antonius and Octavius
description:
History always painted Gaius Octavius and Marcus Antonius as bitter enemies who soon went their separate ways. Well, this is somewhat different. 
Bitterly jealous at Octavius getting all of Caesar's money and adoption, Antonius withholds all of the money out of spite. 
Only nineteen-years-old, Gaius Octavius has to confront the man who used to be Caesar's friend and best general in battle. What starts out as anger turns into something sweeter. Antonius has always been described by other people as good looking, a possible descendant of Hercules. Octavius never believed this at first, until he meets the older man face-to-face. 

Annoyed at his conflicting feelings for Antonius, Octavius marches off back to Apollonia, not realizing the older man is trailing behind.

description:
The Multicultural Love Story: Alryana Lopez Tan Sy Briones and the Heir of Spain

Hello, I am Alryana Lopez Tan Sy Briones, a proud blend of Spanish, Chinese, Filipino, and American heritage. You may already know my family, the Lopez Tan Sy Briones, known for our successful business ventures in the Philippines. My life changed forever when I met Leonor, Princess of Asturias, at UWC Atlantic. Despite our different worlds, we discovered a deep connection that transcended borders and titles. As our friendship blossomed, so did an unexpected love, igniting a journey that would challenge our identities and futures.

title: Protection
description:
Alayna Bordreaux was a testament to one of the bloodiest revolutions of all time- the French Revolution. She watches in horror as the acclaimed mistress of death steals everyone she loves- the guillotine. Finally, toting one more burden in the form of a secret to peaceful, haven-like England, Alayna is taken in by a dying, kindly old man, thinking she will live her life as his nurse. But she is wrong. 
   Alexander Pembroke is a man of many dark sins, and after his father passes away, he finds that many vexing responsibilities fall into his lap- one in particular, a meek but lovely young woman who seems to attract danger- as well as himself. 
  Will they find love, or is it fate that finds them first?

authorBio:
My, how this description has changed over the years! I'm a Mrs. now.  :)
I'm an aspiring author, waiting on a story to write.
I'm a newlywed, which is a tale in itself.
I love history and I consider my role models to be Princess Diana, Ree Drummond, Dave Ramsey, and over all, Jesus Christ. I love to bake but I would never say that I excel. I love to read very much. The concept of grace is my lifelong exploration, and a lost art. I enjoy the music of Lana Del Rey, Taylor Swift, John Denver, Casting Crowns, Third Day, and many, many others.
My favorite book is Gone with the Wind by Margaret Mitchell, followed closely by Revolution by Jennifer Donnelly.
My favorite film is It's a Wonderful Life.
I am inspired by Better Homes and Gardens magazine, numerous poems and songs, and the happenings of my own life. Anything that I have written is based on something that I have felt before in my life.
I have a blog chronicling my journey through young married life, home making, and working. The link is somewhere around here.
I love talking to new people! Shoot me a message. :)

title: Little Sharpshooter
description:
Sixteen-year-old Randy has been playing games with her pa for as long as she can remember. When shots are fired while she's tending her ill-tempered horse one morning, the game that plays out becomes one of survival for Randy. Outlaws have shown up on the family homestead to  seek revenge on her Pa from his long past Texas Ranger days. She hasn't played the game as well as she could have. Her pa dies and she's injured and on her own.

Randy plans to cross the American West with her guns and her horse as her only companions as she starts her journey to the ocean to scatter the ashes of those she loved. However, the boy that saved her life after trying to steal her horse wants to join her and an old family friend convinces her that they can make good money by exploiting Randy's excellent sharpshooting skills making her out to be the Annie Oakley of the West. Randy's full name Miranda Carter quickly becomes legendary all while outlaws are hot on their tail. 

But it doesn't take long for Randy to realize she could do without the fame, trouble, and danger being a Carter brings her and the boy she is falling for.

title: Beast
description:
He who breaks, must repair.
Or spend eternal life in despair.
No love, no place, 
No human face

Canines, claws and red eyes.
There is no time, for goodbyes.
He will hunt, he will howl.
Listen out for his growl.

Only one cure for the curse.
Perhaps she will only make it worse.
Her love and kindness.
Will shake the blindness.

Treasure, love and protect.
Hold no ounce of regret.
Under the full moon, his time will come.
Then you need to be the one.

--------------------
This is a short novella, so I apologise if you feel it is rushed at any point.
This is inspired by Beauty and the Beast, so you will see some similarities.

title: L'Ange de la Mort (The Art of Revolution #1)
description:
{Wattys 2018 Winner - The Contemporaries} Versailles, France 1789: Where the only things more prevalent than opulence and wealth, are secrets.

At the dawn of the French Revolution, Paris is divided. In the glittering palace of Versailles, courtiers party without a care in the world, but in the city, people must fight to stay alive. 

Eighteen-year-old courtier Gabriel de la Marche is part of both worlds. When Gabriel was fourteen, his older sister went missing, and desperation for answers led him to strike a deal with an underground organization of assassins-they would use their connections to help Gabriel find his sister, if Gabriel agreed to kill members of nobility under the alias L'Ange de la Mort. Four years later, he still hasn't found his sister, and the repercussions of his decision are catching up with him. But he fears it might be too late to turn back now. 

The daughter of a French mother and a wealthy English earl, Lizabeth survived in the womb when her twin brother did not. Believed by her family to be cursed, she has grown up shamed and unloved, locked away in her father's estate. That is, until Lizabeth's mother strikes a deal of her own. If Lizabeth travels to Versailles and kills L'Ange de la Mort, she'll be granted her freedom. 

At the palace, Gabriel and Lizabeth fall headfirst into love, neither of them knowing the other's secret. Amid lavish court life, Lizabeth desperately searches for the identity of L'Ange de la Mort while Gabriel searches for the person rumored to want him dead. And when the truth is finally revealed, they discover they've become entrapped in a plot bigger than either of them could have imagined. One which could change all of France.

aesthetics by makovea!

authorBio:
This profile celebrates the life and works of Charlotte Brontë. All of the works listed here are in the public domain. This profile is maintained by Wattpad.

Charlotte Brontë (/ˈbrɒnti/; 21 April 1816 - 31 March 1855) was an English novelist and poet, the eldest of the three Brontë sisters who survived into adulthood, whose novels are English literature standards. She wrote Jane Eyre under the pen name Currer Bell.

title: If I Could Live Again

title: MULATTO (Iyila) (Editing)
description:
A Historical/ Romance novel

MULATTO (Iyila) tells the story of a young slave girl during the era when slavery was at its highest peak in the American South - the year 1860, before Abraham Lincoln's succession as president. Iyia was not just any slave but a mulatto, conceived through a brutal rape.

Life as a slave is quite unpredictable, misery and pain is the deal of the day especially amongst the black  females, this of course includes the mulattos who were generally seen as a curse, an abomination by their African mothers and some were thrown away after birth.

But Iyila, being quite fortunate, was kept until she turned six before being abandoned by her family. She gradually grows into a woman, passed on by different owners until she is finally sold to Mr John - the richest plantation owner in the whole of the South. His brutality could not be measured and hope in his household is something of a rare find. What with Mr. John's brutal son and his stupid daughter, the slaves are yet to see hell, until Gabriel - his first son - arrives from Oxford University with a degree in law.

The John's mansion soon turns into a drama house, where opinions clash and feelings begin to emerge.

What will happen when the handsome, intelligent and well built human rights activist begins to find the striking, stubborn mulatto slave (Iyila) amusingly intelligent and very unlike her folks? Could it be fondness? Or is it something much deeper? Which presents another delicate problem, dropping a yet to answer question - will Iyila ever let go of her hate for the white folks who have caused her nothing but pain? Or will his looks and opinions weaken her stony heart? Find out in this thrilling book .... MULATTO (Iyila)
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The War at Home | Adult F/F Romance [COMPLETE]
description:
Sometimes all that's keeping you from having everything you want is losing everything you have.

***

The year is 1946. The place is Bristol, England, UK.

Captain Jordana Freemantle served with distinction in World War II as an ambulance driver and battlefield medic, but now she's home again with her husband and two young children, she doesn't know what to do with herself. Meeting vivacious civilian surgeon Romana Gentry reminds Jordie of the other secret she left on the field of battle--Jordie is a lesbian and she doesn't know how much longer she can stand to deny it.

The affair that ensues will shatter Jordie's life, but it also just might save it.

  © 2020-present Idris Grey

description:
There was a kingdom, A kingdom full of life.   But that was before. Fatenturia, a kingdom once filled with hope, peace, and love, is now destroyed by Greanger, a kingdom that did not want peace anymore, but power.  Alleyal, a friend of Fatenturia, turned their backs and joined Greanger. Because of the war, many retreated and joined the enemy for a sure victory.  Fatenturia was destroyed, but hope can never be destroyed.  Overtaken.. Defeated.. Broken.. But hope was still among them.  Fatenturia will fight back.  The good will stand for right.  Fatenturia's kingdom is taken, but the people's spirit of hope and peace is still there.  They will come back..soon.

title: The Physicians Lady
description:
Lady Aria Alford, daughter of the Duke of Wellington has always dreamed of finding love. However, her occasional clumsiness and unspoken demeanor cause her to be a less than desirable woman of society as she is often reminded. Her love of reading and adventurous spirit may lead her down a path she did not expect and allow her to meet someone with the potential to make her dream a reality. 

Lord Nicholas Sterling, aspiring physician and son of the Earl of Suffolk dreams of starting his own practice after returning back home from studying and travelling abroad. Hardships paint the way for Nicholas as well as unexpected blessings in accomplishing his goal. Something he was not prepared for was meeting a beautiful woman with sparkling blue eyes who would take him on a journey he could not have conjured on his own. 

Unforeseen circumstances, mystery, murder? Much awaits Aria and Nicholas as their paths cross. Both looking to accomplish their dreams, but just what will it take to reach them?

title: Lost Without You
description:
Book Two of Lost in the Castle Trilogy 
(Book Three is on the WATTYS 2022 SHORTLIST)

THE AMBY AWARDS 2022 WINNER (Best Series)

Samara, separated from Vlad by an unfortunate turn of events, is sent back to her century for her own good and safety. 

Not being able to face the prospect of living the rest of her life without the only man she loves, she refuses to lose hope of going back to him.

But is going back even possible? 

Looking for answers to her endless questions, she discovers that not even in present-day London all the people are what they seem to be at first sight...

Venturing deeper in secrets and mysteries, which suddenly seem to spring at her from London's every shadowy corner, she meets a man who she thought was long dead and the secret society surrounding him. 

Will Samara find her way back to Vlad with the stranger's help? Does he know things that might help her?

Will she find a way to stay with Vlad this time, forever?

The journey to her happiness  won't be short, easy, or simple. 

Samara will have to make a difficult choice. If she wants to try to gain back the man she loves, she will have to risk all that she has. 

Will she be able to leave one of her most precious beings behind to recover the other? 

Cover: @WakeWriteWrath

The princess of Padmadurg was prophesied to be blessed and bring prosperity. However, throughout Tarini's life of eighteen years, all she had been feeling was cursed,  unwanted, underestimated to be precise.

 Tarini tries her best to pursue her but one dream to become a worthy empress even after being given away to an enemy kingdom as a war compensation, but at what cost?

 This is her journey from a mere war compensation to the regal empress of Aaranya.

title: Dragon Blood [Alonia's Queenslayer #2]
description:
(Read Book 1: Blood Rider first! This is the second book of the series.)
The war with the Queen of Linos is over, and Eli is content in the land of elves, believing that her life can finally make some sense. 
But after the kings of both lands announce that Eli and some of the others will be travelling to the continent, the land beyond the sea about which the Alonians know very little, her calm and peaceful life is shaken to its core, especially after meeting an annoying human princess who would be accompanying them to the continent.
Their goal is to be good guests and find out whether the kingdoms on the continent are a threat.
But instead, she uncovers hidden secrets about her hosts, herself, and Rileigh, and Eli is forced to put her feelings aside again to navigate an unfamiliar land while getting rid of a new threat.

title: The Mirror
description:
Keller is back in town and has his sights set on ancient Egyptian artifacts. The hunt for Adler begins in earnest. Fluff: Valentine's Day, sci-fi convention. February - March 2005.  Follows The Dreamer in the Caffrey Conversation series.

My White Collar stories are set in the Caffrey Conversation universe created by Penna Nomen. In that world, Neal Caffrey--expert forger, thief, and con artist--is recruited by Special Agent Peter Burke to work for him at the FBI. Neal begins his new life in December 2003 when he is twenty-three years old. Unlike the TV series, Neal was never convicted of a crime and didn't serve time in prison. 

Penna Nomen is the creator and chief muse of the series. She is also my writing partner.  The complete list of Caffrey Conversation stories is on our blog, Penna Nomen & Silbrith Conversation. 
 
This story is for fun.  I don't own the rights to the White Collar TV series.

authorBio:
I've been writing since elementary school, I haven't stopped since, and I don't think I ever will... at least not any time soon. I write about anything that interests me. I also love to draw and I have a few sites where I showcase my art.

And another thing: I don't write for other people; I write for me. I write whatever I want whenever I want at my own pace. And sometimes it takes time to update certain things because I'm caught up with something else. If you like my stories, then that's great. But if you can't respect my wishes, then I don't know. I also admire lots of other different writers and authors, and their own stories always inspire me to create my own.

title: Apollo
description:
WITH EVERY SUNSET
COMES A NEW SUNRISE.

[sequel to Artemis]

Lord Emmett Portsmouth ruined the lives of the two people he cared most for, and who cared most for him. He did not believe in marriage before; now he does not believe that he deserves to be married to a woman he loves. After all, his sister will spend her life trapped in a loveless marriage with the kingdom's crown prince - and he blames no one but himself for it.

Can one doe-eyed manifestation of everything he detests change everything for him?

authorBio:
Hello!

I go by the pen name Leanne and I like writing about love. The real kind - the kind not just meant for significant others but also for siblings and for self. Regardless of what some people will say about romance novels and their writers, I love what I do. In fact, I'm pretty much addicted to writing.

A few facts about me.

I would love to be published sometime in the near future.

I love cats and dogs both! I'm currently a dog owner, though.

I found myself identifying as a feminist a few years ago because I believe in equality. I have stayed an ardent feminist since then because I believe in love.

Like many of you on Wattpad, I'm a student with a very heavy workload so I can't promise scheduled updates etc. But I'll do my best, promise.

So enjoy and let me know what you think about my work. My only request is that you be kind about it.

Love,
Leanne

Your duty is to your people, not your heart, and if marrying an obsessive and cruel king is the only way to protect the kingdom, then you must be his betrothed.

You must do as he says. You must keep your mouth shut. You must do whatever you can to keep your people safe, even if it means sacrificing what little freedom you have.

title: The Tragedy of Macbeth
description:
"A brave Scottish general named Macbeth receives a prophecy from a trio of witches that one day he will become King of Scotland. Consumed by ambition and spurred to action by his wife, Macbeth murders King Duncan and takes the Scottish throne for himself. He is then wracked with guilt and paranoia. Forced to commit more and more murders to protect himself from enmity and suspicion, he soon becomes a tyrannical ruler. The bloodbath and consequent civil war swiftly take Macbeth and Lady Macbeth into the realms of madness and death." -Wikipedia description

More readable version of "The Tragedy of Macbeth" from the Gutenberg library.
Domaine public
authorBio:
I'm currently part of the @RP_Clan and @RP_Warriors joint account where we do cool stuff. Check it out!





Still reading? Well I hope you are ready for the barrage of information you probably won't even remember by the time you've finished reading. Here it goes:

Italy is my favorite country; in fact, I plan to spend two weeks there next year.
If you like tuna and tomato sauce- try combining the two. It's really not as bad as it sounds.
If Purple People Eaters are real... where do they find purple people to eat?
Wednesday is hump day, but has anyone asked the camel if he's happy about it?
Christmas is coming.
A song can make or ruin a person's day if they let it get to them.
Lets all be unique together until we realise we are all the same.
Abstraction is often one floor above you.
I think I will buy a red car, or I will lease a blue one.
The waves are crashing on the shore; it is a lovely sight.
What was the person thinking when they discovered cow's milk was fine for human consumption... and why did they do it in the first place!?
Last Friday in three week's time I saw a spotted striped blue worm shake hands with a legless lizard.
Don't step on the broken glass.
A glittering gem is not enough.
I would have gotten the promotion, but I wasn't there to receive it.
My Mum tries to be cool by saying that she likes all the same things that I do.
When I was little I had a car door slammed shut on my hand. My hand still remembers it quite vividly.
The old apple revels in its authority.
I'd rather be a bird than a fish.
I want to buy a onesie... but know it won't suit me.
A purple pig and a green donkey flew a kite in the middle of the night and ended up sunburnt. How?
Writing a list of random sentences is harder than I initially thought it would be, except that I'm not writing them... :3

title: This Time, I'll Find My Own Happiness [HIATUS]
description:
Betrayed by the one she loved, but given a second chance, would she take a different path this time?

Viona Beslire, a Duke's only daughter, never wanted anything more than to claim Klein Hendlich's love. After being best of friends for more than a decade, she did her best to be the woman of his dreams, but it only took one day afternoon to ruin all she had when Klein met Lady Cornelia, a baron's daughter. Klein fell in love with her and betrayal started. Viona's family became traitors, Klein's promise faded like ashes, and Viona Beslire got executed from harming Lady Cornelia. 

However, when she opened her eyes, she became a child again, this time, she met different kinds of people, especially the second prince known as the playboy-slash-badboy of the Denrile empire. Having a contract with Vaxius Denrile to find her own happiness, she forged a different path, but what if the path she took was worse than the path she had in her first life especially knowing how her feelings are changing abruptly and Vaxius is the main culprit? And what if the result of her fading away from Klein made him realize he can't live without her, would she still choose to have her own happiness or would she be stuck to the past feelings she had with Klein?

"When you left me, that's when I realized I had loved you all the time."


***
Original Story

I created this story on September 14, 2023, and I decided to publish it on September 21, 2023. I know I'm still beginning to learn the ways of creative writing and I admit that I'm not excellent yet, but I will keep on writing until I manage to capture your interests. Thank you for reading this book and my other stories which I put so much effort into creating. 

On Hiatus

Unrequited Love #7 4/23/24

title: Epic Rebirth: The Mahabharata's Second Chance (Universe1-Generation1) Completed
description:
In a realm where ancient myths intertwine with modern marvels, a new chapter of the Mahabharata unfolds. "Epic Rebirth: The Mahabharata's Second Chance" is a spellbinding tale of destiny, power, and transformation.

When a group of extraordinary individuals from the modern world, including the formidable Karna and the enigmatic Advika, find themselves transported back to the epic era of the Mahabharata, they are thrust into a realm where fate itself is in their hands. Karna, known for his valor and virtue, and Advika, with her mystical powers, discover their intertwined destinies as they strive to alter the course of history for the better

Alongside Karna and Advika, Shivani, the powerful cousin of Shri Krishna, and her twin brother Shivaay, the legendary hero with a secret past, join forces with other remarkable figures Dev, the youngest sibling, and his spirited love interest Ananya, as well as the enigmatic Avantika and her powerful partner Ekans, add depth to the ensemble. The fierce Naintara, Shivani's sister and chief of the kingdom's army, stands as a stalwart protector

As the characters navigate alliances and confront ancient foes, including the reformed Kauravas and the once-villainous Shakuni, they face trials that test their strength and unity. They must not only battle external threats but also grapple with personal revelations and romantic entanglements
The heart of the story is the enduring struggle against the malevolent Manora, an adopted granddaughter of the benevolent Alisa Singhania, the former queen with the power to create and reshape universes. As Alisa watches over them from her celestial realm, the heroes must harness their newfound abilities and forge deeper connections to secure a brighter future

The story weaves together epic battles, romances, and the quest for redemption. In this mesmerizing journey, every choice and action ripples across the fabric of time, shaping the destiny of a world caught between ancient lore and new beginnings
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Daughter of England
description:
Caroline Winther has everything a girl in Victorian England can wish for. A kind, caring family, plenty of money, a respected name, and a loving fiancee. Her life takes a drastic change, however, with the start of the Crimean war.

Carol finds her plans to join Florence Nightingale's team of nurses roadblocked by her loved ones. A military hospital is no place for a girl of Carol's status and position in society. But Carol's family underestimate her, and when threatened she breaks with them and sets sail for Turkey, hardly prepared for what is to greet her when the ship docks.

Does Carol have what it takes to cope with the hardships and prejudice she must face as a female military nurse? And will she be able to regain the respect and love of her family?

Daughter of England is a story of courage and love set against a historical background. Through the eyes of fictional characters you can meet one of history's greatest heroines and embark on a journey with the early pioneers of nursing as we know it today.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Reading is my passion, writing is my love, art is my soul, and Christ is my life.
Stay at home mom who writes in her spare time and hopes to publish one day!

I love history with a passion so most of my novels are Historical Fiction. But I also like to write fantasy and sometimes play around with modern day romance.

To me, there is no greater beauty than the written word and a picture is worth a thousand of them.

Let's make the world a better place, one story at a time.
My favorite writers are C.S. Lewis, Charles Dickens, Alexsander Solzhenistin, and Beatrix Potter :)

title: The Time Keeper
description:
Elias Ashborn is a highly intelligent and studious young man who has always been a dedicated student, pouring all of his time and energy into his academics. However, his single-minded focus on his studies has left him with little experience of the world beyond the pages of his textbooks. One fateful day, after an exhausting study session, Elias is suddenly and inexplicably transported to a strange new world that bears a striking resemblance to 19th-century Europe.

In this new world, Elias discovers that magic is a forbidden and criminal practice, and those who are caught wielding its power are persecuted and hunted down. Despite his initial reluctance to interact with the people he encounters, Elias soon finds himself drawn into the complex and perilous struggle between various powerful factions, each vying for control of the world and its secrets.

As Elias navigates this strange and dangerous new reality, he forms unexpected and unlikely friendships with the people he meets along the way. He uncovers secrets that should've stayed hidden, and he encounters great powers that only some dream of seeing. Through his experiences and struggles, what new things will he learn about himself and this brand-new world?

title: The Uncommon Villainess
description:
I was being reincarnated into a realm I had no knowledge of, and on top of that, I was a villain in that universe. And I'm not your typical villainess because I don't fit into that category. I'm not as attractive or as slender as a typical villain. I'm the polar opposite. But who knows? I'm going to live my life my way whatever.

title: Fearless Warrior: Isaacson Trilogy Book Two
description:
*Book 2 in the Isaacson Trilogy, "Fearless Warrior" picks up where book 1, "Reluctant Berserker" left off.*

If only life had background music. Maybe then, Esmund Isaacson, berserker and US Marshal, would have known it would be wise to avoid Elsie Boynton. She appeared to be an ordinary and boring woman with a desperate request to rescue her friend. But what was supposed to be a simple rescue mission became precisely the opposite. Now, a woman Esmund would never have spared a second glance at has ensnared his heart while her secrets threaten to destroy everyone he loves.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Born the 2nd oldest of 6 children, she grew up often escaping to her bedroom to read, draw, and write. Somehow, she managed to graduate high school and even continued her education by being granted a Theatre scholarship and earned her degree in pretending to be someone else. After graduating, she served a mission for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints in Toronto, Canada.
Upon returning to the U.S., she earned her Cosmetology License so she could run with scissors and not get yelled at. To really finish the deal, she became a certified Media Makeup Artist.
In 2006 she married her husband, who she met while they both worked in a magical far-off land the locals call 'The Home Depot.' Now on the search for the ever-elusive Sasquatch, they live in the Pacific Northwest, where her husband is from. When she's not writing stories or speaking fluently in movie quotes, she enjoys drawing, painting, and spending time with her handsome husband and their dog. You can like and follow her on:

title: Liberty Calling
description:
As the war for America's freedom stretches on, Emmeline Reed is sure that she knows exactly what she stands for. Her brothers fight in the British Royal Army. Her father is a British Major. In every way, she is the ideal example of what a Loyalist young lady ought to be. But when a soldier encourages her to form her own beliefs, she begins to question all she knows. Now she must decide who she will trust, how she will fight for what she believes in, and what she is willing to sacrifice.

The last thing you remembered was being someone stabbing you to death. So... why did you return to the time before all of this had happened? Were you given another chance? Or were you forced to endure the pain of being heartbroken and then dying because fate was not kind to you?

title: The Forbidden Duke
description:
Irresistible Attraction...
Lady Seraphina Ashford is promised to the ruthless Lord Camden, a man who seeks to control her every move. But when she meets the dangerously handsome Duke of Ravenhall, Alexander Lennox, her life is forever changed. His touch awakens a fire in her, and his commanding presence makes her crave the forbidden. With every stolen glance, every heated brush of skin, Seraphina's resistance crumbles, and all she can think about is giving in to his wicked desires.

Forbidden Desire...
Alexander Lennox has one goal-destroy Lord Camden and reclaim his family's honor. But his carefully laid plans are threatened the moment he sets eyes on Seraphina. Her beauty tempts him, her strength captivates him, and her innocence ignites a dark hunger within him. He knows he should keep his distance, but the more he tries to resist, the deeper he falls into a web of desire that could ruin them both. Caught between duty and passion, Seraphina and Alexander must decide how far they're willing to go for love-and how much they'll risk for a single night of forbidden ecstasy.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: ✨ Regency Romance Author 🔥 Curating my books & passion-filled reads from top authors 📚 Your go-to bookshelf for love, lust & history 💋

title: Her Heart Or Her Kingdom?
description:
I stand there glaring at my husband. My Prince. His brown irises swirl, deeply glaring back at my own. 

"I suggest you listen to me, my princess. I should be in charge of this, it is too dangerous for a woman. I don't want you to get hurt."

I hiss crossing my arms against my heavily embroidered half-sari, "This is my kingdom, just because I married you doesn't mean you automatically become King and rule over everything. This threat is targeting my kingdom and I am its Queen."

I look seriously at him along with my heart pounding about how my people are going to react. I glance back at him looking at his quiet and reserved nature. You've changed a lot from our childhood. 

I have too, I have become refined, royally royal and trying to be as perfect a woman as possible. Still, I'm glad you are my husband. 

He breaks the silence with an icy voice, "Fine, do as you wish. But I will be there every step of the way whether you like it or not. Your. Majesty."

Genre- Romance/Adventure

*contains blood, violence and hopefully adorable romantic moments*

Hope you enjoy!

Lotus7543🙏🏽👑🤗

title: The seeker of Truth
description:
Hello everyone! I had always wanted to write a historical tale based in ancient India, also known as Bharatavarsh. The period in which this story is set is somewhere around the Vedic Era (1500-1000 BCE), which is the period when the Vedas (the oldest sacred texts of Hinduism) were composed. To maintain the authenticity of the story, some words and terminologies will be used from traditional languages. 

Please give your valuable feedback and let me know what you think of this story.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a passionate, driven individual who believes in living life with purpose and authenticity. Professionally, I aim to excel as a dentist, a field that combines my love for precision and my desire to make a meaningful impact on people's lives. My journey is fueled by curiosity, dedication, and a constant drive for self-improvement. 

Beyond my career aspirations, I cherish my personal life deeply. I am family-oriented and value the time I spend with my loved ones. I find joy in simple pleasures like journaling, dancing, and creating memories with those who matter most.  

Spiritually inclined, I draw inspiration from texts like the Bhagavad Gita and find strength in introspection and self-awareness. I believe in balancing ambition with humility, learning from every experience, and embracing life's challenges with resilience. 

To me, every day is an opportunity to grow, inspire, and leave a positive mark on the world. I strive to live authentically, honor my roots, and create a life filled with purpose and love.
